Name: ROORAL
Description:
Current Generations grew up being told success was in big cities. This provoked the biggest migration ever, from rural to urban areas, accelerating inequality, climate change and mental health issues. 

We are reverting this, by demonstrating small villages can be restorative remote work hubs in Europe. How? 

ROORAL is a village-based, impact-oriented rural co-living and co-working space in Southern Spain. Instead of extracting from the local community, ROORAL focuses on fostering connections, collaboration, and learning between the village and remote workers.

Data shows that:
- 83% of participants say stress levels dropped during the experience
- 94% report feeling more creative and inspired
- 97% say they felt less lonely
- 88% increased their interest in spending more time in rural areas

Additionallyt this affluence of remote workers gives villages a new income stream (especially important in low season), more social life and a higher sense of self-esteem. 

If you want to live a sustainable and responsible nomad path this is your place.

More info: https://www.rooral.co/

Name: Vila Aurora Ecoprojecto
Description:
Bem-vindos à Vila Aurora Ecoprojecto

A Vila Aurora Ecoprojecto é um refúgio sustentável no coração da natureza, onde a vida acontece ao ritmo do campo, da partilha e do respeito pelo ambiente. Mais do que um espaço de alojamento, somos um projeto de vida responsável, onde promovemos a sustentabilidade, a hospitalidade autêntica e o sentido de comunidade.

Situada em Gomide, Vila Verde, a Vila Aurora é um espaço acolhedor e colaborativo, com várias casas que criam um ambiente harmonioso para quem procura um estilo de vida mais simples e conectado à terra.

Aqui, vivemos a tradição da cozinha caseira, valorizamos os produtos locais e acreditamos no poder da hospitalidade para criar laços genuínos. O nosso propósito é inspirar um modo de vida mais consciente, onde o bem-estar e o respeito pelo planeta caminham lado a lado.

 Gomide, Vila Verde
 vilaauroraecoproject@gmail.com

 Junta-te a nós nesta jornada sustentável! 


Wellcome to Vila Aurora Ecoprojecto

Vila Aurora Ecoprojecto is a sustainable retreat in the heart of nature, where life follows the rhythm of the land, community, and environmental responsibility. More than just a place to stay, it is a mindful living project that promotes sustainability, authentic hospitality, and a sense of belonging.

Located in Gomide, Vila Verde, Vila Aurora is a welcoming and collaborative space, with multiple homes that create a harmonious environment for those seeking a simpler, more connected way of life.

Here, we embrace home cooking traditions, value local ingredients, and believe in the power of hospitality to foster genuine connections. Our mission is to inspire a more conscious lifestyle, where well-being and respect for the planet go hand in hand.

 Gomide, Vila Verde

 Join us on this sustainable journey!

Name: SUL AMERICAN ALOJAMENTOS
Description:
A Sul American Alojamentos é especialista em soluções completas de hospedagem corporativa para equipes em obras, com foco no conforto, segurança e bem-estar dos trabalhadores. Mais do que infraestrutura, entregamos gestão operacional eficiente, com foco na qualidade dos serviços, controle de custos e suporte contínuo ao cliente. Oferecemos uma estrutura completa que inclui alojamento, alimentação e transporte, tudo dentro das normas legais e regulamentações vigentes.

Assumimos a responsabilidade pela implementação e operação dos alojamentos com o compromisso de minimizar impactos socioambientais e socioculturais, respeitando as particularidades de cada projeto e região.

Com a Sul American, sua empresa pode se concentrar 100% na execução da obra, enquanto nós cuidamos de quem faz tudo acontecer.

Oferecemos soluções completas para alojamento, incluindo:

	•	Estrutura e mobiliário
Alojamentos equipados com camas, armários, utensílios e ambientação adequada.
	•	Vigilância, portaria e administração
Gestão profissional e controle de acesso para segurança e organização.
	•	Limpeza, lavanderia e zeladoria
Serviços de manutenção, limpeza e lavanderia para garantir bem-estar contínuo.
	•	Centros de vivência
Ambientes temporários com refeitório, área de lazer, salas de descanso e convivência.
	•	Repúblicas residenciais
Imóveis locados e adaptados para hospedar equipes com conforto e privacidade.
	•	Hotelaria corporativa
Sistema completo de gestão de hospedagem, com check-in e check-out controlados, registro individualizado de ocupação por cama e por quarto, garantindo rastreabilidade, organização e maior controle da movimentação dos colaboradores.

Name: Le Mas les Eydins
Description:
Niché au coeur du village typique de Bonnieux en Provence, au coeur du Luberon, le Mas les Eydins, projet imaginé par Alexandra et Christophe Bacquié, propose une expérience inédite à ses convives. 
Entre chambres et cottages, ceux-ci sont invités au repos et à la découverte d'une nature environnante unique. La Table des Amis, auréolée au printemps 2024 de deux étoiles au Guide Michelin, est synonyme de créativité et de liberté pour Christophe Bacquié, qui réalise ici son rêve de proposer une expérience culinaire intimiste et conviviale autour du goût et des saveurs. Le produit est mis en lumière, selon les choix et les préférences gustatives du Chef, son émotion, son imagination. Plus que jamais, en cuisine, le Chef joue sa partition avec le coeur : la maîtrise technique est au service de la créativité et de la sublimation des produits.

Au Mas les Eydins, Ici, la Provence s’observe, s’hume, se caresse,
s’entend et se goûte, au rythme des envies des convives.

Name: Roomzy
Description:
Roomzy: Your Doorway to Hassle-Free Housing

Tired of the housing struggle? Worried about navigating an unfamiliar city? 
We at Roomzy, a student-founded startup from SGSITS, Indore, understand your challenges. That's why we created a platform to revolutionize the housing experience for students and professionals.

Beyond Brokers, Beyond Chaos:
The traditional housing market can be daunting, with widespread unorganized practices, hidden fees, and exorbitant broker charges. Roomzy cuts through the clutter, connecting property owners directly with potential tenants.

Unleash the Search Power:
Finding the perfect place shouldn't be a chore.
Roomzy boasts a comprehensive listing platform with advanced filtering options. Narrow down your search by location, budget, and more, ensuring you discover the abode that caters your every need.

Simplicity at Your Fingertips:
Our user-friendly interface makes searching and connecting a breeze. No more wading through complex menus or puzzling interfaces. With Roomzy, finding your next home is as easy as swiping through your favorite app.

Transparency You Can Trust:
Say goodbye to surprise fees and hidden costs! 
Roomzy takes pride in its transparent pricing, so you know exactly what you're paying upfront. Forget your haggling and headaches, just honest pricing you can rely on.

More Than Just Housing, It's a Community:
We believe housing is more than just four walls. Roomzy aims to foster a community of responsible tenants and supportive property owners, creating a positive and secure living environment for everyone.

Start Your Journey Today:
Roomzy is currently making waves in Indore and Bhopal, and we're excited to expand to new horizons soon. Whether you're a student seeking a comfortable haven or a young professional starting a new chapter, Roomzy is here to make your housing journey smooth and stress-free.

For collaboration or any other queries, please contact us at:

Name: L'arbre aux étoiles
Description:
L’Arbre aux Étoiles est un écolieu situé en Normandie, à 10 min de Honfleur. Nous accueillons et organisons des séminaires, retraites et formations dédiés au bien-être, à la transition et à l’innovation sociale.

 Notre mission : accompagner les entreprises, collectifs et professionnels dans leurs dynamiques de transformation, en reconnectant l’humain à la nature et à lui-même.

 Nous proposons un cadre propice à :
- la gestion du changement
- la cohésion d’équipe et l’intelligence collective
- le bien-être au travail
- la découverte de pratiques inspirantes : gouvernance partagée, permaculture, yoga, méditation, cuisine vivante, facilitation, etc.

 Le lieu dispose d’espaces de travail inspirants et d’une capacité d’hébergement sur place jusqu’à 35 personnes, favorisant les immersions sur plusieurs jours dans un environnement naturel ressourçant.

 L’Arbre aux Étoiles remet la nature et l’humain au cœur des projets. Pensé comme un trait d’union entre un monde ancré (l’arbre) et un monde inspiré (les étoiles), il invite à explorer l’équilibre entre action concrète et élévation intérieure.

 Contactez-nous pour organiser votre prochain événement ou séminaire.

Name: Younic Home
Description:
“Younic Home” was founded in May 2015 in Dhanmondi Area. Our branches are in Dhanmondi, Ashulia , Uttara, Mirpur. We provide residential facilities to students and working individuals, who come across Dhaka for studying or doing jobs. We provide a service of room to stay, breakfast, lunch, evening tea and snacks, and dinner in case of hunger, small library to study, common room for chat, sports room, study room, praying room etc. We provide them accommodation for one, two or more days, or for months or years as per requirement of individuals. Basically, we have female hostels. But, we are starting male hostel recently.  Because, we are getting high response from boys. 

We the “Younic Home” aims to provide students the best amenities in terms of residence, convenient location, mouth watering food (3 time meal), well furnished room, a laundry, TV lodge, a trendy Sports room with all the facilities provided you to play the safe and healthy games in a friendly atmosphere and a cool discussion room for study purpose but despite offering all these bundles of facilities we charge you (the students) a very nominal amount of  6000-15,000 tk each.

Younic Home is Here to Help Bachelors/ Working Person for accommodation. 

Our company's core product is to provide cheap hostel residency especially for bachelor male and female who have problems to live alone in strange places.

 A lot of security issues concerns related to staying alone far from home, especially for girls and working women who come across their city and stay in hotels to conduct business activities in city which are more expensive and having less security concerns, and also our religion doesn’t allow our females to live alone in hotels which is also a big issue for females autonomy, and above all hotels major problem is availability of less social gathering .

 By analyzing the need of the market, we decided to provide hostels with cheaper rates for the time of one night, two nights, one month or years.

Name: Caddis Shack
Description:
Are you looking for the perfect riverside cabin getaway or simply a place to find some solitude? 

The Caddis Shack is a hidden gem nestled along the picturesque Toccoa River near the towns of McCaysville and Blue Ridge, GA.

This rustic yet charming cabin is a paradise for nature enthusiasts and fly fishing aficionados. 

Property Highlights:

Quaint Cottage Blend Cabin: Experience the rustic ambiance of a classic cottage cabin, perfectly blended with modern amenities. The Caddis Shack boasts a warm and inviting atmosphere that will make you feel right at home.

Large Living Room and Scenic Views: The spacious living room is ideal for unwinding after a day of fishing adventures. Throw open the French doors and step onto the expansive screened-in porch to take in breathtaking views of the Toccoa River.

Large Deck: Sit on the deck and grill out or entertain your group on the Caddis Shack's large wrap around deck. 

Fire Pit and River Deck: Enjoy the river up close on the river deck or build a fire in our spacious fire pit. There is also an opportunity to grill on the firepit as well.  The choice is yours!

Wade Fishing: The Caddis Shack is located along one of the premier stretches of the Toccoa for wade fishing! Guests will have full access the river directly from the river lot with an extensive sections of shoals that are easily waded. Also ask us about our guided wade trips as well should you wish to have one of our expert guides show you the ropes! 

Guided Fly Fishing: For those looking for a guided fly fishing drift boat/float trip or fly fishing instruction we offer a variety of options for anglers of all abilities. Inquire today to discuss options for your group! 

We look forward to having you as one of our guests soon!

Name: Call Me Mami Hostal
Description:
Call me Mami Hostal is the first and unique hostal offer in a Colombian favela ! 

Call me Mami Hostal is empowering Colombian stay-at-home mothers in precarious situations to earn a steady income from home by hosting travelers.

For the Mami, it is the opportunity to value their sense of hospitality by ensuring a decent and steady income from their home, while combining their work and childcare.

For the travelers, it is a life experience, with your second mother, in an authentic and difficult-to-access but peaceful hood, where you are received like at home and contribute to the empowerment of an entired family

ps : colombia is much more than Pablo, Íngrid, cocaine and FARC

Name: Alessandro Palace
Description:
Alessandro Palace & Bar – Your Perfect Base in the Heart of Rome!

Welcome to Alessandro Palace & Bar, one of Rome's most beloved hostels, offering a unique combination of convenience, comfort, and community. Located just a short 5-minute walk from Termini Station, our hostel provides unparalleled access to Rome's main transport hub, making it incredibly easy to reach famous landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Plus, with the airport shuttles departing from Termini, you’ll have a hassle-free journey to and from the city.

At Alessandro Palace, we believe in creating an environment where travelers can feel at home while experiencing the vibrant energy of Rome. Our hostel features a lively pub where guests can relax with a drink, make new friends, and join in on fun events like karaoke nights and pub crawls. It’s the perfect place to share travel stories and meet fellow adventurers from around the world.

For those who enjoy cooking their own meals, our fully equipped guest kitchen is available, providing you with everything you need to prepare a feast after a day of exploring the city. We also offer clean, comfortable dorms and private rooms, ensuring a pleasant stay for young travelers.

Whether you're here for a short trip or an extended adventure, Alessandro Palace & Bar is the ideal spot to base yourself while discovering the wonders of the Eternal City. Our friendly staff is always on hand to offer tips on local attractions, transportation, and the best hidden gems Rome has to offer.

At Alessandro Palace, you're not just booking a bed – you're becoming part of a global community of travelers. Come stay with us and make memories that will last a lifetime!

Het doel van de vereniging is de belangenbehartiging van
Bed & Breakfast, Vakantieverhuur en sinds huizenruil gelijk is gesteld aan vakantieverhuur dus ook Huizenruil. Ze levert een bijdrage aan de gemeentelijke visieontwikkeling op B&B en vakantieverhuur, wil de beeldvorming daarover positief beïnvloeden en de leden ondersteunen in procedures met overheden of corporaties. Overlast en illegaliteit moeten worden bestreden, maar overbodige en zwaar belastende regelgeving moet worden voorkomen. B&B en vakantieverhuur dragen bij aan spreiding van toerisme en een vriendelijke ontvangst. Amsterdam op zijn mooist. Zo vaart heel Amsterdam wel bij het toerisme.

Name: Doongri House, Jaipur
Description:
Doongri House is nested in the UNESCO’s World Heritage Site in Jaipur.  Located just off the main road of Indira bazar, framed pink walled city bazar of Jaipur. 

The minimalist yet luxurious homestay is tucked beautifully on the 3rd floor of the complex (lift & stairs both accessible) which overheads all the city buzz and surrounded by textile houses, jewellery markets and a marketplace bursting with colours. 

Doongri house comprises of seven spacious bedrooms, each room is curated beautifully to give you an amalgamation of modern yet Rajasthani touch, to create an atmosphere of relaxed grandeur. 

All the rooms are newly formed and designed capaciously for a pleasant stay. 
Each bedroom is airy & well-lit and well equipped with all the necessary amenities such as—
double king size bed (size of bed) with comfortable 8”inch mattress, air conditioner, hot and cold running water, electric kettle for
 tea & coffee. 
Each room comes with an en-suite changing room which then channels into the bathroom. 

The intimate premises then opens into an shaded corridor that is joined to the  courtyard which overlooks the magnificent Parkota (walled city of Jaipur) that is adjoined to the Ajmeri Gate on the left and the Singh Pol on the right, all clearly visible from the outdoor seating space. 

On the left side of the opening area lie our two kitchens for the guests personal use which make their long stays even more homely which opens into the dining hall. 

The stairs from inside of the lobby then lead to the terrace right upstairs, which has an admirable view of the grand Nahargarh that has a divergent beauty after it glows up in the evening, the beautiful temple of Garh Ganesh, Ishwari Lat (Sargasuli) and the glorious Moti Doongri are also visible on the other side. 


Many heritage sites from our home stay are within a radius of 2 km, whereby making it convenient for an everyday stroll, even the e-rickshaws, autos and cabs are easily accessible.

Name: Ty Monde
Description:
Offrez-vous un séjour dans une de nos cinq chambres d'hôtes ou privatisez le lieu pour des retrouvailles en famille ou entres amis.
Nous sommes situés en centre Bretagne, au carrefour des trois régions Morbihan, Côtes-d'Armor et Finistère avec une identité finistérienne forte et la possibilité de rayonner jusqu'à la mer à moins d'une heure de route.
Nous proposons l'accueil à la nuitée et plus, le petit-déjeuner inclus et gourmand, la possibilité de dîner sur place avec nos assiettes gourmandes à partager, d'emporter un pique-nique, ou de cuisiner avec une cuisine équipée à votre disposition.
Pour profiter pleinement du séjour , relaxez-vous dans la piscine, réservez un massage bien-être sur place, détendez-vous dans le jardin.
Avec des chambres rénovées confortables et aménagées pour séjourner, des lieux de vie spacieux, nos espaces et notre offre conviennent aussi bien à une famille, qu'à un voyageur d'affaires et qu'à un couple.
Nous nous inscrivons dans une démarche de développement durable en ciblant nos actions sur l'économie des énergies et matières premières, la gestion et limitation des déchets, le partenariat avec acteurs et producteurs locaux. Nous développons actuellement une démarche d'engagement auprès de labels tels que Accueil Vélo ou la Clef Verte afin de vous offrir un séjour qualitatif.
Vous pouvez nous suivre sur Instagram et Facebook, le site internet est en cours de création pour une ouverture prochaine!

Name: EMMA v Jizerkách
Description:
Apartmány EMMA, Váš domov v horách.

Nabízíme dva moderní apartmány pro krátkodobý i dlouhodobý pronájem v srdci Jizerských hor.

Jsme čtyřčlenná rodina, která chvilku neposedí, miluje cestování do dalekých krajů i do bližších luhů a hájů. A právě při našich toulkách českou kotlinou jsme si zamilovali Jizerky. Konkrétně Hrabětice nám učarovaly krásnou přírodou a nespočtem úžasných míst k poznávání. Nemohli jsme zkrátka jinak, než si tu postavit druhý domov, který velmi rádi sdílíme se stejnými nadšenci jako jste třeba právě vy.

Abyste se u nás cítili jako doma, přenesli jsme do apartmánů veškeré zkušenosti z našich početných cest. Základními pilíři jsou pro nás rodinná pohoda, klid, přátelská a zároveň profesionální komunikace, a v neposlední řadě je to i důraz na kvalitu vybavení. Ne nadarmo jsme apartmány pojmenovali po našich dětech, na rodině a její pohodě nám prostě záleží. Důkaz místo slibů: EMMA = EMílie & MAtyáš.

A proč vyrazit zrovna do Jizerek? To je snadné, jsou to hory, co nabízí mnoho skvělých aktivit během celého roku! Přijeďte brázdit svahy na lyžích, prozkoumat běžkařské tratě, projet všechny cyklostezky a dobýt turistické cíle. Je tu prostě spousta vyžití pro malé i velké, a k tomu i bezvadná gastronomie.

Tak co, najdete u nás druhý domov v horách i vy?

Chcete-li se s námi, s našimi apartmány a jejich okolím seznámit lépe, neváhejte sledovat náš instagramový profil https://www.instagram.com/emmavjizerkach/. Najdete tam i spoustu tipů, co po příjezdu k nám podniknout.
Location: Janov nad Nisou - Hrabětice , Janov nad Nisou - Hrabětice

Name: COCOSTAY Kochi
Description:
COCOSTAY is a modern inclusive Co-Living and hostel space designed for today’s travellers, students, and working professionals. Located in the heart of Kochi, COCOSTAY blends comfort, community, and affordability to create a stay that feels less like accommodation and more like an experience.

We believe travel is more meaningful when it connects people. That’s why COCOSTAY is built around shared experiences and social living. Guests can choose from a variety of stay options, including 4-bed and 6-bed mixed dorms, dedicated female dorms, and private rooms, each designed to offer comfort, cleanliness, and a modern, relaxed feel.

Our property features an air-conditioned lounge for work or relaxation, an in-house café serving fresh bites, a rooftop space for social gatherings, and games and entertainment options to encourage interaction among travellers. Whether you’re a backpacker touring Kerala, a digital nomad working remotely, or a student seeking short-term accommodation, COCOSTAY provides a safe, vibrant environment that suits every lifestyle.

What sets COCOSTAY apart is our focus on smart living-high quality rooms, thoughtful design, seamless check-ins, and a welcoming community vibe. We aim to redefine budget stays by offering more than just a bed. With our mixed dorms and community areas, we bring together people from different backgrounds, creating friendships and memories that last beyond their stay.

COCOSTAY is continuing to grow its vision by introducing community events, rooftop meetups, and expanding facilities that enhance the guest experience. Our long-term goal is to build a chain of smart co-living spaces that offer comfort, community, and connection across multiple cities.

Whether you're here for a night, a week, or an extended stay, COCOSTAY welcomes you to a space where comfort meets community, and where every stay becomes a story worth sharing.

Stay Different, Stay Coco

Name: Bed and Breakfast 1691
Description:
Welkom bij Bed & Breakfast 1691, mijn huis aan Strabeek 5 in Valkenburg. De naam verwijst naar het bouwjaar van het pand: 1691. Dit huis ademt al meer dan drie eeuwen geschiedenis en vormt het hart van mijn B&B.

Ik ben trots dat ik dit bijzondere stukje erfgoed mag bewaren en delen. Het gebouw is een prachtig voorbeeld van de Limburgse bouwtraditie, met mergelsteen en authentieke details die door de eeuwen heen bewaard zijn gebleven. Generaties lang werd dit huis bewoond, en nu mag ik gasten ontvangen die de sfeer en de historie zelf kunnen beleven.

Toen ik besloot om er een Bed & Breakfast van te maken, wilde ik de historie centraal stellen. Daarom koos ik ervoor om de B&B naar het jaartal van het huis te vernoemen. Bij de renovatie heb ik bewust oude elementen behouden en gecombineerd met modern comfort. Zo kun je bij mij genieten van de charme van de 17e eeuw, zonder in te leveren op luxe en gemak.

Of je nu Valkenburg komt ontdekken, de grotten en kastelen wilt bezoeken, de natuur van Zuid-Limburg in wilt trekken of gewoon even helemaal tot rust wilt komen: in B&B 1691 verblijf je in een stukje levende historie dat ik met veel liefde met je deel.

Name: Lovill House Inn
Description:
Welcome to the Lovill House Inn, a historic treasure in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains, near the Parkway, Appalachian State University, and downtown Boone. Built in 1875, this storied home was where the state charter for Appalachian State University was drafted in 1903, and it provided housing to some of the university’s first students.

 

Now a luxury bed and breakfast, the inn has been beautifully renovated, offering six elegant suites, a two-bedroom cabin, a historic barn and 3 acres of meticulously maintained gardens for unique events and intimate weddings.

 

Enjoy our organic breakfast and modern amenities, including covered parking under a solar canopy that powers the entire property—even during outages. Situated on 11 private acres, complete with hiking trails, a waterfall, and a mountain stream, the Lovill House Inn offers the perfect blend of mountain tranquility and in-town convenience. Discover the perfect mix of history, luxury, and sustainability at the Lovill House Inn—your home in the Blue Ridge Mountains.

Name: Ons dorpje Overeind
Description:
Welkom, wat leuk dat je ons gevonden hebt! Op zo’n 20 minuten rijden van Utrecht hebben wij met een groep bewoners onze droom om een sociaal, ecologisch en duurzaam woonproject gerealiseerd. Rondom een prachtige monumentale boerderij in Schalkwijk delen wij het erf met zeven huishoudens. Verschillend samengesteld, maar met dezelfde missie. Het is ons doel om goed voor elkaar, toekomstige generaties en de aarde te zorgen.

Een ecodorp voor de toekomst
Ons Dorpje Overeind is een plek waar we samen leren, ontdekken, wonen, leven, lachen, groeien, elkaar helpen en inspireren. Een open en toegankelijke plek waar iedereen welkom is. We zijn sociaal betrokken, verbouwen ecologisch met oog voor de natuur en focussen in alles op duurzaamheid. 
De vraag die we altijd centraal stellen is: ‘Welke impact maken wij met ons ecodorpje?’ 

In 2026 bestaat de monumentale boerderij 100 jaar. Ons doel is dat Ons Dorpje Overeind over 100 jaar nog net zo mooi en duurzaam overeind staat als dat we het nu met zorg voor de natuur en elkaar opbouwen.

Kom jij bij ons op visite?

The facility is about 03 Kilometers from Kibale National Park's Official visitor area. (The park is one of the most popular destinations for chimpanzee tracking in the world)
We are a stones throw from Bigodi Wetland Sanctuary, another popular tourism site in the area that boasts of 8 primate species and over 100 bird species. Therefore, when you stay with us, you have high chances of seeing some of these species and other wildlife.
Kibale Eco-Home is very accessible from the Fort Portal-Kamwenge road , and is in a quiet environment.
The property doubles as a home for Bruce and family,  Bruce and his wife Samantha are passionate about Eco-tourism and conservation. 
They are both conservationists, working with local communities around Kibale National Park, and are happy to share their experience with guests who stay.

Name: Aqua Terra Silva
Description:
Aqua Terra Silva est un éco-lieu en devenir en Sud-Ardèche, qui comprend un ensemble de 4 grands gîtes, des terrasses cultivées de plantes aromatiques et médicinales, un potager agroécologique, quelques ruches, des espaces boisés et un cours d’eau transformé en cascade lors des pluies. Il peut accueillir des stages et séminaires, et proposera des ateliers pédagogiques autour des plantes, de l’agroécologie et du zéro déchet. 
En rénovant une bâtisse traditionnelle ardéchoise du 17ème siècle avec des techniques écologiques, nous voulons offrir à nos hôtes un lieu d'accueil où se reconnecter aux cycles du vivant. Le potager pédagogique et les terrasses aromatiques leur permettront de découvrir les principes de la permaculture, de l'agroécologie et de l'alimentation durable. 
Le compostage des déchets organiques sur site sera également un moyen de sensibilisation à la prévention et valorisation des déchets. A travers l'aménagement du terrain, du système de pytho-épuration et des équipements des gites, nous souhaitons enfin mettre en évidence l'importance de la ressource en eau, comment l'économiser, la valoriser et la recycler.

Name: L'Amirauté sur Baïse-Chambres d'hôtes et gîte
Description:
Midden in het glooiende landschap van de Gers, in het charmante dorpje Saint-Jean-Poutge, ligt l’Amirauté sur Baïse – een idyllische chambre d’hôtes en gîte waar rust, natuur en gastvrijheid samenkomen. Met trots en enthousiasme stellen wij ons aan u voor: Ibo Vroom en Marlies van Heymbeeck zijn recent de nieuwe eigenaren van dit betoverende plekje in Zuidwest-Frankrijk.

Na jarenlang te hebben gedroomd van een leven dichter bij de natuur, besloten wij onze koers te verleggen en onze passie voor het goede leven, gastvrijheid en authentieke ervaringen om te zetten in een nieuw avontuur. Met open armen nemen wij het stokje over van de vorige eigenaren, met behoud van alles wat deze plek zo bijzonder maakt – én met frisse energie en nieuwe ideeën.

Of u nu op zoek bent naar een ontspannen verblijf in een sfeervolle kamer, een langere vakantie in onze comfortabele gîte, of simpelweg wilt genieten van het prachtige landschap, de lokale cultuur en een warm welkom: bij l’Amirauté sur Baïse bent u aan het juiste adres.

Wij kijken ernaar uit u te ontvangen, te inspireren en u thuis te laten voelen in ons stukje paradijs in de Gers.

Ils portent une grande attention sur le choix des produits, et privilégient le circuit court. Des plats végétariens, sans gluten, sont possibles, il suffit de leur en parler !
Suivant la saison, c’est autour d’une majestueuse cheminée, ou sur une grande terrasse que vous dégusterez tous ensemble les bons petits plats de Vannack & Colas !
Le château propose également de nombreuses activités en intérieur et en extérieur : billard, ping-pong, et baby-foot, jeux de société sont à votre disposition.
Aux beaux jours, piquez une tête dans la piscine entre deux parties de pétanque ou de volley !
Envie d’une activité en particulier ? Le Boisrenault saura vous guider grâce à son répertoire local de professionnels compétents !

Name: La Maison Culier
Description:
Ben jij op zoek naar een inspirerende locatie voor een werkvakantie, yoga retraite of andere coaching doeleinde.
Stop met zoeken, bij La Maison Culier heb je alle ruimte, rust en gelegenheid om even alles los te kunnen laten en je focus op 1 ding te richten.
La Maison Culier, betekent vrij vertaald, het bijzondere huis.
Daar waar bijzondere dingen gebeuren, met bijzondere mensen in een bijzondere omgeving.
Er is voldoende rust en ruimte in en om onze accommodatie met terras,  zwembad en uitzicht over de vallei. Er is voldoende ruimte om je even terug te trekken voor een wandeling in het bos of bij onze (boven) buitenbar met een heerlijk zitje en schommelstoelen om een boek te lezen of even bij te kletsen.
Binnen 10 minuten kun je op een terrasje zitten, genieten van Franse tafereeltjes in Montcuq en als je daar toch bent kun je de toren van Montcuq bezoeken (dit moet wel vooraf worden besproken), daar kun je exclusief in met jouw yoga en/of coaching groep. 
Het uitzicht is adembenemend en doet iets met je ziel.
Terug in ons bijzondere huis, zorgt chef Jeroen voor een heerlijke gezonde en gevarieerde maaltijd.
Of boek een kookworkshop, chef Jeroen zal je de fijne kneepjes van de keuken bij brengen, onder het genot van lokale wijnen en na afloop gezellig met z’n allen aan tafel.
We hebben 2 hectaren grond en bos, we zijn nog volop bezig deze optimaal te laten shinen, zo hebben wij deze zomer een natuurlijke bron ontdekt met een prachtig uitzicht. 
Volgende zomer hopen wij hier een extra plekje gecreëerd te hebben voor rust, meditatie en yoga mogelijkheden.

Name: Barbera E Tulipani Bed & Breakfast
Description:

A life project of the Italian-Dutch family of Paul and Daniela. Many years have passed since their first meeting in Paris, many lives in as many countries - from France to Sweden and then back to the Netherlands -. And the circle closes here, in Monferrato, Daniela's homeland where the family moved in 2021.

Barbera e Tulipani is located a few kilometers from Asti, in the heart of Monferrato, an area rich in history and breathtaking hilly landscapes.

You are welcome to our world.

Daniela and Paul

Name: ATRIUM AREIAS
Description:
ATRIUM Areias é a ponte entre a inquietude do oceano e a paz do Lima, o ancoradouro do descanso, o pátio central do lazer, a descoberta da rosa dos ventos na cidade de Viana do Castelo.
Há quase 70 anos, José da Guia foi morar para o lugar das AREIAS, em Darque, onde havia – e há – uma antiga capelinha que tem, como orago, Senhora das Areias.
Em 1954 adquiriu um barco a que chamou “Santa Maria das Areias”, nome anterior ao de “Senhora das Areias”, com origem, talvez, em 1173. A partir daí, José da Guia passou a ser conhecido pelo AREIAS e os seus descendentes também.

Name: The Federal Inn
Description:
The Federal Inn, built circa 1830, is a boutique bed and breakfast with a storied history fused with hip hospitality. Curated for the modern sojourner seeking the road less traveled, the Inn boasts an immersive experience with eclectic decors to surprise and delight beyond expectations.

Inspired by the culture, history and community of its locale in historic Maumee, The Federal Inn is your home away from home. Three cozy guest rooms juxtapose traditional spaces with storied experiences. 

The Federal Inn is owned by proprietor Katie Pettee, a Maumee native and hospitality entrepreneur.

Name: Tinyhaus Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Die Idee
Angesichts des immer größer werdenden Interesses an flexiblem, kostengünstigem Wohnraum habe ich mich entschlossen, mein Tinyhaus in Serie zu bringen. Trotz Serienfertigung kannst Du mit mir Deine persönlichen Vorstellungen vom Tinyhaus umsetzen. Ich begleite Dich bei der Planung.

Der Plan
Wir bauen nicht irgendein Tiny House - wir bauen Dein Tinyhaus. Es gibt ein paar Gegebenheiten technischer Natur, um die ich mich kümmere. Die Art der Veranda und den Inneraum kannst Du gestalten. Du bist herzlich eingeladen, die Produktionshalle zu besichtigen. Dort entstehen eh die besten Ideen.

Die Ausführung
Sofern die Planung steht, schließen wir einen Werkvertrag ab in dem alle Wünsche und Rahmenbedingungen festgehalten sind. Dann baue ich Dein Tinyhaus. Über den Baufortschritt halte ich Dich natürlich immer auf dem Laufenden. Die Fertigungszeit beträgt aktuell ca. 3 Monate.

Name: Poule d'eau & Co
Description:

L’espace d’un weekend, d’une semaine ou plus venez partager une maison spacieuse, avec une cuisine toute équipée, un espace chill, un jardin vue mer, votre espace nuit privé ou partagé, c’est comme vous voulez 

Et comme on sait que vous êtes des bosseurs on vous propose le lieu parfait pour vous concentrer, créer, travailler etc   
Notre bureau se trouve dans le jardin, un espace de 30m2 avec 10 espaces de travail confortables.

Cet espace est également propice pour un séminaire, un team building ou un séjour à thème (yoga, écriture, relaxation...)

Name: Woodzo Stays
Description:
Woodzo Stays is startup of unique stays & experiences in Himachal Pradesh started in 2021. Our mission is to change the way people perceive the quality of life and connection to our environment. We are doing it through unique concept of vacation experience in nature called experiential tourism, glamorous tourism.

We are a group of outdoor enthusiast, marketing and hospitality experts, who believe true glamour is nature. We believe people are searching for unique experiences in nature where they can reconnect with their life and environment, to live out their passions, to make love with their life again. Woodzo connects people and companies, who share the same attitude, values, and a have the power to realize them in everyday life and space, for us all.

We have currently 3 properties  - Shangarh ( Kullu) , Naggar ( Manali) & Kasol (Kullu). More will be coming in near future.

At Chebi Homes, we are passionate about curating exceptional experiences that redefine luxury and comfort. Whether you're seeking a serene beachside escape or a chic city retreat, our handpicked properties are meticulously crafted to cater to your every desire.

Dubai is a city of dreams, and we are here to make your dreams come true. Our team is dedicated to providing unparalleled hospitality, ensuring that your stay with us is nothing short of extraordinary.

What sets Chebi Homes apart is our commitment to personalized service. From the moment you inquire about your vacation to the day you check out, our team will be there to assist you every step of the way.

Name: Apnawala rent
Description:
At Apnawala Rent, we are more than just a rental platform – we are a trusted community-driven space created exclusively for the Dawoodi Bohra / Mumineen community. Our mission is simple yet powerful: to make travel, stays, and rentals easier, safer, and more affordable for our people across India and Dubai.

 Who We Serve
Whether you are a student moving to a new city for education, a family traveling for weddings or ziyarat, or a professional relocating for work, we ensure you feel at home wherever you go. Unlike generic platforms, we understand the unique lifestyle and values of our community, which is why every homestay listed on Apnawala Rent is verified, comfortable, and Mumineen-friendly.

 Our Offerings

Homestays & Rentals: Affordable Dawoodi Bohra-friendly stays in Mumbai, Surat, Pune, Bangalore, Ahmedabad, Navi Mumbai, Dubai, and many more cities.

Short-Term & Long-Term Stays: From weekend getaways to student accommodations, we cover it all.

Community-Focused Experience: All listings are curated keeping in mind cleanliness, accessibility to masjids and jamaatkhanas, and family needs.

 Why Apnawala Rent?
Trusted alternative to Airbnb with a community-first approach
Affordable and transparent pricing for students, families, and travelers
City-specific listings to make your search faster and more relevant
Growing platform designed by the community, for the community

 Our Vision
To become the go-to platform for every Mumineen looking for safe, affordable, and trusted stays anywhere in the world. By blending technology with cultural understanding, we aim to create a seamless experience where community members can book with trust and travel with peace of mind.

 Let’s Connect
If you’re a host looking to list your property or a traveler seeking a reliable Bohra-friendly stay, Apnawala Rent is here for you. Together, let’s build a network of homes that keep our community connected and comfortable.

Visit us at Apnawala Rent!

Name: Hostel Bjorkenheim
Description:
Hostel Bjorkenheim sijaitsee Seinäjoella, historiallisen Piirin alueen vanhimmassa, vuonna 1923 rakennetussa päärakennuksessa. Rakennus on läpikäynyt mittavan remontin, jonka yhteydessä on lisätty muun muassa koneellinen ilmanvaihto jäähdytyksellä.

Meillä on sekä yhden, kahden että kolmen hengen huoneita. Osaa huoneistamme pystyy yhdistelemään. Tällöin on mahdollista majoittua tarvittaessa kuusikin samaan huoneeseen.

Mikäli esimerkiksi yrityksenä tai tapahtumajärjestäjänä tarvitset kerralla enemmän majoitustilaa, on mahdollista tehdä sopimus myös koko hostellin varaamisesta, ellei varauksia tuolle ajalle vielä ole.

Myös pidempiaikaisesta majoittumisesta voidaan tehdä yksilöllinen sopimus, mikäli sellaiseen on tarvetta esimerkiksi työmatkojen vuoksi.

Name: Hostal Aljibe
Description:
Hostal Aljibe is occupying a traditional townhouse, a stone’s throw from the Plaza Ochavada in the heart of the historic town of Archidona. 
Midway between the bustling vacation city of Malaga and the historic towns of Granada, Cordoba and Sevilla, this is the first accommodation of its kind in the region. 

The hostal Aljibe experience cannot be summed up in one word. 
We offer our guests the hospitality and conviviality of a B&B, the cosiness and guidance of a homestay, the relaxed atmosphere of a guesthouse and the luxurious feeling of a hotel.

As hosts, we've travelled the world and have put all our experiences into the design, vision and feeling of the house and rooms.

Nestled in the center of town, we offer our guests an oasis of tranquility with a beautifully designed Andalusian patio surrounded by cushion covered seating, an emerald swimming pool and sunbathing area. 
Inside, the bright and airy downstairs offers several cosy seating areas where guests can enjoy reading one of the many books in our libraries, listen to music, have a drink and engage in conversations with other like-minded travelers.

Sounds good to you ? Then take a look at our website and book your room.

Name: PLENTI House
Description:
PLENTI is a quiet location for a meaningful stay located in the Nilgiris Hills of South India, on the border of Tamil Nadu and Kerala. This region forms part of the Western Ghats, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of the world’s most important biodiversity hotspots. It is also home to Indigenous Adivasi communities whose deep connection to the land shapes the spirit of this place.

Our guesthouse is community-owned and cared for by people from the surrounding valley. It is a spacious, peaceful home that blends comfort with simplicity - ideal for solitude, reflection, or creative work.

For those who are interested, PLENTI also offers thoughtful ways to engage with the community and its ongoing work. Every stay becomes a quiet thread in a shared story - one that connects people, land, and community.

The PLENTI Project began with a simple question: How can travel and hospitality bring value not just to the visitor, but to the place and its people?
Our intention was to create a space that not only offers rest and reflection, but also strengthens what already exists—a network of deeply rooted local organizations working in education, health, cultural preservation, and livelihoods.
By building a stay experience that supports and uplifts these efforts, PLENTI offers something mutual: a chance for visitors to slow down and reconnect with nature, while contributing— quietly and meaningfully—to the wellbeing of this unique valley and its people.

Description: Com acesso pela BR 040, eleita uma das melhores rodovias do Brasil, o Chalé da Colina está situado a apenas 140 km do Rio de Janeiro, no Município de Matias Barbosa. Description:
Au cœur du Lauragais, nos quatre chambres d’hôtes de charme vous attendent pour un séjour calme et reposant. Nichée au cœur de la campagne audoise, nous avons restauré cette ancienne ferme du XVIème siècle pour vous offrir un espace de convivialité et de repos. La beauté du village de Belflou vous charmera avec son château du XIIIème siècle dont notre maison est une ancienne dépendance.



Pour une nuit, un week-end ou une semaine, nous vous offrirons un accueil personnalisé, aux petits soins pour que votre séjour soit inoubliable. Vous apprécierez de faire une pause, de profiter de la campagne Lauragaise, d’admirer la douce décoration de nos chambres pendant votre séjour chez nous.

Name: Domaine de Couilleuse
Description:
Si vous cherchez un endroit paisible pour vous ressourcer et profiter de la nature, alors notre maison d'hôtes avec petit déjeuner est faite pour vous ! Implantée dans un environnement calme et verdoyant, notre maison d'hôtes vous offre un cadre idyllique en plein coeur de la vallée de la Loire réputée par ses nombreux châteaux.
Nos chambres sont aménagées avec soin et disposent de tout le confort nécessaire pour vous garantir un séjour agréable. Avec une décoration soignée et une atmosphère chaleureuse, vous vous sentirez immédiatement à l'aise dès votre arrivée. Le matin, vous pourrez déguster notre petit déjeuner, préparé avec des produits frais et locaux. Il vous sera servi dans la véranda avec vue sur le parc, ou à l'extérieur sous le tilleul. Il vous permettra de bien démarrer la journée et de vous préparer à explorer les alentours.
En dehors de votre chambre, vous pourrez profiter du calme et de la verdure qui entourent notre établissement et vous détendre sur notre terrasse ou sous le saule pleureur au bord de l'étang. Notre maison d'hôtes est donc un choix idéal pour ceux qui cherchent à se ressourcer et à visiter notre très belle région.

Name: 29 Nights
Description:

Name: Apartmani Dušica Tekija - Nacionalni park Đerdap
Description:
Apartmani Dušica se nalaze u centru mirnog naselja Tekija, vazdušne banje na samoj obali Dunava, u srcu Nacionalnog parka Đerdap.

Pogodno za team building malih kompanija, kolektiv do 8 osoba. 

Đerdapski granični prelaz sa Rumunijom i Hidroelektrana Đerdap 1 se nalaze na 12 km od objekta, a grad Kladovo na 22 km. 

Plaža je udaljena 350 m, a najbliži restoran i prodavnica 70 m. 

Apartmani su pušteni u rad 2020. godine.

U ponudi su:
- Apartman sa terasom - veličine 52 metara kvadratnih, kapaciteta 5 odraslih osoba, super komforan za roditelje sa decom ili za grupu prijatelja;
- Studio sa terasom - veličine 30 metara kvadratnih, kapaciteta 3 odrasle osobe, idealan za parove ili roditelje sa jednim detetom.

Svaka smeštajna jedinica sadrži kupatilo i kuhinju. Nalaze se na spratu kuće i imaju prostranu terasu sa pogledom na Dunav. 

Kreveti se po želji gostiju mogu spojiti/razdvojiti. Dodatni kreveti i kreveci za bebe nisu dostupni.

Besplatno: parking ispred objekta, brz WiFi internet, Total TV satelitska televizija, klima uređaj, sef, oprema za peglanje, električna džezva, fen i toaletni pribor.

Objekat poseduje uređen vrt sa dvorišnim nameštajem i zidanim roštiljem sa opremom za ražanj, kotlić i sač, takođe gostima na raspolaganju besplatno.

Za vas organizujemo vožnju čamcem ili gliserom kroz klisuru, ribolovački izlet sa domaćinom, kao i iznajmljivanje čamca, opreme i pribora za pecanje.

Ljubitelji prirode i aktivnog odmora mogu uživati u plovidbi kroz Đerdapsku klisuru, usponu po uređenim stazama Miroč planine do čuvenih vidikovaca iznad klisure (Ploče, Mali Štrbac, Veliki Štrbac), biciklizmu, motociklizmu, ATV (kvad) po obeleženim stazama, izletima, obilasku Hidroelektrane Đerdap 1, Trajanov most, rimsko utvrđenje Diana kod Karataša, tvrđava Fetislam u Kladovu, i drugo.

Cena je 10 evra za noćenje po osobi. 

Navedena cena po osobi važi za rezervacije od minimum dve odrasle osobe na minimum tri noćenja. 

Za decu mlađu od 7 godina smeštaj je besplatan. :) 

Prijavljivanje od 15h do 23h, odjavljivanje od 06h do 11h.

Name: Château de La Rivière
Description:
A 1h30 de Paris, aux portes du Perche, le château de La Rivière, pur 17ème vous propose toute l’année des chambres d’hôtes d’exception pour un séjour inoubliable. 
Les chambres d’hôtes sont situées au centre du château jouissent d’une vue remarquable sur le parc et sur la cour d’honneur. Le petit déjeuner est servi dans le salon d’Aligre. Il est possible de réserver une table d’hôtes. A la belle saison vous pouvez profiter des visites guidées, des promenades dans le parc de 140 ha et de nombreuses activités : tennis, piscine, vélo, pêche à la mouche, canoë... 
L'architecture, la décoration d'intérieure et le parc dans une nature préservée vous offriront une parenthèse privilégiée.

Name: Northcombe Farm Shepherd's Hut and Lakes
Description:
The Shepherd's Hut at Northcombe Farm is a beautifully appointed traditional shepherd's hut which the owners have lovingly built and furnished on their Devonshire farm. The hut provides the perfect glamping experience with the lake and countryside on your doorstep, but with all the modern conveniences of a walk in shower, central heating and kitchenette.

There is ample parking for two cars next to the shepherd's hut and guests will enjoy the seating area in front of the hut with views out across the green fields. The fact that it is sheltered under the barn roof means that even in wet weather, guests can enjoy a warm cup of tea or glass of wine outside and taking in the fresh air.

The hut is accessed up some small steps and the open plan living inside is well-designed with the bed area to the left and the kitchenette and dining bar to the right. The bathroom is at the end of the hut with its walk in shower and flushing WC.

Guests are able to fish in the lake and can also enjoy equestrian activities on the farm (please contact us for details). Further afield, guests can enjoy the famous Dartmoor National Park - ideal for hiking and cycling fans.

Name: Big Bay | Eco-Lodge | Bocas del Toro | Panama

Name: DJH Landesverband Sachsen e. V.
Description: Seit über 100 Jahren ist der Landesverband Sachsen e.V. im Deutschen Jugendherbergswerk Teil einer weltumspannenden Idee und ist ein Ort für gelebte Gastfreundlichkeit. Wir vertreten Werte, die das Leben bereichern und stehen für Begegnungen, Respekt und Weltoffenheit. Als gemeinnütziger Verband betreiben wir 23 Jugendherbergen an den schönsten Orten in Sachsen. Jugendherbergen sind einzigartige Lernorte und Erlebnisräume. In und um unsere Jugendherbergen schaffen wir Momente und Erlebnisse, die im Kopf bleiben und zu Herzen gehen. In familiärer Atmosphäre arbeiten wir im Team täglich daran, diesem Ziel gerecht zu werden.

Description:

Name: Auberge Le Héron - Studios Nature
Description:
Le Héron, avec ses 6 Studios nature, propose un concept novateur. Profitez de l’intimité de ces studios entièrement équipés et séjournez dans l’une des plus belles régions du Québec.

Vous souhaitez rassembler vos amis ou encore les membres de votre famille sous un même toit, tout en ne négligeant pas votre confort? Le Héron offre la possibilité de réserver l’entièreté de ses studios. Que ce soit pour profiter d’une semaine de ski au Mont Orford ou encore pour arpenter les pistes de randonnées durant la saison estivale ou automnale, Le Héron a été pensé pour faciliter ces moments si importants auprès des gens qui nous sont chers.

Name: Donkey Sunrise
Description:
Located in La Unión, Valle del Cauca, alongside the Pan-American Highway, Donkey Sunrise is a guesthouse and information hub designed exclusively for motor travelers in Colombia. Our facilities and atmosphere allows them to rest and recharge, to connect with like-minded moto travelers, share stories, work on their bikes and swap travel tips over delicious, homemade family-style meals. 

Donkey Sunrise offers comfortable rooms and campsites, guided and self-guided tours, both on the road and off the road, ensuring our guests experience the real Colombia. Being motor travelers ourselves, we've collected all information, services and partnerships to make the travel adventures of our guests as smooth as possible. From technical service help and offroad motor training to a place to print new stickers and offering an address to ship new parts to.

But most of all, we offer a community. A place where like-minded motor travelers find each other and create new memories. Whether a seasoned traveler with their own motorcycle or looking for a way to dip your toes into the world of adventure riding, you've found a home away from home here at Donkey!

Name: Luma Terra Prague Hostel
Description: Fascinující zcela nový projekt komfortního ubytování v kategorii hostel, hotel, apartmán. Vynikající lokalita v historickém centru Prahy jen pár kroků od Václavského náměstí

Name: Office Nature
Description:
Uma hospedagem e Day Use para profissionais que precisam de um respiro que potencialize a criatividade e a produtividade, equilibrando com o bem estar e a saúde mental.

Uma charmosa casa aninhada em meio à natureza exuberante, com uma cascata exclusiva como trilha sonora e uma imponente pedra convidando à superação. Cuidadosamente estruturado para profissionais que buscam um novo paradigma de trabalho. Em meio a esse cenário, no coração das montanhas do Sul de Minas, surge o Office Nature, uma hospedagem exclusiva para se tornar o seu escritório e do seu time.

É um projeto da Cascata O.Rocha (Instagram: @cascataorocha) que, durante a semana abraça o Office Nature, criando um ambiente profissional para times que buscam novos estímulos criativos e produtivos. Aos finais de semana é uma hospedagem para quem busca tranquilidade e experiência exclusiva.

Além da hospedagem, há roteiros para quem gosta de trilhas e aventuras, como o rape na propriedade e, no raio de até 8km, mais opções de trilha para admirar o nascer e/ou pôr do sol, com guia de expedição para acompanhar.

Vem viver, quem vem com você?

Name: Padláskincsek Birtok (Estate)
Description:
The guesthouses of Padláskincsek Estate offer accommodation in the center of Nagybörzsöny, which boasts numerous attractions and is crossed by several hiking trails, yet is located on a quiet street. The guest house is a building typical of the area, retaining its Swabian style, which we have completely renovated to meet modern expectations.

Features of the guest houses (for 7 and 9 people): 100 m2 living space, two adjoining but separately accessible living areas (with entrance hall, bedroom, two separate bathrooms) and a well-equipped kitchen/dining room (with hob, convection oven, dishwasher, microwave, kettle, hand blender, etc.). The garden features a barbecue area where you can cook, grill, and eat, even in bad weather. The comfort of the house is enhanced by flat-screen TVs and internet in both bedrooms. In terms of furnishings, we have complemented the authentic furniture with modern elements. The beds, mattresses, and bedding are also modern/new. We can accommodate 7 + 9 guests in the 2 guest houses.

Features of the Small House (4+1 persons): 40+30 m2 living space (ground floor + attic), private kitchen, corner bathtub, barbecue terrace, large garden, and hot tub.

The Nagybörzsöny Forest Railway runs through picturesque surroundings from Nagyirtás puszta, via Márianosztra, all the way to Szob, providing great entertainment for the whole family. 

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

Name: Stayverse
Description:
Welcome to STAYVERSE, your ultimate solution for travelers visiting Kerala. With over 80 lakh houses in Kerala, and more than 15 lakh houses lying vacant, we offer comfortable homestay accommodations along with a wide range of essential services and products to cater to the needs of over 2 crore visitors to Kerala each year. 
Our mobile app provides access to more than 17 services, including food, homestay, tent stay, rent bikes, scooters, cars, and bicycles, pick-up and drop services, guides, gaming areas, essential kits, and more. You can also rent a vehicle from one STAYVERSE point and drop it off at another, and once you've stayed with us, you can use any STAYVERSE point for freshening up. 
We take pride in offering these services at 50% lower costs than other service providers, ensuring your journey is not only convenient but also enriching. Our motto "Yaathum Oore Yaavarum Keleer" reflects our belief that all places are home, and all people are family. 
Our primary goal is to create a sense of belonging for every traveler by facilitating social interaction and communication through homestay arrangements. By immersing yourself in the local culture, geography, lifestyle, and culinary delights, you'll have an authentic and comfortable experience during your stay with us. Let us take care of your needs while you enjoy your journey in Kerala.

Name: Nimmoh's Homestays
Description: Nimmohs Homestays is a company that deals with vacation rentals, which is commonly known as Airbnb. We also provide housekeeping, vacation rental management and Consultation amongst other industry-associated services. We are located in Nanyuki, Naivasha and Mombasa with plans to expand into all major cities in the country. Our goal is to transcend the borders and have regional footprints and eventually globally, in the long term. Nimmohs Homestays' tagline is 'We are Different' because we really are! We offer a wholesome, unique and personalised experience to all our Guests. This has given us ‘Super Host’ status on the Airbnb platform, the highest accolade, as well as ensuring that we are the best-rated host in Kenya. Our biggest accolade so far is being named the Best SME to watch in the National Business Leadership Awards held in 2022.

Name: LA BICICLETA RAVITO - SOUILLAC
Description:
Bicicleta signifie «vélo» en occitan. Implantée à Souillac, Lot, Vallée de la Dordogne, Occitanie, la BICICLETA RAVITO est un lieu inédit, à la croisée des routes et des chemins ; elle veut accueillir, héberger, ravitailler, faire rouler, équiper, faire se rencontrer les passionné(e)s de la petite Reine. Voyageuses et voyageurs à vélo et pratiquants de tous les vélos aiment s’y retrouver pour partager et découvrir notre belle région.
A la BICICLETA RAVITO, on peut dormir dans les 3 chambres d'hôtes ou dans le dortoir 8 places. On peut manger en tables d'hôtes ou au café cycliste. On peut louer des vélos : électriques, Gravel, route ou vintage... On peut s'habiller et réparer... et repartir pour mieux revenir.

Name: Jerry Borry
Description:
Jerry Borry Homestay (Unity Development Project LLP) is a homestay and Airbnb Management Operation in Bangalore, Patna, Bhagalpur, and other cities across India.

Jerry Borry specializes in managing and operating premium homestays and Airbnb properties across key Indian cities. Our focus is on delivering exceptional guest experiences through well-curated, comfortable, and uniquely local accommodations. We provide end-to-end property management solutions, ensuring hassle-free hosting for property owners while maximizing occupancy and revenue.

Our services include property onboarding, guest communication, professional cleaning, maintenance, and strategic pricing. At Jerry Borry, we blend hospitality with local cultural immersion to create memorable stays that resonate with travellers seeking authentic and convenient lodging options.

Committed to quality, guest satisfaction, and seamless operations, Jerry Borry is building a trusted network of homestay experiences that connect travellers with the heart of each city.

Name: Lady Macdonald Country Inn
Description:
As a friend and family-run Inn, we believe it’s all about the little things at the Lady Macdonald. Let the warmth of Victorian elegance, mixed with country charm, surround you as you start your day with us in our beautiful Rocky Mountain Town of Canmore.

Awaken to a sumptuous, homemade breakfast each morning, served in our spacious solarium; then linger over your coffee and the breathtaking view of the mountains. As a boutique Inn, we offer 13 unique and inviting guest rooms with a host of modern amenities such as; heated wooden floors, air conditioning, complimentary WiFi and Aveda bath and shower products, to name a few.

Centrally located, the Inn is walking distance to our favourite French bakery as well as downtown Canmore, which offers an abundance of amazing restaurants and shopping. We’re also very fortunate to be surrounded by world-class outdoor activities such as hiking, cross-country and downhill skiing, biking, canoeing, and rock-climbing. The adventures are endless.

Name: West Bay House
Description: A unique offering for corporate retreats & events, away days, and overnight stays, located on the North Kent Coast. This grand 9-bed, 9-en suite home has been lovingly restored, with a luxury design to match the magnificent architecture.

Name: MOUNTAINSHACK
Description:
Mountain Shack, nestled in Dobhi, Manali, Himachal Pradesh, India, offers a cozy riverside cottage experience surrounded by lush orchards. Escape the urban hustle and bustle in this serene environment equipped with amenities like a bonfire pit, BBQ grill, and a riverside restaurant serving delectable dishes. Dobhi is also known for being the highest paragliding site in the valley. Guests can relax by the river, enjoy scenic views, indulge in outdoor activities such as picnics, fishing, hiking, rafting, and paragliding, and take a refreshing dip in the fresh river water. Conveniently located near attractions like Rohtang Pass, Solang Valley, Nagar Castle, Bijli Mahadev Temple, Tosh, and Hadimba Temple.
 Mountain Shack offers a variety of accommodation options, including 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom cottages, as well as family rooms and private suites. Whether you're traveling alone, with a partner, or with family and friends, there's a comfortable and spacious option to suit your needs. Each room is thoughtfully designed and equipped with modern amenities to ensure a pleasant stay amidst the serene surroundings of Dobhi, Manali. Whether you're seeking privacy in a private suite or looking to accommodate a larger group in a family room or multi-bedroom cottage, Mountain Shack has the perfect accommodation for your stay.

Elevate Vacation Homes is dedicated to helping property owners unlock the full potential of their vacation rentals. At Elevate Vacation Homes, we believe in elevating every aspect of property management to help you achieve more bookings, higher profits, and peace of mind. 

Ready to elevate your property? Contact us today to see how we can help you reach new heights in the vacation rental market.

Name: Sessius 1622
Description:
Spread out on three floors with an impressive courtyard and a cozy garden overlooking the Mont Blanc, this 1622 house (also known as The Chateau des Cologny) was renovated in style by its passionate owners bringing in their love for design, for international art and long lasting conversations by the fireside or under the stars: a true l#ifestyle experience

Sessius 1622 offers a peaceful escape for all business travellers looking at a #Geneva, #palexpo or #paysdegex business trip or #bleisure alternative to large corporate hotels by the Airport.

Located only 13 km from both Palexpo and the Airport, with free parking, wifi, desks in the rooms and the best bedding and locally-sourced breakfast. A true alternative for your upcoming stays or gatherings.

Sessius 1622 is not only a Guest House. Our aim is to offer a full lifestyle experience as we also have launched:

- Our now Iconic Chef Residency, bringing an Italian fair to the culinary scene of the Pays de Gex for a true epicurian experience. 
-  Our unique Private Events:  we have a dedicated old-stoned, full of charm, meeting space with direct access to the patio and garden.
We can make the entire property available and provide all services from gourmet catering to flower arrangements, entertainment for children, photography and videography.
- Our engaged Art Expositions as we host the Association Le Chateau des Cologny aiming to preserve heritage and art in the Pays de Gex region.

Contact us at info@sessius1622.com 

See you soon at Sessius 1622 !

Name: Casina al Lago
Description:
This delightful apartment, completely renovated, is located on the second floor of a historic building that reflects the typical architecture of lake villages. It's perfect for those who want to spend a vacation in tranquility and nature without giving up the comforts of city life.

Lugano, with its attractions, is easily reachable in just 10 km thanks to an efficient narrow-gauge railway service. The charming towns of Luino and Varese are also nearby, at 10 km and 20 km respectively.

Let yourself be enchanted by the beauty of the place and enjoy an unforgettable stay!

Name: The Garden Cottage
Description:
Built in 2022 and completed in 2023 The Garden Cottage is a stunning new 1-bedroom single-storey cottage situated in the market town of Hinckley, Leicestershire and can sleep two people in one bedroom (super-king or twin beds). The Garden Cottage is Leicestershire Property And Construction winner Small Residential Scheme of the Year Award 2023. The ProCon Awards showcase the best projects and developments in construction, property and the built environment in Leicestershire and Rutland
The space
The contemporary styled Garden Cottage has its own driveway (parking for 2 cars) accessed from a quite road in the Forest View area of Hinckley.

The tastefully furnished property has bright, modern and spacious rooms presented with some stunning touches which give this cottage a warm, cosy and homely feel. Inside there is a living room with open plan fitted kitchen with large breakfast bar and bar stools. There is one double bedroom and one super-king size bed that can be divided into 2 singles. A separate shower room and large hallway complete the accommodation. Outside has a small new cottage-style garden situated at the bottom of our own garden. The Garden Cottage is ideal for a single or couple visiting the area.

See also:
Airbnb - The Garden Cottage in Hinckley
YouTube - The Garden Cottage Hinckley
Facebook - The Garden Cottage

Name: Apartments Margareta & Ena
Description: Our house is just 400m from the center of Malinska, so you need less then 5 minutes of slight walk to get there. City beach is just 350-400 m from center, so in less than 10 minutes of walk from house , you can get there. You are in the center, but not in the rush :) If you book one of our apartments for 7 days starting 25th of August, you will get 15% discount. If you book for 7 days or more in September, you will get even greater discount from standard price. So what are you waiting for?We are family Kauric and we are renting apartments in our family house for a long time - entire floor is one apartment. We always like to help our guest to spend their vacations on the beautiful Krk island in order to know it and to take pleasant and warm memories with themselves back home. Some of them are returning year in, year out and consider our family accommodation as second home - that's the best compliment my husband, daughter and I can get as hosts. We like pets, and we are pet friendly. For any further question or request, please do not hesitate to ask. You are all always welcome :)

Name: Gracey Concierge

Name: CefalHome
Description:
CefalHome is a charming brand of vacation apartments located in the picturesque coastal town of Cefalù, Sicily.

Our spacious and bright rooms boast comfortable beds and modern furnishings, ensuring a restful retreat. Each room is finely appointed to give guests the ultimate comfort, elegance, and service. 

Start your day on one of our sunny terraces, which offer breathtaking views of the sea and the city. CefalHome goes beyond expectations by offering a range of services that will allow you to feel at home even on vacation.

In addition to our popular vacation rentals, CefalHome is proud to offer professional asset management and vacation home management services for third parties in Cefalú. We specialize in maximizing the value of real estate investments and ensuring the smooth management of vacation properties on behalf of our clients.

 Discover the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and expert property management in the heart of Sicily's coastal gem.

CefalHome - Bed, Sun & Sea !

Name: La Primavera B&B/Agriturismo
Description: Onze agriturismo bevind zich in de heuvels van het midden van de regio de Marken in Italie. Met de adriatische zee en de Appenijnen op korte afstand een perfecte plaats voor een rustig of sportief verblijf. De B&B kamers zijn gelegen in onze stijlvolle Marchiaanse boerderij met eigen toegang tot de grote tuin. Het ontbijt serveren we indien mogelijk op onze gezellige veranda. Ook bieden we een aantal avonden in de week de mogelijkheid om met ons mee te eten. De andere avonden kunnen we de gasten diverse originele Italiaanse restaurants in de directe omgeving aanbevelen.

Name: Glamlife.cz

Name: Pigeonnier in Marciac
Description: If you're looking for a peaceful spot in the heart of nature, we can offer you a complete change of scenery. Christine, Bernard and their children welcome you to a unique, comfortable, air-conditioned setting. Stroll through the garden and enjoy the tranquility of the natural pool. Fall asleep to the sound of frogs and crickets. Wake up to a 360-degree view of the Pyrenees.

Name: DOMAINE Le CASTEL Mevatanàna - Anjozorobe Madagascar
Description:
Le Castel Anjozorobe est une annexe de l'Entreprise touristique CASTELLO MOTEL Anosizato.
Il s'agit d'un complexe hôtelier à la campagne, doté d'une piscine extérieure, de bungalows, des chambres d'hôtel avec douches privatives, un restaurant qui propose un menu de cuisine locale. Une grande salle pouvant accueillir jusqu'à 400 personnes assises, est également à votre disposition, pour tous vos évènements familiaux ou professionnels (team building...).

Au Castel, le cadre est verdoyant, simple et apaisant. Le Domaine s'étend sur une centaine d'hectare de nature, de forets, de pâturages, avec un étang artificiel au milieu d'un champs de Ravintsara. C'est l'Ideal pour les adeptes de grands espaces et du plein air. Vous pouvez faire beaucoup d'activités outdoors en famille qui se font rare de nos jours. Des sentiers ont été spécialement conçus pour votre  balade en vélo ainsi que les randonnées pédestre ...

Si vous êtes sur Tanà et que vous n'en pouvez plus de la pollution et de la brouhaha de la capitale, ce qu'il vous faut c'est de venir au Castel, qui se situe à 90 km de la capitale via la RN3, pour prendre un grand bol d'air, ralentir le temps, vivre au rythme tranquille de la campagne. Profitez-en pour un Detox digital.

Name: Meio Country House - Leisure and Training Center
Nitya Private Residencies
Description:
Nitya Serviced Apartments is an exquisite luxury homestay experience nestled in the vibrant heart of the city. 

Whether you're visiting for business, leisure, or a long-stay, Nitya brings hospitality and meticulous attention to detail into every corner. Perfect for professionals, families, or travelers who want both comfort and convenience in a refined urban setting.

Name: Bedouin Star - Ras Shitan - Nuweiba - Egypt

Name: LICHTZEIT: Raum und Zeit für Deine Seele
Description:
In Finsterau, im hintersten Eck vom bayerischen Wald, Heimat von geradlinigen Waidlern mit riesigen Traktoren und wendigen Feldhasen, steht ein helles, schlichtes Holzhaus, das dich zu einem ganz besonderen Erlebnis einlädt: LICHTZEIT. 

Ein Ort voller Ruhe und Kraft
Hier bist du vollkommen ungestört. Nichts und niemand, der dich ablenkt oder aus deiner Ruhe bringt.
Ein Haus für dich allein, in dem du dich sofort zuhause fühlst. Klar und auf das Wesentliche reduziert, mit viel Liebe eingerichtet. Sinnlich, voller Naturmaterialien und Licht. Ein ganz besonderer Ort, der dich tief berührt und sofort entspannt.

Wilde, unberührte Natur
Du machst die Haustür auf und bist sofort im Reschbachtal, einem noch unberührten, besonderen Juwel im Nationalpark Bayerischer Wald, der gemeinsam mit dem Böhmerwald Europas größtes Waldgebiet bildet. Natur, die dir mit ihrer Wildheit und unbegrenzten Fülle den Atem raubt. Die Lichtzeit Hausberge laden dich ein, ihre Gipfel zu erklimmen, auf denen du bei gutem Wetter eine wunderschöne, erhebende Fernsicht bis in die Alpen hast.

Über 30 Wanderwege gehen in unmittelbarer Nähe vom Lichtzeit-Haus los. Du kannst dich hier im Sommer beim Mountainbiken und im Winter beim Langlaufen, Schlittenfahren und auf Schneeschuh Wanderungen auspowern und deinen Kreislauf in Schwung bringen. Die Via Nova - ein Pilgerweg, der durch Finsterau, praktisch direkt am Lichtzeit-Haus vorbei verläuft, lädt dich ein, auch deine spirituelle Seite zu entdecken.

Natur-Coaching
Hier kannst du ein intensives Coaching im unberührten Wald erleben und erfahren, wie die Natur dich unterstützt und inspiriert. Du erhälst wichtige Impulse, findest neue Klarheit und Orientierung. Wir gehen hinaus in den Wald an besondere Kraftorte, die dich bei der Lösung deiner wichtigen Fragen unterstützen.

Erlebe wie dir die Natur wertvolle Impulse schenkt und sich in deinem Inneren alles schnell, fast wie von selbst neu ordnet und klärt.

Name: Vacaow
Description:
Welcome to Vacaow, a platform that brings you unforgettable vacations that are truly wow!

At Vacaow, we believe that vacations are not just about visiting new places, but about experiencing them in a way that leaves you with memories to cherish for a lifetime. Our platform is designed to help you find the perfect accommodation and experiences that will make your vacation truly special.

We are proud to be a part of the vibrant and diverse culture of India, a country that is known for its warmth, hospitality, and rich history. At Vacaow, we believe in the concept of "Atithi Devo Bhava" which means "Guest is God". This concept is at the heart of our platform and is reflected in everything we do.

Our goal is to provide travellers with a unique and authentic experience of India, while also empowering local communities and supporting sustainable tourism. We work closely with our hosts to ensure that their homes and experiences reflect the beauty and diversity of India's culture, from the stunning landscapes of the Himalayas to the bustling streets of Mumbai.

Our platform offers a wide range of accommodation options, from cozy homestays to luxurious villas, all carefully selected to showcase the best of Indian hospitality.

We are committed to promoting responsible and sustainable tourism in India. By choosing to stay with our hosts, you are supporting local communities and helping to preserve India's unique cultural heritage.

At Vacaow, we strive to provide our guests with an unforgettable experience that embodies the spirit of "Atithi Devo Bhava". We are passionate about sharing the beauty and diversity of India with travelers from all over the world, and we look forward to welcoming you to our platform. Thank you for choosing Vacaow!

The bedroom is furnished with a queen-size bed and also has a couch and a flat-screen TV. The en-suite bathroom is fitted with a bath, shower, toilet, and washbasin.

The staircase leads to the kitchen downstairs that’s equipped with a fridge, stove, oven, microwave, toaster, basic cutlery and crockery, as well as tea- and coffee-making facilities. Name: Ethno Art Room
Description:
Authentic guesthouse in a tiny remote village, tucked in the heart of Mountain of Orpheus, is awaiting you. Your steps will take on hiking trails and river bridges. You can bike or drive off-road, enjoy horseriding and birdwatching, cave-diving and herb-picking. Your neighbours are the deer and wild goats here. The stars come down at night to be your confidantes. 

With no mobile phone signal available, our guesthouse is as far from civilization as it gets. No store or restaurant in the village either. Rest assured though that our homemade food from local produce will delight your senses. 

Wi-Fi is execellent, so make our Home your Office - ask us for special pricing and amenities to ensure your business needs are met while roaming the wilderness of Rhodope.

With a commitment to trust, reliability, and cultural connection, we go beyond providing a place to sleep — we create a home-away-from-home experience in the heart of Luanda.

Name: The Sunnyside Sisters Bed and Breakfast
Description:
Our guests enjoy the beautiful rooms with a private en-suite bath, authentic antiques, premium luxury linens, towels, robes and fresh flowers. We have 1GB internet, individual HVAC thermostats, fresh paint (everywhere) in 18th century historic colors, and original hard wood floors throughout the home. 

A homemade breakfast with a Dutch Touch is included each morning in our bright and sunny breakfast ‘The Prophecy’ room. Relax anytime in your room, in the many seating areas, or outside on our beautiful benches strategic placed under some old trees on the property. 

There is free on-site parking. There is a walking trail that leads you to the 150 year old Johnson-Carrington cemetery. For the active guest it’s good to know that it’s only a 5 minute drive to Occaneechi State Park with miles of beautiful walking trails among nature and Buggs Island Lake. We are less than a five-minute drive from historic downtown Clarksville and the Lake. 

We look forward to meeting you and making your visit with us unforgettable.

Name: Reservoir View Holiday Cottages
Description:
Reservoir View Holiday Cottages are the perfect place for you to relax and unwind with family or friends. Our cottages are all detached with ample outdoor space to take in the scenery and spend quality time with your loved ones. The properties come in various sizes, accommodating parties from 2 people to larger groups of up to 22, with exclusive use of the whole site. Experience true space, privacy, and tranquility in the rural countryside, while being only a short distance away from the charming villages of Lofthouse, Middlesmoor, and the well-known town of Pateley Bridge. These places offer an array of cafes, restaurants, pubs, and takeaways, as well as independent shops selling amazing local produce.

Located ideally for exploring the wider area, we are just 30 minutes away from the spa town of Harrogate, Ripon, and Masham, 45 minutes away from Skipton, and just over an hour away from York. The journey itself is a delightful experience as you meander along the country roads, following the natural curves of Gouthwaite reservoir while enjoying the breathtaking views of the Yorkshire Dales.

Name: Maison d'hôtes La Halte Gourmande
Description:
Vous souhaitez privilégier d'un accueil attentionné et personnalisé, La Halte Gourmande est faite pour vous… Vous vous y sentirez chez vous.

Nathalie et Marc vous accueillent dans leur propriété à Vachères, village perché sur un plateau au nord-ouest du Parc Régional du Luberon. 

Quatre chambres sont proposées et disposent chacune d’une salle d’eau et d’un WC privatif.

Un petit déjeuner est servi le matin et un dîner/table d’hôtes est proposé sur réservation. 

La table d'hôtes propose une cuisine maison, traditionnelle, fraîche, réalisée à partir de produits locaux (dans la mesure du possible!). 

Le chef, Marc, a toujours évolué dans l’environnement de la cuisine. Il a travaillé dans des établissements gastronomiques étoilés, enseigné la cuisine et la sommellerie en école hôtelière, tenu ses propres restaurants.

Chef passionné par la gastronomie et le vin, il saura vous communiquer l’exigence qu’il porte au choix de ses produits durables, à leurs provenances et à leur saisonnalité.

Il accompagnera en toute convivialité vos dégustations et saura choisir avec vous, dans sa cave, le vin qui correspondra le mieux à votre dîner et à vos envies.

Name: Killeen Castle Galway
Description:
Killeen Castle, or Caisleán a' Chillín, is a 15th-century tower house in County Galway, Ireland, historically tied to the Blake family, one of the original 14 tribes of Galway. Currently, the castle is in the process of restoration, including major updates like a new roof, exterior finishes, and windows.

The future vision for Killeen Castle is to create an inviting medieval-style retreat that combines historical authenticity with modern comfort. The goal is to establish a unique atmosphere that reflects the castle’s rich past while providing an immersive and warm experience for visitors.
