Name: Podere La Casella
Description:
Un antico casale immerso nella campagna toscana, su una collina che domina le vallate del Mugello, ad un passo dall'Appennino, in posizione dominante e lontano da altre abitazioni. Il posto giusto dove prendersi una sosta dalla frenesia quotidiana, oppure tra una tappa e l'altra degli svariati itinerari escursionistici, naturalistici o equestri. 
Si tratta di un complesso ex rurale costituito da casa colonica e fienile, collegati da una loggia. 
 
Ogni stanza conserva la propria personalità ed il proprio sapore contadino, in un'atmosfera che riporta alla vita rurale del vecchio Mugello, quando la casa colonica era la dimora di famiglie numerose che ne condividevano gli spazi, sia durante la giornata lavorativa, sia nella vita privata. Ancora oggi al Podere La Casella si riconosce la vecchia disposizione dei locali, con la loro dotazione di sobri arredi e antichi strumenti di lavoro, elementi che allora scandivano la giornata mugellana, così come oggi accompagnano i nostri ospiti in un'esperienza davvero emozionante in un ambiente semplice e accogliente.

Name: Maison d'hôtes les Greniers
Description:
Vous aimez les pierres apparentes et l’atmosphère champêtre ? - Bienvenue dans cet ancien corps de ferme qui garde précieusement l’âme de nos grand-parents, une maison pleine de surprises !
. La maison est à vous est notre devise, avec des coins et recoins terriblement cosy, un salon accueil avec une cheminée où crépite le feu en hiver et une belle et grande salle à manger ce lieu est propice à la flânerie, sieste et contemplation d'une nature omniprésente.
. La maison en son territoire est notre philosophie, ici tout est décliné en local (ou presque !). Nous invitons tous les ans des artistes et artisans d'art locaux à faire découvrir leur savoir-faire. Expositions, ateliers, chambre-boutique, concert,... viennent animer le lieu et montrer la richesse de notre territoire.
. Avec un air résolument calme, entre cour et jardin 5 belles chambres spacieuses répondant aux noms de Camille, Berthe, Irénée ou encore Yvonne vous ouvrent leur porte sur des ambiances singulières. La cinquième chambre, l'Atelier réserve toujours des surprises aux hôtes qui la choisissent. Nos chambres sont toutes équipées de salle d'eau et de toilettes.
. Des papilles en émoi... la journée commence par un petit déjeuner composé de produits frais et majoritairement BIO, version salé ou sucré. Le soir, pour ceux qui ont réservé, une table d'hôtes vous est proposée. La cuisine élaborée de produits issus de circuits courts majoritairement bio est "faite maison" ou en partenariat avec le café-resto Ciboulette & Cie. On peut aussi choisir plus frugal, avec le plateau "casse-croûte" toujours locavore et bio. 
Nous avons à coeur de vous accompagner au plus près pour que votre séjour ressemble à ce que vous rechercher pour vous ressourcer, oublier votre quotidien et découvrir un territoire riche et généreux !

Our luxurious rooms, set within a lush green oasis, offer a tranquil escape with stunning views and a refreshing swimming pool. Whether you're seeking relaxation or adventure, The Garden of Asni provides the perfect backdrop for an unforgettable stay. Discover the beauty and charm of Marrakech from our peaceful haven. Here you can relax in the tranquility of the countryside, surrounded by ornamental plants, rosemary and the scents of the Mediterranean scrub. Our farm offers you an authentic experience in a unique natural landscape, where comfort and nature come together to give you an unforgettable holiday.

You can choose between the 2 poolfront apartments we offer: a natural oasis that blends in perfectly with the surroundings. Choose between our cozy two-room apartment or the spacious three-room apartment, both designed to offer you maximum comfort and relaxation. Enjoy the breathtaking view of the pool, the ideal place to relax and rejuvenate during your stay. Our apartments are perfect for couples, families or friends looking for a quiet and modern retreat surrounded by nature.

Name: Allegambe's Goed
Description:
Wie houdt van verwend worden, wandelen, fietsen, natuur, stilte en ontspanning kan in Allegambe’s Goed terecht om eventjes tot rust te komen, ver weg van alle drukte.
Na een verkwikkende nachtrust in een comfortabele kamer, geniet je ’s morgens van een uitgebreid ontbijt met producten van onze collega-landbouwers.
Allegambe’s Goed is gelegen in een waardevol agrarisch gebied. Je hebt er een prachtig uitzicht over de velden waar je volop van fauna en flora kan genieten.
Voor de meerwaardezoeker die een rustgevende vakantie wil, maar toch veel mogelijkheden in de buurt wil, bieden wij je een unieke uitvalsbasis om West-Vlaanderen te ontdekken.
We bevinden ons in een oase van rust, toch ligt onze B&B in de nabijheid van de autosnelweg (E40 -E403). 
Voor zakenmensen biedt onze ideale ligging de kortste route naar het werk. Ook voor groepen, teambuilding,  … ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres.
Van harte welkom.
Cis en Toon

Description:
We have a small and cozy digital nomads coliving and coworking place in surf paradise El Palmar in Cádiz, Spain. El Palmar is surf paradise #1 in Andalucía with more than 35 surf schools and many other surf spots very nearby. It is a very vibrant place with great day and nightlife. Great location for a balanced and healthy lifestyle with sunshine almost all year around and the best climate you can wish for in the most southern part of Europe. We are so close to Africa that you can actually see Morocco on normal, not too cloudy days which gives the scenery even more beauty.

Reconnect and focus on your project and get inspired by our workshops by experienced online marketers that will help you to improve your skills. Connect with other digital nomads and form collaborations with other visitors and digital nomads from within our community and in the area.

There are plenty of things to do like Spanish language courses, digital marketing courses, horse riding on the beach and dunes, bike rides in flower fields and to nearby white villages and beaches, surf (classes), windsurfing, kitesurfing (classes), paragliding, canoeing, paddle surf (SUP), hiking, climbing, yoga, meditation, detox, body, mind & sound healing, voleibol, eco agriculture meetings, retreats, cooking classes, wild mushroom picking and cooking, woodworks workshop, barbecues (we have barbecue on the site and large swimming pool with lounge area), wine tasting (visiting bodegas), concerts every day in El Palmar, Flamenco, culture, jam sessions, pizza and movie nights, visit the white villages such as beautiful neighborhood village Vejer de la Frontera on the hilltop and Conil de la Frontera. Activities depend on the type of guest and their preferences. We facilitate and guests can choose what they want to do and share with other without any obligations. You will find more tips on the website and can book a private call with us to get informed colivingdigitalnomad.com Join us at his amazing paradise!

Name: Viaggio della Vita - Bed n Breakfast
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Piemonte, our enchanting bed and breakfast offers a serene retreat surrounded by breathtaking landscapes, rolling hills, and vineyards. Immerse yourself in the region’s rich culture, where every corner tells a story and every meal is a celebration of local flavors.

Our cozy, elegantly appointed rooms blend rustic charm with modern comforts, ensuring a restful stay. Wake up each morning to the aroma of freshly brewed coffee and homemade pastries, lovingly prepared with local ingredients. Enjoy breakfast, or an afternoon aperitivo, on the sun-drenched terrace of our Vineyard View Suite overlooking the picturesque countryside or in the main level dining room. 

Explore the nearby historic towns, savor world-class wines at local wineries, or indulge in the delectable cuisine at charming trattorias. Whether you’re seeking adventure or relaxation, our knowledgeable hosts are here to help you plan the perfect itinerary.

Join us at Viaggio della Vita BnB in Piemonte, where every moment is a delightful escape into the heart of Italy. Experience warm hospitality, stunning views, and the true essence of Italian living. Book your stay today and create unforgettable memories in this hidden gem!

Name: Chateau de Cambayrac
Description:
Pouvant accueillir 12 personnes, ce château inscrit aux Monuments Historiques a été entièrement restauré. En famille ou entre amis, profitez de cette demeure de charme classée 4 étoiles, Gîte de France 5 épis, tout confort, dotée de six chambres, d’une piscine chauffée, d’un large parc et d’un bois privé ouvert aux promenades.
Aux confins du Quercy et du Rouergue, le château de Cambayrac se dresse à la croisée du Tarn-et-Garonne, de l’Aveyron, du Lot et du Tarn. Autant d’invitations à des aventures gastronomiques, culturelles et sportives, dans une nature préservée et flamboyante.

Name: Lemon Hostel and Guest House
Description:
No Lemon Hostel, proporcionamos uma experiência de alojamento acolhedora, acessível e vibrante, no coração da cidade. Valorizamos a hospitalidade, a diversidade e o espírito jovem, oferecendo um ambiente multicultural onde os hóspedes se sentem em casa. Com uma equipa dedicada e focada em proporcionar momentos únicos, garantimos conforto, diversão e uma atmosfera envolvente.

Estamos sempre à procura de talentos que partilhem a nossa paixão pela hospitalidade e que queiram crescer connosco num ambiente dinâmico e colaborativo. Se procuras uma oportunidade para fazer a diferença e contribuir para experiências memoráveis, o Lemon Hostel é o teu lugar!

Name: Sukoon Villa, Almora
Description:
Sukoon Villa isn’t just a retreat—it’s a sanctuary for those who dream bigger and think deeper.  Perched 1600 meters above sea level in the sacred land of Devbhoomi, this Himalayan haven is where big ideas find room to breathe.

Here, nature isn’t just a backdrop—it’s your boardroom.Whispering pines stand witness to your breakthroughs. Starlit skies become your strategy sessions.
And the rhythm of Pahadi life, in its simplicity and quiet grace, becomes your reminder of what truly matters.

Crafted by the founders of The Pahadi Story—who have always believed in the power of mindful pauses—Sukoon Villa invites you to slow down, reconnect with your purpose, and let your ideas flow.

In this spiritual heartland, every moment is an invitation to simplify, to see clearly, and to imagine boldly.

Come for the pause.
Leave with an idea that could change everything.

Propriété de la même famille depuis cinq générations, cette ancienne ferme gasconne du 19ème siècle entièrement éco-rénovée vous propose trois chambres d'hôtes confortables, une table d'hôtes gourmande, bio et locavore, un espace détente, une piscine écologique, dans un environnement préservé.

Description:
La Ferme de Wolphus est une grande propriété de plus de 13 hectares.

Transformée à partir de 1984 pour le tourisme et l’accueil. Située dans le Parc Naturel Régional des Caps et Marais d’Opale entre Calais et Saint Omer, la ferme se situe à la campagne et dans un cadre de vie apaisant et reposant. 

La ferme de Wolphus est un lieu exceptionnel à proximité des plus belles plages du nord et de nombreux centres culturels et historiques.

Name: The Vikings Retreat : a Boutique Holiday Cottage
Description:
The Vikings Retreat is a modern open plan self contained mini-cottage that sleeps two, located in the lovely village of Donington-on-Bain in the very heart of the Lincolnshire Wolds, an Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty. 

The retreat overlooks The Viking Way, a 147 mile national trail that starts on the banks of the River Humber and finishes at Oakham in Rutland, walk out of the garden gate and you're now standing on the Viking Way, turn right for Tealby and Walesby or turn left for Goulceby, Horncastle and beyond.  There are several popular established walks around the village too, from 2 miles to 7 miles, right out of the garden gate.  

The retreat has a modern wet room and kitchenette and sits in its own private garden of a quarter acre, overlooking the Lincolnshire Wolds in a predominantly south facing aspect.  

We have safe parking for a car, as well as secure parking for cycles and motorcycles too.  

The site offers a 'cube' for sitting and watching the sunset, or maybe to practice yoga, plus a firepit too and ample space to simply sit and relax.  

Camping for up to two further guests can be arranged, ask for details. 

The Viking's Retreat is ideal for those looking to unplug from life and relax, or maybe wishing to explore the area more.  Though we do have Wi-Fi and a TV, if you want to work remotely or binge watch Netflix.  

Cadwell Park race circuit is 4 miles away, historic Lincoln is 20 miles and Market Rasen Races 10 miles.  Race day transport can be arranged.  

We're located equidistant between the historic market towns of Louth, Market Rasen and Horncastle.  The traditional seaside towns of Cleethorpes, Skegness and Mablethorpe are only a short drive or ride away.  

Our popular and welcoming village pub offers fresh local food prepared to order along with a wide range of guest ales.

Name: Oplombike
Description: OPLOMBIKE Bed&Breakfast werd na een minutieuze renovatie omgebouwd tot exclusieve vakantiewoningen met alle comfort. De oude schuur doet nu dienst als een prachtige zaal voor allerlei bijeenkomsten. De locatie in Gooik (Parel van het Pajottenland) is uniek door de groene omgeving en dit op korte afstand van hoofdstad Brussel. Het historische “Hof te Mergelingen” (anno 1378) is de ideale locatie geworden voor wie het Pajottenland in alle rust wil ontdekken.

Name: Old Ing
Description:
A remote Yorkshire Dales farmhouse high on the moors on the foothills of Pen-y-ghent with two guest rooms offering a peaceful rural escape. 

There are views across to Whernside and the Ribblehead Viaduct from the front gate and walking and cycle trails on the doorstep, including the Pennine Way/Bridleway and the Yorkshire 3 Peaks. This is also a dark skies area, so perfect for star gazing. 

We are surrounded by a working farm, so the sheep are our only close neighbours. The perfect tranquil hideaway - no distractions except for stunning views!

Coming Soon! Self-directed creative-scientific residencies are in development. Please get in touch to discuss should this be something you are interested in.

Name: Het Verborgen Geluk
Description:
Met een landelijke, natuurrijke omgeving en de weidse Zeeuwse polder om de hoek is Het Verborgen Geluk al zeggen we het zelf allesbehalve standaard. Hier komt iedereen tot zijn geluk: van rustzoekers tot zakelijke teams, van interieurliefhebbers tot natuurliefhebbers.

Het Verborgen Geluk inspireert, prikkelt en ontspant. Van binnenkomst tot vertrek, van vergaderen tot overnachten, van brainstorm tot wandeling in de natuur. De locatie is zorgvuldig ingericht om rust, aandacht en persoonlijke service te combineren, met als doel iedere dag weer te verrassen.

In deze warme, huiselijke en luxe omgeving draait alles om genieten, verbinden en het ontstaan van waardevolle momenten. Ons doel is dat directieleden, teams, gasten en bezoekers een blijvende, bijzondere ervaring mee naar huis nemen. Laat je verwennen door onze persoonlijke service en ontdek wat deze verborgen plek voor jouw geluk kan betekenen.

www.bbhetverborgengeluk.nl

Name: BedStarLine B&B
Description:
Go back to the old times in this 16th century protected monument! The house is one of the first houses build in stone and has magnificent oak beems troughout the property. We could maintain the cosy and romantic feeling with today's comfort level. This makes you feel direct at home!
Always happy to assist you in any way to make your stay more comfortable. The hotspots and best locations for every occasion are well known. The positive reviews and the guestbook give so much satisfaction and we are happy to share this with you!
The rubenswalk take you trough the highlights of the historical city center and BedStarLine B&B is located right in the heart of this walk. In a street where traffic is not allowed to pass and just 300 meters from the main square. The oldest house in Antwerp are actually our neighbours!

Name: L'Autre Rives
Description:
In town, L'Autre Rives is a bed and breakfast very particular. Charm and character with a resolutely contemporary decoration for this accomodation. A large house with swimming pool 10 minutes walk from the city center. Large landscaped garden, a magnificent salt-water swimming pool, designer interior, spacious rooms, 5 themed rooms : Vintage, Scandinavian, Zen, Baroque and Ethnic
Lovers of decoration and design, this beautiful house from the 1930s which subtly combines evidence of its art deco past and pieces of furniture signed by great designers will seduce you.

L'Autre Rives benefits from an ideal location, in a calm and relaxing environment, just a 10-minute walk from the Sainte-Cécile d'Albi cathedral. Its undeniable advantages: a large landscaped garden, a magnificent salt water swimming pool which will refresh you on your return from your excursions, a designer interior, spacious rooms, 5 themed rooms: Vintage, Scandinavian, Zen, Baroque and Ethnic; to choose according to your tastes, your desires or your budget and the advice and good plans of Isabelle, the owner of the place.
Between heritage visits, lazing by the pool, session in the sauna or at the gym, breakfast in the garden, you won't have enough of a weekend to take advantage of this guest house and what Albi and the Tarn have to offer.

Name: LULU IN THE VALLEY Corfu Retreat
Description:
Welcome to Lulu In The Valley Corfu Retreat, a newly appointed two-bedroom traditional village house situated in the tranquil serendipity of historical Gastouri, Achileion, Central Corfu. This two-storey XVIII Century former village school features 2 fully airconditioned bedrooms, 1 bathroom/shower, a spacious living room, a large dining room, a kitchen, a balcony as well as an adjacent 30m² large sunny patio.

LULU IN THE VALLEY comfortably accommodates up to 4 adults, featuring privacy for 2 guests and complimentary wifi access.
It is located a 250m downhill walk from Kato Gastouri upper village parking, adjacent to Tony's Coffe Bar, just off the main road to nearby famous Achilleion's Palace.

"..Gastouri is a village that has a long and rich history, the first reference to it is found in 1474.
The village of Gastouri, built at an altitude of 120 meters, on the slopes of Mount Agioi Deka, is located about 12km [South of] the [old] city of Corfu [and the airport] in the eastern part of the island.." (source: MyKerkyra.com)

Description:
L’Oasis d’Essaouira est un petit Riad de charme du XVIIIème siècle, idéalement situé en plein cœur de la médina et à 10 minutes à pied de la plage, à louer en exclusivité ou par chambre.

Le Riad l’Oasis d’Essaouira s’élève sur 3 niveaux. Il est composé au rez-de-chaussée d’une cuisine, d’une salle à manger et, d’un charmant salon. Au 1er étage se trouve une Suite Luxe et une Chambre Luxe. Elles disposent chacune de leur salle de bain privative avec douche. Au dernier étage se trouve une Chambre Luxe qui dispose de sa salle de bain privative avec baignoire. Cette chambre donne sur la terrasse partagée du Riad où vous pourrez prendre un bain de soleil accompagné d’un jus d’orange frais ou d’un thé à la menthe et, en fin de journée boire un verre au coucher du soleil !

Name: Bohodyssey Hallan
Description:
BohOdyssey Hallan:
Redefining Hospitality in the Himalayas

Located in the serene and unexplored Hallan 1 Valley, BohOdyssey Hallan is more than just a homestay—it’s a curated experience designed for travelers seeking tranquility, inspiration, and authentic connections.

Blending the charm of boho-inspired interiors with the raw beauty of the Himalayas, we provide a unique escape for couples, solo explorers, and groups looking to immerse themselves in nature while enjoying modern comfort. Our focus is on creating an environment where guests can disconnect from the chaos of daily life and reconnect with themselves, their loved ones, and the untouched beauty around them.

At BohOdyssey Hallan, hospitality is more than providing a place to stay. It’s about crafting moments—whether it’s sharing stories under a starlit sky, indulging in local cuisine, or exploring the hidden trails of Hallan. Our mission is to offer personalized, meaningful experiences that leave lasting impressions on every guest.

We take pride in being a sustainable and inclusive destination, celebrating the harmony of local culture and global sensibilities. BohOdyssey is where modern travelers discover peace, purpose, and a sense of belonging.

If you’re ready to elevate your travel experience, let’s connect and collaborate to redefine how we explore the world.

Name: New Comb Hanoi Hostel
Description:
Located in the Old Quarter area, in the heart of Hanoi capital, near many tourist attractions such as Hoan Kiem Lake, Ngoc Son Temple, Dong Xuan Market, Long Bien Bridge, Train Street, The Comb Hanoi Hostel promises to be the Good choice for your travel.
We provide accommodation services with bunk beds and dormitories, fully equipped with amenities such as air conditioning, wifi, cafe and friendly, enthusiastic and hospitable customer service.
The best thing about coming to The Comb Hanoi Hostel is not only the optimal price, but also giving visitors the experience of making friends with other people. This makes it possible for you to share travel experiences together, creating memorable memories.

-

Nằm trong khu vực phố cổ, thuộc trung tâm thủ đô Hà Nội, gần nhiều địa điểm du lịch như Hồ Hoàn Kiếm, đền Ngọc Sơn,  chợ Đồng Xuân, cầu Long Biên, phố đường tàu, The Comb Hanoi Hostel  là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho chuyến du lịch của bạn.

Điều tuyệt vời nhất khi đến với The Comb Hanoi Hostel không chỉ là sự tối ưu về giá cả, mà còn mang lại cho du khách trải nghiệm kết bạn với những người cùng lưu trú. Điều này giúp  bạn có thể chia sẻ những kinh nghiệm du lịch cùng nhau, tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ.

Name: Gîte Le Pré Charville - Activités et loisirs
Description:
Situé à Trévignin, à seulement 15 minutes du Lac du Bourget, Le Pré Charville est un gîte qui allie confort et aventure. Niché au cœur du Parc Naturel Régional des Bauges, notre gîte offre un cadre idyllique pour des séjours mémorables.

Nous disposons de quatre appartements spacieux et entièrement équipés, parfaits pour les familles ou les groupes d'amis, chacun avec des terrasses ou des balcons offrant des vues imprenables sur les montagnes.

Au Pré Charville, les activités de plein air sont à l'honneur. Raphaël Jochaud, le propriétaire et moniteur expérimenté, vous propose des activités comme le canyoning, via ferrata, escalade et grands rappels. Il est là pour vous accompagner, que vous soyez débutant ou expérimenté.

Pour les moments de détente, profitez de notre piscine chauffée, des espaces de relaxation, et d'un terrain de badminton pour des moments conviviaux.

Que vous cherchiez l'aventure ou la tranquillité, Le Pré Charville est la destination idéale pour des vacances exceptionnelles en Savoie, à proximité du magnifique Lac du Bourget.

Name: Pekoe Lodge
Description:
Welcome to Pekoe Lodge! 

Nestled in the heart of Maskeliya, Sri Lanka, Pekoe Lodge is your ultimate destination for an unforgettable stay amidst the serene beauty of the highlands. 

About Us:
 Pekoe Lodge, formerly a tea transportation warehouse dating back to the 1940s, has been thoughtfully transformed into a unique boutique Airbnb. Our lodge boasts a rich history and rustic charm, making it a perfect blend of heritage and modern comfort.

Our Specialisation:
Planning to conquer the iconic Adams Peak? Look no further! Pekoe Lodge is strategically situated close to Adams Peak, making it the ideal base camp for hikers and families seeking adventure. Our comfortable and affordable accommodations are designed to cater to the needs of those embarking on the Adams Peak hike, ensuring a restful night's sleep before your ascent.

Additional Highlights:
 Pekoe Lodge is not only a gateway to Adams Peak but also a gateway to the world of tea. We are located in close proximity to tea estates and factories, offering you an opportunity to immerse yourself in the history and culture of Sri Lanka's renowned tea industry.

Our lodge also offers breathtaking views of the Maussakelle reservoir, allowing you to relax and unwind while surrounded by the beauty of nature.

Don't miss the chance to explore the nearby Gartmore falls, adding another layer of adventure to your stay at Pekoe Lodge.

Our Mission:
At Pekoe Lodge, our mission is simple yet profound – to provide a warm and welcoming haven for travellers exploring the wonders of Sri Lanka's central highlands. We are committed to delivering exceptional hospitality and a unique experience that blends comfort and affordability.

Join us on this exciting journey as we share the beauty of Maskeliya, the awe-inspiring Adams Peak, and the captivating surroundings with the world.

Connect with us for the latest updates, travel tips, and exclusive offers. We look forward to being a part of your Sri Lankan adventure!

ZenBlad is an inn nestled in a unique natural setting, offering the perfect blend of modern comfort and local traditions. Whether you're seeking relaxation or adventure, ZenBlad is the ideal place to recharge in the beauty of nature.

Your refuge of tranquility and authenticity.

HI Israel is a non-profit public organization, and its main areas of activity are providing affordable hosteling, tourism and tour-guiding for individuals, families and groups from Israel and abroad, all for an affordable budget. Name: RAD Homes Dubai

RAD Homes Dubai: Where Unforgettable Vacation Escapes Begin

Name: Douceur des Pins
Description:
Douceur des Pins vous offre une chambre de 20m² pour 2 personnes, avec accès indépendant, terrasse privative et salle d'eau privée de 5 m2. Située au sud de l'île, dans le charmant village de Saint-Trojan-les-Bains, la chambre d'hôtes est rapidement accessible depuis le pont et vous pourrez stationner votre véhicule dans la propriété.

Le cadre apaisant de Douceur des Pins est idéal pour se ressourcer au calme et profiter de la nature. Au programme de votre séjour : réveil avec vue sur le jardin paysager, petit déjeuner servi sur la terrasse ou dans la salle commune, promenades au cœur de la forêt ou au bord de l'océan, baignade dans la grande piscine chauffée (en utilisation exclusive, équipée de la  nage à contre-courant) et repos à l'ombre des pins. Vous aurez peut-être même la chance d'apercevoir les chevreuils qui aiment se promener à l'arrière de la maison.

La proximité de la forêt domaniale vous donnera accès à de nombreuses possibilités de randonnées pédestres ou promenades cyclistes. La plage de Gatseau et son centre de Thalassothérapie, la plage du Soleil ou la Grande-Plage sont accessibles en vélo en quelques minutes. Un local fermé est mis à disposition pour garer vos vélos en toute sécurité.

Corinne et David, vos hôtes, seront ravis de vous accueillir et vous conseiller dans la découverte de l'île. Ils ont prêté une attention particulière à faire de ce lieu un véritable havre de paix. Votre chambre, exposée plein sud, est équipée d'un lit Queen Size, parfait pour de bonnes nuits de sommeil. Et si la déco de votre chambre vous plaît, vous aurez même l'occasion d'y chiner quelques objets !

Alors, qu'attendez-vous pour vous évader au paradis ? Réservez votre séjour dès aujourd'hui !

La chambre est non-fumeur et n'est pas adaptée aux enfants et aux animaux.

Name: Estonia Hébergement Nature
Description:
Notre domaine se spécialise dans l’accueil de groupes en quête de ressourcement et de cohésion : retraites de yoga, formations professionnelles, rassemblements d’équipe ou séjours corporatifs. Ici, chaque détail est pensé pour offrir un cadre où l’on décroche du quotidien afin de mieux se recentrer.

L’hébergement
Nous offrons 8 chambres douillettes, chacune avec salle de bain privée, ainsi que 4 mini-chalets, nichés en forêt, accessibles par un court sentier. Ces options permettent d’allier confort et intimité, que ce soit pour une petite équipe soudée ou un groupe plus large.

Des espaces modulables
Notre grande salle commune avec foyer, hamacs suspendus et lumière naturelle se transforme selon vos besoins : repas conviviaux, ateliers créatifs, cours de yoga ou même séances de danse en groupe. À l’extérieur, la forêt et les sentiers deviennent un terrain de jeu idéal pour des ateliers en nature.

 Zone spa
Deux cuves nordiques, un sauna sec, un coin feu et un lac pour les cold plunge composent un espace bien-être en pleine nature. L’endroit parfait pour alterner entre travail d’équipe, détente et reconnexion à soi.

Pourquoi choisir Estonia ?
Parce que nous croyons que les meilleurs apprentissages et les liens durables se créent hors du cadre habituel. Ici, la tranquillité, la nature et l’authenticité favorisent la concentration, la créativité et la complicité entre collègues.

Estonia, c’est plus qu’un lieu d’hébergement. C’est un havre de paix où chaque séjour devient une expérience mémorable.

Name: SUDOPARK
Description:
Sudopark je rekreačný areál nachádzajúci sa v srdci Kysúc, obklopený nádhernou prírodou a čerstvým horským vzduchom. Ponúka široké spektrum aktivít a služieb, ktoré uspokoja rôzne potreby návštevníkov, či už ide o rodiny, páry, priateľov, alebo firemné akcie.
Jedným z hlavných lákadiel Sudoparku je jeho wellness ponuka. Hostia si môžu vychutnať horúce kúpele v drevených sudoch alebo relaxovať v ohňom vykurovanom "čertovom kúpeli", čo poskytuje jedinečný zážitok pod holým nebom za každého počasia

Name: Casa de los cactus
Description:
Descubre Galicia alojándote en un precioso chalet con todas las facilidades: piscina de gran tamaño, barbacoa, comedor exterior, zona chillout, jardín con estanque, a pocos kilómetros del centro de la ciudad y de la playa. 
Disfruta de entrañables veladas al aire libre en la zona chill out a la luz de la hoguera, o date un refrescante baño bajo las estrellas. Demuestra tus dotes de cocinero preparando deliciosos manjares en la brasa de la barbacoa. Descansa en las hamacas colgadas en los árboles mientras disfrutas de tu libro preferido. Relájate, descansa y construye recuerdos que te acompañarán toda la vida. 

Nuestra villa está ubicada en pleno corazón de As Rías Baixas, con todos los servicios necesarios en apenas un kilómetro de distancia. ¿A qué estás esperando para reservarlo?

Name: Arpian Valmorel
Description:
L’Arpian incarne bien plus qu’un simple chalet : c’est un morceau d’histoire du village. 

Ancien hôtel, ce lieu emblématique de 450 m² a été réinventé pour offrir des séjours inoubliables en famille ou entre amis : espaces de vie généreux, bar, family room, fitness, sauna, ... tout cela a seulement 5 minutes du centre de Valmorel !

Au fil des rires, des repas partagés et des soirées animées, L’Arpian deviendra le décor de vos plus beaux souvenirs. Ceux qui se racontent encore des années plus tard, en se remémorant ces instants hors du temps. 

Bienvenue dans ce chalet unique de 450m² à Valmorel, pensé pour rassembler famille et amis dans un cadre chaleureux et authentique. 

Véritable coeur du chalet, l’espace de vie de 100m2 composé d’un salon séjour de 75m² avec son magnifique bar en bois d’époque, témoignant du passé du lieu en tant qu’ancien restaurant, et d’une grande cuisine attenante de 25m², entièrement équipée, invite à la convivialité et au partage avec ses proches. 


Au 1er et 2nd niveaux vous retrouvez 8 chambres doubles ainsi que 2 dortoirs de 4 et 6 lits et 10 salles de bain, chacun profite ainsi de son espace d'intimité tout en partageant des moments inoubliables.

Pour le divertissement, direction la family room de 40m² au rez-de-chaussée, équipée d’un écran géant, d'une borne d’arcade pour replonger dans les jeux vidéo de votre enfance, d'une Wii pour des moments de rigolade, d'un baby-foot, ainsi que d'un bar et d'un karaoké avec jeux de lumière. Un véritable espace de fun pour tous les âges ! 

Un local ski avec sèche chaussures est également à votre disposition pour un confort optimal. 

Que ce soit pour cuisiner ensemble dans la grande cuisine, partager un verre au bar de l’ancien restaurant, ou vous détendre dans le salon spacieux, tout le chalet vous est entièrement réservé pour que vous vous sentiez comme chez vous.

Name: Casa Eusebia y Eusebio
Description:
Casa Eusebia y Eusebio est une chambre d'hôtes chaleureuse et familiale, située à Viñales, dans l'ouest de Cuba. Le parc naturel de Viñales est inscrit au patrimoine mondial de l'UNESCO et mérite le détour !
Nous proposons une seule chambre à louer, avec deux lits doubles : c'est idéal pour une, deux ou quatre personnes ! Elle est équipée d'une salle de bain privative, d'un climatiseur moderne, silencieux et économe (inverter) ainsi que d'un minibar pour garder vos boissons au frais.
Vous pourrez également profiter du porche avec ses rocking chairs (et peut-être apercevoir un colibri en fin d'après-midi), le patio et la terrasse sur le toit pour observer le magnifique paysage.
De plus, nous servons aussi de délicieux repas et cocktails, nous vous invitons à consulter les évaluations dithyrambiques de notre chef Eusebia !
Nous sommes également là pour vous informer sur les nombreuses activités à faire à Viñales, comment se déplacer et qui sait, apprendre à jouer au fameux domino cubain !
Ainsi, nous vous disons à bientôt, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter, nous vous répondrons au plus vite,
À très bientôt !
Eusebia y Eusebio

Name: Enervillas Greece: Accessible PassiveHouse Premium Villas
Description:
Enervillas is a pioneering eco-luxury destination situated in the picturesque landscapes of Greece, providing affluent families with an exclusive blend of privacy, relaxation, and adventure. Our properties, including the esteemed villas Anna and Nefeli, are paradigms of sustainable tourism, boasting Passive House Premium certification, demonstrating our commitment to eco-conscious living without compromising on luxury.

At the heart of our ethos lies advanced KNX smart technology and energy management systems, ensuring that our villas not only conserve energy but produce more than they consume, offering an energy-plus accommodation experience. This allows our guests to indulge in modern comforts while maintaining a minimal environmental footprint.

Privacy is paramount at Enervillas. Each villa offers spacious living areas, state-of-the-art 75" TVs, and gourmet kitchens, alongside a private 55m² pool, verdant garden, and dedicated BBQ area, ensuring a sanctuary for families to create lasting memories.

We cater to families with children of all ages, providing everything from water games to playrooms, and are ideally located near attractions like Kalogria Beach and Strofilia Forest for boundless exploration.

Our direct booking deals reflect our belief that luxury should be accessible, offering unmatched rates and value. Guests are welcomed with special treats, including complimentary late check-out, and occasionally an additional night's stay.

Enervillas is more than a stay—it's an experience, carefully curated to exceed expectations, marrying adventure, relaxation, and sustainable living. We invite you to embrace the Enervillas difference, where luxury living is redefined for the eco-conscious traveler.

Name: Coral Stayz
Description: Coral Stayz is a new age Co-living, Student Housing and Serviced Accommodation. Smart Property Management with App based Booking, KYC, digital rent collection and Automated receipts and complaints resolutions. With over 200 beds in Bangalore and Mysore catering to Students, Working men and women. Expanding soon and enabling growth of Co-Living sector with shared housing and Property Management services.

Name: Vostani Rural Rest Area
Description: Vostani is a place of rural tourism in Halavar village of Lori Region. We offer eco-lodging, apitherapy, rural food, stargazing, horseback riding, jeeping and hiking in the mountains.

Name: Reserva Mata Grande
Description:
We are a Nature Park. 
A set of ecotourism resources, in a protected area, dedicated to the preservation of the natural and cultural heritage of our region, on top of the Serra do Mar. We provide an environment of leisure, sports and immersive experiences in the greatest biodiversity of Brazil. 

We are Reserva Mata Grande.
We are located less than 100 km from São Paulo, in the Altitude Atlantic Forest: one of the richest ecosystems on the planet. This type of biome brings together a set of biotopes such as marshland, mid-hills, hilltops, waterfalls, and rocks that shelter specific fauna and flora in the midst of a water source, an ideal scenario for nature lovers.

Name: Hiker Hostel and Resale
Description:
Hiker Hostel and Resale is located on M 77 in Germfask, Michigan. Conveniently located for budget travelers and those looking to do a little of shopping! We specialize in $5 or less books & books signed by Michigan Authors. 

Local artists and kitchy/vintage resale items!

Name: The Local Tribe - Cafe & Homestay
Description:
The Local Tribe - Cafe and Homestay in Sonada is a charming establishment that was started in 2022 by a passionate young entrepreneur hailing from the picturesque Mooonda Kotee tea garden. Situated in the serene town of Sonada, amidst the breathtaking hills of Darjeeling district in West Bengal, India, this homestay and cafe offer an authentic and immersive experience for travelers seeking a peaceful retreat in the lap of nature.

The Homestay:
The homestay portion of The Local Tribe provides cozy and comfortable rooms that are thoughtfully designed to offer guests a homely atmosphere. The rooms are equipped with all essential amenities, and each one offers a delightful view of the surrounding tea gardens and lush green hills. Visitors can wake up to the soothing sounds of nature and enjoy the fresh mountain air from the comfort of their rooms.

The Cafe:
The cafe at The Local Tribe is a focal point for guests and locals alike. The warm and welcoming ambiance complements the stunning natural beauty outside. The cafe's rustic decor and local touch create a unique and memorable dining experience. Visitors can relish a variety of local and regional delicacies, as well as international cuisine, all prepared with care and using fresh, locally sourced ingredients. The cafe's menu caters to various tastes and dietary preferences, ensuring that everyone finds something delightful to indulge in.

Good Reviews:
The Local Tribe - Cafe and Homestay has garnered excellent reviews on Google, a testament to the quality of service and experience it offers. Visitors have praised the picturesque location, friendly staff, and the sumptuous food served at the cafe. Many have commended the owner's dedication to creating an authentic experience and supporting the local community through their business.

Name: Vaayu Hospitality Group
Description: VaayuStays is a haven where personalized hospitality, immersive experiences, and exceeding expectations converge. From warm greetings to curated spaces, every detail reflects our commitment to make each guest feel truly at home. Our relentless pursuit of excellence ensures unforgettable memories, personalized recommendations, and a sense of belonging. Welcome to hospitality redefined.

Name: Tierra Stay
Description:
At Tierra Stay, we believe that every journey deserves a destination as unique and memorable. With that vision in mind, we are ready to welcome you to our villas nestled in the serene beauty of Uttarakhand.

Currently, we offer five exquisite villas, each thoughtfully designed to blend comfort, luxury, and the natural charm of the Himalayas. Whether you’re seeking a peaceful retreat, a family getaway, or a romantic escape, we promise an experience tailored to your desires.

Name: Zarrien Holiday Homes
Description:
Zarrien Holiday Homes is a boutique vacation rental and property management company in Dubai, offering stylish, fully furnished apartments designed for comfort and luxury. We provide seamless short-stay experiences with five-star amenities, personalised guest service, and meticulous attention to detail. 

For property owners, we handle everything. From listings and bookings to guest relations and maintenance, maximising rental returns while ensuring each home is cared for as if it were our own.

Name: Les loges de la nature
Description:
Hébergement insolite au coeur de la Montagne Bourbonnaise en Allier.
La kerterre, dôme autoporté en chanvre, chaux et sable, vous accueille pour un séjour dépaysant et inoubliable au plus près de la nature, et pour un retour à la simplicité.
Point de superflu, et pourtant vous ne manquerez de rien dans ce lieu de calme et de sérénité.
Déconnexion assurée de votre quotidien, et reconnexion à la nature environnante.

Name: MAISON MARIE BARRAULT
Description:
La MAISON MARIE BARRAULT est avant tout une maison gorgée d'histoire … aujourd'hui c'est une Maison d'Hôtes déco design dans une demeure de fin 19ème siècle, située au cœur du Bocage Vendéen à quelques minutes du fameux parc du Puy du Fou.
Adaptée aussi bien pour les séjours touristiques en famille, entre amis, en groupe, que pour les déplacements professionnels.
Nous vous invitons à venir découvrir notre région et profiter des nombreuses activités touristiques, sportives et historiques.

Name: Hostel Honeycomb
Description:
Welcome to Hostel Honeycomb, your gateway to the best of Cebu City! Nestled at the iconic Tops Lookout, our hostel offers a breathtaking 360-degree view of Cebu’s tri-cities and lush mountain landscapes. Whether you’re a solo traveler, digital nomad, or adventurer, Hostel Honeycomb is your home in the hills, perfectly blending comfort, entertainment, and unforgettable experiences.

At Hostel Honeycomb, every stay is designed to delight. Our amenities include:
 A vibrant restaurant and bar serving delicious local and international flavors.
 A nomad co-working space for remote workers seeking productivity in paradise.
 A fully-equipped gym and relaxing bonfire area.
 Inviting communal spaces, both indoors and outdoors, where friendships are made.
 A convenient pantry for your everyday needs.

Step outside and explore The Circle, a lively hub just at our doorstep, featuring Cebu’s finest restaurants, bars, cafés, and souvenir shops—all accessible to our guests without entry fees.

The Hive Experience
We take pride in creating a buzzing community of like-minded travelers. With daily activities such as live music, quiz nights, and fun games, there’s always something happening to keep our “bees” entertained. Come vibe with the hive and make memories that will last a lifetime!

Traveling to Hostel Honeycomb is as easy as it is affordable:
 Take our daily shuttle buses from I.T Park in Cebu City directly to Tops and Hostel Honeycomb (₱50 per way).
 From the airport, ride the MyBus to SM City Cebu (₱50), then transfer to a jeepney or taxi to I.T Park.
 Prefer a direct ride? Taxis or motorcycle taxis cost around ₱300-₱600 each way.

Simply search 'Tops Cebu' or 'Hostel Honeycomb Cebu' on Google Maps for precise directions.

Join the Hive
Whether you’re here to relax, explore, or connect, Hostel Honeycomb is more than a place to stay—it’s an experience. Book your next adventure with

Name: Cedar Ridge Nashville

Name: Yoga You Travel
Description:
Yogaretreats in een kleine groep. Op een ongedwongen manier, met gevoel voor humor en lekker eten. In een niet-competitieve sfeer.

Name: Glamping Remanso

Name: Sol da Mantiqueira Pousada
Description:
Recém-construída no bairro Jaguaribe, um dos mais charmosos e centrais de Campos do Jordão, a Pousada Sol da Mantiqueira nasceu do desejo de oferecer uma experiência de hospedagem que une conforto, localização privilegiada e o calor acolhedor de um verdadeiro lar.

Com arquitetura elegante e ambientes cuidadosamente planejados, nossa pousada convida os hóspedes a desfrutarem da beleza da Serra da Mantiqueira com tranquilidade, estilo e bem-estar. Um refúgio sereno na cidade mais alta do Brasil.

Name: Wernöe & Granitz, Lda
Description:
Welcome to our cabin in Sirevåg, Norway! This scenic area boasts stunning sea cliffs, pristine white sandy beaches, and excellent hiking opportunities. Built in 2024, the cabin combines modern design with comfort, featuring two cozy bedrooms and a loft.

We’re also excited to announce that short-term tourist accommodations in Madeira will be available soon!

Name: Seagull Studio Vacation Suite
Description: Seagull Studio Vacation Suite is a luxurious one-bedroom suite just steps from the ocean. All guests have access to their own private patio where they can bbq or ride our complimentary bikes. Come and breath in the fresh ocean air while you relax, rejuvenate and rekindle at your perfect getaway destination.

Name: Gidu Ilhabela
Description:
Desfrute de uma estadia única na encantadora Pousada Gidu Ilhabela, onde o conforto de hotel encontra a atmosfera acolhedora de uma casa na praia. Localizada a apenas 650 metros da balsa, nossa pousada oferece a combinação perfeita entre proximidade e tranquilidade. Inspirada na ideia de uma casa de veraneio, a Gidu Ilhabela tornou-se um refúgio familiar que acolhe todos como parte da
 nossa própria família.

Missão:
Na Gidu Ilhabela, nossa missão é criar não apenas uma hospedagem, mas uma experiência acolhedora e memorável para todos os nossos hóspedes. Como uma família apaixonada por Ilhabela, buscamos compartilhar não apenas o conforto das nossas suítes, mas também a beleza desta ilha paradisíaca. Nosso compromisso é oferecer um ambiente onde a amizade floresce, proporcionando momentos inesquecíveis em um cenário deslumbrante. Seja parte da nossa jornada e leve consigo lembranças incríveis da sua estadia na Gidu Ilhabela.

Name: Room Pilot
Description:
Premium Short-Term & Vacation Rental Specialists – London
At Veevo Home, we specialize in the full-service management of premium short-term lets and vacation rentals across London. We partner with property owners and investors to unlock the full potential of their homes, delivering a high-yield rental experience tailored to today’s luxury travelers.
From staging and listing to guest vetting, housekeeping, and 24/7 guest support, we handle every aspect of the rental process with discretion, professionalism, and attention to detail.

Name: Casas de Los Andes
Description: Mendoza, ubicada al pie de los majestuosos Andes, es un destino ideal para organizar reuniones de trabajo corporativas en un entorno mágico.

Name: Srishti The Farm
Description:
Srishti - The Farm | Corporate Wellness Retreat | Nature Staycations | Agri-Tours 
Not your regular resort. Not your regular team outing.

Srishti - The Farm is a one-of-a-kind wellness retreat designed to help teams disconnect from screens and reconnect with nature. Located just 2 hours from Chennai, this 18-acre farm stay blends traditional charm with modern comfort, offering a refreshing escape from work stress.

Here’s what makes us different:
 Corporate Wellness Retreats – Recharge with nature, reduce stress, and boost productivity.
 Staycations & Offsites – A refreshing alternative to conference rooms, set amidst paddy fields and coconut groves.
 Agri-Tours & Outdoor Experiences – From farm-to-table meals to hands-on farming experiences, your team bonds over nature.
 Immersive Activities – Sky-gazing, bullock cart rides, pond-side High Brainstorming session, and more!

Give your team more than just an outing—give them an experience that refreshes the mind, body, and spirit.

 Located near Cheyyur, Chennai |  Private & Customizable Corporate Retreats |  Stay, Unwind & Connect

DM us for bookings or call +91 90809 03414 to plan your next corporate getaway!

Name: MAS DES VIOLETTES
Description: 2 cottages and 5 guest houses, in the middle of nature, facing the Pic Saint Loup, which can accommodate up to 49 people. An ideal place to organize a family stay, a wedding, a seminar, to celebrate an event, a birthday, a family celebration. Many activities possible at the Mas (ping pong, electric mountain biking) and surroundings (hiking, cycling, climbing, horseback riding, ...)

Name: B&B Hoeve BuytenHout
Description: Where business meets luxury. Experience our six beautiful rooms at Hoeve BuytenHout in Delft, The Netherlands.

Name: Winnica Nad Źródłem
Description:
Winnica nad Źródłem – więcej niż wino, więcej niż wypoczynek
U podnóża majestatycznych Gór Świętokrzyskich, bije źródło naszej pasji – dosłownie i w przenośni. Jesteśmy rodzinną winnicą, która z równą uwagą dogląda winorośli, co z dumą serwuje gościom kieliszek rzemieślniczego trunku. Tu, gdzie woda ze źródła warzy się nie tylko w ziemi, ale i w duszach odwiedzających, każdy dzień zaczynamy od pytania: “Jak dziś zaskoczyć Was smakiem i atmosferą?” 
Co mamy w ofercie?
•	 Produkcja wina
Ręcznie zbierane grona, fermentacja z pazurem i butelkowanie z sercem. Nasze wina to kalejdoskop aromatów – od żwawych białych, przez soczyste czerwienie, aż po toastowe różowe.
•	 Domki w winnicy
Drewniane, przytulne, z widokiem na rzędy winorośli i koronujące to wszystko Góry Świętokrzyskie. Zapomnijcie o WiFi? Spokojnie, światłowód też mamy – ale połączenie z naturą jest dużo silniejsze!
•	 Wydarzenia z charakterem
Urodziny? Wieczór panieński? Spotkanie biznesowe przy… beczce? Stylowa sala degustacyjna/bankietowa czeka na Wasze pomysły.
•	 Przygoda za progiem
Tu rozciągają się piesze i rowerowe szlaki godne Tour de Świętokrzyskie – od krętych dróżek wijących się między winoroślami, przez leśne dukty, po trasy prowadzące do mnóstwa atrakcji. Każdy kilometr to opowieść, którą odkryjesz na własne buty (lub koła).
Dlaczego warto nas odwiedzić?
•	Autentyczność i ludzkie podejście – tu nie ma korpo‐bezduszniactwa.
•	Klimat, który zostaje w pamięci – zobaczysz, jak świta wśród winorośli, a wieczór spędzony przy ognisku z kieliszkiem w ręku to najlepszy scenariusz na reset!
•	Elastyczność – od weekendowego wypadu z rodziną, przez romantyczny wypad we dwoje, po konferencję wśród butelek (brzmi odważnie, ale działa!).
Wpadnij do nas na degustację, weekendowy chillout albo event, który Twoi goście będą wspominać latami. Pamiętaj – tu każda kropla wina ma historię, a każda wizyta staje się Waszą opowieścią.

Name: La Conciergerie du Bessin
Description: La Conciergerie du Bessin, spécialiste de la location saisonnière, répond aux besoins des propriétaires et des voyageurs.

Name: Zelante Guest House
Description:
Nestled in the tranquil suburb of Garsfontein, Zelante is a charming self-catering villa that promises a relaxing and peaceful stay.

The villa comprises 2 separate en-suite bedrooms, each thoughtfully designed to accommodate up to 2 guests. Guests can choose between queen- or king-size beds for their comfort, and the en-suite bathrooms are fitted with showers. In-room facilities include a bar fridge and convenient heat-and-eat amenities that include a microwave and a kettle. Wi-Fi is also available for guests' convenience.

Zelante offers a range of on-site facilities, including a communal lounge and bar area, a swimming pool, a well-equipped gym, an outdoor patio with dining arrangements, a boma fire pit, and recreational spaces for guests to enjoy their meals and drinks. All necessary cutlery, crockery, and glasses are provided, and a private office can be arranged upon request. Secure parking is available on-site.

Conveniently situated near local shops and restaurants, Zelante is an ideal accommodation choice for business travelers or guests passing through the town, providing a comfortable and convenient home away from home.

Name: Yellow Nest Hostel Barcelona
Description: We have different types of rooms to suit your needs. You can choose between shared rooms with simple and colorful decorations with air conditioning (for the summer) and heating (for the winter), private lockers and shared bathroom with hair dryer, or if you are looking for a bit more of privacy can choose private rooms with private bathroom.

Name: Les Hauts de Monségu
Description:
Au milieu du Parc Naturel Régional, Les Hauts de Monségu à Rimont offre une situation centrale sur le département de l’Ariège.
Nous vous proposons une cabane dans les arbres ainsi qu'un gîte de charme, tous les 2 tout équipé et possédant une terrasse avec spa privatif. 
Vous pourrez y découvrir de très nombreux lieux de visites culturelles mais aussi y pratiquer de nombreuses activités en lien avec la nature : randonnées pédestres, cyclistes, trails, canyoning, escalade, golf..
Les hébergements des Hauts de Monségu se situent à moins d’une heure trente de Toulouse, Carcassonne ou l’Andorre et à moins de deux heures de Montpellier, Perpignan ou Tarbes.

Name: Barros e Cambraia Sul Alojamentos LTDA
Description: A Barros e Cambraia esta há 24 anos no mercado atendendo grandes empresas em obras por todo Brasil, envolvidos em grandes projetos e visando sempre a melhoria no seu seguimento.

Name: La Chollerie de Marmaju
Description:
Maison très spacieuse (350m²) avec grand jardin clos et piscine chauffée (accessible entre mi-avril et octobre sous réserve de bonnes conditions climatiques)
Composée de 6 grandes chambres de plus de 20m² et de 4 sdb avec douches dont une chambre et une Salle de douche au rdc.
1 pièce de vie très spacieuse et lumineuse (environ 80m²) avec cuisine ouverte 
Idéale pour vos événements : Réunions de famille, Séminaires, professionnels, Anniversaires, EVG/EVJF, Vacances entre amis, Séjours adaptés, etc.

Name: Casa Vina Del Mar - Sitges
Description:
Casa Vina del Mar is a secluded hilltop villa just 15 minutes from Sitges and 30 minutes from Barcelona Airport. Located in a protected national park and surrounded by vineyards, it offers sweeping sea views and total privacy.

The villa features two double bedrooms, two bathrooms, a private pool, a spacious terrace, and fast Starlink internet ideal for remote work. Perfect for couples, small groups, and professionals seeking a restful escape or a creative retreat.

Available year-round for weekly stays, seasonal getaways, and wellness retreats.

Name: Leghorn Touring
Description: Servizi in alloggi turistici e strutture ricettive extra-alberghieri - Organizzazione eventi e catering - Consulenza immobiliare - Sviluppo Club Deal

Name: Quinta de Recião
Description:
Por entre socalcos e olivais, ao longo da margem do rio Varosa estende-se a Quinta de
Recião. As três casas estão localizadas entre a vinha e o rio, com uma vista idílica sobre
este vale encantado.
Ideal para daqui partir à aventura e à descoberta desta tão rica região, onde a natureza nos
abre as portas a lugares de beleza incomparável e inesquecível que refletem séculos e
séculos de História traduzindo um vasto Património Monumental.

Name: B&B De Korenwolf
Description: De sfeervolle B&B De Korenwolf is gelegen in het Zuid-Limburgse Puth.Genoemd naar een beschermde hamster die alleen leeft in Zuid-Limburg. Het beestje is vitaal, actief, houdt van een warm holletje en lekker eten. Dat is alles waar onze B&B voor staat in een omgeving die in trek is bij fietsers en wandelaars die het Pieterpad en Pelgrimspad volgen.

Name: Casa Aiva
Description:
We are a little farm and we also love to host people from all the world in our two houses overlooking the vineyard. In every season of the year, you can stay in a spacious and welcoming apartment, "Casa Aiva", or in the romantic cottage "Il Ciabutin", and enjoy a region still very authentic, away from confusion and beaten tourist tracks, but only 40 km. from the lively city of Turin.
This place fascinated us the first time we saw it. Waking up you watch the sunrise and relaxing in the evening one is grateful for this view that they can never have enough of. The choice of name sums up the pleasant feeling that is enjoyed here all year round.
Aiva means Acqua (Water): at the propriety there is a water source, very important for the fields (agriculture, vegetable garden and the vineyard) and for the animals.
The name Aiva also summarises 4 significant words for us:
Aria (Air): here the air is clear. Incanto (Enchainting): from here we enjoy an incredibile view over the plains which extend to Turin and eventually to Cuneese. Vacanza (Holiday): we invite you to spend some days here to relax, in contact with nature and in a sustainable environment. Agricoltura (Agriculture): we enjoy cultivating the Vineyard, the orchard, and the vegetable garden, which provides us with healthy products which are good all year round.

Name: Casa 81
Description:
Around 39 km from Guarda Train Station and 42 km from Castelo da Guarda, Casa 81 provides free WiFi and a terrace. Featuring free private parking, this villa is in an area where guests can enjoy activities such as hiking and cycling.

This air-conditioned villa has 5 bedrooms, a living room, a fully equipped kitchen with a fridge and coffee machine, and 5 bathrooms with a bath or shower and free toiletries. A flat-screen TV with cable channels is available.

Casa 81 offers a daily buffet breakfast.

Casa 81 offers a bicycle rental service.

Guarda Cathedral is 43 km from Casa 81, while Capela do Calvário - Belmonte is 44 km away. The nearest airport is Viseu Aerodrome, which is 124 km from Casa 81.

Name: PIERRES BLANCHES GUERANDE- Maison d'hôtes
Description: Séjournez en chambre d’hôtes ou en maison privative [10 à 12 personnes) entre amis, en famille dans la dépendance fraîchement rénovée le temps d’un week-end ou d’une semaine pour découvrir la beauté de la presqu’île guérandaise.

Name: Terra Alta Do Furnia
Description:
Terra Alta do Furnia es una antigua casona de 1813 rehabilitada en el año 2015. Conserva el más mínimo detalle de su esencia del siglo XIX, como una lareira de piedra presidiendo el hall de entrada y un sistema de obtención de miel empotrado en la pared de piedra del salón.



La cocina se encuentra totalmente equipada. Cuenta con una mesa amplia para todos los comensales (disponibilidad de trona), haciendo así también, de comedor. El amplio salón cuenta con un televisor que también dispone de Smart TV y muebles para almacenaje. En una de las zonas más soleadas de la vivienda, se encuentra el rincón de lectura, en el que se podrá disfrutar de un buen libro o revista.

 

En el exterior de la vivienda, los huéspedes podrán disfrutar de un jardín de 2.000 metros cuadrados. En él se encuentra una piscina de 4x8 m. con profundidad de 1,55 m. Justo al lado de ésta, se encuentra la zona de solarium con tumbonas para disfrutar de la tranquilidad que ofrece el entorno. También podrán disfrutar de la barbacoa y mobiliario exterior para pasar los calurosos días de verano.

 

Por último, al lado de la casa, se encuentra la sala de juegos, que cuenta con: diana, mesa de billar americano y mesa de ping-pong para disfrutar durante largas horas.



El aforo máximo de la vivienda es de 10 personas. Disponemos de 3 habitaciones, dos de ellas con cama doble, y una con cama doble y 2 individuales. Además, se pueden sumar 2 camas supletorias y/o una cuna.

Name: Château de Belmont-Sainte-Foi
Description:
Depuis 2020, nous rénovons en famille ce château du Moyen-âge.  
Au coeur d'un petit village d'une centaine d'habitants et abandonné pendant plus de 30 ans, il reprend tout doucement vie !
Le château de Belmont-Sainte-Foi se situe à 1h de voiture au nord de Toulouse, entre Cahors et Montauban.  
Aujourd'hui, nous vous accueillons dans nos deux gîtes classés 4 étoiles, situés dans les dépendances du château.  
Cing chambres d'hôtes, au coeur du château, sont en cours de rénovation et vous seront proposées prochainement.  
Un parc de 5 hectares et une magnifique piscine de 12mx6m vous attendent pour une déconnexion totale. 
Si vous rêvez de la vie de château, vous recherchez un cadre prestigieux, vous aimez l’authenticité, les produits du terroir et les belles pierres, n’attendez plus; réservez votre séjour !

Name: Formiche Islands
Description: Un soggiorno esclusivo, su un'isola privata: un’esperienza profondamente compenetrante, sensoriale e trasformativa.  Il fascino del faro si sprigiona appena si attracca al suo pontile. L’accesso è esclusivamente privato. La dimensione di sei ettari dell’isola consente di girarla in una ventina di minuti cogliendone il suo aspetto selvaggio, arso, che cambia con le stagioni, da brulla si riempie di vegetazione e fiori selvatici in primavera.

Name: Chambre d'hotes & Gîte Vichy : Château de Charmeil
Description: Dans un château du 18 eme siècle entièrement rénové à 6 km de Vichy dans l'Allier : 6 chambres d'hôtes de charme à la décoration personnalisée et soignée, un gîte indépendant, un parc arboré de plusieurs hectares, ne grande piscine intérieure chauffée, plusieurs salles de réception. Possibilité d'organisation d'évements : mariages, séminaires, d'entreprises, ....

Name: MalaMù BnB Eventi
Description:
MalaMù bnb Eventi per il vostro soggiorno di lavoro o di piacere, per realizzare il vostro evento aziendale e la vostra festa privata immersi nella natura.

Cinque camere nei tre appartamenti a tema.
Il calore della casetta del focolare immersa nel verde.
Il dolce abbraccio delle "origini-radici" che si respira nell'accoglienza bolognese e greca della casa delle nonne e la creatività che si accende nella casa delle Arti.

Le due luminose sale Alba (50 mq) e Tramonto (60 mq) per meeting aziendali e feste private, in dotazione : Cucina attrezzata, barbecue esterno in muratura, ampio spazio mattonato attrezzato con salottini, ombrelloni sdraio, circondato dall'ampio parco con grandi alberi ornamentali.
Frutteto, orto fanno da cornice ad un sogno tutto naturale ideale per team building e attività didattiche a pochi chilometri da Bologna.

MalaMù si trova in una posizione strategica ed ha un ampio parcheggio.
Si trova nella prima periferia di Bologna, a Zola Predosa.
a 3 km dalla stazione di Pilastrino (Zola Predosa) 
a 4 km dalla zona industriale di Zola Predosa
a 5 km dall'uscita dell'autostrada e tangenziale. 
a 6 km dall' Unipol Arena
a 8 km dall'aeroporto Guglielmo Marconi 
a 15 km da Bologna Centro
  

MalaMù è la meraviglia di creare e allestire luoghi, che siano una camera, un appartamento, una sala meeting, parco, frutteto, giardino, dove le energie delle persone si incontrano e incontrandosi danno nuova vita a pensieri, esperienze, conoscenze, competenze condivise, ricordi ed emozioni.  

Qui si respira il senso del nostro tempo e della nostra passione abbracciati in un luogo dove si sta bene, ci si sente accolti come a casa ma sostenuti da una professionalità seria e consolidata negli anni.

Name: Au Coeur de Bordeaux B&B
Description: Au coeur de Bordeaux, notre B&B au charme baroque offre une parenthèse de douceur et d'art de vivre. Dans un cadre raffiné et paisible, nos hôtes apprécient un petit-déjeuner soigné, agrémenté de touches maison, conçu avec passion. Nous travaillons main dans la main avec des partenaires de confiance pour proposer la visite des sites incontournables de la région ainsi que des dégustations accords mets et vins de qualité, avec possibilité d'espace privatisé. Un point de départ idéal pour découvrir Bordeaux et ses environs.

Name: Portal381
Description: Mi, rezervacioni portal Putujmo po Srbiji, pomažemo vlasnicima smeštaja da imaju mnogo bolju organizaciju i bolju popunjenost smeštaja, kako bi ostvarili veće prihode i imali više slobodnog vremena za sebe i porodicu, čak i kada mislite da je sve to mnogo komplikovano i skupo, verujte da nije. Mi smo tim koji je godinama u ovom poslu, te nam je iz tog razloga poznata problematika oko svega šta vas plaši.

Name: Ferme de l'Hosté
Description:
La Ferme de l'Hosté est une entreprise familiale qui accueille les particuliers ainsi que les entreprises dans ses hébergements (chambres et gîtes ) avec une capacité max. de 40 personnes. 

Nous mettons également en location 2 salles de 30m2 (communicantes) meublées et privatisées. Pour vos réunions et événements professionnels ou personnels, nous vous accueillons dans un cadre authentique, au milieu de la nature et des champs. Le grand jardin peut également être loué. Il peut facilement accueillir 150 personnes et est adapté pour tout type d'événement en extérieur.

Vous aurez aussi la possibilité de déguster tous les jours un délicieux buffet petit-déjeuner à base de produits bio, locaux ou faits maison tels que nos confitures, notre pain, nos patisseries, nos yaourts...

Name: Houses of Portugal
Description:
Stylish, fully renovated holiday homes in wonderful rural locations in the Algarve. 
Enjoy complete relaxation in our modern villa's with private pool. Check out  
Casa Oliveira 6p, Casa Cidro 4p, Casa Nêspera 4p or all three together 14p & future rental and sales projects in the Algarve, Portugal www.housesofportugal.com

Name: Anant Farms
Description:
Holiday home designed for natural living amidst an Organic farm; situated amongst majestic mountain ranges with a view of Torna gad. A place where friends and family can rejuvenate and create beautiful memories.
Built in rustic yet classy interiors, spacious Verandas, an open to sky Courtyard; constructed with natural stones. Sustainable leaving is at the heart of everything we do.
Bungalow and 2 independent cottages can easily accommodate a group of 30-55 people

Name: Casa Laguna
Description: Bed-and-Breakfasts, Hostels, Homestays

Name: The Hostel Hub
Description: Find good Hostels, PGs & Food with the help of The Hostel Hub

Name: La Maison d'hôtes de la Porte Saint-Michel
Description:
Maison d'hôtes du XVIIIème siècle située dans la Petite Cité de caractère et Cité du livre de Bécherel (35).
Nous vous accueillons toute l'année dans la chambre d'hôtes "Rêves et Voyages".
Si nous devions résumer un séjour chez nous : calme, nature et culture !

Name: Menazina
Description:
Welcome to our company, a leader in the tourism accommodation sector in the vibrant City of Mexico. Founded by a visionary woman entrepreneur, our company stands out for its focus on details and quality of service, providing our guests with a unique and memorable experience.

With two strategically located rental units in the city, we offer our visitors the opportunity to immerse themselves in the rich culture, history, and charm of Mexico City. Our accommodation spaces are carefully designed and decorated to provide comfort and style, creating a cozy atmosphere that reflects the essence of the city.

However, our company is much more than just an accommodation business. We take pride in empowering the careers of other women and fostering equality of opportunities in the workplace. We believe in the power of women's entrepreneurship and provide support and mentorship to talented women who aspire to grow and thrive in the tourism industry.

Furthermore, we collaborate with local suppliers, especially those led by women, to promote community economic development. We value diversity and inclusion, and we strive to create a work environment where all voices are heard and respected.

As our company expands, we are constantly seeking new opportunities to offer unique experiences to our guests and strengthen our commitment to female empowerment. We are excited to continue growing and exploring new ways to contribute to tourism in Mexico City, always maintaining our high standards of quality and attention to detail.

Join us on this exciting adventure and discover Mexico City through the eyes of a company committed to excellence, equal opportunities, and the empowerment of women.

Name: Outeiro do Álamo - Turismo Rural, LDA
Description:
Alojamento. 

O Outeiro do Álamo é muito mais do que um alojamento. É um refúgio. Um oásis de tranquilidade, acolhedor e envolvente.

Aqui, há pequenos-almoços demorados. Há mergulhos na piscina. Banhos de sol. Há beijos, gargalhadas e abraços. E, às vezes, também há trabalho, que aqui se mistura com prazer.

No Outeiro, os dias são leves, bons de se viver. E os hóspedes são amigos que regressam.

Afinal, quem não quer regressar a um sítio assim?

Seja bem-vindo a casa. À sua casa no Alentejo.

Name: WANDERLUST.REACH
Description:
We are hostel providers for travelers. We operate exclusively in different places of Madhya Pradesh. We provide you stay for an affordable price with best in class facilities. We look forward to provide best hostel facilities for your travel, vacation, holidays, weekends and much more. 
Come and enjoy with us

Name: Paradisun Villajoyosa
Description:
In our adults only 6 boutique apartments, we not only want you to stay with us.  We want you to enjoy the whole PARADISUN experience. Feel the smell and sound of the Mediterranean see in our 1500mq garden with private beach and pool.
We are at only 15 minutes from Benidorm touristic centre.

Name: U Matyldy
Description:
Ideální ubytování v klidné obci s perfektní dostupností do Prahy autem busem i vlakem (Hlavní nádraží).
Ideální pro služebky v Praze, když vás zrovna neláká ruch velkoměsta.

Name: Bed and Breakfast Casa Mistela
Description:
Casa Mistela is located in the town of Xaló/Jalón in the beautiful Vall de Pop, also called the Jalón Valley. A paradise for cyclists and walkers. 
And with beautiful coastal towns on the Costa Blanca such as Jávea, Calpe, Benidorm and Villa Joiosa at a 20-minute drive, the sea is never far away.

Casa Mistela is located in an authentic Spanish house, originally built in 1880. In recent years, we have completely transformed the house into a beautiful B&B with six suites, all with their own unique decor and style. We recently installed solar panels, which we use to generate our own electricity. And with our own well inside, we can rightly say that we operate sustainably. 
The house is named after the Mistela wine produced in the Jalón Valley. Casa Mistela is literally at the foot of the majestic Sierra de Bernia. Climb the Bernia by bike or via the hiking trails. The ultimate reward awaits you at the top with breath taking views and at the highest point you can see Ibiza.

We, John and Sonja Hermans, wish you a warm welcome. Enjoy our hospitality, the beautiful countryside, the tranquility and the Spanish sun and culture.

Name: Pretty Holiday home Rental
Description: Plan your budgeted 5 star holidays with us at prime locations all over Dubai. We are committed to providing exceptional customer services to both landlords and our valued guests.  Trust us with taking care of your trip and making it memorable!  We have multiple premium properties listed with us that are managed with the assistance of multiple OTAs’. We assure smooth check-in and check-out for guests and troubleshoot any problems that may arise during the stay.  Our dedicated team is available 24/7 to help you.

Name: Sutherland House Victorian B&B
Description: The Sutherland House Victorian B&B is located just minutes away from Canandaigua Lake. The 5500 sq. ft mansion sits on 5 acres of land and welcomes guests from around the world!

Name: Edwards House
Description: Located just steps away from Old Town Fort Collins, Colorado, the Edwards House welcomes you with premium accommodations, delicious breakfast, and personalized service that will exceed any Fort Collins hotel.

Name: Summerdays Studios
Description:
Your Holiday in our Studios!
 
Summerdays Studios are located in the village of Coteau Raffin
in the south-west of Mauritius, 5km from the famous beach and mountain, Le Morne Brabant.

The studios are modern and practical.
They include a bedroom with a king size bed,a bathroom, a fully equipped kitchenette and a small terrace.

Name: Volunteer Villas
Description:
Volunteer Villas exists to make traveling with young families easier by providing kid-friendly, fully equipped stays in the Knoxville area—so families can focus on time together, not logistics.

Nestled just 45 minutes from the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, our two beautifully appointed homes offer the perfect escape for families, university visitors, and adventure seekers alike. Whether you’re visiting UT, exploring the Smokies, or just craving space to unwind, you’ll feel right at home in our spacious, toddler-friendly vacation rentals.

Name: Saigon Street Homestay
Description: Introducing a tranquility base privately owned unique home not a hotel in an emerging hotspot tucked away in Ward 19, Binh Thanh District conveniently central to District 1, providing guests a genuine experience and finest Saigonese welcomes.

Name: CLYS - Résidence Créative
Description:
Un cadre magique pour des projets exceptionnels. Ancien hotel des
années 40, accueil de voyageurs devenu résidence d'artistes en
voyage, la résidence Clys accueille tout groupe désireux de travailler,
de répéter, de créer, de respirer. Dans un cadre naturel verdoyant de
plus d'un hectare et à quelques 30 mns de l'océan, les espaces de
travail sont conçus pour pouvoir accueillir toute forme d'art ou
d'expression: théâtre, danse, yoga, méditation, cirque, séminaire de
travail et d’entreprise. Les espaces "nuit" peuvent accueillir de 2 à 4
personnes par chambre suivant les demandes.
professionnelle et salle de répétition au coeur de la maison, vous
permettront de progresser dans un cadre chaleureux, confortable et
bienveillant. De nombreuses prestations peuvent être proposées en plus.

Name: Lacasa Hospitality
Description:
Located in the summer capital of India, Lacasa offers a unique combination of luxury and wildlife.
Pet friendly property, hosted by the natives of the village.

Latest Airbnb stats (1st July 2022 - 20th Jun 2023)
Rating - 4.85
Response Rate - 99%
Cancellation Rate - 0.00%

Given the key emphasis on customer experience, Superhost status is maintained every year. The resort has a perfect demographical mix of families, couples and friend groups. 

Lacasa Luxury Stays has 7 cottages and a restaurant. Sustainability, a core principle of the project, is demonstrated by having 40% construction of bamboo and using water conservation techniques like rain water harvesting.
Roughly, 20% of the food menu is fresh farm to table. Some groceries are directly procured from the local village farmers. Milk/milk products are directly sources from them too.
This operation helps to eliminate adulteration and to maintain the freshness of meals. And also to generate revenue for the farmers, having a positive economic impact.
From kitchen operations, the pilferage and waste is deployed for composting.

Name: Townview Guesthouse Swakopmund
Description:
We bring to the table exceptional comfort and convenience: Whether you're a tourist eager to explore Swakopmund, a holidaymaker seeking serenity, a work traveler in pursuit of productivity, or looking for two in one--conference and stay attendee, our guesthouse is your destination.



We offer a range of amenities tailored to cater to every need and we've curated an experience that exceeds expectations.

Our location offers easy access to town, the beach, and nearby attractions, ensuring flexibility. 

Work travelers will find a haven for productivity, equipped with all the essentials to facilitate seamless remote work.
