We also offer concierge services, your every need is attended to with care and attention to detail. From special room setup to arranging local tours, to recommending the best dining spots/watering holes, we are dedicated to making your stay truly unforgettable.

Name: Casa Bart, Bike & Outdoor Hospitality
Description:
La Provincia di Cuneo è una terra perfetta da #pedalare, dove le strade non si misurano in #chilometri ma in #emozioni. 
Immersa in queste terre di #ciclisti e di #appassionati delle #dueruote trovi Casa Bart, il bike hotel di Augusta e Luca, un vero e proprio #postotappa per #cicloviaggiatori, ai piedi della Valle Maira.
Che tu stia pedalando l’Eurovelo 8, una delle mitiche salite del Giro d’Italia o una delle tante stradine secondarie immerse nei frutteti della pianura Saluzzese, fermati a Casa Bart.
L’accoglienza è familiare, le torte di Augusta sono buonissime e la birra è artigianale!
E poi c’è Luca, Bike Manager e guida cicloturistica, che, con la sua passione per il #tourplanning, saprà consigliarti gli itinerari migliori e anche accompagnarti, se vorrai.

Name: The Homestay Academy
Description: The Homestay Academy empowers Airbnb/Homestay hosts in India with training, tools, and community support to build successful, guest-centric hosting businesses.

Name: Mas OSMEEA
Description:
CÔTE D'AZUR

Maison d'hôtes . Maison de vacances 

Au Mas OSMEEA, une parenthèse inattendue
Situé au cœur du « triangle d’or » Nice – Cannes – Grasse, dans l’arrière-pays, le Mas Osmeea est idéalement localisé entre mer et montagne, à l’écart des routes principales de la région a 2,5 Kms du cœur du village de Roquefort les pins.


BASTIDE DE CARACTÈRE

Entouré d’un écrin de verdure, le Mas Osmeea date de 1856 pour la partie la plus récente et probablement des années 1750 pour la partie la plus ancienne. Il constituait probablement autrefois, un point de rassemblement autour du puit et des fours à pain.

Stéphanie et Olivier ont acheté cette bastide à la fin de l’année 2013. Depuis cette date, ils ont rénové et se sont appliqués à améliorer ce cadre de vie, pour vous offrir une parenthèse inattendue.

Sur le terrain, vous profiterez d’essences d’arbres de la région : Oliviers centenaires, murier, micoucoulier, tilleul.

Sur l’une des restanques, une piscine de style provençal et sécurisée sera à votre disposition.

Name: Swiss Alps Coliving
Description:
Swiss Alps Coliving is a community-driven coliving and coworking space in Liddes, Switzerland. We host remote workers, creatives, and digital nomads from around the world who come to live, work, and connect in the heart of the Swiss Alps.

Our space combines fast WiFi, mountain views, shared adventures, and a warm international community. Whether you're staying for a month or the whole season, SAC offers a unique blend of productivity, nature, and belonging.

 Coworking with a view
 Weekly hikes and communal dinners
 Private and shared rooms
 All just 2 hours from Geneva, Aosta, and Chamonix

Join us and experience coliving in the Alps, where connection, nature, and remote work flow together.

Name: Nimai Girls Hostel
Description:
**Nimai Girls Hostel: Your Gateway to Academic Success**

Nimai Girls Hostel is the premier choice for female students seeking a comfortable, safe, and conducive environment to pursue their academic aspirations. Situated in the heart of Sambhaji Nagar, our hostel offers a homely atmosphere, excellent food, and hygienic living conditions, ensuring a well-rounded experience for our residents.
At Nimai Girls Hostel, we understand the unique needs of female students and strive to provide an environment that fosters their academic growth and personal development. Our hostel is equipped with modern amenities, including spacious study rooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library, empowering our residents to excel in their studies.

**Our Key Highlights:**

* **A Homely Atmosphere:** Our hostel provides a warm and welcoming environment where residents feel comfortable and supported.

* **Excellent Food:** Our in-house chef prepares nutritious and delicious meals to keep our residents energized and focused.

* **Hygienic Living Conditions:** We maintain impeccable cleanliness throughout the hostel, ensuring a healthy and comfortable living space for our residents.

* **Strategic Location:** Our hostel is conveniently located in the heart of Sambhaji Nagar, close to major colleges and universities, minimizing commute time and maximizing study time.

* **Round-the-Clock Security:** We prioritize the safety of our residents with a robust security system that operates 24/7.

**Nimai Girls Hostel: Where Girls Thrive**

At Nimai Girls Hostel, we believe that a nurturing and supportive environment is the cornerstone of academic success. Our hostel provides a supportive ecosystem where female students can thrive, both academically and personally. We encourage our residents to engage in extracurricular activities, participate in workshops and seminars, and form meaningful connections with their peers.

Name: Avabodha
Description:

It is an eco friendly 3 bedroom villa with a living room, terrace, porch and lawn where you can enjoy your stay with homegrown vegetarian meals. ‘Avabodha’ meaning ‘Awakening’, is an extraordinary abode for you to reconnect & realign with nature, with your inner-self and your relationships amidst serene landscapes.

Name: Cranmore Mountain Lodge
Description:
Cranmore Mountain Lodge is a charming, historic Bed & Breakfast Inn nestled in a secluded and peaceful residential neighborhood in North Conway, New Hampshire. Offering classic New England-style lodging, we provide a unique blend of history, comfort, and privacy, making it the perfect escape for travelers, corporate retreats, and intimate gatherings.

 Steeped in history since 1860, our beautifully preserved main building is one of the oldest hospitality landmarks in North Conway, reflecting the timeless charm of New England. Guests enjoy cozy accommodations, personalized hospitality, and easy access to the White Mountains' top outdoor adventures, from skiing and hiking to scenic train rides and local dining.

Name: L'ERMITAGE - Hastingues
Description:
Situé à seulement 45 minutes de Biarritz, le Domaine de l'Ermitage a ouvert ses portes en mars 2023 après 2 années de travaux, pour proposer sa propre version du gîte haut de gamme pouvant accueillir jusqu'à 15 personnes.
Plus qu'une simple location saisonnière, la maison a été pensée comme un lieu dédié aux moments de partage et permet ainsi différents formats de séjours: les vacances en famille ou entre amis, les évènements privés ou célébrations, mais aussi les séminaires d'entreprises, retraites de yoga ainsi que les évènements presse et shooting.
Au croisement des Landes, du Pays Basque et du Béarn, le Domaine s'étend sur un parc de presque 7 hectares en pleine nature. Comme un cocon niché en plein cœur de la nature pour permettre à ses hôtes d'apprécier le calme et de venir se ressourcer.
Tout a été conçu pour proposer un hébergement aux prestations haut de gamme, où le confort est une priorité et le respect de l'environnement une valeur fondamentale. Ce qui vaut à l'Ermitage ses labels Meublé Tourisme 5 étoiles, Tourisme Durable et bientôt Ecolabel Européen.

Name: les beaux jours en Baie de Somme

Name: Finca La Vida Loca B&B
Description:
Our luxury B&B is located in a unique spot in Benalmádena Pueblo, surrounded by plenty of greenery. Golf courses and beaches are just a few minutes' drive away. The ultimate location for your perfect holiday. Finca La Vida Loca is an Adults Only B&B.

Dear guest,
We are Tim and Lieven, the hosts of Finca La Vida Loca, and we warmly welcome you to our beautiful Finca!

To get straight to the point: we have always had a love for Spanish culture, hospitality, and for Spain in general. With our education and years of experience in the hospitality industry (over 20 years), the aspect of ‘hospitality’ is something we are very familiar with.

For more than 10 years, we ran Brasserie ’t Heerehuys in Belgium, our home country, with passion and dedication, until at the end of 2023, we could no longer resist the call of Spain. Our dream finally became a reality: opening our own Finca in southern Spain.

Finca La Vida Loca is best described as a charming place for true life enthusiasts, a paradise on earth with endless possibilities, both in summer and winter.

Whether you come to enjoy the tranquil nature, the beautiful beaches, or to engage in sports under the bright sun, at Finca La Vida Loca, we make it our mission to ensure that nothing is missing for you.

So be sure to take a look at our website and discover what our unique location has to offer. We look forward to your arrival and warmly welcome you to our Finca!

Saludos cordials,
Tim and Lieven

Name: Friends & Families
Description:
La Collection Friends & Families, c’est l’histoire de notre famille qui s’est épanouie en pleine campagne au cœur de la France.

Pour étancher notre soif de rencontres et de poésie, nous avons beaucoup voyagé. De nos nombreuses pérégrinations aux quatre coins du monde, nous avons retenu une chose : l’hospitalité est universelle, mais sa beauté est singulière.

La Collection Friends & Families rend hommage à ces valeurs dans un endroit qui nous est cher: La France, d'une beauté et nature exceptionnelle.

A travers ces lieux iconiques, nous souhaitons célébrer le temps, le beau, et l’émerveillement.

Céline & Alexandre
Côme, Jeanne, Diane & Louis

Name: Riad Aarab
Description:
Riad Aarab is the creation of Helen & Kosovo, a couple, who hail from Liverpool & Essaouira. We live in North Wales with spells in Essaouira, our parallel universe. Our Riad and its garden was birthed from an uncultivated, unloved sandbank, that was once agricultural land on the edge of an Argan forest, a few kilometres from the surf village of Sidi Kaouki in the province of Essaouira. Helen visited for the first time in June 2007. Inspired by the setting & energy she felt there, she bought the land (& sand) a month later!  With few inhabitants in the area, there was no water & no electricity infrastructure. But  Helen had a dream … 
The rest is history, herstory and our story. 
Conceived as a Berber country riad with 4 en suite bedrooms, indoor courtyard, salon, kitchen, roof terrace, water tower with small apartment, & large garden the place has a calm energy, and offers simple affordable luxury in a rural setting. We are in a fabulous location, surrounded by stunning scenery offering 360 degree views: a valley where the sun rises; views and sounds of the Atlantic, beach and setting sun; a clifftop Berber village in the distance, and an Argan forest that stretches as far as the eye can see. 
Our Riad reflects our shared passion for the place that is our spiritual home. The Riad takes its Berber name from Kosovo's family whose roots are in the area. Over the years we have employed several local people & artisans as we built and developed our handmade home. With help from friends & family, we have slowly transformed the arid landscape into a lovely country garden attracting wildlife.

Our garden is brought to life by birdsong. Goats, camels & donkeys are close by. Rocky 2, the resident dog cohabits peacefully with 5 cats. Mohammed, a Berber, is the custodian of the space, living in a small apartment on the land. He keeps the animals well fed, the garden nurtured & everything else ticking over. Marhaba! Welcome to www.riadaarab.com & book your visit!

Name: Tetto Stays

Name: Maison Caramel
Description:
La Maison Caramel est une authentique maison de village, située en Savoie, dans la vallée de La Tarentaise, au cœur de village de Landry, sur le chemin de grande randonnée GR5, à quelques minutes d’importantes stations de ski.
Kerry et Serge y reçoivent leurs hôtes, leur clients, leur amis, en demi- pension : petits déjeuners et dîners de haute qualité.
Le chalet comprend un grand salon avec poêle à bois, une salle à manger ouvrant sur une terrasse, un espace barbecue et un jardin. Cinq confortables chambres pour deux ou plus vous attendent, avec salle d’eaux et toilette, et balcon indépendant. Un sauna infra-rouge et une wifi gratuite sont à votre disposition.
En plus de nos chambres, sont proposés : un gite avec salon, cuisine, chambre et salle d’eau-WC pour 2 à 4 personnes, ainsi qu’un studio avec kitchenette pour 2.
Le jardin clos et les balcons offrent des vues magnifiques sur la vallée du Ponthurin, le village de Landry et le massif du Beaufortin. Ainsi que notre toute nouvelle terrasse et notre Spa Balné0.
Marcheurs, cyclistes, vététistes, skieurs, fondeurs, alpinistes, parapentistes, amateurs de canyoning et de rafting, tous seront près de cols mythiques, Iseran, Cormet de Roselend, Petit Saint Bernard, près de stations prestigieuses ou discrètes, La Plagne, Les Arcs, Peisey-Vallandry, La Rosière, l’Espace San Bernardo, près de l’Isère impétueuse, près de la calme vallée de Nancroix, jusqu’au Parc National de la Vanoise.
Notre service de navette vous accueillera et vous déposera sur les sites choisis, avec skis, vélos ou autres matériels.

                      Nous sommes impatients de vous accueillir et nous nous efforcerons de rendre votre séjour inoubliable.

Name: Pardubsky apartments

The apartment is located near the city center (15 minute walk) and in the vicinity of the University (Faculty of Electrotechnology, Math and Physics, Pharmaceutics, etc.).

Public transport, shops, pharmacy, and medical facilities are all within a few hundred meters.

Servizi aggiuntivi esclusivi, tra cui:

Organizzazione di esperienze turistiche.

Concierge personalizzato per esigenze specifiche degli ospiti.

Servizi per lo smart working (Wi-Fi ad alta velocità, spazi dedicati).

L’offerta si rivolge a:

Turisti nazionali e internazionali di fascia medio-alta, attratti dal patrimonio culturale e paesaggistico della zona.

Famiglie e coppie alla ricerca di un soggiorno rilassante e di qualità.

Nomadi digitali e professionisti in cerca di una location che offra comfort e connettività per lavorare a distanza.

Turisti esperienziali, appassionati di enogastronomia e cultura locale.

Villa Calipso si distingue dai competitor per:

Elevati standard di qualità e accoglienza, con un’attenzione particolare ai dettagli e alla personalizzazione dell’esperienza.

Esperienze su misura, con proposte turistiche esclusive che valorizzano il territorio e la cultura locale.

Struttura rinnovata e tecnologicamente avanzata, con arredi moderni e servizi innovativi per il massimo comfort.

Posizione strategica sulla litoranea di Taranto, con facile accesso a spiagge, siti storici e attrazioni turistiche.

Name: Palm Beach Fuerteventura
Description:
The spacious Palm Beach Fuerteventura apartment, which is only 150 metres from the volcanic sand beach and the beautiful promenade that stretches along the town of Tarajalejo - you can go for a walk or do sports. 

Tarajalejo is a charming and peaceful village in the south of Fuerteventura, where you can observe the life of the islanders and taste the local cuisine. The flat is located just 5 km from the Oasis Wildlife Park and a 10-minute drive from paradise beaches (close to the famous Sotavento beach, la Pared, the beaches of the Jandia peninsula, Cofete). Tarajalejo is an ideal base to explore the whole island.

The apartment is located in the Las Palmeras apartment complex and consists of a living room combined with a dining area (large table and 4 chairs) with a sofa bed (bed when unfolded: 140cm), chest of drawers, Smart TV (43") and a fully equipped kitchenette (induction hob, dishwasher, microwave, kettle, capsule coffee machine, plates, glasses, cups, wine glasses, pots, pans and other necessary kitchen equipment), a bathroom (washing machine with dryer, shower cubicle, washbasin, toilet, hairdryer, towels) and a bedroom with a very comfortable double bed (160 cm) - ideal for relaxing after an active day, with bed linen, wardrobe and large mirror. A sunny and spacious terrace with a beautiful view of the ocean, a table and chairs where you can have breakfast or relax in the evening watching the sky while drinking your favourite beverage. 

Beautiful view from the window, close to the beach and the ocean, modern and spacious interior equipped with everything you need to relax. 

If you're planning to come on holiday - you'll find the perfect place to relax, away from the hustle and bustle of the island's biggest resorts. 

If you work remotely - in Palm Beach Fuerteventura you will find everything you need to work efficiently. (high-speed WIFI internet, a window with blackout blind, the possibility to work from the terrace with a beautiful view).

Name: Tourist Promotion and Entertainment Company
Description: Dar Aicha is immersed in a beautiful view surrounded by nature surrounded by poplar, cork oak, beech, eucalyptus and pine trees and other fruit trees such as carob trees, azeroliers and olive trees. An Overlook overlooking the town of Tabarka. And not far away stands the sea, majestic and full of hope... and riches. This nature has generated a heavy and peaceful personality of the local community and a typical character that we observe in their traditions and their way of life and know-how. The resulting products are extracted from this nature, wood, clay and textiles from fiber plants were their raw materials to build villages, make their utensils and work tools and make their adornments and clothing. And therefore, the main activities are agriculture, grain farming, cattle breeding and fishing. It should be noted that this mode and this nature have - for a long time - shaped and influenced the character of local communities too much. Today, the need is transformed into art which is expressed, by the musical note which has a specific tone of course, but also by the word and by the everyday action where the plant and the wave are omnipresent.

Name: Maka Forest Villa
Description:
Maka Forest Villa is a repurposed decayed poultry 
farm upcycled into a bed and breakfast facility. It is 
a living example of our Regenerative Culture, a 
systems thinking that respects and co-thrive with 
other species. The whole premise exhibits natural 
materials sourced within the nearest area if not 
available within the land such as termite soil, buga 
clay, soft and hard charred wood, lowly vines and 
tanlak reeds.

The 2 hectare land is home to a number of native/
endemic endangered trees and wildlife species. 
Learning from our ancestor’s we gather our food, 
wood, medicines, the clean air we breathe, and the 
unseen importance that nature provides us. We will 
plant more and increase the ecological health of 
this place.

Maka is an ancient tagalog word that means 
“where the good spirits reside”, it is the heaven on 
earth.

The villa offers 2 triple, 1 double and 2 twin/double bedrooms, catering for a maximum of 12 people. It has 4 guest bathrooms, a lounge, dining area (indoors and outdoors), two expansive terraces, a pool, and a massage room with an ample range of Spa/Energy & Holistic Treatments. Ample outdoor space, and a 65m2 event room allows for yoga and nature activities, while breathtaking 360 degree panoramic views create serene settings for sunrise coffee or sunset dining, celebrating the beauty of Sicily’s landscape. Name: Belle Louise
Description:
Welcome to Belle Louise, a historic guest house.

Discover the heart and soul of Paducah, Kentucky at Belle Louise Historic Guest House, lovingly restored by passionate hosts Cary and Melinda Winchester. With over 24 years of experience in historic preservation and architecture, the Winchesters are dedicated to preserving the past while ensuring you have an unforgettable stay.

Cary and Melinda Winchester's journey began in 2019 when they embarked on the extensive rehabilitation of Belle Louise. Their dedication to historic preservation has touched numerous projects in Kentucky and Missouri. As former Paducah Main Street Director, Melinda is your go-to expert for all things Paducah – from local activities and restaurants to quaint shops. Your comfort and privacy are paramount, and the Winchesters are here to tailor your experience, whether you seek solitude or engaging conversations.


What to expect from us?

1. Historic Charm: Explore the rich history and architectural beauty of Belle Louise, a testament to Paducah's heritage.

2. Cozy Retreat: Enjoy a comfortable and relaxing stay in our well-appointed guest rooms.

3. Local Insights: Let us be your Paducah guides, recommending the best activities, dining spots, and hidden gems.

4. Personalized Hospitality: Your satisfaction is our priority; we're here to make your stay memorable.

At Belle Louise, it's all about you, the "guest." We invite you to experience the perfect blend of history, comfort, and warm hospitality. Whether you're a history enthusiast, a traveler seeking tranquility, or an explorer of local culture, Belle Louise is your home away from home.

Connect with us to stay updated on Paducah's treasures and explore the magic of the Belle Louise, Historic Guest House. 

Your memorable journey begins here!

Built in 1898, the Hewitt House has been lovingly restored and transformed into a luxurious boutique hotel that seamlessly blends old-world elegance with modern amenities. Each of our suites is thoughtfully appointed with antique furnishings, plush bedding, and all the comforts of home.

Guests can start their day with a delicious breakfast served in our elegant dining room, or relax in the inviting common areas, which include a cozy library and a stunning parlor with a grand piano. For those looking to explore the city, InnBuffalo off Elmwood is conveniently located within walking distance of some of Buffalo's best restaurants, shops, and attractions.

Whether you are visiting Buffalo for business or pleasure, InnBuffalo off Elmwood offers a warm and welcoming home away from home. Come experience the charm and hospitality that make our bed and breakfast a hidden gem in the heart of the city.

The Big Sky croft is the perfect base for exploring the spectacular Black Isle and whole of the Highlands and Islands.

Get back to nature exploring our woodland, building dens and watching the wildlife and coos go by. Spend a day hillwalking and return to a welcoming cosy and colourful cabin, where you can finish your day with a wee dram under the stars while the firepit crackles.

We have six beautiful Finnish log cabins, a vintage style glamping caravan and new in 2023, our beautiful romantic Loft on the Croft. All with toasty wood burners, beautiful natural surroundings with perfect comfort and a touch of Scottish Style.

Name: Belva Lockwood Inn
Description:
The Belva Lockwood Inn is a historic bed and breakfast located in the heart of Owego, New York. The inn is named after Belva Ann Bennett Lockwood who resided at the residence in 1863-1865, a prominent lawyer, activist, and politician who was the first woman to run for President of the United States.  

The inn was fully remolded in 2019 and has been lovingly restored to its original Victorian splendor. It features 5 guest rooms, each with its own unique charm and ensuite. The inn also has a common living room, a dining room, and a wrap-around porch where guests can relax and enjoy the views of the town.

The Belva Lockwood Inn is more than just a place to stay. It is a place to experience history and culture. The inn is located within walking distance of many of Owego's historic attractions, including the Tioga County Historical Society Museum, local shops, antiques and restaurants.

Name: Vakantiehuis Bergvliet

In september is ons tweede vakantiehuis opgeleverd, een prachtig houten vakantiehuis naar eigen ontwerp. Een warm en luxueuze plek om volledig tot rust te komen. Beide veilig en geborgen gelegen op Landgoed Bergvliet tussen Breda, Oosterhout en Teteringen. De mooiste plek op het Landgoed met een prachtig uitzicht over de golfbaan en Spa One als buren. Het is er heerlijk rustig en toch zijn er meer dan genoeg activiteiten te ondernemen in de omgeving. Dé plek voor levensgenieters!

Name: 4Oaks Ranch Bed & Breakfast LLC
Description:
All proceeds from your stay with us are donated to the Pitt Hopkins Research Foundation.

Pitt Hopkins Syndrome (PTHS) is a rare genetic disorder affecting a specific gene in chromosome 18, called TCF4. PTHS is characterized by developmental delay, possible breathing problems of episodic hyperventilation and/or breath-holding while awake, recurrent seizures/epilepsy, gastrointestinal issues, lack of speech, and distinctive facial features.

"Collins' Camino" (aka Collin's Way) is dedicated to our granddaughter, Collins Kate Lehrmann, who has been diagnosed with PTHS.  She's such a happy and loving soul who is blessing our lives.  Collin's Camino is focused on bringing awareness of PTHS and supporting the research to aid these wonderful children.

4Oaks Ranch (aka Rancho de los Cuatro Robles or Ranch of the Four Oaks) is Jeff and Cindy Lehrmann’s labor of love. 

While living and working in countries around the globe, they collected numerous pieces of art, carvings, rugs, and furniture reflecting the gracious cultures of each location.   This collection now graces the 4Oaks ranch house.
Relax in 1 of 4 spa like Suites

Enjoy one of four suites with private bathroom tastefully decorated with furnishings and artwork from Southeast Asia.  

The Halong Bay Suite on the first-floor features silk embroideries from Vietnam.  

The Ubud Suite on the 3rd floor is arranged with hand carved furnishings and artwork from Indonesia.  

The Bali Suite on the 3rd floor features boat wood furnishings and coastal paintings from Indonesia and Myanmar.  

And the Yangon Suite on the 3rd floor is decorated with paintings from Myanmar and furniture from Indonesia. 

Robles in Spanish can be translated to "oak tree" or "strong person".  Rancho de los Cuatro Robles honors the Spanish heritage of the Thomas de La Vega land grant the property resides, as well as the four "strong people" in their four children and their families.

Name: Finca Romelia
Description:
Finca Romelia, Los Colores de la Vida, es un proyecto turístico familiar que nace del amor por la naturaleza de José y Marisa. Ellos han dedicado más de la mitad de su vida al sector agrícola como negocio y a la colección, estudio y conservación de orquídeas entre otras plantas como hobby. Esto sin dejar a un lado el compromiso con la restauración de la flora nativa y la preservación de la fauna silvestre. Su inmensa pasión permite que hoy se abran las puertas de la finca para que los viajeros puedan conocer este paraíso.
En la finca, los visitantes podrán disfrutar de más de 840 especies de orquídeas para un promedio de 8000 plantas de orquídeas, una variedad interesante de bonsáis y alrededor de 216 especies de aves. Además, de cultivos de producción de cítricos y aguacate . Todo esto, acompañado de una vista espectacular que permite observar las imponentes cadenas montañosas y las diferentes composiciones de paisaje. Finca Romelia ofrece la opción de alojarse en su casa principal y visitarnos en el día para realizar diversas actividades alrededor de las orquídeas y de las aves.

Name: Stichting De Blauwe Hut
Description:
Stichting De Blauwe Hut is an initiative by Mariët and Eric Spierings. The foundation was established on October 6, 2021, in Zeist, in collaboration with the current board members. The foundation holds ANBI status. Our mission is to provide carefree vacations for families who have recently faced or are currently dealing with a seriously ill family member. To achieve this, we raise the necessary funds and maintain contact with healthcare professionals involved with these families.

The illness of a family member brings significant concerns and challenges. Often, during or after the illness, there is little time or energy to focus on each other, especially the non-ill children and family members. A few days of vacation can help families momentarily break free from the emotional and practical burdens of the situation. Stichting De Blauwe Hut's mission is to offer families in this difficult situation a wonderful and relaxing experience, providing an opportunity to escape the chaos surrounding the ill family member and creating a cherished memory for the future.

Name: Domaine de Lanis
Description:
Chambres d'hôtes - Table d'hôtes - Privatisation 

Niché dans un écrin de verdure avec un parc de plus d'1 ha, le Domaine de Lanis est une ferme lauragaise qui a su retrouver tout son charme et prestige d’antan en intégrant tout le confort moderne. Elle vous offre 5 chambres d'hôtes très spacieuses (26 à 42m²). Les hauts plafonds et la décoration vous emmènent dans un univers nature enchanteur… L'attention portée aux aménagements et équipements, lit king size, coin salon, plateau de courtoisie avec machine à café et bouilloire… rend votre séjour très agréable. 

Le parc avec ces centaines d'essences plus que centenaires est un véritable havre de paix. Il vous invite à vous ressourcer et profiter selon votre envie du moment de ses nombreux recoins (hamacs au milieu des arbres fruitiers, fauteuil suspendu avec vue sur la bâtisse, salons nichés au milieu des arbres,….). 

Sa très grande terrasse dominant le parc est propice à l'évasion et la convivialité. C'est sur cette terrasse que seront servis dès les beaux jours les petits-déjeuners ainsi que les dîners. Les repas de la table d'hôtes privilégient les produits faits maison à partir de produits locaux, de saison et bio autant que possible souvent agrémentés à notre façon de quelques épices. 

De juin à septembre, profitez de la piscine extérieure, de ses 12 m de longueur pour vos séances de natation ou bien de sa grande plage pour un moment de détente. Et quand vous sortirez de l'eau vous pourrez tranquillement vous installer sur un transat.

A deux, entre amis, en famille, au Domaine de Lanis vous vivrez une parenthèse hors du temps, oubliant pour un week-end ou une semaine votre quotidien pour vous ressourcer au cœur de la nature et du patrimoine de nos anciens.
 
Situé à 3km du centre de Castelnaudary et à 6km de la sortie d'autoroute, au cœur du Lauragais, en pays Cathare, le Domaine de Lanis est le lieu idéal pour combiner repos et visites de la région.

Name: Coorong Island Retreat
Description:
Where bush meets the bay and beach 

A secluded haven farm stay, with all the modern conveniences. 
Get away from it all, close to everything you desire. 

Spend your days kicking back enjoying Lake Albert’s panorama and grazing animals. Explore foreshore fishing opportunities around this 8.5-hectare island block. Then, venture out on a boating, surfing, bushwalking, biking, 4WD off roading, national park or tasting adventure. 

After all that, wind down with wine, a BBQ, and an uninterrupted sunset. You’re nature’s guest. The day, and Coorong Island Retreat accommodation, is all yours. 


The story behind your stay 

Tranquil, breathtaking scenery. Australian wildlife. A gateway to the Murray River and the Coorong National Park. Feel the history and culture of the river that’s over 130 million years old, flowing into the lakes – your front yard. 

Escape the stress of everyday life and experience the simple magnificence of South Australia’s ancient ‘Storm Boy’ country. This is holidaying, with the whole peninsula to yourself for fishing, jet skiing, boating, and birdwatching. 
A fully equipped retreat, on a private island 

Feel all that tension dissolve in a relaxed, comfortable waterfront accommodation with all the modern touches you could want. 

Three ample bedrooms with water views, two bathrooms, an open-plan dining and modern island kitchen, smart TVs, high-speed internet, laundry, a large BBQ, undercover parking, and gated property for the pets to roam. 

Even your fridge has a lovely surprise waiting, lined with fresh eggs, all care of our free-range chickens. 


Luxury, secluded, Airbnb-style holiday home 

This is a holiday, in the truest and fullest sense of the word. 
You won’t need a break after getting back. 


Plan your holiday in the Coorong.

Name: Ankasy Loge Tuléar Madagascar
Description:
Welcome to Ankasy, one of Madagascar’s best-kept secrets!

Ankasy Lodge & Spa is located 80 km north of Toliara, on the coast of the Tropic of Capricorn, along the magnificent lagoon of Ambatomilo.  It’s one of the most authentic regions of Madagascar, a perfect change of scene.

 Relax in our luxurious waterfront cottages while enjoying the wide array of activities available, right on a 1.3 km awesome white sand beach!
 From breathtaking sunsets to an extensive choice of delicious foods and even a massage table right on the beach, a comfortable and heavenly stay awaits you at Ankasy Lodge & Spa
Let yourself be lulled by the waves on a hobby cat or a traditional vezo pirogue, snorkel on a coral garden, marvel at thebeauty of the world on a small sandbar attached to the reef, discover the typical life of the inhabitants of a picturesque village Tsiandamba "where we're going without clothes" ...
Everything is possible Ankasy Lodge.
Nothing is imposed. Our guests are friends, and in the evening, feet in the sand, under the big roof of palm leaves restaurant overlooking the infinity of the Mozambique Channel, everyone comes together to reinvent the world, enjoy these moments of happiness shared or stargazing ...
 
Because here in Ankasy Lodge, time stands still ...

Description:
UYU Yenilikçi ve Akıllı Uyku Deneyimi

Hoş Geldiniz! UYU, akıllı uyku kapsülüyle uyku deneyiminizi dönüştürmek için tasarlanmış bir girişimdir. Amacımız, günümüzün hızlı tempolu yaşamında ihtiyaç duyduğunuz kaliteli ve dinlendirici bir uyku sunmaktır. QR kod ile kiralanabilen yazılımsal bir sistemle desteklenen kapsülümüz, modern yaşamın yoğunluğuna mükemmel bir kaçış sunar.

Girişimcilik Hikayemiz

Nisan ayında başladığımız girişimcilik serüvenimizle, UYU'nun tasarımı bitirip MVP(minimum uygulanabilir ürün) yapımı aşamasındayız . Kaliteli uyku deneyiminin, verimli bir yaşamın temel taşı olduğuna inanıyoruz ve bu düşünceyle yenilikçi bir uyku çözümü sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Ekip olarak, hem teknolojiyi kullanarak hem de kullanıcı dostu tasarımıyla fark yaratan bir ürün geliştirmeye odaklanıyoruz.

UYU Uyku Kapsülü Nedir?
UYU kapsülü, modern yaşamın getirdiği stres ve yorgunlukla mücadele etmek isteyen herkes için ideal bir çözümdür. QR kod ile kiralanabilen yazılımsal sistemimiz sayesinde, kapsülümüzü kolayca kiralayarak kendinize anında bir uyku molası verebilirsiniz. Uyku kapsülümüz, sessiz, huzurlu ve kişisel bir uyku alanı sunarak taze bir zihinle güne başlamanızı sağlar.

Neden UYU Uyku Kapsülü'nü Tercih Etmelisiniz?

Kaliteli Uyku: Yüz tanıma, kimlik kontrolü ve veri kodlama gibi özelliklerle donatılacak kapsülümüz, kaliteli ve güvenilir bir uyku deneyimi yaşamanızı sağlar.
Esnek ve Erişilebilir: Hem Android hem de IOS cihazlarında kullanılabilecek uygulamamız sayesinde, kapsülümüzü kolayca ve hızlıca kiralamak mümkündür.
Yenilikçi Tasarım: Modern ve şık tasarımıyla UYU, her türlü mekânda rahatlıkla kullanılabilir ve çevrenize uyum sağlar.

Name: The Old Millhouse 1703
Description:
The three-storey stone house dates back to the 18th century and is nestled on the rugged banks of the pretty River Esk. Surrounded by 3.5 acres of mature, landscaped gardens, it is a peaceful sanctuary and a sophisticated hideaway. Each traditional room has been exquisitely finished and fuses its original features with a modern, country décor. Colonial touches tell tales of the past and showcase fine Indian silks brought back from far off lands. 

Its elegant living areas provide you with a warm and homely welcome and include a large state-of-the-art kitchen with designer mod-cons. An impressive sun room offers seductive garden views and has triple aspect windows which let the sunlight flood through. The classic drawing room is perfect for a pre-dinner tipple, while the beautiful dining table is on hand for three course dining. Spill out on to the garden terrace for a night beneath the stars, before having a sneaky nightcap in your own bar tucked inside the den. 

Five sumptuous double/twin bedrooms are spread across the first and second floors and have a unique character with deluxe Hypnos mattresses. Discover Far Eastern textiles and chinoiserie wallpaper alongside delicate ceramics and handmade, woollen blankets. Quirky prints add an eccentric British twist and are joined by vintage fabrics and antique furniture. Sleek en-suite bathrooms bring the rooms right up to date and are complete with thick, fluffy towels and natural toiletries.

When you’re ready to head out and explore the local area, you’ll find a magnificent choice between city and country adventures. Outdoor enthusiasts can hike in the nearby Pentland Hills, or head out with a rod to the famous River Tweed. Stroll through the woodlands or picnic beside the river before admiring the interesting wildlife and wildflower meadows.

Name: Le Clos de Bellevue
Description:
Organiser un séminaire, ce n’est pas seulement réunir des collaborateurs autour d’un objectif professionnel : c’est leur offrir un cadre inspirant, alliant concentration, détente et esprit d’équipe. Au Clos de Bellevue, magnifique propriété du XIXᵉ siècle située à Mortagne-sur-Gironde, c’est exactement ce que nous vous proposons.

Niché entre les plages royannaises, les vignobles de Cognac et de Bordeaux, cet écrin arboré de 5 hectares est un véritable havre de sérénité. Imaginez vos équipes se ressourcer dans un parc verdoyant et ouvert, profiter d’une piscine, se détendre autour d’un logis chargé d’histoire, tout en bénéficiant d’infrastructures modulables parfaitement adaptées aux séminaires.

Claire et Arnaud, vos hôtes passionnés, ajoutent une touche chaleureuse et unique à votre événement. L’équitation, la découverte des animaux, les balades en pleine nature… autant de moments forts qui favorisent la cohésion, détendent les esprits et créent des souvenirs collectifs durables.

Vous trouverez ici le juste équilibre entre sérieux et convivialité, professionnalisme et échappée hors du quotidien. Le Clos de Bellevue incarne l’excellence discrète d’un séminaire réussi : cadre authentique, accueil personnalisé, concentration facilitée, détente naturelle.

Pour vos réunions, team-buildings, journées d’étude ou séminaires résidentiels, un seul slogan s’impose : tout séminaire digne de ce nom doit se vivre au Clos de Bellevue.

Name: 2 Laurel Mount Holidays - Dog Friendly with HOT TUB
Description:
This modern bungalow is a perfect getaway for a family of 5 or 6 or even a romantic getaway for a couple looking for that little bit more space, offering all you need for a memorable holiday including your own private hot tub!
The bungalow is located in the welcoming village of Bolton, Appleby - in - Westmorland which is nestled within the Eden Valley between the Lake District National Park, the North Pennines and The Yorkshire Dales National Park so you will never be short of things to see and do!
The bungalow, which has been stylishly furnished, is situated all on one level with a single step to gain access through the front or to get into the large fully enclosed garden. It consists of a bright and airy open plan lounge/kitchen/diner so whether you are kicking back for the night using the smart tvs provided to watch a film or rustling up a home cooked meal in the fully equipped kitchen any time can be family time. There are 3 bedrooms, 2 double rooms and a single, with a travel cot provided for infants. The master bedroom has an en-suite bathroom with a walk in shower. The main bathroom has a bath and an over the bath Rain shower. All bedrooms have been equipped with 32” smart TV’s and there is a 50” smart TV in the lounge. High Speed (fibre) wireless internet is provided as standard as we understand that even when you want to get out in nature being connected is still important.
To ensure everyone is comfortable we have also installed a smart heating system, so you can choose the temperature of each room to suit your needs.
A selection of toys and books have been made available in the event the kids want something to do, there is also a highchair/booster seat and a travel cot for your convenience. And if you fancy turning the telly off for a little bit there are some games, jigsaw puzzles and books for you to get your teeth into!
In the spacious fully enclosed garden (6ft fencing to the ground) perfect for dogs or kids to play in you will find a hot tub and gard

Description:

Vi holder til i Aarhus’ gamle hovedbibliotek – et vartegn fra 1934 og engang en hjørnesten i byens offentlige liv – og vi har bevaret husets sociale ånd. Det har altid været et sted for mennesker. Til læring, samvær og fælles rum. Det er stadig sådan. 

Her kan du sove i en pod, en seng, et privat værelse – eller komme som gruppe. Du kan være med til fællesspisning, snuppe en yogatime, høre et oplæg eller se en film – eller gå ned til Roberta’s Stage, når stemningen skifter gear og natten kalder.

Name: Ostel.in by Taproot
Description:
Ostel.in was the brainchild of Kandarp Mehta (engineer) and Akanksha Bansal (architect), a duo brought together by a shared passion for experimental community living, sustainable architecture, and culturally immersive travel experiences.

Inspired by the spirit of Pondicherry and Auroville, they transformed a coastal home into a lively, design-forward hostel — a place where stories were shared over breakfast tables, strangers became bunkmates, and the vibe encouraged curiosity, collaboration, and quiet introspection by the sea.

The vision was always clear: create a stay that felt like home to kindred spirits, and spark conversations among those with different ways of seeing the world.

Due to internal differences with a former partner involved in the venture, Kandarp and Akanksha stepped away from Ostel.in. While they are no longer associated with the brand, the essence of what they created continues in spirit.

Their journey now continues through Taproot Collaborative, where they continue to explore the intersection of hospitality, sustainability, and meaningful design.

Discover more: taprootco.in

Name: Ostel.in
Description:
Ostel.in is the brainchild of an engineer and an architect, a fiery duo who joined forces  to bring together their expertise in curating experimental community experiences, hostel operations, planet friendly architecture & interior design, a curiosity for diverse socio-cultural geographies of our shared world and concern for its degradation… They were drawn to Pondicherry for this place best reflects their ideas of the world as a shared habitat and a lifestyle of shared resources. 

 Originally a beach house, it is now a community living experience where you share the space with co-travellers and bunk mates. 

At Ostel.in Pondicherry, we thrive to provide you an experience of a lifetime imbued with the bounties Pondicherry and Auroville have to offer. We wish you to come and immerse yourself in reminders of history seen in architecture and culture, find yourself in the rhytmic roaring and calmness of the sea and get lost in the enticing aura of the place altogether.

Immersed in the vibe of the place we want you to leave a part of you behind, a figment of your imagination, a thread of your dream, a smell of your culture, to build in a community together. 

Our curated stay aims to make our tribe feel at home by sharing space with like minded people as well as have you intrigued by the thrill which different idiosyncrasies may have to offer.

Description: Bandenservice Numansdorp is gespecialiseerd in zomer- en winterbanden voor personenauto's, campers, caravans en trucks. Daarnaast verzorgen we klein onderhoud aan auto's in de regio Hoeksche Waard. De dagelijkse leiding is in handen van Leo de Ruiter. Met meer dan 30 jaar ervaring en behulp van een enthousiast team worden dagelijks vele tevreden klanten geholpen.

Name: Hosts Voyage
Description:
Hosts Voyage was born out of a passion for helping property owners succeed in the competitive rental market. We're not just about managing properties – we're about crafting experiences.

Whether it's setting up your listing for maximum visibility or optimizing every detail for top-notch guest satisfaction, we’ve got you covered. Think of us as your go-to partners in turning your property management into a thriving voyage. We love what we do, and we’re here to make your property stand out in a crowded marketplace.

Name: ROYAL BLUE ROSE
Description:
Royal Blue Rose offers accommodations with access to an open pool and a bubble-bath. This property offers access to a terrace, darts, free private parking, and free Wifi. 

The air-conditioned property is composed of 5 separate bedrooms, a living room, a fully equipped kitchen, and 3 bathrooms. A flat-screen TV is offered at every bedroom. The accommodation is non-smoking.

During warmer months, you can make use of the barbecue facilities and eat on the private balcony.

The area is popular for cycling and walking tours, and free use of bicycles is available at the property. An indoor play area is also available at the property, while guests can also relax in the garden.

Žiča Monastery is 22 miles from the accommodation. The nearest airport is Morava, 11 miles from Royal Blue Rose, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service

Name: MAK Enterprise (Hotel) India pvt. ltd.
Description:
Welcome to our charming 3-star hotel, nestled in the heart of Bengaluru. Our hotel offers a comfortable and relaxing stay for both business and leisure travelers.

We have 45 well-appointed rooms and suites that are tastefully designed to cater to the needs of our guests. Each room is equipped with modern amenities such as AC, Refrigerator, TV, Electric kettle ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay.

Our hotel also features free Wi Fi, Complementary Breakfast, Rich garden view, 1000 acres golf course making it a perfect destination for a memorable vacation or a successful business trip. We have a restaurant serving delicious cuisine.

Our team of friendly and professional staff is always available to assist you with any queries or requests, ensuring that you have a pleasant stay.

We take pride in providing our guests with a memorable experience, and we look forward to welcoming you to our hotel.

Name: Student Homestay Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Student Homestay Ltd - Your Trusted Partner in Student Accommodation!

At Student Homestay Ltd, we specialize in providing high-quality homestay accommodation solutions for international students studying in the UK. With a mission to foster cultural exchange and create comfortable living environments, we connect students with welcoming host families across the country.

Our Services:

Premium Homestay Accommodation: We offer a wide range of premium homestay options tailored to meet the diverse needs of students. Each homestay is carefully selected to ensure safety, comfort, and a conducive environment for learning.
Personalized Support: Our dedicated team provides personalized assistance throughout the accommodation process, from booking to departure. We prioritize student satisfaction and strive to address any concerns promptly.
Cultural Immersion: Living with a host family provides students with the opportunity to immerse themselves in British culture, practice English language skills, and create lifelong connections.
Convenient Booking: Our user-friendly online platform makes it easy for students to browse available homestay options, book accommodations, and manage their bookings hassle-free.
Join us at Student Homestay Ltd and experience the warmth of British hospitality while pursuing your academic goals. Contact us today to book your homestay accommodation and embark on an unforgettable journey in the UK!

Contact Information:

Website: www.studenthomestay.co.uk
Email: info@studenthomestay.co.uk
Phone:  +44 7307 047053 | +44 7715 815157

Name: Ege Tatil Evleri
Description:
Ege Tatil Evleri; Türkiye’nin dört bir yanında güvenilir, konforlu ve yüksek standartlarda kiralık tatil evi hizmeti sunan, profesyonel turizm ve emlak çözümleri üreten bir markadır.
Trink Emlak, Takumi Dijital Ajans ve WinWin Emlak ile stratejik iş ortaklıklarımız sayesinde; pazarlama, emlak yönetimi, dijital görünürlük ve müşteri deneyimi süreçlerinde uçtan uca profesyonel hizmet sağlıyoruz.

Ayrıca TÜRSAB No: 17134 ile yetkilendirilmiş bir turizm firması olarak misafir memnuniyetini, şeffaflığı ve sürdürülebilir turizm yaklaşımını önceliklendiriyoruz.

Türkiye’nin birçok şehrinde bulunan hukuk ofislerimiz ve deneyimli hukuk departmanımızla; sözleşme, kiralama, müşteri hakları ve operasyonel tüm süreçlerde güvene dayalı hizmet vermekteyiz.

Ege Tatil Evleri olarak hedefimiz; misafirlerimize ev konforunda unutulmaz bir tatil deneyimi yaşatırken iş ortaklarımıza da güçlü, sürdürülebilir ve profesyonel bir çalışma modeli sunmaktır.

Name: Travelling to Lisbon
Description:
Welcome to TravellingToLisbon!

We are specialists in local accommodations and property management in the heart of Lisbon. Our mission is to provide unforgettable stays for everyone wanting to discover the essence of this vibrant and historic city.

We Offer:

 Quality Accommodations: We offer a wide range of properties, all located in prime areas of Lisbon.

 Property Management: We handle all aspects of property management, ensuring peace of mind for owners and a seamless experience for guests.

 Authentic Experiences: We want our guests to live Lisbon like locals, enjoying everything the city has.

Our furnished apartments in the old city centre of Lisbon are located in all the most well-known neighborhoods (Baixa, Chiado, Alfama, Castelo, Bairro Alto, Graça, and Principe Real).

Staying in our apartments you will feel at home whilst experiencing the true portuguese way of life!

If your visit to Lisbon is for corporate purposes or leisure our apartments are the solution.

All these vacation rental flats are perfect for a short term or medium term stay in Lisbon. Our holiday apartments are fully equipped and are an excellent option for your business trip or family holiday in Portugal.

Name: Relais del Brigante
Description:
Un piccolo agriturismo familiare immerso ai margini del paese rurale di Cesnola tra vigne, ulivi, castagni e torrenti. Una vacchia casa in pietra ristrutturata recentemente nel rispetto delle caratteristiche originali. Una Taverna conviviale con piatti della tradizone cucinati con un mix di metodi antichi e tecnologie moderne per riscoprire vecchi sapori ed odori e scoprirne di nuovi.
Un luogo ancora da scoprire ed esplorare e che offre una grande richezza di tradizioni, sport, cultura ed enogastronomia al confine tra Piemonte e Valle d'Aosta: una posizione perfetta per andare alla ricerca della propria vacanza dedicando il tempo a fare quello che più piace con chi vogliamo e per quanto tempo si vuole!

Name: Casa Cosi
Description:
We manage branded short-term rental apartments and deliver attentive customer service from the moment a client books our service until check-out.

Our state-of-the-art apartments have been minouciously designed to cater modern day travellers and are equipped with all the necessary amenities to ensure the utmost comfort for our guests.

Name: Activar Turismo
Description:
A Activar Turismo tem como objetivo potenciar o turismo na região centro nomeadamente através da organização de atividades de animação turística, dando a conhecer o património natural, histórico e cultural.

Oferecemos um serviço próximo das pessoas e a pensar no seu bem-estar, com respeito pelo meio ambiente e com todas as condições de segurança. Os nossos profissionais são qualificados para a prestação dos serviços que disponibilizamos e asseguram a comunicação com os nossos clientes em várias línguas.

(ENG) Activar tourism aims to boost in the central region trought the organization of tourist entertainment activities, making know the natural, historical and cultural heritage.

We offer a local service close to people and thinking about their well being, with respect for the environment and all the safety conditions. Our professionals are qualified to provide the services we have available and ensure communication with our clients in several languages.

Name: VacationHaven101
Description:
𝐕𝐚𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐇𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝟏𝟎𝟏 – 𝙔𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙃𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝘼𝙬𝙖𝙮 𝙁𝙧𝙤𝙢 𝙃𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝙞𝙣 𝙀𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮 𝘿𝙚𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣
Discover the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and local charm with Vacation Haven 101. Our handpicked short-term rental properties are located in top tourist destinations, offering travelers a welcoming space to relax, explore, and experience the best each location has to offer.

Whether you're seeking a beachfront escape, a cozy mountain retreat, or a city-center apartment steps away from the action, Vacation Haven 101 provides stylish, fully furnished accommodations designed to meet every traveler’s needs. Each property features modern amenities, thoughtful touches, and easy check-in for a stress-free stay.
Why Choose Vacation Haven 101?

𝙁𝙡𝙚𝙭𝙞𝙗𝙡𝙚 𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙮𝙨 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙨𝙤𝙡𝙤 𝙩𝙧𝙖𝙫𝙚𝙡𝙚𝙧𝙨, 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙥𝙡𝙚𝙨, 𝙛𝙖𝙢𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙨, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙜𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙥𝙨

From weekend getaways to extended stays, let Vacation Haven 101 be your trusted host wherever you go. Book your next adventure today and stay like a local — with the comfort of home.

Name: Villa il Maiale-Bianco B&B
Description:
Gedurende het verblijf in onze B&B bieden wij niet alleen een goed bed en een goed ontbijt, maar creëren wij een volledige belevenis in Italiaanse sferen. 
De karakteristieke villa geeft je de indruk dat je teruggaat naar het romantische Italiaanse, dat in een oase van rust voorbijgaat.
Location: Centro Valle Intelvi fraz. San Fedele, Lombardije

Name: 2-Let Room
Description: 2-Let offers listings for new pg, hostels, homes, resale homes, rentals, and co-living spaces in India.

Name: Staymoksha
Description:
Staymoksha is the leading accommodation platform in Northeast India, empowering local entrepreneurs and small businesses with a comprehensive technology stack that simplifies operations and increases earnings. By providing trusted, affordable accommodations that guests can book instantly, we are revolutionizing the hospitality industry in this vibrant region.
Staymoksha is your trusted partner in transforming your vacation property into a standout destination. With our comprehensive onboarding packages, we'll help you maximize occupancy, revenue, and guest satisfaction. Explore our tailored plans and unlock the full potential of your vacation rental

Name: Suki_House
Description: Suki House es mucho más que un lugar para hospedarse, se trata de una experiencia integral de bienestar y conexión con uno mismo y con los demás. Estamos comprometidos en brindar un servicio de calidad y crear recuerdos memorables para nuestros huéspedes. Ven a descubrir la serenidad y el confort de Suki House en Madrid.
Location: Pozuelo de Alarcón, Community of Madrid

Name: La Casa del Mexicano
Description:
Hermosa Villa en Santa Rosa Jauregui a tan solo 5 min de Juriquilla, Querétaro.
Nuestra impresionante Villa cuenta con jardines espaciosos, alberca, jacuzzi privado y climatizado, palapas y asador techado es Ideal para tardes de diversión en Familia.

Nuestra preciosa casa totalmente equipada cuenta con más de 2500m2 de terrenos para tu privacidad y comodidad; además está a tan solo 5 minutos de un increíble parque de juegos mecánicos y se cuenta con rápido acceso a las principales vialidades de Querétaro.

Name: The Croft Manali
Description:
The Croft Manali - Own your private and secure cottage and apple orchard to embrace life !!! 

Relax and rejuvenate in your own private and secure space at our breathtaking cottage situated on the bank of river Beas. Wake up to a stunning view of snow-covered mountains. This Cottage has been crafted with so much love and care, keeping in mind the guests should get the best experience. The cottage has a riverbank, a mountain view, free parking, free Wi-Fi and is located 3 km from Mall Road, Manali on the way to Atal Tunnel.
It features a fully equipped kitchen with fireplace, flat-screen TV, washing machine, dishwasher, fridge, and each room with mini bar seating area, apple orchard lawn. Cottage offer breaks fast and on-demand lunch and dinner.

Name: Chambres en vigne : Chambres d'hotes et gite proche Saint Emilion
Description:
Au cœur de l’Entre-Deux-Mers, à proximité de Saint Emilion, entre Bordeaux et Bergerac, à la limite de la Gironde et de la Dordogne vous serez accueillis dans une maison de village, du 16 eme siècle et située au cœur des vignes.
A bientôt .

Name: Le Logis du Brocard
Description: Opening July 1, 2025

Name: Ten To Go Hostel Barcelona
Description:
After years travelling around the World identifying hostelling best practices, we decided to open Ten To Go Hostel with the sole purpose to offer you the best possible stay among us. Our aim is that you feel at home… no! even better if possible!
We have developped four large, spacious – and yet private, shared mixed dorms and bathrooms, where each detail is thought to make your stay as homely as it can be.
When staying with us, you will be able to enjoy a relaxing chill-out pool where to rest, relax and meet people from all around the World after a long day (or night!) visiting our lovely city.
Our facilities also include an amazing lounge with several different spaces to suit your needs, including a fully equipped opened kitchen, a dining area, a library corner with comfortable couches and an Internet corner.

Name: Au Dolmen de Kerhus
Description:
Et si vous décidiez de vivre "une parenthèse bien-être" dans l'une des 2 maisonnettes insolites du dolmen de Kerhus ? Le dolmen de Kerhus est un nouveau concept de chambres d’hôtes éco-responsables sur le nord-Finistère. 
Une première maisonnette de 20 m2 tout équipée pour une ou deux personnes de forme rectangulaire avec terrasse, cuisine et salle de bain privatisée. Stores réglables sur mesures et agencement intérieur par une architecte d’intérieur. 
Une deuxième maisonnette de 34 m2 pour une famille de 3 à 5 personnes de forme pyramidale avec salle de bains, cuisine et terrasse privatisée, étage avec un filet suspendu pour les temps de lecture, les siestes ou la vue sur les champs environnants. Stores réglables sur mesures et agencement intérieur par une architecte d’intérieur. 
Chaque maisonnette permet l’accès gratuit au sauna extérieur. Des bornes de charges pour votre véhicule électrique sont disponibles. Vous pourrez louer des vélos pour vos balades dans la campagne environnante. 

Un braséro favorisant les moments de convivialité est également accessible pour accueillir vos invités. Les petits déjeuners sont bio et faits maison à partir de produits locaux et de saison mais ils ne sont pas obligatoires. Vous trouverez un environnement très nature et de quiétude avec les moutons et les poules pour vous tenir compagnie. 
Anneli, la propriétaire du lieu est de nationalité suédoise et elle parle 5 langues.  Le lieu est vraiment propice au bien-être. Anneli est impatiente de vous accueillir et vous faire découvrir votre "moment insolite" à moins de 10 minutes de plages de sables blancs des Amiets, à deux minutes du fabuleux château de Kerjean et à moins de 30 minutes des Monts d’Arrée !
Parés pour un moment de quiétude et un voyage en Suède tout restant en Bretagne ?

Name: Baytinn
Description:
Baytinn is a Prop-Tech startup specializing in short-
term rentals, offering end-to-end property management and marketing services. Our advanced technological tools ensure optimal occupancy rates and attractive returns for property owners.

Name: Le Jardin de Moulis
Description:
Posez vos valises au cœur du Parc Naturel Régional des Pyrénées Ariégeoises : le Jardin de Moulis, maison d’hôtes revisitée, vous accueille à 5 minutes de Saint-Girons.

Nous vous proposons une vue à 360 degrés sur la campagne verdoyante et notre « bout de Pyrénées », à proximité des principaux centres d’intérêts et d’activité de l’Ariège.

Les codes traditionnels de la chambre et de la table d’hôtes, la convivialité et l’authenticité alliés à une attention personnalisée à nos invités : Le Jardin de Moulis donne une suite à vos envies !

Name: Stonegate Guesthouse
Description: Located on South Main Street in historic Lexington, Virginia, Stonegate is a comfortable and graceful residence that has stood the test of time. After restoration and conversion into an elegant five-bedroom bed and breakfast, we now welcome outdoor enthusiasts, college students and their families to explore the treasures of Lexington, Rockbridge County, and the Blue Ridge Mountains.

Name: Student HelpOut
Description:
At StudentHelpOut, we take pride in being a leading platform for accommodation, job, and study abroad solutions. Our journey began with a vision to bridge the gap between students, professionals, and seekers of exciting opportunities worldwide. We understand that searching for the right place to stay or work, especially in a new country, can be a daunting task. Therefore, we have crafted an intuitive and user-friendly website that brings together a plethora of options for hostels, housing, mess services, roommates, and jobs, simplifying the process and empowering you to make informed decisions.

Our team consists of passionate individuals who share a common goal: to make your experience seamless and enjoyable. With years of experience in the accommodation and education sectors, we bring in-depth knowledge and expertise to curate a diverse range of listings, tailored to your specific preferences and needs. Every listing is carefully vetted to ensure reliability, quality, and safety, so you can embark on your journey with confidence and peace of mind.

At the heart of our mission is a commitment to fostering a global community. We believe that connecting people from different backgrounds and cultures enriches lives and broadens horizons. By providing a platform that caters to students and professionals alike, we aspire to create an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and cultural exchange.

As we continue to grow and expand our services, we remain dedicated to continuously enhancing our platform's features and functionalities. We value feedback from our users, and their input plays a vital role in shaping the future of our website. Our ultimate aim is to become the go-to resource for anyone seeking accommodation, job opportunities, or study abroad programs, and we are excited to have you on this journey with us. Thank you for choosing StudentHelpOut, and we look forward to helping you make your dreams a reality.

Name: Nusk Hotels
Description:
Welcome to Nusk Hotels Group - the beacon of hospitality in Medina. We offer high-quality hospitality services in three of our hotels: Nusk Taiba, Nusk Madina, and Nusk Hijra. Our hotels are strategically located near the Prophet's Mosque, providing our guests with a comfortable and spiritual visiting experience.

Our vision is to be the first choice for guests seeking comfort and premium hospitality in Medina. We aim to deliver exceptional hospitality services that exceed our guests' expectations every time.

We strongly believe in quality and attention to detail, and we invest in training our team to deliver outstanding service. We build relationships with our guests based on trust and respect, focusing on delivering an unforgettable experience for them.

Follow us here for our updates and the latest news about Nusk Hotels Group.

Name: Nomaya Surf House
Description:
Nomaya, c’est plus qu’un surf house — c’est un lieu où atterrir.
Installé à Tamraght, au cœur du littoral marocain, Nomaya est un refuge pour les esprits créatifs, les télétravailleurs nomades, les freelances en quête d'inspiration et les voyageurs qui cherchent plus que de simples vacances.

On y surfe, on co-work, on crée du lien. Le tout dans une ambiance chaleureuse, authentique et sans pression.
Pas un resort. Pas une auberge. Juste un espace vivant, où le quotidien se vit à son rythme.

 Une matinée laptop sur le rooftop.
 Une session surf à midi.
 Un atelier ou un dîner partagé le soir.

Nomaya accueille aussi les groupes et les projets.
Que ce soit pour organiser une retraite de yoga, un bootcamp créatif, un séminaire en petit comité ou un team-building les pieds dans le sable — on met à disposition un lieu modulable, ancré dans le réel, pensé pour la connexion.

Ici, on vient comme on est. Et on repart avec une idée, une rencontre, ou une nouvelle énergie.

Name: Palm Leisure Stays
Description: Palm Leisure is a chain of luxury homestays in Pink City, Jaipur. Having commenced its operations in 2016, Palm Leisure is on a mission of redefining luxury in the hospitality sector. Consisting of 6 homestays and over 60 rooms in Pink City, the company looks forward to providing top-class hospitality services to its clients, hearing their feedback, and retaining them.

Name: AfricAppart
Description:
AfricAppart est un site de réservation d’appartements meublés.
A cet effet,
• Les « Hôtes ou Hébergeurs » peuvent publier des « Annonces » afin de louer leurs « Propriétés » directement aux « Visiteurs » ou aux « Utilisateurs », sans passer par un « Agent/Agence » immobilier.
• Le « Service client » et les « Utilisateurs » peuvent communiquer directement entre eux afin de louer des Appartements ou Résidences Meublées en dehors de cette plate-forme.
• Les « Annonceurs » peuvent louer des espaces « Publicité » sur notre plateforme et dans notre magazine afin de bénéficier de la visibilité pour promouvoir leurs produits ou services.

AfricAppart agit uniquement en tant que plate-forme de publication d’annonces et de Réservation d’appartements meublés. Ce n’est pas une agence immobilière mais nous intervenons dans la transaction locative proprement dite et agissons en tant qu’intermédiaire immobilier entre les utilisateurs.

Name: Ultra Host Chile
Description:
Administramos departamentos y casas en Puerto Varas y alrededores. Nuestro objetivo es que los propietarios disfruten sus segundas viviendas cada vez que puedan, y rentabilizarlas al máximo cuando no las usen.

Te invitamos a seguirnos en Instagram para saber más sobre nosotros y nuestro servicio: @ultrahostchile. Ahí también podrás ver lo que opinan los propietarios que ya han confiado en nosotros (15+), y también los huéspedes que hemos recibido (400+).

Disfruta tu propiedad cuando quieras, nosotros la rentabilizamos el resto del tiempo!
Location: Puerto Varas, Región de Los Lagos

Name: B&B HVN10
Description: Deze voormalige boerderij onderging een complete metamorfose en beschikt over 10 luxe comfortabele kamers.

Name: Group Of Sakina & Fatima Girls Hostels
Description:
Sakina Girls Hostels Group is a professionally managed women-only accommodation provider, offering secure, comfortable, and fully-serviced residential solutions for female students and working professionals. Under our umbrella, we operate PIFD Living Space Girls Hostel, Pearl Girls Hostel, Fatima Girls Hostel, and Sakina Girls Hostel—trusted by over 1,000 families.

Located in prime areas near top universities and business hubs, we provide 24/7 security, modern amenities, and a welcoming community. Our hostels are designed to support academic success and professional growth while offering a warm, safe, and community-driven environment. Whether you're a university student or a young professional, our spaces are built to feel like home — redefining women’s housing in Lahore.

Name: Maison Maurice Zweden
Description:
Welkom bij Maison Maurice, waar we unieke en verrijkende themaweken organiseren voor diverse doelgroepen. Of je nu even wilt herbronnen, kampt met een burn-out, herstelt van een ziekte, een mantelzorger bent, quality time met vriendinnen zoekt, de band met je vader of zoon wilt versterken, of als senior op zoek bent naar nieuwe ervaringen – wij bieden een programma dat bij jou past.

Onze themaweken vinden plaats te midden van de prachtige Zweedse natuur.
Bij Maison Maurice geloven we in de kracht van evenwichtige programma's die zowel de geest als het lichaam stimuleren. Onze workshops zijn zorgvuldig geselecteerd en ontworpen om inspiratie te bieden, terwijl onze activiteiten in de natuur je de kans geven om te ontspannen en te genieten van onvergetelijke ervaringen.

Bij Maison Maurice streven we naar een persoonlijke aanpak. Wij zorgen ervoor dat alle gasten de aandacht en begeleiding krijgen die ze verdienen. In een schitterende omgeving bieden we een warme beleving waarbij je helemaal jezelf mag zijn.

Ontdek de magie van Maison Maurice en geef jezelf of je doelgroep de kans om te ontdekken, te groeien en te genieten van een onvergetelijke ervaring!

Name: Embassy Coliving- PG Hostel
Description: Embassy Coliving offers modern co-living spaces in New Hafeezpet, Hyderabad. Our fully furnished rooms provide affordable stay options with flexible lease terms. Experience community living with modern amenities and embrace a perfect work-life balance. Visit us today and elevate your living experience!

Name: Southport Air B & B Ltd
Description:
Southport Air B&B is a premier destination for travelers seeking a unique & personalized travel experience. Our one-bedroom stunning apartment offers sea views & can comfortably sleep up to five guests. We pride ourselves on providing our guests with a home away from home, complete with all the amenities and comforts needed for a memorable stay.
Our apartment features a spacious and beautifully decorated living area, complete with plush seating and a flat-screen TV. The fully equipped kitchen offers everything needed to prepare delicious meals, including a stove, oven, microwave, refrigerator, and all necessary cookware & utensils. Guests can enjoy their meals at the dining table in the living area.
The bedroom boasts a comfortable king-sized bed & plenty of storage space for guests' belongings. Additionally, the living area features a comfortable sleeper sofa that can accommodate up to three guests, making it an ideal choice for families or groups traveling together.
Our apartment is located in the heart of Southport, a charming coastal town known for its beaches, tourist hot spots, charming shops, & delicious dining options. Guests can take a short stroll to the beach, explore the town's many attractions, or simply relax and take in the stunning views from the comfort of their apartment.
At Southport Air B&B, we pride ourselves on providing exceptional service & personalized attention to each of our guests. Our team is available 24/7 to assist with any needs or requests, ensuring that each guest has a comfortable & enjoyable stay.
In addition to our stunning apartment, we offer a range of amenities to enhance our guests' experience. These include complimentary Wi-Fi, cable TV & on-site parking. 
In conclusion, Southport Air B&B offers an unparalleled travel experience for those seeking a unique & personalized stay. With stunning views, comfortable accommodation & exceptional service, we are the ideal choice for anyone looking to experience the best of Southport.

Name: Host Valencia
Description:
En Host Valencia, nos enorgullecemos en presentar una solución innovadora para todos los propietarios de alojamientos turísticos. Nuestra misión es maximizar tus ingresos y optimizar la ocupación de tus propiedades, sin que tengas que preocuparte por nada
¿Cómo lo logramos? Permíteme explicarte.

Automatización Inteligente: Utilizamos las últimas tendencias en herramientas de gestión y marketing para automatizar procesos clave. Esto incluye la automatización de precios, que ajusta dinámicamente las tarifas según la temporada, eventos locales y precios de la competencia. Así, cada propietario obtiene el máximo porcentaje de ocupación y la máxima rentabilidad. 
Así podemos dedicar más tiempo a lo que de verdad importa, a tus huéspedes.

Experiencia del Huésped: ¿Qué hace que un alojamiento destaque? La respuesta está en la experiencia del huésped. Nuestro equipo se esfuerza por crear un ambiente acogedor y personalizado. Queremos que cada visitante se sienta como en casa, y eso se traduce en más reservas directas.

En resumen, Host Valencia es tu socio ideal para llevar tus alojamientos al siguiente nivel. Únete a nosotros y descubre cómo alcanzar el éxito en el mundo del turismo!

Name: LA BODEGA DE LA VALDUERNA
Description:
La Bodega de la Valduerna, Slow Living Guest House
Aire puro, pinares, senderismo, pueblos con encanto, cocina kilometro 0 y noches iluminadas por las estrellas: La escapada rural perfecta está en la Valduerna!
Erase una vez un lugar custodiado por un monte mítico y arropado por bosques de pinos, castaños, robles y encinas. Un lugar donde la vida tiene su propio ritmo, un ritmo tranquilo, al compas de la Naturaleza y las estaciones.
Aquí la banda sonora corre a cargo de los grillos, los ruiseñores y las cigüeñas, el arrullo del viento y el rumor del rio.
Al caer la noche, sin ningún obstáculo que se interponga entre los limites de lo humano y lo divino, el brillo de la Vía Láctea fascina todas las miradas.
La escapada rural perfecta tiene nombre propio: la Bodega de la Valduerna.
Aquí te proponemos algunos planes para volver a lo esencial, disfrutar de un perfecto momento de desconexión, Naturaleza y por encima de todo, calma absoluta.
Vas a entrar en una zona totalmente libre de cualquier estrés que sea… así que disfruta la presentación sin moderación alguna!

Name: Som Turisme Coop
Description:
El HUB «Som Turisme» tiene como misión desarrollar un modelo de transformación hacia prácticas ecosociales en el sector turístico acompañante los procesos de cambio de los actores turísticos. Este modelo proveerá de una alternativa a las plataformas turísticas globalizadoras. Nace de y por la población local, con el objetivo de fijar la plusvalía de la actividad turística en el territorio donde se ha generado.

El HUB «Som Turisme» quiere democratizar el acceso al turismo, el fomento de una relación humana y auténtica entre turistas, trabajadoras y vecinas, considerando a todo el mundo al modelo de gobernanza turística, sin olvidar la transparencia y responsabilidad social en la gestión digital de los datos de todo el mundo. Somos Turismo se configura como un modelo de plataforma cooperativa “multistakeholder” y sin ánimo de lucro.

El HUB nace con la voluntad de generar y compartir conocimiento. Con este propósito, creará un laboratorio de proyectos piloto transformadores del modelo turístico en general, pero con especial atención a áreas protegidas, zonas rurales y el emprendimiento de las mujeres.

Name: Hotel Mauritius
Description:
Willkommen im #HotelMauritius, dem Stadthotel in #Crimmitschau, das Ihnen eine Oase der Ruhe und Gemütlichkeit bietet.  Seit unserer Wiedereröffnung im April heißen wir unsere Gäste mit offenen Armen willkommen.
 Für #Geschäftsreisende: Unser Hotel bietet die ideale Umgebung für Ihre geschäftlichen Unternehmungen. Die Teilrenovierten Zimmer sind modern und komfortabel. Der Schreibtisch in jedem Zimmer ermöglicht es Ihnen, in Ruhe zu arbeiten und sich auf Ihre Projekte zu konzentrieren. Kostenfreies WLAN ist selbstverständlich.
 Für #Urlauber und #Langzeitaufenthalte: Ob als Kurztrip oder für längere Aufenthalte - unser Hotel bietet für alle Gäste den perfekten Rückzugsort. Unsere Doppelzimmer mit 25 m² und Einbettzimmer mit 15 m² bieten ausreichend Platz und sorgen für eine angenehme Atmosphäre. Unser Frühstück steht nicht nur unseren Gästen zur Verfügung, sondern auch externen Besuchern.
 Kostenfreie Parkplätze und optimale Lage: Kostenfreie Parkplätze in unmittelbarer Hotelnähe stehen für Sie bereit. Die Lage unseres Hotels ist perfekt für Entdeckungstouren in der Region #Vogtland und darüber hinaus. Die berühmte #Göltzschtalbrücke und die Städte #Reichenbach, #Plauen und #Gera sind nur wenige Kilometer entfernt. Auch das #AltenburgerLand in Thüringen sowie die #TourismusregionZwickau e.V. sind leicht erreichbar.
 Erlebnisse vor Ort: #Crimmitschau bietet eine Fülle an kulturellen und historischen Sehenswürdigkeiten. Ein Stadtrundgang führt Sie durch die charmante Altstadt, und dass #TextilmuseumGebrPfau gewährt faszinierende Einblicke in die regionale Geschichte.
Buchen Sie direkt bei uns und profitieren Sie von günstigeren Preisen im Vergleich zu Buchungsportalen. Als unser Gast erhalten Sie außerdem bessere Stornierungsoptionen und besonders attraktive Konditionen für #Langzeitaufenthalte.
#Stadthotel #Komfort #Entspannung #Herzlichkeit #Willkommen #Gemütlichkeit #Service #DirektBuchen #Kurztrip #Reisen

Name: The Tamarillo
Description:
Discover the joy of being in nature where your quest for serenity is answered. Imagine yourself experiencing nature at its very best, being surrounded by endless lush greenery, stunning views of long, winding tea plantations and clumps of huge eucalyptus trees. The Tamarillo is the ultimate place to relax, recharge and reconnect with nature.

Set in a landmark high-rise , this elegant luxury boutique bed and breakfast is a 10 Minute drive from the Ooty centre Adams Fountain at the Charing Cross and a 15 Minute drive from the Ooty Bus Stand and Railway Station.

The Tamarillo offers a luxurious escape, having upscale rooms that are attractively rustic in style.

A serene four room private property offering upscale private rooms with hardwood floors, featuring a sprawling living area with a king-size bed, equipped with superior linen and other amenities like flat-screen TVs, sofa cum bed, nested tables, free Wi-Fi and comfortable wooden chairs in the private corridors/balcony. 


The air just might be a bit sweeter and the views are definitely more sweeping from the balcony room on the 1st floor. The ground floor rooms aren't anything to sniff at either. With more square footage, corridor rooms on the ground floor are suitable for a family with kids and also have a dressing space and wide bath area.

Living rooms and private corridors/balcony provide a majestic view of the surrounding greenery offering a 180º view of the valley with tea plantation and eucalyptus tree forest.
