Description: Nichée dans le petit village de Saint-Cirgues-de-Jordanne, La Maison Normande vous accueille dans un environnement authentique et préservé, au cœur du Massif Cantalien. Entourée de paysages spectaculaires, la maison offre un cadre unique, entre montagnes, vallées verdoyantes et sentiers de randonnée. Que vous soyez en quête d’aventure ou de repos, La Maison Normande vous offre l’essentiel : un lieu vrai, au plus près de la nature, où l’on se sent chez soi au cœur du plus vaste ancien volcan d’Europe.

Name: The Hubble House
Description:
The Hubble House is more than an Inn, it's a story. It is imagery brought to life by its owner, Caara Chantrel. Few people live a life like the one lived by Caara Chantrel, which she so openly shares in her own words through her powerful book called Echoes of the Heart. 

With her life shared she has now embarked on a new journey to create a place that she hopes will provide her guests a colorful symphony of inspiration,strength, rest, respite and hope. 

Whether you stay for a day, a weekend, a week or longer, Caara wants to provide you with a unique experience to 'live' life away from your life and return with renewed enthusiasm. 

Caara believes in community and that community is enhanced through the blending and the sharing of ideas and tastes. She is an avid supporter of her community and  hosts events and gatherings designed to bring cohesiveness and connectivity to the region.  

Caara has also become an example of how one can overcome tremendous, painful, and unspeakable loss and thrive in its aftermath. The Inn reflects her journey....A journey that she wants to share with you through the warmth and hospitality of the Inn. A journey that will, perhaps, allow you to hear more fully the echoes of your own heart.

Name: Dera Jaipur
Description:
About Dera Jaipur
Dera Jaipur is an elegant heritage home built in 1946 and is a leafy paradise in the heart of the World Heritage UNESCO city of Jaipur. It is a classic home furnished for modern times, with beautiful lawns and terrace gardens. This heritage home steeped in the past belonged to a World War II veteran Col. Sumer Singh MBE and his wife Suraj Kunwar, who came from an erstwhile nobility of Shekhawati in Rajasthan. The region and the home are filled with frescoes. The family has a 500-year-old history and has had two generations in the Indian Armed Forces.

Concept and Vision
Dera Jaipur is adorned with splendid frescoes, Burma teak furniture, Murano chandeliers, and vintage photographs. Dera Jaipur provides an authentic Rajasthani experience steeped in history and tradition, amidst all the modern luxuries.

We support sustainability through rainwater harvesting and using solar energy to meet all our energy requirements.

Private Luxury
The rooms are peaceful, luxurious and meant for those who do not like to be hemmed in. You can enjoy fun activities like mural painting, block-printing, learning traditional Rajasthani cooking and photography in traditional Rajasthani attire, or celebrate the festivals of Diwali, Dussehra, Makar Sankranti and Holi. The hosts also organise special occasions for their guests with local bards, bonfires and curated meals. In addition, yoga sessions and shopping pop-ups are a pleasant surprise.

Name: La Grappille Bellevue
Description:
Notre gîte et ses 2 chambres sont situés sur les hauteurs de Villié-Morgon en Beaujolais. Cadre idéal pour un séjour de détente, tourisme ou de télétravaille. La Grappille est située au milieu des vignes avec vue panoramique sur le vignoble et le Mont Blanc.

Départ de plusieurs promenades aussi bien à pied qu’à vélo, à proximité des cols de Truge, Avenas et Durbize, et des crus du Beaujolais : Morgon, Fleurie, Régnié et Chiroubles.

Le calme, la nature, les vignes et le Château de Bellevue sont nos voisins.

Au plaisir de vous recevoir ! 

Céline et David.

Name: Sardinian Gallery
Description:
Discover the magic of Bosa with Sardinian Gallery, a collection of seven unique properties offering unforgettable stays in one of Sardinia’s most picturesque towns. Nestled in the heart of Bosa’s historic center, our accommodations blend charm, history, and modern comfort to provide an authentic experience for every traveler.

Choose from a variety of distinctive stays:
 Wake up to breathtaking views of Malaspina Castle in our Temo Apartment
 Stay in a beautifully preserved 18th-century noble palace
 Experience history in a medieval home built over a natural spring
 Enjoy a panoramic terrace overlooking the colorful town

 Opt for a cozy, laidback residence with a terrace in the historic quarter
 Stay just steps from the beach while being minutes from the town center

Immerse yourself in the vibrant life of Bosa, where medieval streets, local boutiques, and authentic Sardinian cuisine surround you. Whether you're visiting for leisure or business, we promise a tranquil and enriching stay.

Book your next getaway with Sardinian Gallery and experience Bosa like never before.

Name: Apartments Raffaello
Description:
Half-board Raffaello is located on the island of Rab in the quiet town of Kampor by the sea. 7 km from the city. Not far from the building there is a large sandy beach, children's playground, crane, cafe, shop and other facilities. There are various sports facilities in the immediate vicinity. For those looking for an active holiday, the island of Rab offers various boat trips, sightseeing in national parks, cycling, diving, beach volleyball, surfing, sailing and many other activities.

 We offer 2nd rooms and 5th apartments with air conditioning with a choice of half board, private parking, swimming pool and jacuzzi, boat mooring and dry marina and rent a boat and many other facilities.

 Raffaello offers accommodation in modern rooms and apartments throughout the year.

 On the beautiful terrace, right next to the coastal promenade, relax with food and drink and enjoy the fantastic view of the sea.

 The friendly staff will make you feel welcome and will do their best to make sure everyone takes good memories with them.

Name: Casa de Coria Bed & Breakfast
Description:
CASA DE CORIA Bed & Breakfast is conveniently located on the Plaza of Chacras de Coria and 15 minute drive from Mendoza City.
Founded in 1615, the charming village of Chacras de Coria offers an authentic mix of traditional rural life and upscale modern infrastructure, where one can experience quaint cafés, bakeries, Italian-style ice cream and so much more. Stroll down tree-lined avenues. Browse the interesting shops and galleries. Dine under the stars. Simply enjoy!
Built in a traditional farmhouse style, CASA de CORIA offers a relaxed atmosphere, reminiscent of the past with the comforts of the present. Our private gardens feature magnificent old olive trees, exquisitely manicured lawns and a variety of beautiful flora. We welcome discerning travelers. Whether it's visiting wineries, walking through vineyards, horse-back riding, hiking, climbing, skiing the Andes, or simply taking in the relaxed atmosphere, Casa de Coria is the perfect vacation or business destination. Where friendships and fine wines blend together, at CASA de CORIA you are always at home

Name: The Country House at Hunchy Montville
Description:
Multi Award-Winning 5-Star Accredited Luxury Accommodation

Close to Montville, the artisan epicentre of the glorious Sunshine Coast Hinterland in Queensland, Australia, The Country House at Hunchy offers an unparalleled escape. Just an hour north of Brisbane and 30 minutes from Sunshine Coast Airport, you’ll find yourself cocooned in natural rainforest surroundings.

Our expansive modern Queenslander is purpose-designed to welcome guests in luxury, privacy, and tranquillity. This secluded hideaway offers memorable views toward the Coast, with the Blackall Range as a breathtaking backdrop.

We serve indulgent in-house breakfasts and intimate dinners, lovingly prepared. Our delicious home-cooked creations made exclusively from premium, organic, free-range, and local produce will amaze and delight your taste buds.

With only two spacious King Spa Suites, The Country House at Hunchy is perfect for romantic getaways, honeymoons, anniversaries, birthday celebrations, or simply a peaceful retreat in the Sunshine Coast Hinterland. After a day of bushwalking in nearby National Parks, exploring artisan villages, or visiting popular attractions such as Australia Zoo, the Big Pineapple, Eumundi Markets, Wildlife HQ, the Ginger Factory, Sea Life, or Sunshine Castle, you’ll return to pure comfort and serenity.

And of course, the Sunshine Coast’s world-class beaches including Coolum, Marcoola, Maroochydore, and Mooloolaba are as close as 35 minutes away, with Noosa a short drive further.

There truly is something for everyone across the Sunshine Coast made even more special when you stay at one of Queensland’s Best Hosted Accommodations.

Name: EDDA Country House
Description:
EDDA ce sont les avantages de l'hôtel et le confort de votre maison. 

Venez découvrir la splendeur du Val de Loire. Niché au coeur de cette région française emblématique - classée au patrimoine mondial de l'UNESCO - EDDA Country House est idéalement située au carrefour de ses châteaux majestueux, de ses vignobles mondialement connus, ou encore du Zoo de Beauval, pour une escapade nature & relaxante, en couple ou en famille, le tout à 2h de Paris. 

Choisissez l'une de nos 3 suites, prélassez-vous au bord de la piscine, plongez dans votre livre préféré au pied du chêne, on s'occupe du reste.

Profitez de notre conciergerie maison pour découvrir les meilleurs restaurants, bars ou producteurs locaux en fonction de vos envies ou de votre budget. 

Alors, on vous voit bientôt ?

Name: Casa Spa d'Alma Alferce
Description:
Casa Spa d'Alma is een Bed & Breakfast met alle faciliteiten van een charmant hotel met een Zen-sfeer. Het ligt midden in het beschermde natuurgebied Serra de Monchique in de Algarve, dicht bij de mooiste wandelroutes. 
Een vakantieplek waar je prachtige natuur ontdekt en het oorspronkelijke Portugal leert kennen. Ook een uitstapje naar de bekende stranden is slechts een half uurtje rijden bij ons vandaan.

Op vakantie komen in onze bed and breakfast betekent jezelf een prachtig cadeau geven. Naast het luxe ontbijt kun je genieten van authentieke Portugese en Mediterrane maaltijden in door ons aanbevolen lokale restaurants. Maar omdat we weten hoe vervelend het is om elke dag uit eten te gaan, is er een sfeervolle buitenkeuken beschikbaar voor onze gasten. Voor elk wat wils.

Name: up_stays
Description:
Welcome to UpStays, your serene mountain retreat nestled in the picturesque hills of Mukteshwar, Uttarakhand. Our charming homestay offer a unique blend of rustic elegance and modern comfort, providing an idyllic escape from the hustle and bustle of city life.

At UpStays, we pride ourselves on delivering an exceptional guest experience. Our well-appointed rooms and cozy common areas are designed to make you feel at home while you enjoy the stunning natural beauty that surrounds us. Each morning, wake up to breathtaking views of the majestic Himalayas and lush forests, right from your window.

Whether you're looking for a peaceful getaway, a family vacation, or an adventure-filled holiday, UpStays caters to all your needs. Our location offers easy access to Mukteshwar's famous attractions, including the Mukteshwar Temple, Chauli Ki Jali, and numerous hiking trails that showcase the area's rich biodiversity.

Our amenities include:

Comfortable and spacious rooms with modern amenities
Delicious home-cooked meals featuring local and organic ingredients
Personalized guest services to ensure a memorable stay
Guided tours and adventure activities such as trekking, bird watching, and village walks
Cozy outdoor spaces perfect for relaxation and enjoying the tranquil mountain atmosphere
Come, experience the warm hospitality and natural beauty of UpStays Mountain Chalet & Homestay. Your perfect mountain escape awaits!

For bookings and inquiries, contact us directly.

#UpStays #MountainChalet #Homestay #Mukteshwar #Uttarakhand #Travel #NatureRetreat #Adventure #Relaxation #Hospitality

Name: B&B Oase d'Itegem
Description: Welkom bij Oase d'Itegem - Wellness & Luxe, de perfecte plek om te ontsnappen aan de drukte, of je nu komt voor een ontspannende vakantie of een rustig zakelijk verblijf. Gelegen in het hart van de Kempen, omgeven door groene velden en prachtige wandel- en fietsroutes, biedt onze B&B de ideale combinatie van rust, luxe en comfort. Na een productieve dag of een dagje verkennen kun je ontspannen in ons binnenzwembad, genieten van onze wellnessfaciliteiten of simpelweg tot rust komen in ons stijlvolle interieur. We begrijpen dat een goed verblijf meer is dan alleen een plek om te slapen, daarom bieden we een rustige en comfortabele omgeving, zodat zowel toeristen als zakelijke reizigers zich thuis voelen. En na een dag van werk of avontuur helpen we je graag bij het vinden van de beste eetgelegenheden in de buurt, van gezellige cafés tot heerlijke restaurants. Oase d'Itegem is de ideale plek om even op adem te komen, of je nu komt voor ontspanning of zakelijke rust. Bij Oase d'Itegem draait alles om luxe, rust en de kleine extra's die jouw verblijf onvergetelijk maken.

Description: Distinguida hostería ubicada en el corazón de la majestuosa Patagonia argentina. Fundada en 1998, nos enorgullecemos de ofrecer a nuestros huéspedes una experiencia única que fusiona la elegancia con la autenticidad de la naturaleza patagónica. Nuestro compromiso es crear estancias inolvidables, donde el confort y la hospitalidad se combinan para brindar momentos excepcionales. Además de experiencias únicas, también abrazamos la sostenibilidad y la preservación del entorno.

Name: The Waltonia
Description:
Sir Walton's Waltonia is a diminutive hamlet, erected in the colonial epoch. In bygone days, it served as a colonial hotel of the Britishers. Our forefathers had the fortune to procure it from the British authorities during the Independence era. Since then, our modest family has conserved this cultural landmark as a relic of the colonial history of Himachal Pradesh. Presently, we extend an invitation to our visitors and patrons to relish the splendor of the village while dwelling in the hut of the colonial era. Our family has endeavored to safeguard its magnificence for the forthcoming generations. It is also worth noting that Waltonia is the oldest hotel in the district, dating back to the times of the British rule.  

  Waltonia proffers the broadest vista in the Kullu valley. Its unblemished and unsullied grandeur is awe-inspiring. One can venture through fruit plantations and apple orchards in this place. It is a paradise for those who cherish angling. This place is not as frigid as Manali and is accessible to tourists throughout the year. Furthermore, this area abounds in fruit plantations and apple orchards. Apiculture and fishing are also widely practiced here. Brown and Rainbow Trout can be found here by those who relish fishing. In addition to fishing, we offer Agrowalks and our kitchen solely relies on our own herbs and vegetables. Additionally, you may have the opportunity to taste exotic fruits and mushrooms once a year for a brief period. Sir Walton's Waltonia is the oldest residential abode in this valley. Behold what we have conserved for you!

Name: Can Cocollona
Description:
Inspirado en la tendencia actual de alojarse en albergues y B&B, Can Cocollona nace en Girona con la voluntad de compartir experiencias únicas con otros viajeros.

Basado en la filosofía slow travel, es un lugar donde alojarse de forma asequible adoptando nuevos ritmos de vida y donde establecer relaciones auténticas con los habitantes de la comunidad local. En Can Cocollona vivirás experiencias de bajo impacto medioambiental y de alto valor personal, siempre orientadas a la sostenibilidad ambiental, social y económica.
Fomentando la interacción con nuestros huéspedes, Can Cocollona es un punto de encuentro, un lugar para compartir y vivir experiencias, donde hacer crecer la creatividad y los sueños, donde intercambiar anécdotas y compartir tiempo y culturas con nuevas amistades.

Can Cocollona simboliza, en una casa tradicional, el amor por la naturaleza, la excelencia, la entrega, la dedicación, la constancia, el respeto y la delicadeza por las pequeñas cosas.

Name: La Ferme de Berlioz
Description:
Bien sûr, voici une suggestion de texte de description pour la page LinkedIn de la Ferme de Berlioz :

 Bienvenue à la Ferme de Berlioz 

Au cœur de la nature, au carrefour de l'authenticité et de l'innovation, la Ferme de Berlioz est bien plus qu'un simple lieu de villégiature. Nous sommes une destination riche en expériences, alliant hospitalité, créativité et développement personnel.

 Chambres Touristiques : Découvrez un séjour inoubliable dans nos chambres paisibles, offrant une vue imprenable sur la nature. C'est l'occasion parfaite pour se ressourcer, se déconnecter et se connecter avec la beauté de notre environnement.

 Événements d'Entreprises : Notre espace dédié aux entreprises offre l'inspiration que vous recherchez pour vos réunions, séminaires et événements professionnels. Créez des souvenirs professionnels mémorables au sein de notre cadre unique.

 Événements Familiaux : Célébrez les moments précieux de la vie au sein de notre ferme. Des mariages aux réunions de famille, notre équipe vous accompagne pour créer des souvenirs chéris au milieu de la nature.

 Stages : Explorez vos passions, développez vos compétences et épanouissez-vous grâce à nos programmes de formation et de développement personnel. La connaissance fleurit ici.

Nous sommes fiers de vous accueillir dans un environnement qui favorise la créativité, la croissance personnelle et la convivialité. Rejoignez-nous pour partager notre passion pour la nature, l'authenticité et l'innovation.

Name: Palazzo Personè Dimora Storica
Description:
La struttura Palazzo Personè Dimora Storica è un B&B che sorge sulle fondamenta dell’antica sinagoga, nella suggestiva cornice della piazza della Basilica di Santa Croce, nel cuore del centro storico di Lecce.

Situata all’interno di un palazzo medievale, questa struttura si compone di sei camere finemente arredate, collocate al piano terra di Palazzo Personè. Ciascuna stanza dispone di un ingresso indipendente e di un bagno privato, garantendo comfort e privacy agli ospiti.

L’unione tra gli arredi contemporanei e gli elementi architettonici e archeologici dell’antica sinagoga medievale crea un’atmosfera esclusiva, in cui passato e presente si fondono armoniosamente per rendere indimenticabile il vostro soggiorno nel capoluogo leccese.

Name: La Casa De Colette

It features a creative space with art from Nicolette Pineda's collection available for purchase. Equipped with all necessary amenities, including a fully stocked kitchen, BBQ, pool, and fire pits, it's an ideal destination for art enthusiasts and those seeking comfort and relaxation.

Name: Gray Fox Services
Description:
Gestión profesional de propiedades turísticas | Administración integral y Revenue Management

Somos una empresa especializada en la administración de inmuebles con fines turísticos. Brindamos soluciones a medida para propietarios que desean delegar total o parcialmente la gestión de sus alojamientos.

Ofrecemos dos modalidades principales:
	•	Administración completa: Nos ocupamos de todo el proceso, desde la publicación en plataformas como Airbnb y Booking, hasta la atención al huésped, limpieza, mantenimiento y más.
	•	Revenue Management: Si ya operás tu propiedad, te ayudamos a potenciar tus ingresos con estrategias de precios dinámicos, análisis de mercado y optimización del inventario.

Nuestro objetivo es maximizar la rentabilidad de cada unidad, garantizando una experiencia profesional tanto para propietarios como para huéspedes.

Name: La Casita Mexicana | Casa Rural en Llanes Asturias
Description:
La Casita Mexicana - Tu refugio ideal en Asturias para grupos grandes

En La Casita Mexicana, ofrecemos más que una casa rural: brindamos una experiencia única donde la comodidad moderna se une al encanto de una auténtica casa mexicana, en un entorno asturiano inigualable. Ubicada en el pintoresco pueblo de Cué, a solo 2 km de Llanes, nuestra casa es el punto de partida perfecto para descubrir playas, montañas y disfrutar de la naturaleza.

¿Por qué elegir La Casita Mexicana?

Nuestra casa está diseñada para grupos grandes y familias que buscan un lugar amplio y acogedor para compartir momentos especiales. Con capacidad para 10 a 18 personas, es el lugar perfecto para escapadas familiares, reuniones de amigos o celebraciones en un ambiente relajado.

Beneficios al alquilar La Casita Mexicana:

Espacios amplios para compartir: Con un salón de 50 m², varias zonas comunes y una cocina completamente equipada, es fácil relajarse, disfrutar de una comida en grupo o simplemente charlar y descansar.

Distribución pensada para grupos: Con 7 habitaciones distribuidas en tres plantas, La Casita Mexicana ofrece comodidad y privacidad para todos. Cuenta con 4 baños y dos encantadoras buhardillas.

Ubicación estratégica: Rodeada de montañas y playas, nuestra casa es el lugar ideal para disfrutar del senderismo, actividades de aventura como rafting, paseos a caballo o simplemente relajarse en la naturaleza.

Alquiler íntegro para privacidad total: Al alquilar La Casita Mexicana, todo el grupo disfrutará de la casa en exclusiva, asegurando privacidad y un ambiente íntimo.

Vive una experiencia auténtica

Si buscas un lugar donde la comodidad moderna se combine con el encanto rural mexicano, nuestra casa es la opción perfecta para ti. Cada rincón está pensado para hacerte sentir como en casa, rodeado de la tranquilidad que ofrece el campo asturiano.

Reserva hoy y vive una experiencia inolvidable en el corazón de Asturias.

Name: Ascend Suites
Description:
Ascend Suites is the perfect choice for those seeking fully furnished apartments for both short and long stays in Ntinda, a vibrant suburb of Kampala, Uganda. Our 17 spacious apartments (1 to 3 bedrooms) are thoughtfully designed and equipped with all the necessary amenities to make your stay comfortable and enjoyable.

Each apartment features a fully equipped kitchen, comfortable beds, high-speed internet, a flat-screen TV and all rooms have access to a private balcony or terrace, providing stunning views. Our facility is fitted with an elevator that provides easy access to all floors, ensuring that our guests and those with mobility challenges can enjoy the full amenities of our apartments.

Name: Applebutter Inn PA
Description:
Nestled in the rolling meadows of Western Pennsylvania, the Applebutter Inn offers guests a window into the past, with today's convenient amenities. Built in 1844, and remodeled into the 12-room Inn you see today in the late '80's, the original 6-room farmhouse and 5 gas fireplaces located in a few of the original bedrooms and common areas have truly stood the test of time.

The Inn was purchased in summer of 2021 by the Prebula Family who also own the nearby Slippery Rock Golf Club and Events Center.  Work has begun restoring the grounds and interior to bring the Inn back to its original luster, starting with all new memory foam mattresses in every room and publicizing the use of the shared   space to the community for private & special events. Perfect for parties of 50 and under. The Inn sleeps up to 30

Description:
Casa dos Castanheiros is a charming guest house, completely renovated and fully equipped, located 10 minutes from the center of Angra do Heroismo and 5 minutes from the sea, in the parish of Terra-Cha.

Nature & Conviviality

After numerous trips from Asia to the Americas via Australia, looking for adventure, encounters and a peaceful home, we simply fell in love with the Azores and more particularly the people of Terceira. 
So we settled down in Terra-cha between land and sea in our guesthouse that we have completely restored. 
It is with great emotion that we open the doors to offer you a memorable experience. 
Passionate about cooking, nature, diving and art, we will be happy to share our discoveries, our good addresses and our partners for activities such as scubadiving, boat tours, fishing, whales and dolphins watching, hiking, visits and electric bike & car rental.

We do our best to make Casa dos Castanheiros a home away from home for you !

Name: Angeline Boating
Description:
Hotelboat Angeline is a unique and captivating accommodation option that offers a delightful blend of comfort, charm, and adventure. Nestled on the tranquil waters of Amsterdam's canals, this floating hotel provides a one-of-a-kind experience for guests seeking a memorable stay.

Step aboard the beautiful Angeline, and you'll be greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere. The boat boasts a cozy and intimate setting, ensuring a relaxing and rejuvenating retreat for every guest. The interior exudes a classic nautical charm, with tastefully designed cabins and common areas that reflect the boat's rich history.

The cabins on Hotelboat Angeline are thoughtfully designed to provide the utmost comfort. Each room features cozy beds, crisp linens, and ample storage space to ensure a restful night's sleep. You'll also find modern amenities such as private en-suite bathrooms, ensuring convenience and privacy during your stay. The rooms are meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards of cleanliness and comfort.

One of the highlights of Hotelboat Angeline is its delightful breakfast service. Wake up to the aroma of freshly brewed coffee and indulge in a delectable spread of delicious pastries, bread, fresh fruits, and more. The attentive staff ensures that each guest starts their day on a high note, providing personalised service and catering to dietary preferences and restrictions.

But Hotelboat Angeline offers more than just a cozy bed and a scrumptious breakfast. It also operates as a charter and tour operator, providing an opportunity for guests to explore the captivating waterways of Amsterdam and beyond. Embark on a mesmerising journey, gliding through the picturesque canals, admiring the stunning architecture, and immersing yourself in the rich history and culture of this vibrant city. The boat's knowledgeable crew will guide you through these enchanting waterways, sharing fascinating insights and stories along the way.

Name: Castleview Holiday Lodges
Description:
Castleview Holiday Lodges is situated on a working farm in the beautiful Scottish countryside. In 2020, during lockdown, we had time to reflect on what we wanted and an idea started to form.

We had an area of land that was destroyed by storm Arwen. Thinking of all the possibilities, we decided it would be wonderful to build a few lodges and offer people a place to stay when they visit the Scottish Borders.

Excited to take on a new project, we started planning. Then, in June 2022, we started building. As a family, we all got involved and pulled together to make our little idea a reality. One year (and a lot of hard work!) later, there stood three spacious holiday lodges where nothing was before!

Now, you can come and enjoy this beautiful bit of land with us and fall in love with the place too!

Name: Sugar Maple Inn LLC
Description:
Sugar Maple Inn was once a dream now turned into reality for co-founders and married couple, Natalie and Julian Dion.  Founded in 2022, the Dions, stumbled upon an old, vacant Inn that would eventually become their first hospitality project.  As small business owners, having the freedom and opportunity to make their dream project a reality- a place where families could gather, support local businesses, and become an integral part of the local community—felt as though the stars had aligned for this young family.  They recalled their days as former homeowners in the green mountain state, where they hosted weekend family gatherings, enjoying the great outdoors, and skiing down Mount Snow with their two young daughters.  Vermont was a place they held near and dear to their hearts, and they wanted to share this warmth with other families—to give back to a place that had given them so much.  

Armed with a clear mission and a determined heart, the Dions took on the arduous task of personally remodeling the old Inn over the course of several grueling months.  They wanted to breathe new life into the space while maintaining the integrity of the natural setting.  Pulling from their design and woodworking expertise, the Dions created a space where cool modern design meets the warmth of heartfelt gatherings. Today, Sugar Maple Inn is a place that encourages connection with loved ones and the beauty and wonder that surrounds us.  With an undying devotion to building community and a deep respect for serving others, Sugar Maple Inn will serve as a place for cherished memory-making for years to come.

Located in picturesque West Dover, Vermont, and set upon four lush acres of Northeastern countryside, Sugar Maple Inn boasts 18 beautifully designed suites, an eatery that's open to the public and offers a locally-sourced menu, an in-ground pool, and a gut-renovated XYZ-foot barn that's the perfect backdrop for life's most meaningful moments.

Sugar Maple Inn– Make Sweet Memories

Name: HostelingOn
Description:
Monterey Hostel offers clean, safe, and memorable overnight lodging where travelers can connect with one another, share resources to reduce their impact on the planet, and experience the natural beauty of the Central Coast. We are a nonprofit lodging provider that offers private and communal lodging to school groups, families, and travelers. We are committed to making Monterey Bay more accessible. 

We are operated by HostelingOn, a 501(c)3 nonprofit on a mission to preserve and promote the hostel movement. Hostels are a more fun way to travel! They connect people of all ages and cultures so they can experience and learn about local communities through travel, shared experiences, and sustainable tourism.

Name: Swasey River Farm
Description:
Welcome to Swasey River Farm, your eco-conscious home-from-home beside the picturesque Swasey River in Stann Creek, Belize.
We are Rob and Angie, your hosts and the dreamers and creators of Swasey River Farm.
Angie hails from Cape Town, South Africa, whilst Rob was born in Zimbabwe. Both of us have travelled extensively and have finally chosen a place to roost - beautiful, enchanting Belize. The caretakers of this incredible jungle haven are Israel and Marcella, who hail from Belize.
Decades of working to repair yachts all over the world (Rob) and being an onboard culinary chef sailing seas and oceans full time for decades (Angie) led both of us to cherish time on land. Looking to drop anchor long term, we fell in love with Belize and our dream of inland self-sufficiency started to take seed in 2016 when we bought our slice of paradise - 20 acres of
untouched virgin jungle.
Aided by a local construction company, we created road access to the lot and gently started clearing part of it to build our off-grid home, which is made from two shipping containers. We then introduced a few animals to make up our little farm and planted an orchard and vegetable garden to sustain ourselves on a small scale basis.
The farm as you see it now is the end product of many years of creating, cultivating and maintaining our land and
smallholding. We adore this unique spot - for its serenity, its beauty and for the fertile riverside soil it provides our veggies, fruits and creatures. Swaysey River Farm is home to sheep, pigs, cows, chickens and 7 dogs with just four dedicated
humans overseeing them all!
Feeling the need to share this unique space, we were inspired to build a cabana, pool and palapa with a wood fired pizza
oven, barbeque, fully stocked bar and comfortable lounging and dining area for visitors to enjoy whilst watching the birds and see the colours of the hillside change throughout the day. Master builder and engineer Rob toiled endlessly to create
what you see around you

Name: Best Little Fredericksburg Texas Bed and Breakfast
Description:
If you are looking for the best places to stay in Fredericksburg Texas then check out the Best little Fredericksburg Texas Bed and Breakfast. Fredericksburg Texas offers some of the best hotels, motels, bnbs, airbnbs, vrbos, cabins and studios to stay at in the country.

Each room showcases with sliding glass door entry to a private 70 sqft patio, common access to a 1500 sqft slab patio, and a 400 sqft rooftop deck panoramic view of the hill country. We spare no expense on this unit and it is stacked full of luxury appliances including a retro fridge, 4 in 1 micro/oven / air-fryer / convection oven, and top-of-the-line Ninja Coffee maker. At night the automatic lighting schema comes alive with traditional string party lights and led lamps. During the day roll up the garage door and walk from your living room to the spacious 1500 sqft patio with 3 cherry red solar sails that provide shade and deck space to lounge under. The property is full of exotic black bucks, over 25 peacocks,  long horns, and other ranch animals.

Description:
Chesapeake Paradise is a 2-acre waterfront micro-resort in Churchton, Maryland—just 20 minutes from Annapolis and under an hour from Washington, D.C. and Northern Virginia. This hidden gem on the Chesapeake Bay offers one-of-a-kind vacation rentals ideal for romantic getaways, family reunions, wellness retreats, business off-sites, intimate events, and solo escapes.

Guests can choose from several distinctive accommodations, each blending rustic charm with modern comfort:

The Chesapeake House: A beautifully remodeled 6–7 bedroom, 4-bath waterfront home with multiple balconies, a screened porch that opens into the great room, two fireplaces, and room to host unforgettable intimate gatherings.

The Cottage: A charming, 3-bedroom, 2-bath stand-alone house just steps from the water, perfect for families, couples, or longer-term stays. Includes full kitchen, private lawn, hammock, and a cozy fireplace. Pet-friendly!

The Skylit Flat + Solarium Suite: A light-filled, second-floor studio with luxurious marble bath, wet-bar kitchen, and breathtaking views from every window—ideal for honeymoons, creative retreats, anniversaries, or solo resets. Featured in Travel + Leisure Magazine as Maryland’s Most-Wished-For Airbnb.

The Sunrise Suite: A private primary suite with its own balcony, soaking tub, rain shower, fireplace, dining area, and a wall of windows that greet you with sunrises over the Chesapeake Bay.

Guests enjoy a range of amenities including a private pier, hot tub, free kayaks and canoe, tree swings, firepits, BBQ grills, screened porches, stargazing spots, lawn games, and stunning sunrise-to-moonrise views. Whether you're unwinding in a hammock, crabbing off the pier, or hosting a cozy waterfront retreat, Chesapeake Paradise is designed to nourish connection, rest, and play.

Book direct via our website to avoid third-party fees and experience this truly peaceful slice of the Chesapeake.

Name: Dennarque Estate
Description:
Perfect location for a boutique team building and small conference retreat. A Blue Mountains retreat in the heritage garden village of Mt Wilson offering luxury accommodation and small events.

Dennarque Estate is situated on the highest point in Mt Wilson. The original sandstone house was built in 1879 by former Aide-de-Camp to the Governor, Commissioner for Crown Lands and Clerk of the Executive Council, Edward Merewether, who lived there with his wife Augusta and 10 children.

The original gardens were designed by Charles Moore, Director of the Royal Botanic Gardens Sydney.

Rarely open to the public, the extensive manicured cool climate gardens are ideal for the perfect retreat, small conferences, or a small wedding for up to 50 guests.

Today, Dennarque Estate is available to those who wish to experience nature at its best as in in-house guest.

We are looking forward to welcome you!

Name: Riad La Tempérance Essaouira
Description:
Envie de tranquillité, de sérénité et d’authenticité, le Riad Anis eco-responsable est l’endroit idéal pour passer un séjour reposant et ressourçant à Essaouira. Sylvain, professionnel de l’hôtellerie franco-suisse, vous accueille à un peu plus de 35 km de l’ancienne Mogador, dans un Riad de tradition équipé d’une terrasse panoramique, d’une piscine à débordement et d’un hammam.
Vous pourrez profiter d’une région pittoresque avec des villages typiques tels qu’Aquermoud et Had Dra avec leurs souks incomparables dans un rayon de 30 min, du traditionnel port de pêche de Bihbah à 10 min, tout en étant à proximité d’Essaouira atteignable à un peu plus de 30 min.
Ce lieu paradisiaque, au cœur de la vie locale marocaine, est propice à la relaxation, au farniente et à la méditation.
Alors n’hésitez plus et venez découvrir cette région dans une nature préservée, à l’écart du tumulte des grandes villes de l’ancien Royaume Chérifien.
Au Riad Anis, nous vous offrons une expérience complète mêlant services de conciergerie, bien-être et activités sportives. chaque instant est pensé pour vous offrir un séjour mémorable alliant confort, détente et découverte.

Name: Abigail's Bed and Breakfast Inn
Description: Abigail's Bed and Breakfast Inn is located in Ashland Oregon. Home to world renowned Theatre. Part of a growing wine region located in Southern Oregon as well a close to incredible hiking and biking trails. This small town boasts gourmet restaurants and boutique shopping as well as many eclectic Art Galleries. The Bed and Breakfast is .7 of a mile and within easy walking distance to all that Ashland has to offer as well as the beautiful Lithia Park and Japanese Gardens. The Bed and Breakfast consists of five en-suite bedrooms as well as a two bedroom self catering cottage. The house is a beautiful 1904 Victorian home on North Main Street. Updated and in keeping with tradition this BnB is owned and managed by Adam and Susan Lemon. The property has secure off street parking. Each room is furnished with our guests comfort in mind - from Cable TV, Tea/Coffee making facilities, individual Air Cond./Heating, WiFi and room amenities. We have four king bedrooms to choose from, one queen or two of our rooms can convert to twins. A gourmet two course breakfast made from scratch daily is served in the dining room for guests to enjoy before heading out for the day. Tea/Coffee, Sodas, Water and snack/fruit facilities are located downstairs for guest to enjoy throughout the day. Freshly baked cookies or coffee cakes is served daily at 3 pm for guests to enjoy when returning to the BnB in the afternoon. A guest information handbook filled with Things To Do, Restaurants to visit etc. is sent to each guest prior to arrival so that they may start to plan their vacation. Wine can be purchased on site as well as De Luxe Charcuterie/Cheeseboards. Keyless entry to both the property and rooms have been installed for the ease of our guests.   Ashland Oregon is an hour and half drive from the beautiful Crater Lake, twenty minutes from Downtown Jacksonville and the Britt Festival, twenty minutes from Harry and David, the Rogue Creamery as well as Medford Airport with local shuttle access.

Name: Casa Belleza – Private Pool Villa, Kihim Alibag
Description:
Casa Belleza, Kihim – Weekday Workcation & Calm Escape

Casa Belleza is a serene and private luxury 4BHK pool villa near Kihim Beach (just 800 m), ideal for guests seeking peace, nature, and comfort. Surrounded by lush farms and spread across 30,000 sq. ft. of fully fenced land, the villa offers complete privacy while remaining conveniently close to the main market (1 km).

 Wake up to birds chirping, spot different species from your windows, and unwind with the soothing sound of sea waves in the distance. The calm atmosphere makes Casa Belleza especially popular for weekday workcations, midweek breaks, long stays, yoga, reading, writing, and creative retreats.

The villa is thoughtfully designed for both relaxation and productivity, offering high-speed Wi-Fi, spacious indoor and outdoor seating, and a quiet environment free from crowds. Weekdays are more pocket-friendly, with attractive discounts on longer stays—many guests extend their visit after experiencing the tranquility.

 Villa Highlights: Private crystal-clear swimming pool, Large green lawn for yoga, meditation & outdoor activities. King-size beds with memory foam mattresses. Indoor & outdoor dining areas, Barbecue & bonfire setup (on request) For Families & Kids. Enjoy carrom (champion board), badminton, lagori, Monopoly, Jenga, UNO, and ample open space for safe play.

Location Advantage: Kihim Beach is known for water sports, parasailing, scenic sunsets, and delicious local cuisine—making the villa perfect for both peaceful stays and short explorations.

Amenities: The villa is fully equipped with toiletries, bath & pool towels, kitchenware, refrigerator, microwave, washing machine, iron, cupboards, hangers, Smart TV, Wi-Fi, board games, yoga mats, speakers with mic, inverter, generator, and much more—ensuring a comfortable, hassle-free stay.

Warm, trained caretakers provide attentive service & genuine hospitality. As written in our living room: May all who enter as guests leave our home as friends

Name: Hunter Gleann Pty Ltd
Description:
Hunter Gleann is a charming farm stay nestled in the heart of the Hunter Valley, NSW, just 2.5 hours north of Sydney. Set on a picturesque property surrounded by vineyards and olive groves, Hunter Gleann offers a peaceful retreat where guests can truly unwind and reconnect with nature.

Our accommodations are designed to cater to both small and large groups, ensuring a comfortable and memorable stay. The Homestead, a spacious five-bedroom, three-bathroom residence, is perfect for families or groups of 8-11 guests. With its expansive living areas and sweeping views of the Broken Back Range, it provides the ideal setting for gatherings, celebrations, or simply relaxing in style. The two-bedroom, two-bathroom Cottage offers a cozy yet roomy option for smaller groups of 4-6 guests. Both accommodations are equipped with modern amenities and exude warmth and comfort, making Hunter Gleann a true home away from home.

A standout feature of Hunter Gleann is our 14-acre olive grove, where we cultivate and produce a range of marinated table olives. Guests are invited to stroll through the grove, learn about the olive-growing process, and sample our delicious olives. This unique experience allows visitors to connect with the land and enjoy the fruits of our labor in a truly authentic way.

Conveniently located near some of the Hunter Valley's most popular attractions, Hunter Gleann is within walking distance of renowned wineries, distilleries, and breweries. Guests can also indulge in gourmet dining at nearby Restaurant Botanica or pamper themselves at Spa Anise, located just next door. Whether you're here to explore the local wine scene, relax in the tranquility of the countryside, or experience the rich agricultural heritage of the Hunter Valley, Hunter Gleann provides the perfect base for your getaway.

Experience the charm and serenity of Hunter Gleann—your gateway to an unforgettable Hunter Valley experience.

"The Circle offers a tranquil bed and breakfast experience in the heart of the city. Our curated collection of private apartments provides the perfect blend of comfort, privacy, and personalized service for couples and corporate travelers seeking a peaceful retreat.

At The Circle, we understand the need for a quiet, undisturbed space to unwind and recharge. Each of our thoughtfully designed accommodations serves as your personal haven, complete with all the amenities needed for a restful stay. Wake up to a delicious, freshly prepared breakfast that caters to your preferences, setting the right tone for your day.

Whether you're on a romantic getaway or a business trip, The Circle envelops you in an atmosphere of serenity. Our commitment to privacy ensures that your time with us is free from disturbances, allowing you to focus on relaxation or work without interruption.

Experience the warmth of a bed and breakfast combined with the privacy of a boutique hotel. The Circle welcomes you into its embrace of calm, comfort, and exceptional service, providing a home away from home in the city."

This revised description:
Includes the bed and breakfast aspect

Maintains emphasis on calm, privacy, and comfort

Still targets couples and corporate travelers

Highlights the personalized service, especially the breakfast

Balances the ideas of a B&B's warmth with a hotel's privacy

Name: Hoeve Wondervol
Description:
Welkom bij Hoeve Wondervol, jouw warme thuis weg van huis in het Brabantse Erp. Hier draait alles om rust en aandacht met een vleugje vintage charme.

Hoeve Wondervol is een kleinschalig gastenverblijf met twee heerlijke ‘nestels', elk uniek ingericht met hergebruikte meubels en vintage vondsten. Perfect voor iedereen die even wil onthaasten en ruimte wil maken voor persoonlijke groei en zelfreflectie.
Bij Hoeve Wondervol verblijf je niet in een huisje, maar in je eigen Nestel, een charmant toevluchtsoord met een groot gevoel van thuis.

Hoeve Wondervol – Creatieve Werkplek
Onze locatie is ideaal voor professionals die op zoek zijn naar een inspirerende omgeving voor coaching, workshops of zakelijke retraites. Met uitzicht op weilanden en bossen, vintage inrichting en een focus op duurzaamheid, creëren wij de perfecte setting voor persoonlijke en professionele groei. Het geheel is geïnspireerd door Atelier In Vervoering.

 Erp, Noord-Brabant
 Meer informatie en boekingen via hoevewondervol.nl

In een paar steekwoorden: #HoeveWondervol #Nestel #Coaching #Workshops #ZakelijkeRetraite #DuurzaamOndernemen #PersoonlijkeGroei #ProfessioneleOntwikkeling #AtelierInVervoering

Name: Rehin Sehin
Description:
We provide fully furnished and equipped apartment suites for daily bookings in central Islamabad with guaranteed safety, privacy and luxury. Perfect stay for business, personal or transit travel in the heart of the city. Each apartment has two modern bedrooms with attached bathrooms, a living area, kitchenette, balcony,  private parking, high-speed internet and a dedicated team for check-in, check-out and/or other assistance 24/7.

We are fully equipped to host from family vacations to corporate retreats!

Name: Exclusive Stays
Description:
Exclusive Stays | Excelência em hospitalidade.

Há quatro anos, a Exclusive Stays nasceu de forma despretensiosa — uma ajuda pontual a um vizinho acabou revelando um novo caminho. Com o tempo, a dedicação se transformou em propósito, e a paixão pela hospitalidade se tornou a base do nosso trabalho.

Hoje, atuamos com foco na gestão profissional de imóveis por temporada, oferecendo um serviço completo, personalizado e de alto padrão. Da primeira conversa com o hóspede até o pós-check-out, cuidamos de cada detalhe para que a estadia seja tranquila, memorável e à altura do que cada cliente merece.

Com 12 trimestres consecutivos como Superhost no Airbnb, reforçamos que excelência não é acaso — é resultado de cuidado, eficiência e compromisso.

Somos a escolha de quem valoriza o que é único. Somos Exclusive Stays.

Name: Mykolodge Majunga
Description:
Passez un séjour unique en famille ou entre amis dans la villa Mykolodge, où vous retrouverez tout le confort nécessaire pour des vacances réussies : piscine lagon, wifi, TV, climatisation, literie confortable, linges de maison fournis et petit-déjeuner inclus.
Le tout dans un cadre idyllique inspiré des maisons grecques et idéalement situé à 5 minutes à pieds de la petite plage de Majunga.
Nous nous réjouissons de vous y accueillir.
Toute l'équipe Mykolodge.

Name: BBITALIA.it
Description: BBITALIA.it operates since 2001 as the first italian portal and has more than 3000 active properties in its platform.

Name: Domaine de Montclair
Description:
Chambres d’hôte de charme et séminaires au cœur des pierres dorées en Beaujolais
Une maison de famille dans un écrin de verdure aux portes de Lyon :
Montclair est un lieu de ressourcement qui allie l’élégance des demeures anciennes au confort actuel pour répondre à vos besoins.
Idéal pour vos séjours touristiques en famille dans le Beaujolais.
Situé sur la route des vins, le Domaine vous proposera aussi de déguster ses vins rouges et blancs. Nous pouvons aussi vous proposez des cours d'œnologie .
Pour les amoureux du vin, ne manquez pas de vous rendre au "Hameau du vin" de Georges DUBOEUF, magnifique musée sur l'histoire du Beaujolais et du vin. Vous pourrez aussi profitez de dégustation dans différents caveaux typiques à Vaux en Beaujolais(cave de Clochemerle) ou Beaujeu (le Comptoir Beaujolais)

Profitez de l'arrivée de l'automne pour admirer les  couleurs flamboyantes  des vignobles s'harmonisant avec la couleur des pierres de nos villages (Charnay, Bagnols, Châtillon d'Azergues)
Vous pourrez aussi faire des ballades en famille sur les différents circuits pédestres des Pierres Dorées ou du haut Beaujolais.
Situé au cœur du Géopark du Beaujolais (label mondial de l'UNESCO) vous pourrez aussi visiter des villages médiévaux comme Oingt ou Ternand ou le nouvel espace Pierres Folles.  ( Ouverture printemps 2025).

Les passionnés d'histoire pourront aller visiter le Château de Fléchères, déambuler dans les cours renaissance de Villefranche ou tout simplement sillonner les routes du Beaujolais (Château de Bagnols, Montmelas, La Chaize).

Name: Le Coin Tranquille - La Roque-Gageac
Description:
Believed to be over 400 years old, Le Coin Tranquille has undergone several restorations and is equipped with the benefits of modern life. However, the charm and atmosphere of the past were left intact, retaining the original character of this quaint and historic Black Perigord Property. 

Our boutique Bed and Breakfast has three bedrooms, two of which are double and one is a twin room; all rooms have en-suite shower rooms.

We have two terraces; one is a partly covered terrace off to the side, where you can enjoy breakfast, relax, or just watch the river roll by. The second terraced garden offers excellent views of the Dordogne River and valley, where you can enjoy breakfast and relax after a great day exploring the area.

A five-minute walk through the little narrow streets to collect bread, have coffee or eat at the many restaurants.

Castelanaud-la-Chapelle, Domme and Beynac-et-Cazenac are as close as 7min driving and Scarlat-la-Canadá is at 15mins by car. Five wonderful castles and two famous gardens are just minutes away from us.

The house is furnished with everything you will need for your stay, including traditional French furniture and lovely linens. Wi Fi throughout. We offer a delicious breakfast, served every morning.

Come and experience the timeless beauty and serenity of this historic house, set amidst the stunning Dordogne Valley and its picturesque villages!

Name: MEC Office Hostel
Description:
Bem-vindo ao MEC Office Hostel! Nosso propósito é ajudar empresas a hospedar da melhor forma seus colaboradores, oferecendo um espaço que combina conforto, funcionalidade e um ambiente acolhedor no coração de Niterói.

 O Que Nos Diferencia:
No MEC, entendemos as necessidades das empresas e trabalhamos para criar uma experiência de hospedagem que vai além do simples pernoite. Nossos valores de transparência, fidelidade, sustentabilidade, inovação e amizade guiam todos os nossos serviços. Aqui, você encontrará:

 Acomodações Confortáveis: Quartos e dormitórios projetados para garantir descanso e revitalização após um dia de trabalho.
 Sala de Coworking: Um espaço dedicado para que seus colaboradores possam trabalhar de forma produtiva, com todas as facilidades necessárias.
 Ambientes de Interação: Oferecemos atividades e áreas de convivência que promovem a integração e o networking entre hóspedes.
 Localização Estratégica: Rua Doutor Cotrim da Silva, 22, Niterói
 Por Que Escolher o MEC:
Ao optar pelo MEC Office Hostel, sua empresa não só reduz custos com hospedagens, mas também proporciona uma experiência única para seus colaboradores, incentivando a colaboração e a inovação. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer um atendimento profissional, porém próximo e leve, garantindo a satisfação de todos.

 Vamos Conversar:
Estamos abertos a novas parcerias e oportunidades! Se sua empresa deseja discutir como podemos atender suas necessidades de hospedagem, entre em contato conosco.

Junte-se a nós e descubra uma nova forma de acomodar seus funcionários, transformando cada estadia em uma experiência memorável!

Ubicados en Epuyén, formamos parte de la Comarca Andina del Paralelo 42º, un oasis de calma para vivir una experiencia en contacto directo con el entorno natural y disfrutar de los imponentes valles y paisajes de la Patagonia Argentina

Name: Villa del Mar Leba
Description:
Villa del Mar Łeba – guest rooms

We cordially invite you to choose our facility as a holiday destination in Łeba.

We invite people of all ages, families with children, couples, young people and the elderly to our villa.

We offer 10 rooms (2, 3, 4 and 5 people) with bathrooms, including 8 rooms with a balcony.

Each room is equipped with a bathroom with a shower cabin, a hairdryer, a flat-screen TV, a wardrobe, a table with chairs, a fridge and an electric kettle. There are tables with chairs on the balconies. There is a fully equipped kitchen on the premises. Iron and ironing board on request. Bath towels on request.

Villa del Mar in Łeba is surrounded by a green garden with barbecue facilities, garden furniture and a playground for children (a swing with a slide, a sandbox with toys, a children's house).

Villa del Mar is located away from the hustle and bustle of the center of Łeba, in a quiet place, which allows you to take a deep breath and relax from the big cities.

A sandy beach is over 20 minutes on foot. Possible access by melex.
Lake Sarbsko and horse stud farm approx. 600m.
To the largest DINOSAUR PARK in Poland (Łeba Park) approx. 500m. To the sealarium (SEA PARK) in Sarbsko approx. 7 km.
Nearby grocery stores, bar, bike rental.
Free parking and Wi-Fi internet on the premises of the villa.

We cordially invite you to choose our offer for your ŁEBSKA HOLIDAYS.
We assure you that we will do everything to make you feel good and comfortable with us.

You're welcome
Villa del Mar Leba

Name: Studio Rippple
Description:
Door mijn jaren ervaring in de hotelsector en als growth marketeer is het een passie om de algortimes te bespelen. Zo is het mijn kunnen om de rendabiliteit te verhogen door aan de juiste knoppen te draaien.

Name: Le Clos de Ronzières
Description:
Le Clos de Ronzières, est un petit havre de calme et de sérénité face au paysage naturel du pays des Pierres Dorées.

Notre maison d’hôte est située à 30 km de Lyon et 20 km de Villefranche sur Saône.

Nous sommes au cœur du Beaujolais des Pierres Dorées, sur la commune du village de Ternand, dans une ancienne ferme rénovée avec goût. 

Nous vous accueillons pour vos moments de ressourcements, weekends, vacances, dans deux belles chambres d'hôtes pour une étape sur votre parcours… tout au long de l’année.

Nous vous proposons aussi d'accueillir vos formations, séminaires, réunions pour 12 à 15 personnes en fonction de la configuration.
Vue dégagée sur Oingt, Ternand et les Monts du Lyonnais, venez profitez d'un lieu apaisant dans un écrin de verdure.

Name: Deer Home LLC
Description: Pocono Mountains vacation rental investor & operator. @Airbnb #Superhost #GuestFavorite

Name: Casa Brivio
Description:
Casa Brivio is a home: a Milanese home, in the heart of Milan. 

Dedicated to the spirit of mid-century Milanese modernism and inspired by the works of the iconic Italian architects of that era, Casa Brivio embodies the essence of the city. Fusing Milan’s rich experiences in design, fashion and culture, Casa Brivio embodies a sophisticated and unique style, a tribute to the golden age of Milanese design and architecture. 

The rooms/suites are conceived with a unique design. The furniture chosen is all by Cassina, the historic Italian brand that boasts custom designs created by big names in the industry, from Le Corbusier to Philippe Starck.

Name: Le Manoir du Moulin de Madame
Description:
Découvrez le charme intemporel de la maison d'hôtes Le Manoir du Moulin de Madame, située aux portes de la belle bastide de Villeneuve-sur-Lot, dans le Lot-et-Garonne. 

Nichée au cœur d'un cadre verdoyant et paisible, cette demeure, empreinte d'histoire et de charme, vous transporte dans une époque révolue, tout en offrant le confort moderne.

Ses chambres spacieuses et raffinées, sa piscine rafraîchissante et ses jardins verdoyants vous invitent à la détente, la relaxation et la contemplation. Imprégnez vous de l'atmosphère sereine des environs, explorez les trésors de la région ou savourez simplement un moment de détente en bord de rivière du Lot.

Vous aurez le choix parmi 3 chambres spacieuses pouvant accueillir jusqu’à 4 personnes selon la chambre. Chaque chambre dispose de sa propre salle de douche à l’italienne avec ses toilettes.

Au plaisir de vous accueillir très bientôt dans notre petit coin de paradis ! 

Discover the timeless charm of the Le Manoir du Moulin de Madame guest house, located at the gateway to the beautiful bastide town of Villeneuve-sur-Lot, in the Lot-et-Garonne region. 

Nestling in the heart of a peaceful green setting, this residence, steeped in history and charm, transports you back to a bygone era, while offering modern comforts.

Its spacious, refined rooms, refreshing swimming pool and lush gardens invite you to relax, unwind and contemplate. Soak up the serene atmosphere of the surrounding area, explore the treasures of the region or simply enjoy a moment of relaxation on the banks of the River Lot.

Choose from 3 spacious bedrooms sleeping up to 4 people, depending on the room. Each room has its own Italian-style shower room and toilet.

We look forward to welcoming you to our little corner of paradise very soon! 

#weekend #bordeaux #chambredhotes #charme #détente #piscine #lemanoirdumoulindemadame #moulinmadame #gite #villeneuvesurlot #agen #lotetgaronne

Name: Le Dimore del barone
Description: Atmosfera sempre ricercata, all’insegna della qualità e del calore familiare. La nostra serie di strutture, sono la scelta ideale per chi vuole soggiornare in un territorio ricco di storia arte e paesaggi.

Name: CASAS COM RUMO
Description:
A house in the quiet Aldeia de Juso, is composed as follows: CASA D'ALDEIA DE CIMA 3 bedrooms - 5 camas - 1 sofá cama - 8 guest CASA D'ALDEIA DE BAIXO 1 bedroom - 1 bed - 1 sofa bed - 4 guest

___________________________________________________________

Aldeia de Juso is located just a short 30-minute drive outside beautiful and emblematic Lisbon, in a quiet area near Guincho, one of the most beautiful beaches in the world, 10 minutes from the village of Cascais, which is considered by many to be the Portuguese Riviera. On the edge of Sintra-Cascais Natural Park and several beaches, it is 15 minutes away of the historic village of Sintra, the perfect place for nature lovers.

Ideal for friends and families who want to try surfing and appreciate the waves, relax on the beach and enjoy the summer sun on the Portuguese coast. Venture into the many green golf courses and finish with a perfect Portuguese glass of wine at the end of the day watching the sunset, followed by a good meal in the many restaurants that our coast has to offer, is an excellent possibility. 

As well as cycling through the many cycle paths that the Cascais waterfront has to offer or simply relaxing in the comfort of Casa d’Aldeia, after a tour of the palaces and castles of Sintra or the museums and parks of Cascais. On winter days, walks along the enchanted paths of the mountains become inviting, when we know that, at Casa d’Aldeia, there is a fireplace waiting for us.

Name: Neo Homes
Description: Neo Homes is a modern accommodation brand specializing in premium Paying Guest (PG) services. Designed for students and working professionals, Neo Homes offers safe, fully-furnished, and well-managed living spaces across prime city locations. With a focus on comfort, convenience, and community, Neo Homes aims to redefine urban co-living with hassle-free services and a warm, homely environment.

Name: Eagle Mill Rooms
Description:
Eagle Mill is a relaxed yet luxurious boutique B&B, set within three acres of garden, orchard and paddock in St Ives, Cambridgeshire. 

Seven beautiful bedrooms have been elegantly designed for both comfort and practicality. Whether you’re relaxing or working, Eagle Mill has a room to suit you that’s crammed full of little luxuries.

From a warm welcome to a freshly cooked breakfast, made with local produce, your stay at Eagle Mill will never disappoint.

Bar, restaurant, hébergement, art et bien-être.

Name: GoHimalayan.com
Description:
The GoHimalayan app allows local hosts in the Himalayan region to connect directlly with travelers, make seamless bookings, transact online, share info on their travel plans, and much more. It's a growing community of local hosts and travelers coming together to make some awesome travel experiences across the Himalayan region.

Name: Sakura Ridge The Farm & Lodge
Description:
Sakura Ridge, The Farm and Lodge, which began as a modest log home in the middle of orchards in the shadow of Mt. Hood, enters its latest evolution following a full property renovation as Oregon’s newest luxury property. The certified organic farm and five-room lodge, which was purchased in 2021 by Nashi Orchards, is now open for reservations. The new Sakura Ridge offers an update on the legacy of this stunning destination that reflects the Hood River Valley.

The Lodge was updated with sustainability in mind. Materials like cork floors, paper stone countertops and Japanese limestone plaster were chosen to minimize the use of chemicals in the upkeep and last for a lifetime. Guest rooms feature an updated, fresh aesthetic with varied amenities ranging from stone soaking tubs to a private balcony with unparalleled Mt. Hood views, each featuring a vintage Japanese Tansu circa 1800-1900’s. Guests find sustainably sourced cherry Oregon-made beds, custom rugs, modern and traditional Japanese artwork, hand-made tiles, and materials that reflect craftsmanship and refined detail.

Located 15 minutes from the heart of Hood River, the lodge vibes continue to delight guests with long porches, huge logs, and the authenticity of a working farm.

Name: Vieille France Saint Florentin
Description: La Vieille France est implanté à Saint-Florentin, dans le département de l'Yonne (89). Dans une ambiance familiale, Henri et Najette vous accueillent et sont à votre disposition pour vous assurer un séjour confortable et reposant dans leurs chambres d'hôtes.

Name: YUP.
Description: Customer-focused accommodation and lifestyle brand targeting exchange students.

Name: LODGE DU HAUTACAM
Description:
Dans un domaine de plus de 2 hectares de jardins et de forêts, à 15 mn de Lourdes, découvrez une magnifique grange du XIX siécle, au design moderne et raffiné. Un havre de paix de 270 m2 conçu pour accueillir 8 personnes, bordant la route mithyque du Hautacam, surplombant la vallée des gaves, face à la chaine des montagnes pyrénennes. Les jardins, créés il y a plus de 25 ans vous invitent à des promenades et moments de quiétude, bordants le couloir de nage chauffé de 15M.

Bénéficiant des derniers progrés de la domotique, l'aménagement intérieur est organisé autour de lieux de vie (salon, salle à manger, cuisine) de plus de 90 m2, ainsi que du sauna, les trois suites et la chambre étant conçues comme autant d'écrins luxueux.

Dans une approche indor-outdor, la piscine, les terrasses, les espaces de vie communiquent. Nous avons souhaité que ce lieu soit pleinement dédié à la l'art et au beau: en partenariat avec la galerie d'art "Dom Art" (boutic-hotel et expositions temporaires). Vous serez accueillis par les propriétaires qui ont souhaité faire de ce lieu d'exception tout à la fois un havre de paix et la source d'une connexion vivante avec son environnement. Pour vous qui y séjournez en famille ou entre amis nous avons conçu des aménagements ainsi que des propositions vous permettant d'assouvir pleinement votre passion du cyclisme ou de la montagne (local technique vélo et skis, partenariat avec les meilleurs professionnels, offres packaging...).

Pour les séjours professionnels, les lieux de vie se transforment en salle de réunion permettant la tenue de séminaires. Pour tous nous mettons à disposition des services complémentaires: snacking mais aussi restauration gastronomique, massages, 30 mn de l'aéroport de Lourdes / 20 mn de la gare de Lourdes.

Name: Auberge Val Sans Retour
Description:
Vivez une expérience ressourçante

Immergez-vous au cœur de la majestueuse forêt de Brocéliande et découvrez notre auberge où nous vous invitons à faire une halte gourmande ou un séjour revitalisant.

Laissez-vous séduire par notre menu mettant à l’honneur les produits de saison, savourez une cuisine authentique dans une ambiance détendue. Plongez dans une atmosphère conviviale où vous pourrez vous divertir avec nos jeux de société. Rechargez vos énergies en vous installant confortablement et en dégustant nos douceurs faites maison, accompagnées d’une boisson chaude ou rafraîchissante selon votre préférence.

Nous sommes impatients de vous accueillir très prochainement pour une expérience mémorable.

Name: Chambres d´hôtes Danou
Description:
Of het nu gaat om coachingsdagen, yogacursus, retraite of een meerdaagse teambuilding, Danou biedt een ideale combinatie van gezellige gastenkamers en een fijne trainingsruimte in een inspirerende, natuurlijke omgeving die uitnodigt tot diverse buitenactiviteiten.

Zoek je een unieke locatie voor een meerdaagse training, workshop of teamuitje? In een natuurlijke en inspirerende omgeving waar tijd geen rol speelt?  Dan ben je bij ons op het juiste adres. Onze chambres d’hôtes is dichtbij en toch volop Frankrijk. Het heeft alles in zich voor een succesvol verblijf. 

Wij beschikken naast de vijf sfeervolle gastenkamers over een mooie en grote groepsruimte. De ruimte is geschikt voor diverse activiteiten tot ongeveer maximaal 10 personen, heeft prima wifi en een tv met chromecast voor streamen van presentaties.

We maken met liefde ook het eten voor jullie klaar  (ontbijt, lunch en diner) en drinken (water, koffie, thee en wijn/bier/fris). Diverse opties zijn mogelijk, van eenvoudige eenpansgerechten tot uitgebreide driegangendiners of een combinatie. 

Wil je meer weten over mogelijkheden en prijzen? Neem dan contact met ons en we maken een offerte die past bij jouw wensen.

Name: ITH Stays
Description: We create unforgettable experiences for travellers through our premium curated stays.

Name: Air Away TM - Airbnb/ Short Stay Rental Property Management
Description:
From expert property management to professional photoshoots, meticulous cleaning, and styling services, we ensure your success in the rental market. Our dedicated team handles every detail, from guest interactions to routine maintenance, offering you peace of mind. Stay informed with monthly detailed reports to keep up to date with your Airbnb bookings and more importantly, how much passive income your rental properties generate for you. We will help take care of your inventory. Rest assure and let us full-fill the essentials for you. Experience a new level of convenience and excellence – your journey to vacation rental success starts here with Air Away TM - Airbnb/ Short Stay Rental Property Management.
Why don't we turn your vision into reality now.

Name: Royal Camping Club
Description:
Royal Camping Club has a deep understanding of “Experiential Tourism” and how these experiences transcend from the body, to the mind and alas your soul. So we go beyond just great locations and hospitality, to the very core of how a wanderer can converse with nature and become a part of it. 


We bring three destinations that has a taste if royal living and a luxurious living:
1. Forest Trails, Mathgaon:  Royals from Kolhapur led their lifestyle rooted with the values of comradeship, community and living in harmony with nature. And that is inspiration on which Forest Trails, Mathgaon believes when it comes to give an experience to all the nature lovers.

2. Heritage Residency, Panhala: The property is uniquely positioned within the fort precincts and provides you with a recreational space in nature's embrace; a stone’s throw away from the hustle and bustle of the city. Here you get to steep yourself in history if you so choose or just take time off to breathe in the fresh mountain air. 

3. Casa Royale, Goa: Luxurious space crafted in Portuguese-styled villa, Casa royale is a perfect destination that to put up your feet, sip your pina–coladas by the swimming pool and relax in the lavish lifestyle.

Name: The Hobohomes
Description:
There is nothing quite like the excitement of travelling to new places and meeting new people. And now, there's even more to look forward to with the opening of a new backpacker hostel "TheHoBoHomes".

This new hostel promises to offer an affordable and comfortable stay for budget travellers who are looking to explore the area without breaking the bank. With its prime location in the heart of the city, guests will have easy access to all the major tourist attractions, restaurants and nightlife hotspots.

The hostel is designed keeping backpackers in mind, featuring dorm style rooms that can accommodate multiple guests at a time. Each room is equipped with comfortable bunk beds, storage lockers and plenty of space to relax and unwind after a long day of exploring. The hostel features communal areas such as kitchen, dining area, lounge and rooftop terrace, where guests can meet and mingle with fellow travellers from around the world.

One of the best things about staying at a backpacker hostel is the opportunity to connect with other like-minded travellers. The hostel staff is dedicated to creating a friendly and welcoming atmosphere where guests can make new friends and share their travel experiences and stories. They can also provide valuable tips and recommendations on things to see and do in the area.

Whether you are a solo traveller or travelling with a group of friends, this new backpacker hostel is the perfect place to stay. With its affordable rates, prime location and friendly atmosphere it's sure to become a popular destination for backpackers from all over the world. So, pack your bags and get ready for an unforgettable adventure!

Name: SUN RISE HOME STAYS, RAMGARH NAINITAL

Sunrise Homestays is a great place to stay for people who want to experience the natural beauty of the Himalayas and enjoy a peaceful and relaxing vacation. Name: OYOOSTAYS
Description:
Als eigenaar van een vakantiewoning aan de Spaanse Costa Blanca sta je vaak voor uitdagende obstakels die het beheer van je vastgoed bemoeilijken en je rendement onderuit halen. Lage bezettingsgraden, communicatieproblemen met gasten, tijdsdruk en de constante zorg voor je eigendom kunnen het plezier van verhuur snel verminderen.

Bij OYOO begrijpen we deze uitdagingen en streven we ernaar om jouw verhuurervaring te optimaliseren. Met onze diensten kun je:

- Aanzienlijk veel tijd besparen door volledige ontzorging bij verhuur.
- Positieve beoordelingen van tevreden huurders ontvangen.
- Elk kwartaal gedetailleerde rapporten over je rendement krijgen.
- Vertrouwen op zorgzame huurders en betrouwbare keyholders.
- Zorgen dat je vastgoed altijd in uitstekende staat verkeert, wat resulteert in maximale meerwaarde bij verkoop.
- Genieten van een moeiteloze administratieve opvolging met maandelijkse uitbetalingen.
- Je vakantieverblijf voor jezelf of je familie reserveren wanneer het jou uitkomt.
- Een stevig rendement realiseren, zodat je onze diensten ruimschoots terugverdient.

Met OYOO wordt verhuren een zorgeloze en winstgevende ervaring, zodat jij optimaal kunt genieten van je Spaanse vakantiewoning aan de Costa Blanca.

Description:

Name: Battuta Hostel
Description:
Battuta Hostel is a youth hostel located in Amman, Jordan. Named after the famous 14th century Arabic explorer, Ibn Battuta, this hostel is designed for budget-conscious travelers, offering a comfortable and affordable accommodation option for backpackers, students, young adults, group of friends and families!

One of the standout features of Battuta Hostel is its cozy reading area, which is perfect for book lovers who want to unwind with a good read after a long day of exploring. For digital nomads and remote workers, Battuta Hostel offers a dedicated workspace equipped with high-speed internet, comfortable chairs, and a peaceful environment.

The dorms at Battuta Hostel are designed to provide comfort and privacy for guests. The dorms are spacious and well-ventilated, with each bed fitted with comfortable bedding and a personal locker for storage.

Guests who prefer more privacy can opt for the beautiful private rooms en-suite, which come with their own bathroom facilities. The rooms are tastefully decorated, and the beddings are designed to offer maximum comfort to guests.

The roof terrace and garden area of Battuta Hostel provide the perfect place to relax and unwind after a busy day. Guests can take in the beautiful views of the surrounding area while enjoying a refreshing drink or reading a book.

Located in the heart of Amman, our hostel is close to many great restaurants, cafes, and shops, allowing our guests to fully immerse themselves in the local culture. Our friendly staff are always available to offer tips and recommendations for exploring the city and making the most of your stay.

Whether you're a solo traveler or traveling with friends, Battuta Hostel is the perfect place to relax and unwind in a chill and cozy environment. 

Come stay with us and experience all that Amman has to offer!

Name: The Sea Turtle
Description:
In 2009 the turtle’s journey began and since than each summer our family orange orchard turns into a welcoming tent city. We provide accommodation in tents (with mattresses, sheets and pillows), breakfast and a family-cooked dinner served up in true camp style. Hot showers and toilets are under the shade of old fig trees and we are just a short walk to the beach.  TURTULIZE YOUR SUMMERS 



Camping Accommodation

The campsite is located in the area known as Drymades in Dhermi, (in an area of about 5000 m2) and very close to the beach, just 80 m away. Accommodation is in tents which are equipped with foam beds and all the sleeping sets (sheets, pillows, blankets). THE SEA TURTLE has also another sleeping category, we offer tents with beds (Japanese style beds)
The camp is equipped with toilets and showers with running hot water. Camp capacity is up to 500 people. 

Our latest project for the 2018 season consisted into adding to the above-mentioned categories the Glamping sector of THE SEA TURTLE CAMP.

PRICES
Standard price per person per day is 1200 ALL and includes, accommodation, breakfast, dinner and various activities that take place in the camp. Price for bed version is 1400 ALL and also includes accommodation and two meals (breakfast and dinner). Travel and lunch are not included in these prices.

THE SEA TURLE stays open during summer for three months. Officially opens on June to the end of September

Name: Le Bois d'Alice - Maison d'hôtes
Description:
Le Bois d’Alice : Maison d’hôtes de charme dans l’Ain, entre Lyon et Bourg-en-Bresse
Envie d’une escapade nature et bien-être ? Le Bois d’Alice, situé entre Lyon et Bourg-en-Bresse, est une maison d’hôtes de charme nichée au cœur d’un cadre verdoyant et apaisant. Ce véritable havre de paix offre une expérience unique, mêlant hébergement insolite, gastronomie locale et moments de détente en pleine nature.

Un hébergement unique dans l’Ain, au cœur d’un parc animalier
Nos chambres d’hôtes allient confort, authenticité et sérénité, avec une décoration chaleureuse et élégante. Profitez d’un grand parc arboré, où vous pourrez rencontrer nos lamas, chevaux et moutons, apportant une touche bucolique et dépaysante à votre séjour. Que ce soit pour un week-end romantique, une pause bien-être ou une parenthèse en pleine nature, Le Bois d’Alice vous promet une expérience inoubliable.

Une table d’hôtes aux saveurs locales
Parce que la découverte passe aussi par l’assiette, nous proposons une table d’hôtes mettant à l’honneur les produits du Beaujolais, de la Bresse, des Dombes et du Lyonnais. Nos menus, concoctés avec soin, mêlent terroir et authenticité, pour une expérience culinaire savoureuse.

Détente et bien-être dans un cadre naturel préservé
Au-delà du confort et de la gastronomie, nous mettons un point d’honneur à offrir à nos hôtes des moments de relaxation et de reconnexion avec la nature. Dès cette année, profitez de notre sauna privatif pour un instant de bien-être absolu.

Que vous soyez en quête de calme, de nature ou de découvertes, Le Bois d’Alice vous accueille pour un séjour inoubliable au cœur de l’Ain, entre Lyon et Bourg-en-Bresse.

 Réservez dès maintenant votre séjour et laissez-vous séduire par l’authenticité et la douceur de vivre de notre maison d’hôtes.

Name: VILA DOMOVINA
Description:
Do svojej vrelej náruče Vás víta VILA DOMOVINA. Túto nádhernú vilu nájdete vo Vysokých Tatrách, v tichej časti malebnej obce Tatranská Lomnica, no zároveň len 100 m od centra, veľmi blízko lyžiarskeho strediska, lanovej dráhy na Skalnaté pleso a Lomnický štít. Vychutnajte si každé ráno výhľad na majestátny Lomnický štít a doprajte si dovolenku so všetkým pohodlím, ktoré Vila Domovina ponúka.

Vychutnajte si celoročne ubytovanie, ktoré ponúka dostatok súkromia. Radi u nás privítame rodiny s deťmi alebo skupinku lyžiarov či turistov. Maximálna kapacita je 6 osôb. V modernej, útulnej vile Vás hneď na úvod privíta priestranná obývacia miestnosť s pohodlným gaučom, televízorom, spoločenskými hrami a rádiom. Poteší Vás vybavená kuchyňa, kde nájdete indukčnú varnú dosku, elektrickú rúru, mikrovlnnú rúru, chladničku s mrazničkou, umývačku riadu, mixér, hriankovač aj nespresso kávovar. Najete sa pohodlne spolu za jedálenským stolom.

Na poschodí si sladký spánok doprajete v troch samostatných spálňach vybavených manželskou posteľou s kvalitnými matracmi pre jedinečný oddych. Ráno Vás určite poteší balkónik v každej spálni, kde si môžete vychutnať prvé slnečné lúče, spev vtákov a svieži tatranský vzduch. Samozrejmosťou je na poschodí i kúpeľňa so sprchovacím kútom a samostatná toaleta. Ďalšia kúpeľňa so sprchovacím kútom a toaletou sa nachádza na prízemí.

Aby sme Vám zabezpečili maximálny komfort, na prízemí je Vám k dispozícii i technická miestnosť, kde si odložíte svoje lyže či iné športové náčinie. Využijete tu práčku, sušičku, žehličku, žehliacu dosku aj vysávač.

Z obývacej miestnosti i kuchyne sa dostanete priamo na terasu s vonkajším posedením, ktorá nadväzuje na pestrú bylinkovú záhradu a pokračuje do prírodnej záhrady s kvetinovou lúkou. Záhrada je ukončená horským potôčikom. Vychutnajte si tu perfektné spoločné chvíle. V prípade záujmu si môžete opiecť slaninku alebo špekáčiky na pripravenom ohnisku. Dve autá si bezpečne zaparkujete priamo pri objekte.
