Name: Il Duomo e il Mare Guest House in Brindisi
Description:
Looking for a luxurious and elegant stay in Italy, for leisure or smart working? Look no further than Il Duomo e il Mare! 

This guesthouse is located in the heart of the beautiful city of Brindisi, in the fantastic Puglia Region, just a stone’s throw away from the stunning Cathedral (Il Duomo). 
Brindisi has recently been ranked by Airbnb among the top 20 worldwide destinations for smart working.

The guesthouse features spacious and well-appointed rooms that are perfect for couples or solo travelers. The rooms are equipped with all the modern amenities you need to make your stay comfortable and enjoyable. 

Il Duomo e il Mare is also conveniently located near the touristic harbor and many other points of interest in Brindisi. You can enjoy a leisurely stroll to the harbor and take in the beautiful views of the sea. 
The guesthouse is also within walking distance of many popular restaurants and bars, where you can sample some of the best local cuisine and drinks.
You can enjoy the beautiful terrace while working and take in the stunning views of the city.

Book your stay now at Booking.com and experience the best of Brindisi and its surroundings!

Name: Crindael 11 - vakantiewoning & business retreat
Description:
Crindael 11 is een ruime, karaktervolle hoeve die ideaal is voor grote groepen, maar ook flexibel te huur is in afzonderlijke delen. De hoeve is opgedeeld in drie sfeervolle appartementen, elk met eigen faciliteiten, zoals een volledig uitgeruste keuken, meerdere badkamers en comfortabele slaapkamers met tweepersoonsbedden – waarvan sommige met een eigen badkamer. 

Het grootste appartement, Roodbos, bevindt zich op de eerste verdieping en beschikt over een royale leefruimte, ideaal om samen te ontspannen, spelletjes te spelen, te werken of gezellig bij elkaar te zijn. Op de begane grond liggen Crutzberg, een ruim appartement voor zes personen, en Voort, een knusse tweepersoonsstudio. 

Hoewel de hoeve in zijn geheel wordt verhuurd, zorgt de indeling voor voldoende privacy voor iedereen. Liever een kleiner deel huren? Geen probleem! Afhankelijk van je wensen kun je een of meerdere appartementen apart reserveren.

Name: Lugar da Pedra Alta
Description:
Lugar da Pedra Alta, an authentic 19th century house, located at the foot of the mountain range Serra da Estrela in Central Portugal, opened its doors to the public in July 2022 and since then is welcoming those who love nature and its hidden gems, stories, antiques, Portuguese mountain flavour and want to be part of the family.

Lugar da Pedra Alta offers an unforgettable experience in the middle of nature, either for family or friends gatherings, private events, retreats, team building or corporate meetings.

The eight bedrooms that can host up to 17 guests, plus the dining room and living room provided for our visitors will take you back in time to the early twentieth century, in a warm and familiar atmosphere. In addition, our large swimming pool, the sports field and the 12ha land filled with trees will keep you in shape for some outdoor activities.

Name: Muse Escapes -Luxury Holiday Homes in The Peak District
Description:
If you're looking for a luxurious and memorable holiday experience, Muse Escapes has got you covered! Our 5-star holiday homes are based in the picturesque Peak District National Park, offering stunning views and a unique opportunity to relax and unwind. Our homes are not just a place to stay, but an experience in itself, with hot tubs, brass baths, and opulent interiors that will leave you feeling pampered and rejuvenated. We cater to families and friends, with our homes being able to hold anywhere from 2-30 people at our Foxlow Grange in Buxton and Candle House in Castleton locations.

Experience Luxury in the Peak District National Park
Our holiday homes are designed with luxury in mind. Each home is tastefully decorated with opulent interiors that will make you feel like royalty. Whether you're looking for a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or a weekend away with friends, our homes offer something for everyone.

Unwind in Our Hot Tubs and Brass Baths
Our homes are equipped with private hot tubs and brass baths, so you can soak away the stresses of everyday life and enjoy the stunning scenery around you. Imagine sitting in a hot tub with a glass of bubbly, surrounded by the breathtaking views of the Peak District National Park. It's the perfect way to unwind and recharge your batteries.

Family and Friends Getaways
Our homes are perfect for family and friend getaways, with our Foxlow Grange in Buxton and Candle House in Castleton locations being able to hold 2-30 people. Our homes offer plenty of space for everyone to relax and have a good time.

Name: La Belle Vie
Description:
Bienvenue dans notre maisonnette, idéale pour un séjour d'affaires confortable et reposant. 
Nichée dans un quartier paisible, notre petit havre offre toutes les commodités nécessaires pour rendre votre séjour productif.

** Cuisine Entièrement Équipée : Elle est dotée d'une cuisine moderne et équipée comprenant un four, une plaque à induction, un micro-ondes, un réfrigérateur avec congélateur, un blender chauffant et un robot de cuisine pour répondre à vos besoins.

** Espace de Vie Polyvalent : Profitez de notre espace de vie avec un canapé-lit pour vos moments de détente ou de travail.

** Salle d'Eau Moderne : Notre salle de bains moderne est équipée d'une douche pour vous rafraîchir après une journée de travail.

** Divertissement : Restez connecté grâce à une télévision avec les chaînes Orange et une connexion Wi-Fi.

** Emplacement Stratégique : Idéalement située à seulement 15 kilomètres des magnifiques plages de Saint-Jean-de-Monts, notre maisonnette offre un équilibre parfait entre le travail et la détente. De plus, le centre-ville animé de Challans, à seulement 3 kilomètres, vous offre un accès pratique aux commerces, aux restaurants et à l'atmosphère locale dynamique.

Profitez d'une nuitée à un tarif de 62€, avec le linge de lit et les serviettes inclus.

Veuillez noter que le petit déjeuner n'est pas inclus, mais la cuisine est entièrement équipée pour préparer un repas matinal rapide.

Que vous soyez en ville pour un voyage d'affaires, une mission professionnelle ou un projet en Vendée, notre petit havre est l'endroit idéal pour vous sentir comme chez vous. Réservez dès maintenant pour allier travail et détente dans le confort de notre élégante maisonnette. Nous sommes impatients de vous accueillir et de rendre votre séjour mémorable !

Calendrier des disponibilités 
https://lnkd.in/egPAEaYE

 #location #voyagedaffaires #vendee #challans #stjeandemonts  #travail #confort

Name: CASA VIOLETA 132642/AL
Description:
Casa Violeta está localizada a apenas 1 km da encantadora cidade de Águeda, tornando-se o ponto de partida ideal para explorar o concelho de Águeda e o distrito de Aveiro. Com uma localização privilegiada entre a serra e o mar, os hóspedes podem desfrutar de belas paisagens e explorar as maravilhas da região.
A apenas 30 minutos das deslumbrantes praias da Barra e Costa Nova, no concelho de Ílhavo, a Casa Violeta oferece a oportunidade de momentos relaxantes à beira-mar.
Situada numa quinta no meio rural, a Casa Violeta proporciona uma experiência única de tranquilidade e contato com a natureza. A proximidade com a cidade de Águeda permite desfrutar das comodidades urbanas sem abrir mão dos benefícios da vida no campo, oferecendo o equilíbrio perfeito entre as vantagens da vida na cidade e a serenidade da vida rural.
A casa acomoda até quatro hóspedes, com dois quartos aconchegantes – um com cama de casal e outro com cama de solteiro. A sala de estar possui um sofá-cama, ideal para relaxar, assistir TV ou ler um livro. A cozinha totalmente equipada inclui frigorífico, micro-ondas, máquina de café Nespresso e placa vitrocerâmica, além de uma salamandra a lenha para tornar o ambiente mais acolhedor nos meses mais frios. O WC completo dispõe de polibã, toalhas macias e produtos de higiene pessoal.
Venha descobrir o equilíbrio perfeito entre a vida urbana e rural na Casa Violeta, onde a tranquilidade e a natureza se encontram a poucos passos das comodidades da cidade.

Name: La Racaudière - Maison(s) de famille(s)
Description:
La Racaudière a été conçue pour être un véritable lieu de vie, comme à la maison.
Mariage, réunion de familles, séminaires…
Festoyer, partager, se réunir, c’est notre ADN !

Quelques infos pratiques pour vous aider à faire votre choix. 

Salle de 120 couverts
Wifi, Sonorisation, Micro, Vidéo Projecteur... Tout y est pour que vous puissiez travailler (et/ou) festoyer facilement. Alors oui, on a la fibre, l’écran, la vidéo mais l’essentiel est aussi ailleurs.

Chez nous, vous vous connectez surtout ENTRE VOUS.
Sur terre, en l’air, sur l’eau, à table… grâce a des activités sur site et aux alentours. Bienvenue aux pros qui bossent et aux boss qui lâchent prise. 

Et parce que la convivialité passe aussi par l’assiette !
Cuisine maison, braséro, planches gourmandes, cocktail buffet, autour du feu… On aime recevoir et régaler avec des produits frais et de saison.
Et si vous n’avez qu’une heure pour déjeuner, on trouvera toujours le temps 
de NE PAS vous servir de plateaux-repas tout fait ! 

Et enfin... Ça, ça dépendra de vous !
Vu que dans le cadre d’un séminaire, la Racaudière est systématiquement privatisée, vous vous retrouvés ENSEMBLE mais TOUT SEUL.
Libre de vous sentir comme à la maison le temps d'une soirée ! 

Nous avons jusqu'à 90 couchages sur place (50 en twin l'hiver, 20 en chambres single) pour vous héberger. 

Alors, si ça vous tente, contactez-nous à bienvenue@laracaudiere.fr ou au 02 47 50 02 04. Au plaisir de vous recevoir !

Name: Tuscany Downs Estate
Description:
Perfect for corporate events, retreats and staff functions, Tuscany Downs Estate is located in Kirwee, 25 minutes from Christchurch Airport.

Move the boardroom to the country for team building or executive strategy in peace and quiet. Tuscany Downs Estate is perfect for seminars or training sessions which can include meals and refreshments.
 
Invite clients or prospective clients for a night or weekend as you introduce them to your company in style. Each year we also host Christmas parties throughout November and December as companies farewell the work year with a get-together away from the office in country surroundings.

Corporate retreats can be priced per head for a one-day event through to your company booking the estate exclusively for a full week.

Tuscany Downs Estate offers luxury accommodation set on a picturesque farm with lake, garden, farm, and mountain views. It features a heated indoor pool, a large outdoor entertaining area with a fireplace and grill. 

You can enjoy other common areas such as the lounge area, TV room, garden and picnic areas.

Christchurch is 40 km from Tuscany Downs Estate, while Lincoln is 42 km away.

Name: Boxwood Pod
Description:
Boxwood Pod 
The  perfect combination of adventure and luxury, for couples, families with young children
There's a kitchenette equipped with a small fridge (with freezer compartment), a four-ring  gas hob, oven/grill.
All crockery, glasses, utensils and cutlery are provided, along with towels and bedding . 
A welcome pack provides tea, coffee, milk.
The bathroom has a WC, sink and hot shower.
The pod is off-grid with all amenities powered by gas and an 12 volt inverter powering lights. 
With a 3 KW inverter providing mains power, batteries charged by six solar panels more then enough power for your needs.
The pod can accommodate up to four adults comfortably, there are three single beds in a separate room, the box seats in the lounge fold out into a small double bed.

Name: Out N About Treesort
Description:
Southern Oregon has one of the largest concentrations of old growth trees in the country. The attempt here was to make a living out of the woods doing something that you love without having to harm the trees.  Basically, trying to live in Harmony with the Forest.  We are trying to accomplish a culture of sustainability while creating an economy for the community.  This area is an old logging community and consequently that industry did a lot of damage to the environment for the sake of making money. 

Our Philosophy is the opposite of that culture.   Instead of cutting a Tree down to get a sum of money – you use it for renewable sources of activities such as treehouses, ziplines, and scenic trails for the horses.   Our international success along with the fact that we are currently the largest concentration of TreeHouses in the World, speaks for itself.

Name: The Holiday Cottage Collection

Sarah is a real expert, who understands market trends, appreciates the value of customer service, and knows what staycation holidaymakers really want. She’s put her days of working with multinationals behind her to help people arrange authentic countryside breaks, and help individual holiday cottage owners achieve their goals.

Will you be the next person she helps? We hope so.

Name: Santo Stefano Home & Breakfast
Description:
Casa è il luogo in cui si trova il cuore
Ed è qui, tra i vicoli del centro storico di Polignano, a pochi passi dalle balconate a strapiombo sul mare, che il cuore della nostra famiglia batte forte. L’amore per Polignano è un filo sottile che ci tiene uniti e ci fa sempre ritrovare, anche quando le strade della vita ci portano in direzioni diverse.

È così che è nato Santo Stefano: dall’amore di Rosa per questo borgo marinaro in cui trascorreva le estati con la sua famiglia originaria di Ceglie del Campo, dal supporto di Augusto che ha creduto nella sua visione di realizzare uno dei primi bed and breakfast a Polignano e l’ha accompagnata in questa avventura sin dall’inizio. Dalla presenza di Monica e Vito che anno dopo anno sono cresciuti assieme a questo sogno.

Santo Stefano è il luogo in cui noi ci sentiamo a casa, ed è per questo che ci piace considerarlo un home and breakfast e non un semplice bed and breakfast.

Name: Linden Historic Bed and Breakfast
Description:
Linden Bed and Breakfast, established circa 1790, is an upscale boutique retreat nestled in historic Natchez, Mississippi. Owned by the Feltus family since 1849, Linden has been a luxury bed and breakfast for nearly thirty-five years. The main house features six elegantly appointed bedrooms, each with a newly renovated, spa-like private bathroom. 

Linden Cottage, located at the rear of the property, offers a more private option with three bedrooms, two baths, and a charming New Orleans-style courtyard. Guests can enjoy a variety of common areas, including a U-shaped back veranda, a 98-foot front porch, and seven acres of lush grounds adorned with majestic oak and cedar trees.

Beyond its exceptional accommodations, Linden is a premier venue for weddings, rehearsal dinners, bridal luncheons, and reunions. It is also the site of several annual special events and historical tours, drawing visitors interested in architecture and Southern heritage. Whether staying for a romantic getaway or attending a grand celebration, guests will experience the timeless charm and elegance that make Linden a sought-after destination.

Name: Pousada Águia da Montanha | Monte Verde - MG
Description:
A Pousada Águia da Montanha é um refúgio acolhedor localizado em Monte Verde - Minas Gerais - Brasil, uma das mais encantadoras regiões de montanha do Brasil. Nossa missão é oferecer aos nossos hóspedes uma experiência única de conforto e tranquilidade, em total harmonia com a natureza ao redor. Com ambientes cuidadosamente preparados, incluindo chalés e acomodações com lareira e hidromassagem, proporcionamos o cenário perfeito para momentos inesquecíveis de lazer, descanso e bem-estar.

Nosso compromisso é com a excelência em hospitalidade, buscando sempre a satisfação total de nossos visitantes, oferecendo atendimento personalizado e uma infraestrutura que atende tanto casais em busca de romance quanto famílias em busca de diversão e tranquilidade.

Acreditamos na importância de preservar a natureza e, por isso, nos empenhamos em adotar práticas sustentáveis e conscientes em todas as nossas operações, para garantir que as futuras gerações também possam desfrutar deste paraíso.

Venha viver uma experiência de paz e aconchego nas alturas, no coração das montanhas de Monte Verde!

Name: FUSE Hostels and Travel
Description:
About Us

At FUSE Hostels & Travel, we believe travel is about more than just a bed for the night — it’s about connection, adventure, and unforgettable memories.

Founded in Vietnam, Fuse brings together travelers from all over the world in vibrant, social hostels where the vibe is just as important as the comfort. With locations in Hoi An, Nha Trang, and beyond, we’ve built a reputation as Vietnam’s most social hostels — combining quality stays, exciting events, and authentic local experiences.

Our mission is simple:
 Create spaces where strangers become friends.
 Deliver 5-star fun with every event, party, and tour.
 Support travelers in discovering the best of Vietnam through food, culture, and adventure.

Whether it’s sunrise bike tours, sunset cruises, live music, or legendary bar hops, Fuse makes sure your trip is one you’ll never forget.

⸻

 Product Description (Hostels + Experiences)

Fuse Hostels aren’t just accommodation — they’re a lifestyle. Here’s what we offer:
	•	 Modern Social Hostels: Clean, stylish dorms and private rooms designed for comfort and community.
	•	 Bars & Events: Nightly parties, music, quizzes, and big themed events — the heart of our vibe.
	•	 Food & Beverage: Delicious eats, daily deals, and some of the best value bar menus in town.
	•	 Travel Experiences: Handpicked tours like bike rides, food tours, bamboo boat cooking classes, and the iconic Fuse Sunset Cruise.
	•	 Community Vibe: Our team is here not just to check you in, but to welcome you into the Fuse family.

Name: La Ruche 1742 Odeillo-Font-Romeu
Description:
La Ruche 1742, située à Odeillo-Font-Romeu c'est une ancienne auberge que nous réhabilitons. Nous souhaitons vous offrir un concept original dans l'environnement exceptionnel des Pyrénées Orientales.
Une table d'hôtes au rez-de-chaussée, des chambres et un dortoir, mais aussi une salle de cours collectifs (type yoga), une bibliothèque avec un espace de co-working, et un étage entièrement dédié à la santé avec des intervenants passionnés: thérapeute, médecin, masseuse...

Name: Fred's Place, Kingsand, Cornwall
Description:
Fred's Place is a 4 double bedroom terrace house right on the seafront in quiet and quintessential Kingsand, Cornwall PL10 1NF
Extensively refurbished and available for rental this charming property has a 1st-floor lounge with vast sea views, sociable open-plan dining and kitchen rooms on the ground-floor. There's a large shower and toilet on the ground floor which has underfloor heating throughout, making it super-comfy for winter breaks.
There's a large family bathroom and the master bedroom has an ensuite shower and toilet.
A large 'cathedral' roof bunkroom is suitable for 2 adults or children, with an adjacent toilet.
A rear courtyard stores convenient items and, the best feature of all, a Fred's Place-branded clip-on hardwood tray means you can enjoy drinks and meals right outside on the seafront.
The beach is dog-friendly all year and the Cornwall coastal path is just 5 minutes from the property with Mount Edgecombe or Rame Head half an hour away in either direction.
A convenient car park is nearby, along with a Premier stores and 4 pubs to choose from.
The neighbouring Devonport Inn serves superb food and has a charming open fire during the winter months.
The Cawsand ferry, just 10 minutes walk away, takes passengers directly to the Barbican, Plymouth during the season. This is a delightful 30 trip and dolphins, cormorants and gannets are amongst some of the many species of wildlife that can be seen on the way.
WIFI and SONOS are installed, along with TVs in all 4 bedrooms.

Name: Château de Saint Germain du Plain
Description:
Le Château de Saint Germain du Plain est édifié sur les fondations d’un château médiéval dont il a conservé les caves. Le bâtiment actuel avec ses dépendances et son orangerie, de style Empire, ont été construits en 1830. C’est une transformation apportée en 1848 qui lui a donné sa symétrie actuelle.

Occupé par les descendantes de ses fondateurs Jusque dans les années 70, les «Demoiselles De Verchère» , le château a ensuite été laissé  à l’abandon pendant plus de vingt ans. En 1994 d’importants travaux y ont été entrepris par sa nouvelle propriétaire, qui demeurait à Genève.

Robert Harris et Yuko Matsuoka Harris, après avoir mandaté la poursuite de sa restauration depuis 2007, le dédient aujourd’hui à l’accueil et aux séjours.

Name: Herberg Hanenberg
Description:
Herberg Hanenberg is our retro-style B&B for anyone looking to escape the rush of city life. Located in the heart of the village of Wissenkerke, our place combines nostalgic charm with comfort and calm. Inside, you’ll find vintage details, soft colours, and warm materials—everything chosen to help you slow down and feel at home.

The building dates back to 1876. In the 19th century, it served as a resting place for horses. Travelling riders would stop here to let their horses drink water, eat hay, and regain strength. Nearly 150 years later, we’re once again offering rest—this time for people.

We’ve created a space where you can read by the window, write at a quiet table, or simply enjoy the stillness. Each room is carefully designed with a mix of retro design and everyday comfort. You’ll sleep well, wake up with the sound of birds, and start the day with a delicious breakfast from our neighbours at Hotel Restaurant De Kroon.

Our B&B is a place to reconnect—with yourself, with each other, or with the quiet rhythm of the village. Whether you’re staying for a weekend or longer, Herberg Hanenberg gives you the chance to breathe, rest, and recharge.

In het voorjaar van 2022 heeft deze 20 persoons groepsaccommodatie in Noord-Holland zijn deuren geopend.

Door de indeling van de groepsaccommodatie oftewel vakantievilla heeft men veel privacy. Samen maar toch apart. Er zijn verschillende gemeenschappelijke ruimtes maar je kunt je ook terugtrekken in je eigen huisje. De villa is opgedeeld in 4 wooneenheden elk met eigen sanitair en keuken. Daarnaast zijn er twee grote ruimtes om gezamenlijk te vertoeven. In de orangerie staat een stamtafel met grote openhaard. Tevens bevindt zich daar de wellness met turks stoombad, sauna, douche met dompelbad en stortemmer. Om het geheel compleet te maken staat er in de tuin een jacuzzi.

In totaal bevat de villa 6 badkamers en 10 slaapkamers, waarvan er 1 een studio is. Daarnaast is er nog een gezellig, stijlvol soutterain met stamtafel en bar.

Door het gebruik van natuurlijke materialen, mooie accessoires en luxe meubilair straalt deze groepsaccommodatie een gezelligheid en intimiteit uit die in de meeste 20 persoons vakantiehuizen ontbreekt.

De zuidelijke ligging zorgt ervoor dat men de hele dag van de zon kan genieten op de diverse terrassen die groepsaccommodatie Fridhem rijk is. Voor de kinderen is het een waar speelparadijs, door het speeltoestel en de inground trampoline, maar ook kunnen zij rondjes rijden over het terrein met skelters en trekkers, of voetballen op het grote speelveld.

Name: Janua Jungle House
Description:
Janua Jungle House non è semplicemente un alloggio a uso turistico, ma un progetto di ospitalità esperienziale che fonde la storia millenaria di Genova con un’estetica contemporanea e rigenerante. Situata in Via Giacomo Moresco, nel cuore pulsante del quartiere Bassa Val Bisagno e a pochi passi dalla stazione ferroviaria di Genova Brignole, la struttura si propone come un’oasi urbana per viaggiatori che cercano un rifugio autentico e curato.

L’Essenza del Brand: Janua e Jungle
Il nome stesso definisce l’identità del progetto. "Janua", l’antico nome latino di Genova che significa "porta", celebra il ruolo storico della città come soglia del Mediterraneo. "Jungle" descrive invece l’anima estetica: un interior design vibrante, dominato dal verde e da elementi naturali, pensato per contrastare la frenesia cittadina e offrire un’atmosfera di relax primordiale. L’unione di questi due mondi crea una "Porta sulla Giungla Urbana", un luogo dove il cemento della città lascia spazio a un respiro di freschezza e design.

Name: Ai 13 Gradoni di Chiaia
Description:
La nostra struttura è davvero in un posto centrale, nevralgico della città; tra il quartiere signorile, residenziale di Chiaia; ed i Quartieri Spagnoli, famosi per le viuzze piccole, i festoni appesi ai lampadari delle strade, il murales di maradona ed il folcrore di Napoli; le maggiori attrazioni sono quasi tutte a pochi passi dalla struttura o comunque raggiungibili con i mezzi, che sono a pochi minuti a piedi dal nostro B&B. Una lista, non esaustiva dei luoghi da visitare è la seguente:

• Piazza del Plebiscito - La maestosa piazza simbolo di Napoli, con il suo imponente Palazzo Reale e la Basilica di San Francesco di Paola (5min. a piedi).

• LAES Napoli Sotterranea - Il complesso reticolo di cunicoli proprio del sottosuolo napoletano, che formano una vera e propria città sottoterra (2 min. a piedi).

• Teatro di San Carlo - Il teatro lirico più antico d'Europa, un luogo iconico della cultura napoletana, si trova a pochi passi dalla residenza.

• Galleria Umberto I - Un'opera architettonica splendida, dove puoi passeggiare tra eleganti negozi e caffè storici.

• Via Toledo - Una delle strade più vivaci e caratteristiche della città, perfetta per lo shopping e per scoprire i tradizionali "spaccati" della vita quotidiana napoletana.

• Maschio Angioino (Castel Nuovo) - Un'imponente fortezza medievale che racconta la storia della città.

• Spaccanapoli - La famosa strada che attraversa il cuore del centro storico, dove puoi respirare l'autentica atmosfera di Napoli, con i suoi vicoli stretti, chiese storiche e pizzerie tradizionali.

• Cappella Sansevero - Uno dei capolavori dell'arte barocca, che ospita il celebre Cristo Velato di Giuseppe Sanmartino.

Queste e moltissime altre cose potrai facilmente raggiungere in pochi passi dalla struttura. 
Ovviamente, noi saremo a disposizione, per assisterti in ogni passo ed aiutarti ad organizzare tutte le escursioni che vorrai.

Name: Phantom History
Description:
Welcome to Phantom History House
There’s a house in Florida where history meets the paranormal and where its eerie elegance makes for a comfortable, yet creepy stay. That place is Phantom History House Bed & Breakfast.

Your hosts, Steve Blanchard and Tim Hinton, have opened their unique home to all guests, but particularly those who are fond of the paranormal, the strange and the odd. Are you looking for a stay that is as comfortable as it is unique. Then you’ve found your final resting place – for your upcoming trip.

There’s no need to be scared, however.

Join us for chats about ghosts and paranormal experiences in the beautiful Victorian-style library or pull up a chair at breakfast alongside the magnificent potion wall, adorned with bottles representing the concoctions used for centuries to aid in healing, spell casting and more. 

Do you need some respite from the daily grind and just want to enjoy some peace and some deadly quiet? Lounge on our lanai that overlooks the nearby wooded area where deer and other wildlife sometimes make an appearance.

At night, retire to one of our four themed rooms, each of which captures its own unique  environment complete with a luxurious bed and private bathroom, certainly suitable for Resting In Peace.

By the way, Phantom History House is perfect for EVENTS, from a weekend getaway with family or friends, to a bachelorette party, wedding party, or friends weekend retreat!

Name: EcoHost
Description:
Bem-vindo à EcoHost: Sustentabilidade e Bem-Estar em Cada Estadia
Na EcoHost, acreditamos que as suas férias devem ser mais do que uma pausa na rotina - elas podem ser um passo em direção a um mundo mais sustentável.

Somos um pequeno grupo de alojamentos locais dedicados a proporcionar uma experiência única, onde o conforto e o bem-estar se alinham naturalmente com práticas sustentáveis, éticas e responsáveis. 

Aqui, cada detalhe é pensado para que se sinta verdadeiramente bem - consigo mesmo, com o ambiente e com a comunidade ao seu redor.


Os nossos valores vivem em cada detalhe da sua estadia:

Energia 100% renovável: Todos os nossos alojamentos funcionam com eletricidade proveniente de fontes 100% renováveis, contribuindo para um ambiente mais limpo e saudável.

Produtos Veganos e Cruelty-Free: Disponibilizamos produtos de higiene pessoal livres de crueldade animal, alinhando cuidados pessoais com o respeito pela natureza e pelos animais.

Água filtrada: Dispomos de sistemas de filtragem de água, eliminando a necessidade de garrafas plásticas, reduzindo o desperdício e prolongando a durabilidade dos eletrodomésticos.

Reciclagem: Incentivamos e facilitamos a reciclagem, promovendo práticas conscientes e a redução de resíduos.

Parcerias: Fazemos acordos com negócios locais para oferecermos aos nossos hóspedes descontos relevantes em restaurantes, ginásios, escolas de surf e muito mais!

A nossa missão
Proporcionar-lhe uma estadia que reflete um turismo consciente, inclusivo e respeitador. Aqui, todos são bem-vindos e tratados com o máximo de cuidado e atenção. Os nossos espaços são também pet-friendly, acolhendo os seus companheiros de patas com o mesmo carinho.

Faça da EcoHost o seu próximo destino e viva uma experiência única, onde o impacto ambiental é reduzido e o seu conforto e bem-estar são sempre prioridades.


Juntos, criamos um futuro mais ético e sustentável!

Name: The Apollis Cottage
Description:
The Apollis Cottage Guest House is situated in Concordia, Namaqualand, a beautiful area in the Northern Cape Province of South Africa. Opened in 2012, it is owned by Annie Jepthas. The Guest House is her dream realized: To open a Guest House on the farmland she grew up on - a way to give birth to a legacy of the Apollis family. Inside you will find traces of the family legacy through pictures of the parents, children, and grandchildren. There are also pieces of furniture from the original house that have been kept and restored, a way to preserve the memory of 'Ouma's house.
The Guesthouse boasts 3 large bedrooms, each with its own bathrooms, as well as a large lounge/dining room area, a porch, a kitchen, and a growing garden/braai area at the back. Using its own well for water as well as solar panels for electricity, it really is its own self-sufficient oasis in the desert.
Whether a trip to see the Namaqualand daisies, or just to find a refuge from the bustling city life, The Apollis Cottage is an ideal location for a romantic trip or one with the family. We can also provide our premises for events and conferences. For more details please contact us.

Name: LesHautsDuRébeillou
Description:
Les Hauts du Rebeillou – Un cadre idéal pour les entreprises en déplacement

Situés à quelques minutes de Toulouse, Les Hauts du Rebeillou offrent aux professionnels un hébergement confortable et fonctionnel, alliant sérénité et praticité. Que ce soit pour un déplacement professionnel, une réunion d’équipe, un séminaire ou un moment de cohésion entre collègues, notre domaine vous propose deux hébergements adaptés à vos besoins.

 Le Gîte – Jusqu’à 12 personnes
Spacieux et chaleureux, notre gîte est idéal pour héberger une équipe en mission ou organiser un séjour professionnel. Il dispose de chambres confortables, d’un grand espace de vie, d’une cuisine entièrement équipée et d’espaces extérieurs pour se détendre après une journée de travail. Une salle de jeux avec baby-foot, ping-pong et fléchettes permet également de renforcer la cohésion d’équipe dans une ambiance conviviale.

 La Cabane – Pour 2 personnes
Parfaite pour un séjour plus intimiste ou pour offrir à un collaborateur un cadre propice à la déconnexion après une journée intense, notre cabane allie confort et authenticité. Dotée d’un bain nordique privé, d’une vue imprenable sur Toulouse et ses environs, elle garantit un moment de détente absolu, idéal pour recharger les batteries avant une nouvelle journée.

 Pourquoi choisir Les Hauts du Rebeillou pour vos séjours professionnels ?
 Proximité avec Toulouse, tout en étant au calme
 Hébergements tout confort, adaptés aux besoins des entreprises
 Espaces de détente et de loisirs pour un séjour équilibré
 Un cadre propice à la concentration, au travail et à la cohésion d’équipe

Offrez à vos collaborateurs une expérience unique, entre travail et bien-être, pour allier performance et sérénité.

Name: Student Homestay Services Inc.
Description:
Welcome to SHS Inc.! With over two decades of experience, we pride ourselves on being a trusted leader in providing homestay accommodations and immigration services in Canada.

 Here's a little more about what we do:

Find a Homestay
At SHS Inc., we specialize in matching international students and traveller with welcoming Canadian host families. Our extensive network ensures that you find a safe, comfortable, and culturally enriching environment. We understand that finding the right homestay is crucial for a positive experience, and our dedicated team works tirelessly to make the perfect match for each individual.

Earn Money Hosting
We offer a fantastic opportunity for Canadian families to become host families and earn extra income. By joining our network, you'll not only benefit financially but also gain the rewarding experience of sharing your culture and home with international guests. We provide comprehensive support and resources to ensure you are well-prepared and confident in your role as a host.

Why Choose SHS Inc.?

Experience: With over 20 years in the industry, we have the expertise and knowledge to ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience.

Personalized Service: We take the time to understand your needs and preferences, providing tailored solutions that best suit you.

Support: Our team is always here to help, offering continuous support to both guests and host families.

Community: Joining SHS Inc. means becoming part of a vibrant, diverse community that values cultural exchange and mutual respect.

Whether you're looking for a homestay, interested in hosting, or planning to immigrate, SHS Inc. is here to make your journey successful and enjoyable. We're excited to help you explore the wonderful opportunities Canada has to offer!

Name: Overtown Manor
Description:
Set in beautiful Wiltshire countryside on a working farm, 2 miles from Swindon and 4 miles from the M4, Overtown Manor is not your average meeting destination or business travel accommodation.

The warm and inviting atmosphere of our meeting rooms makes them a popular choice for gatherings of between 10 - 14 people with tea & coffee, homemade biscuits, cakes, fresh fruit and nuts all readily available throughout the day. Projectors, screens, flip charts and Wi-Fi all available. Home cooked, fresh and seasonal lunches can be served in our kitchen, and all dietary requirements accommodated.

On top of this, we have five large, comfortable en-suite bedrooms and a twin with private bathroom. There is a large drawing room and a sitting/TV room both with log fires, a dining room/office or yoga room, a large farmhouse kitchen with Aga and table that seats 12 and a log fire, and use of the Manor’s beautiful garden.

We are well located for day trips to the Cotswolds, Bath, Oxford and London (Swindon train station is 4 miles away, trains leave every 15 minutes to London Paddington and takes 1 hour). We are also located in the middle of the North Wessex Downs, a tranquil yet stunning landscape of rolling chalk downlands, forests, woods and dales that is designated as an ‘Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty.

Name: La casa del forno
Description:
Chambre d'Hôtes à 80km au nord de Lisbonne, en pleine campagne, proche de sites magnifiques comme Tomar, Alcobça, Batalha, Obidos, Fatima et à 45 minutes de la plage de Nazaré, site de prédilection des surfeurs, réputée pour ses grandes vagues en fin d'année et janvier.

Notre lieu d'accueil est composé  :
- d'un studio avec sa salle de douche et ses toilettes
- d'un petit appartement de type 3 avec sa propre salle de douche et ses toilettes, son salon, son balcon.
- d'une salle commune où sont servis les petits déjeuners
- d'une piscine
- de nombreux arbres fruitiers
- de nombreux oliviers.

Sur place, vous pourrez consommer l'huile d'olive issue de nos oliviers, les confitures faites maison issues du soin que nous apportons à nos fruitiers, les œufs de notre poulailler, les légumes de notre potager.

Vous bénéficierez du calme absolu de la situation de la maison et de nos espaces verts.

Een prachtig vakantiehuis met privé-zwembad, niet ver van het grote stuwmeer Aguieira en natuurlijk de Atlantische Oceaan. Hier kunt u lekker tot rust komen in de prachtige natuur van Midden-Portugal, waar nog echte rust en stilte bestaan. Genieten van het pure Portugese leven: gastvrij, betaalbaar, ongedwongen en authentiek. In de directe omgeving kan heerlijk gewandeld worden.

Name: Domaine du Hallier
Description:
Bienvenue au Domaine du Hallier, un havre de paix niché au cœur de 300 hectares de nature préservée. Ici, vous serez seul au monde, entouré d’une forêt aux multiples essences, de grandes allées empierrées, de prairies verdoyantes et d’étangs en cascade.

Venez vivre une immersion totale dans un environnement authentique, propice au repos, aux retrouvailles et à la reconnexion à la nature.

Le Domaine est un espace clos, protégé et entretenu avec soin dans le respect d’un plan de gestion forestier. Vous y croiserez peut-être cerfs, biches, chevreuils,  hérons ou cygnes… Le décor est vivant, apaisant, et toujours inspirant.

Confortablement équipés, nos hébergements et espaces sont pensés pour vous offrir un séjour relaxant, que ce soit en famille, entre amis ou avec vos collaborateurs.

Le Domaine du Hallier se prête aussi bien à des locations saisonnières, qu’à l’organisation d’évènements privés (mariages, anniversaires…) ou professionnels (séminaires, séjours de cohésion).

Name: Nomad's Ville Mirante de Pipa
Description:
PIPA AND NATURE!
We are talking about one of the most charming beaches in the Brazilian northeast. Praia de Pipa is located in the municipality of Tibau do Sul, in Rio Grande do Norte, 80 km south of Natal and 120 km north of João Pessoa.
The famous beach, Baía dos Golfinhos, is among the 10 best beaches in the world, according to the TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice award. Remembering that the sea water
temperature is warm and summer most of the year.

Nomad´s Village in Brazil in the middle of nature.
The inspiring getaway for digital nomads, freelancers and remote workers!
Discover a vibrant workspace where ocean waves meet creativity and productivity.
Located in the stunning Mirante de Pipa, in Rio Grande do Norte, our coworking space offers the perfect combination between a paradisiacal location and an environment conducive to your professional success.
Our privileged location will spark your creativity and bring the positive energy you need to have a great day at work!
We offer high-quality infrastructure, with high-speed internet and advanced technology to ensure that you are always connected and develop your projects without worries, knowing that our connection is fast and stable.
Mirante de Pipa offers a rustic style, very simple, but full of comfort and beauty.
The ideal place for nomads and remote workers to stay, with a green area as an office, the sound of birds and an incredible sunset to end the day. And all of this is located in the center, on the main street, next to the beaches.
All accommodations have a privileged view of the greenery, air conditioning, minibar, private bathroom with hot shower, smartTV and Wi-Fi. Some include a hot tub at room temperature, a full or shared kitchen and a balcony.
Our guests have free access to the Mirante Sunset Bar, one of the city's main tourist attractions.
Make Mirante de Pipa your office and have the freedom to work anywhere in the world.
You will love this lifestyle!
Location: Tibau do Sul, Rio Grande do Norte

Name: Casa Uca
Description:
Join the Uca community

Whether it’s for a relaxing afternoon by the pool, a kitesurfing weekend, or re-energizing holidays, you will feel Casa Uca’s pure energy.

Share magical moments in a place in harmony with Nature, built to honor the true beauty of a natural land between mangroves and sand dunes. Its unique location at the mouth of a river makes it accessible by a road or by boat and provides the perfect way to reconnect with Nature from the very beginning of your stay.

A place deeply connected with the local life, respecting the authenticity of a small and wild fisherman’s village named Guriú while respecting and valuing its activities and crafts. The ambition of our experience, as well as that of all those who work with us, is to be in a place that provides magical moments and amazing memories for our guests. Our goal is to create a space with an atmosphere that feels like us, relaxed, and in harmony with the natural environment. Casa Uca is a place that feels right for the people we’ve created it for.

Name: Finca Serrato
Description:
AN AUTHENTIC EXPERIENCE AT THE GATES OF THE MONTES DE MALAGA NATURAL PARK
Our apartments, nestled in the heart of the Malaga mountains, offer you a unique and authentic experience, in a peaceful natural setting.
We offer 3 comfortable, authentic and fully equipped apartments for 2 to 4 people and a comfortable double room
Located in the heart of nature, on the edge of the Malaga Mountains, the Finca offers a variety of sporting and cultural activities throughout your stay.
Finca Serrato was built over 200 years ago, for the processing and transformation of the estate's olives into oil. Although renovated over the years, the Finca has kept its authentic character, and during your stay you will encounter many clues to its history. In particular, you will find the Moorish influences that are omnipresent in Andalusia.
The Finca has its own reservoirs, which provide fresh water directly from the heart of the mountain. We also have solar panels, which make us almost self-sufficient.
Finca Serrato is the perfect place to disconnect and take a deep breath of fresh air. It is a haven of peace that brings together nature lovers. After a beautiful hike in the Montes de Málaga natural park, you can refresh in the pool or enjoy a cool drink in the flowered patio.

Name: Church View Anglesey
Description:
Church View is a beautifully presented holiday home, available to rent throughout the year, and located in the delightful seaside resort of Trearddur Bay (Bae Trearddur) on Holy Island, the North West coast of Anglesey.

Trearddur Bay boasts a wonderful holiday vibe throughout the year. It is perfect for all water sport enthusiasts and golfers, with courses nearby, and Church View is ideally located to take advantage of the resort’s main amenities. 

The rear of the property has delightful views of St Ffraid’s Church, yet it is only two hundred metres from the main blue flag beach.

It is the perfect base for either a family holiday or a short weekend break. With several bars and restaurants in walking distance, the house is great for those who love to dine out in beautiful surroundings.

Visit Wales has awarded Church View a 4 Star status due to the excellent standard found throughout the property

Available for short breaks and holidays.
Go to www.churchviewanglesey.com to book

Name: Taleton Eco Guesthouse
Description:
Taleton Eco Guesthouse is located in the village of Xirokambi, at the foot of the Taygetos Mountains, near Sparta and Mystras, and just a 30-minute drive from the seaside town of Gythion.

We offer spacious, comfortable rooms and a delicious local breakfast. Our garden, courtyard, and swimming pool provide the perfect setting to relax after a day full of new experiences.

Name: Pousada Cantelli
Description:
A reconexão com o que há de mais autêntico na existência humana é o que pode nos conduzir ao equilíbrio, a paz ou somente em direção a nós mesmos. Sentir a vida. Apreciar a preciosidade de se ter vida na vida. Viver emoções que nos façam acreditar que estamos vivos.
Nossa história é repleta de vida, de sentimentos, de pessoas. Alinhamos e reconectamos a tudo isso, que nos faz ser quem somos. Únicos, assim como cada pessoa que se permite experienciar a vida aqui na Cantelli.
Uma Casa de Pedra de 1878 que mantém a história dos imigrantes italianos viva. Além de Bangalôs novos cheios de conforto e integração com a natureza, nossas acomodações e experiências são cheias de sentidos.
Se permita sentir!
Location: Bento Gonçalves - Caminhos de Pedra, RS

Name: Domaine du Chêne Rond
Description:
Bienvenue au Domaine du Chêne Rond !

Situé au cœur de la Sologne, le Domaine du Chêne Rond est un lieu unique, où nature, bien-être, et passion pour l’équitation se rejoignent. 

Notre mission : Offrir un cadre authentique et haut de gamme pour des séjours en pleine nature, où chevaux et cavaliers peuvent vivre une expérience de détente et de ressourcement.

Ce que nous proposons :

=> Hébergement de groupe et séminaires : Un gîte entièrement rénové, qui allie confort moderne et matériaux traditionnels, idéal pour un week-end ou des vacances en famille ou entre amis, des séminaires d'entreprise, des team-buildings.

=> Séjours équestres : Accueil personnalisé pour les cavaliers et leurs chevaux avec des infrastructures de qualité (carrière de sable Fontainebleau entretenue et équipée, box, aire de préparation et douche couverte, prés individuels avec abris, randonnées en forêt).

Activités à la carte pour les séminaires et séjours à thème : Cours de yoga, séance d'équicoaching, dégustations de vins pour une expérience unique.

Pour les vacanciers : petits-déjeuners, dégustation de vin, balade en main ou séance découverte des poneys pour vos enfants.

Services spécialisés : Location de carrière, organisation de stages équestre, prestations de massage , pension de courte durée pour chevaux en convalescence ou en préparation pour des événements, et bien plus.

Nos valeurs : Authenticité, respect de l'environnement, et passion pour la nature et l'équitation. Le Domaine du Chêne Rond est conçu pour offrir à chacun, humains et chevaux, un cadre de vie et de détente dans une nature préservée.

Rejoignez-nous et découvrez ce lieu d’exception, où chaque séjour est une aventure inoubliable.

 Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus, ou suivez-nous sur nos réseaux sociaux pour rester informés de nos actualités et offres spéciales.

Name: B&B La Perla
Description:
Benvenuti al B&B La Perla, un gioiello situato nel cuore di Frosinone, pensato per offrire un’esperienza esclusiva e tranquilla, garantendo privacy e comfort ai nostri ospiti. Ogni spazio all'interno del nostro B&B è curato nei minimi dettagli per assicurare stile e comodità. Le nostre strutture comprendono una cucina moderna e un living spazioso, ideali per chi cerca un ambiente raffinato e funzionale.

Il nostro giardino rigoglioso e i balconi con vista panoramica offrono un contatto diretto con la natura, permettendo ai nostri ospiti di godere di momenti di relax e tranquillità. Nonostante la serenità dell’ambiente, la nostra posizione centrale assicura un facile accesso al centro città, rendendoci la scelta perfetta per chi desidera esplorare Frosinone senza rinunciare alla quiete.

Al B&B La Perla, ci impegniamo a fornire servizi di alta qualità, tra cui biancheria pregiata, gadget selezionati e una colazione artigianale con opzioni per esigenze alimentari specifiche. Questo ci rende ideali non solo per professionisti in viaggio, ma anche per amanti della natura e per chiunque sia alla ricerca di un luogo accogliente e tranquillo, dove ogni dettaglio è pensato per rendere il soggiorno un'esperienza indimenticabile.

Varcando la soglia del nostro B&B, sarai accolto da un'atmosfera familiare ed ospitale. Le nostre camere, arredate con gusto e attenzione ai dettagli, offrono il massimo comfort per garantire un riposo rigenerante. Dai letti soffici ed accoglienti agli arredi eleganti e funzionali, tutto è stato progettato per soddisfare le esigenze dei nostri ospiti.

Il nostro B&B vanta anche spazi comuni accoglienti, ideali per rilassarsi e socializzare con gli altri ospiti. Potrai trascorrere piacevoli momenti nella nostra terrazza, leggendo un libro o scambiando racconti di viaggio con nuovi amici. Inoltre, la posizione strategica del nostro B&B ti permetterà di esplorare facilmente le attrazioni locali e immergerti nella storia e nella cultura della regione.

Vanuit ons huis, terras, balkon en tuin heeft u rondom zicht op de bergen en de vallei waar u de beken en rivieren hoort stromen. Onze villa is een typisch landelijk romantisch klassiek en stoer ingericht vrijstaand huis. Met een heerlijk grote tuin (2500m²), een zwembad van 5 x 10 m met eigen oprit en voldoende parkeergelegenheid op eigen terrein en veel privacy “niemand die je ziet”.

Uw gastheer en gastvrouw…
Lies en Harald willen u laten genieten van hun persoonlijke aandacht en zorg. Zij zijn toegewijd aan het creëren van een warme en gastvrije sfeer, waarbij we elk detail zorgvuldig verzorgen voor een onvergetelijke ervaring.

Name: Les Gîtes de la Karlsmühle - Moulin 1846
Description:
𝐋𝐞𝐬 𝐆𝐢̂𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐝𝐞 𝐥𝐚 𝐊𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐬𝐦𝐮̈𝐡𝐥𝐞 – 𝐔𝐧𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐡𝐞̀𝐬𝐞 𝐝’𝐞𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐞𝐧 𝐀𝐥𝐬𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐝𝐮 𝐍𝐨𝐫𝐝
Niché au cœur du Parc naturel régional des Vosges du Nord, le domaine de la Karlsmühle est un lieu à part, confidentiel, préservé et apaisant. Ici, la nature règne en maître et la Sauer, rivière emblématique de l’Alsace, accompagne le quotidien de son murmure apaisant.

Sur cette propriété de plusieurs hectares, quatre gîtes de prestige vous accueillent toute l’année pour une expérience unique, entre raffinement, calme et reconnexion. Piscine intérieure, sauna extérieur, jacuzzi en pleine nature, terrain de pétanque, terrasses ombragées… tout a été pensé pour le confort et le bien-être.

Le domaine tire son nom d’un ancien moulin à farine de 1846, dont subsiste une écluse au cœur du parc. Plus qu’un simple clin d'œil au passé, c’est une histoire familiale qui continue de s’écrire. Chaque gîte porte d’ailleurs un prénom évocateur.
À proximité immédiate : sentiers de randonnée, sites patrimoniaux, restaurants gastronomiques et produits du terroir.

Labellisé Gîtes de France 5 épis, Meublé de tourisme 5 et Valeurs Parc naturel régional, le domaine s’inscrit dans une démarche de qualité, de respect de l’environnement et de tourisme durable.

Et si le véritable luxe, c’était simplement le temps de vivre ?

Onze locatie combineert het comfort van een Bed & Breakfast met de perfecte faciliteiten voor zakelijke evenementen, waarbij we alles van A tot Z voor je regelen.

Bij ons hoef je de Finca eigenlijk niet meer te verlaten! Geniet van een breed scala aan activiteiten, zowel voor ontspanning als teambuilding. Van een energieke padellles tot een diepe ademworkshop, van een soulvolle cacao ceremonie tot een dynamische salsa dansles, er is voor ieder wat wils.

Daarnaast bieden we fitness- en Crossfit-workshops, ontspannende massages, en een gezellige pot volleybal of tafeltennis. Voor wie echt wil ontspannen, is er onze sauna, waar je heerlijk kunt tot rust komen.

Finca La Familia Naranja is de ideale plek voor zakelijke uitjes, vriendenweekenden of familiebijeenkomsten. Alles wat je nodig hebt voor een succesvolle en gezellige tijd, vind je bij ons op de Finca.

Name: The Bentley MKE
Description: Welcome to The Bentley Hotel in Milwaukee in the beautiful and historic Walker’s Point neighborhood that sits in the heart of Wisconsin’s largest and most diverse city. It was originally built by prominent Milwaukeean and business owner John Bentley in 1892. The newly-renovated structure maintains archetypal cream city brick which city construction became known for during its boom in the mid-to-late 1800s. Astonishingly, the Bentley family is in its sixth generation of business and is responsible for creating some of Milwaukee’s most iconic buildings including Alexander Mitchell’s mansion known as The Wisconsin Club.

Description:
Bienvenue à La Maison Indigo, votre oasis éco-responsable au cœur de Bordeaux ! 

À La Maison Indigo, nous vous proposons bien plus qu'un lieu événementiel. Niché dans une authentique maison bordelaise, notre espace combine à la fois un cadre professionnel inspirant et le charme d'une maison d'hôtes chaleureuse.

 Notre engagement éco-responsable :
Nous croyons en une approche éthique et durable dans tout ce que nous faisons. Chaque détail est pensé pour minimiser notre impact sur l'environnement, tout en offrant un cadre inspirant pour vos réunions, ateliers ou séminaires.

 Des espaces adaptés à vos besoins :
Que ce soit pour un brainstorming créatif, un atelier de développement personnel, ou un café-réseau convivial, nos différents espaces modulables sauront répondre à vos exigences. Découvrez notre coin salon cosy, notre espace de travail, notre cuisine atelier propice aux échanges, et notre jardin urbain pour une bouffée d'air frais au cœur de la ville.

 Chambres d'hôtes cocons :
En plus de nos espaces professionnels, La Maison Indigo propose des chambres d'hôtes pleines de charme pour prolonger votre expérience. 
Profitez d'un séjour confortable et paisible dans nos chambres aménagées avec soin, idéales pour les clients ou collaborateurs participant à vos événements ou pour vos voyages d'affaires.

 Des événements sur-mesure :
Nous avons le plaisir d'accueillir des événements variés tels que des tournages documentaires, des ateliers artistiques, des séances de coaching personnel ou collectif et bien plus encore. 
Laissez-nous vous aider à créer un événement qui marquera les esprits tout en respectant vos valeurs et objectifs.

 Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour discuter de la manière dont La Maison Indigo peut être le cadre idéal pour votre prochain événement professionnel ou votre séjour à Bordeaux. Ensemble, donnons vie à vos idées et faisons de chaque rencontre un moment privilégié !

À très bientôt,

Ève et La Maison Indigo

Name: Le MaRaClà
Description:
A metà strada tra Nord e Sud, abbracciate dal mare e dalla montagna, tra la vivacità delle cittadine e la quiete della campagna, le Marche hanno tutto quello che serve per sedurre il viaggiatore.

Esse hanno inoltre un vantaggio: sono ancora un po’ segrete, apprezzate dai conoscitori, ma non troppo invase da un turismo massificato.

Piacevole è poi l’atteggiamento accogliente e mai invadente dei Marchigiani, orgogliosi e consapevoli del proprio territorio.

La country house Le MaRaClà si trova alla periferia del Comune di Jesi, circondata dalle bellissime colline marchigiane.

Ristrutturato recentemente, rispettando tutte le caratteristiche originali, realizzando 5 camere tutte con ingresso indipendente, dotate di ogni comfort e angolo cottura ed ognuna con uno spazio esterno privato affacciato sul panorama circostante.

Dopo circa 20 anni di attività al pubblico ai confini con Milano in cerca della possibilità di realizzare un sogno, di un cambiamento totale di vita, ci siamo buttati in questo progetto, forse un po’ ambizioso, ma nel quale abbiamo riposto tutte le nostre energie e speranze.

Realizzato in onore alle nostre tre figlie di cui deriva appunto il nome Le MaRaClà: Matilde, Rachele, Clarissa.

Il desiderio di realizzare, in un posto alquanto stupendo da scoprire, un ambiente unico, nella sua particolarità, senza perdere la semplicità che ne caratterizza non solo il posto ma anche le persone che ci vivono.

Perché venire da noi? Scopritelo!

Name: La Cidraisy
Description:
Situé au cœur du Parc naturel du Vexin, ce loft authentique de 90m²

Derrière un grand portail en bois se cache une maison de famille en pierre, ancienne cidrerie avec écurie.
Le loft rénové avec charpente en chêne et murs en pierre, offre un séjour spacieux, une mezzanine, une cuisine équipée et une salle de bain moderne. Un jardin verdoyant abrite arbres fruitiers, potager et serre, avec une grande terrasse ensoleillée et terrain de pétanque.
Réservé à des amoureux de la nature tout en restant proche des grands axes, ce lieu est idéal pour un séjour en gîte rural ou une activité professionnelle de type séminaire, formation ou séances photos.

Locations

Maximo Short-Stay Services; your perfect blend of comfort and hospitality.

Las dos suites están acabadas de reformar y situadas en la planta baja de la casa catalogada donde vivimos los impulsores de este proyecto, Anna y Albert.

Abrimos las puertas de nuestra casa, convertida en parte en un pequeño bed&breakfast, compartiendo este tesoro con todos aquellos/as que quieran disfrutar unos días de un refugio tranquilo donde pasado y presente se funden armoniosamente.

Name: Poco a Poco Hostel
Description:
We offer a spacious and high quality hostel for travelers from all over the world. Our staff will be smiling when you enter through the gate.

We have been active since 2017 and won the BEST HOSTEL in NICARAGUA award for 3 years in a row, so get ready for a good time! We have space for 42 guests and are open to all kinds of people. We value social interaction between different cultures and our guests. To do so we offer, various places to sit and mingle, swimmingpool, rooftop, fresh green garden, many hammocks, huge open kitchen, big dining area, instruments, social activities, etc.

You want to work while you are here? Perfect! Plenty of places to sit and work with our fast internet available throughout the property. No need to go anywhere because we offer a C$60 breakfast every morning with coffee or tea. Drinks are also available.

Rooms are large with plenty of space for you and all your stuff. We offer different room-types, basic dorm - deluxe dorm - private rooms - family rooms. Some rooms have AC available too, because it gets hot in here :) Need more space, we have a storage where you can put larger items, no problemo.

We are just a couple blocks from the central park and close to many bars and restaurants. We are located in a more quiet street, which is nice... believe us :) We offer daily tours to several volcanoes via our partners. Before you book our hostel, make sure to read some of our reviews so you know what to expect.

Name: VARSHAVAN AGRO HILL RESORT
Description:
Varshavan Wellness Center
Your body says a lot about you. It is where you live. Every day our body goes through a lot and we try to heal it with allopathy. Our body can heal by using naturopathy. Naturopathy is a mix of art & science to lead a healthy life. It is a mix of human body principles of nature on the physical, mental, moral, and spiritual well-being.
Naturopathy uses natural ways to support the body’s own self-healing mechanisms. One of the main reasons for a disease is the violation of nature’s law. Unhealthy food habits weaken the digestion process. This leads to poor assimilation and eliminates the accumulation of morbid matters which helps in increasing the diseases.
Just 40 kms & a one-hour drive from the heart of Pune, VARSHAVAN at 3000 feet above mean sea-level is a veritable Paradise located at Waghapur Village in the Purandar Taluka. Sitting here you get a clear unhindered view as far out as 25 kms in the horizon. Located on the side of a hill, you have hills all around which makes it a walker’s & trekker’s paradise. Yes, it is desolate but then it is in places such as these that you feel nature in all its glory like the site of wild animals (including peacocks, an occasional jackal, deer etc), birds, a clear blue sky in the day which transforms itself into the most starriest in the evenings (a telescope shall shortly be installed here!). Bird and Deer watching is thus a normal pastime here for most guests.

Name: ArabElite
Description:
ArabElite offers luxury apartments furnished with contemporary and modern designs that shine with luxurious five-star residences.

ArabElite is set in the center of Cairo. ArabElite is 4.2 km from Mosque of Ibn Tulun, and guests can benefit from complimentary WiFi and private parking available on site. The accommodation offers a lift and full-day security for guests.

The spacious apartment has 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a balcony with city views. A private entrance leads guests into the apartment, where they can enjoy some fruits and chocolates or cookies. There is also a seating area and a fireplace.

Most importantly, there is the famous Egyptian Civilizations Museum, which is an important goal for all visitors to Cairo, just a few meters away from the apartment.

Mosque of Mohamed Ali Pasha is 5.2 km from the ArabElite, while Cairo Citadel is 6.1 km from the property. The nearest airport is Cairo International Airport, 19 km from ArabElite.

There is a supermarket, a men’s barber shop, a restaurant for delicious oriental grills, a bakery for the most delicious types of oriental cakes and sweets, a pharmacy and a coffee shop that serves shisha in the same building where Arab Elite is located.

Our goal is to provide you with a unique accommodation experience for you, your family members, and your friends during your visit to the city of Egypt, which is full of tourist and entertainment activities.

Name: Pousada Bora Pescar
Description:
Somos a Pousada Bora Pescar, apaixonados pela pesca esportiva e pelo contato intenso com a natureza. Com duas unidades localizadas em Mato Grosso — uma em Luciara e outra em Novo Santo Antônio — oferecemos a experiência completa para quem deseja viver a emoção de pescar nos rios Araguaia e Manso, destinos reconhecidos pela riqueza e diversidade dos seus peixes, especialmente a piraíba e a pirarara.

Nossas pousadas ficam de frente para o rio, garantindo uma vista privilegiada e acesso facilitado às melhores áreas de pesca. Pensamos em cada detalhe para proporcionar conforto, segurança e praticidade. Nossos quartos são acolhedores, com estrutura simples, mas com qualidade, para que você se sinta em casa enquanto desfruta da aventura.

Trabalhamos com pacotes all inclusive que incluem hospedagem, alimentação completa, gasolina para barcos e bebidas ilimitadas, para que sua única preocupação seja aproveitar cada momento da pescaria. Nosso atendimento é personalizado e focado em tornar sua estadia inesquecível, com uma equipe dedicada e pronta para ajudar no que for preciso.

Além da emoção de fisgar grandes peixes, oferecemos um ambiente familiar e tranquilo, perfeito para grupos, famílias e até mesmo para quem busca um refúgio para relaxar e renovar as energias. A Pousada Bora Pescar é o equilíbrio ideal entre aventura e descanso, em meio a uma natureza exuberante.

Venha viver momentos únicos de adrenalina e paz, em um dos melhores destinos de pesca esportiva do Brasil. Aqui, sua pescaria dos sonhos ganha vida com conforto, segurança e hospitalidade. Esperamos por você para compartilhar essa paixão!

Name: guestroom traza 37
Description:
gustroom traza37 is een klein studio op de begane grond van een woonhuis uit 1899.

Het studio is gelegen in een rustige buurt van Amsterdam (Amsterdam Oud-West) niet ver van het centrum. De loopafstand naar de grachtengordel en musea zoals het Van Gogh Museum en Rijksmuseum bedraagt 15 min, het Vondelpark is in 5 min. te bereiken. Ook zijn er goede tramverbindingen (5 min. centrum, 15 min centraal station). In deze populaire buurt zijn veel winkels, cafes en restaurants.

De inrichting van deze kleine studio bevat een comfortabel tweepersoonsbed, een kleine keuken met koffie- en theefaciliteiten en een koelkast, een eigen badkamer met douche en toilet, smart-tv en gratis draadloos internet-verbinding . Bed- en badlinnen zjn opgenomen in de prijs.

Wij zorgen ervoor dat voldoende koffie en thee beschikbaar zijn, maar we serveren geen ontbijt. In de buurt heb je een grote keuze aan restaurants en cafes voor ontbijt, lunch en diner.

Foto's en meer informatie:  www.traza37.nl
email: traza37@traza.nl

Name: The Chapel in Hamley
Description:
The Chapel in Hamley is a boutique Accommodation and Events space located in the heart of the gorgeous Hamley Bridge in South Australia. Nestled between the famous Barossa and Clare Valleys, this is a gem worth visiting!

The grounds of The Chapel in Hamley consist of two separate buildings.

The Chapel is the former Anglican Church of St Thomas and is in the process of being renovated into a gorgeous, intimate events space. Built in 1889, it's beutiful original wooden floors and leadlight windows create a magical space for your next personal or community event.

The Cottage was once used as a community centre and rectory, and is in the initial stages of renovation to turn this beautiful stone cottage into the comfiest, cosiest retreat possible. Watch this space!

The gardens within the grounds are in the process of creation, with the vision to become a serene, colourful display of native plant life. Our focus is to create a sanctuary for native flora and fauna to gather and ensure that the Chapel in Hamley is an eco-conscious refuge! 

We are in the initial stages of restoration, creation and renovation, so please follow us along on our social media and share our journey with us! 

Love,

Graeson and Huy

We can’t wait to welcome you to Casa de Olas, where your stay will be nothing short of spectacular.

Name: The Old Station Snettisham
Description:
The Old Station, Snettisham – Where heritage meets hospitality.
Set on the site of the historic Snettisham Railway Station, The Old Station is a carefully restored and much-loved local landmark in coastal West Norfolk. Once visited by poet and railway enthusiast Sir John Betjeman, the station now offers guests and visitors a unique window into the golden age of rail travel. While the station building has been sensitively brought back to life, our focus extends beyond accommodation – we’re preserving its history, sharing its story, and creating a destination rooted in character, connection and care.

Lovingly restored, The Old Station holiday accommodation now occupies the original station building, blending authentic architectural detail with carefully considered interiors. It’s ideal for guests seeking comfort, charm, and a connection to the slower pace of the past.

But the journey doesn’t stop there. Work is ongoing to conserve and enhance the wider site, including the original platform and Stationmaster’s house. These future phases aim to further celebrate the station’s railway heritage while broadening our visitor experience.

We champion Norfolk’s natural and cultural landscape – promoting local attractions, seasonal highlights, and sustainable experiences in West and North Norfolk. From walking trails and wildlife watching to historic houses, artisan food and the extraordinary Norfolk coast, we help guests discover what makes this region so special.

Sustainability and regenerative tourism are central to what we do. We’ve taken steps to lower our environmental footprint while creating positive local impact, and we continue to learn and adapt.

Backed by outstanding guest reviews, The Old Station is more than just a place to stay – it’s a story of restoration, renewal and connection.

Name: B&B Maison Parco del Brenta
Description:
Servizi Offerti:

Camere Confortevoli e Spaziose: Ogni camera è dotata di bagno privato, aria condizionata, riscaldamento e TV, garantendo un soggiorno all’insegna del comfort e del relax. Le atmosfere luminose e lo stile shabby-chic francese creano un ambiente elegante e accogliente, ideale per rigenerarsi in armonia con la natura circostante.

Aree Relax e Giardini: Ampi spazi all’aperto, tra terrazze panoramiche e giardini curati, offrono un’oasi di pace dove godersi la vista sulle acque tranquille del fiume Brenta. 

Connessione Wi-Fi Gratuita: La copertura Wi-Fi è disponibile in tutte le aree del Bed and Breakfast, facilitando le comunicazioni e il lavoro in remoto, senza rinunciare al contatto con la natura.

Posizione Strategica: Maison Parco del Brenta si trova a breve distanza dagli aeroporti principali, a circa 40 km dall'aeroporto di Venezia Marco Polo e a 30 km da quello di Treviso Antonio Canova, facilitando gli spostamenti per i viaggiatori nazionali e internazionali. Inoltre, è molto comodo per chi utilizza i mezzi pubblici: dista solo 14 km dalla stazione ferroviaria di Padova Centrale e 8 km da San Giorgio delle Pertiche, offrendo collegamenti rapidi e pratici. La stazione degli autobus di Padova Centrale, a 14 km, permette di raggiungere destinazioni come Bassano del Grappa con fermata a Pieve. Per esigenze di trasferimento più personalizzate, è disponibile anche un servizio taxi prenotabile, garantendo un collegamento diretto e senza stress verso e da tutte le principali destinazioni della zona. Questa posizione strategica rende il B&B Maison Parco del Brenta ideale sia per chi viaggia per affari sia per chi desidera esplorare le bellezze del territorio circostante.

Perché Scegliere Maison Parco del Brenta? Un’oasi di eleganza e tranquillità, perfetta per chi desidera rigenerarsi lontano dal caos cittadino, immergendosi nella bellezza naturale del Veneto.

Memorable Experience: Since opening our doors in July 2023, hundreds of guests have created lasting memories with us – whether you’re here for a romantic getaway, a business trip, or an adventurous exploration of the city.

At Canal View Stay Amsterdam, every detail is crafted with love to offer you a truly unforgettable stay.

Name: Lawrence's Lakeside Cabins
Description: Welcome to Lawrence's Lakeside Cabins! We have 5 fully remodeled cabins on the shores of Moosehead Lake in Rockwood Maine. Our cabins are open year round and offer easy access to Moosehead Lake for all your lake adventures. Firepits, Boat Dock and a Lakeside Sundeck are all part of the 'lake life' experience here at Lawrence's. Our cabins have fully stocked kitchens, high speed fiber wifi and expansive lake and mountain views. You can be as connected as you want to be while in the Northwoods of Maine. Our cabins can accommodate anywhere from 2 to 13 people or you can rent the entire property which can accommodate 25 people! Check out our website and book online today!

Name: Crittenden Lakeside Villas
Description:
Lakeside Villas at Crittenden is a boutique accommodation experience set over the tranquil lake at our family-owned vineyard on the Mornington Peninsula. Our three over-water villas offer the perfect blend of privacy, comfort and connection to nature.
Guests enjoy spacious, self-contained villas with king bedrooms, spa baths, wood fires and private decks overlooking the water. With the Crittenden Wine Centre and Crittenden Restaurant just steps away, visitors can unwind with bespoke wine tastings and seasonal dining without leaving the estate.
Whether you’re here to explore the Peninsula, celebrate a special occasion or simply switch off, Lakeside Villas invites you to stay a little longer and savour our lakeside lifestyle.

Name: Gasthaus Piesau
Description:
Gasthaus Piesau – Tu cabaña en el bosque de Turingia
Refugio consciente para viajeros que buscan naturaleza, descanso y autenticidad.

Desde 2021, Gasthaus Piesau acoge a huéspedes de todo el mundo en un entorno único, rodeado de bosque, tranquilidad y aire puro.
Ubicada en el corazón del bosque de Turingia, esta acogedora cabaña invita a reconectar con lo esencial: la calma, el bienestar y el contacto real con la naturaleza.

 Ideal para escapadas en pareja, vacaciones en familia o aventuras slow travel.
 Comprometida con el turismo sostenible, el confort consciente y la hospitalidad con alma.
 Trilingüe: español, alemán e inglés.

 Piesau, Turingia | gasthauspiesau.de | gasthauspiesau@gmail.com

#RefugioEnElBosque #GasthausPiesau #TurismoConsciente #SlowTravel #AventuraNatural #EscapadaPerfecta

Name: Sunflowers and Lavender
Description:
Our vision is to inspire relaxation, rejuvenation, and a deep connection to the natural world, promoting overall well-being and peace of mind for each visitor.

Our mission is to provide a tranquil retreat nestled within the heart of Athens, NY. We strive to create a welcoming, serene space where guests can immerse themselves in the beauty of nature, experience the healing powers of sunflowers and lavender, and engage in self-directed wellness activities.

Our farmhouse is a serene abode nestled on 3 acres in Hudson Valley. Our 6-bedroom, 3-bath sanctuary includes a fully-equipped loft with a dedicated workspace, comfy lounge area, and stunning natural views, offering an idyllic blend of comfort and tranquility.

Our intention serves to offer more than just a tranquil retreat. Our purpose intertwines relaxation with gentle education, fostering appreciation for the potent wonders of herbalism, specifically the therapeutic benefits of sunflowers and lavender.

Name: Bell Camp
Description:
Bell Camp is a camping in Zangakatun village, Armenia.

The village is situated at the border of picturesque Ararat province near mountainous Vayots Dzor province. 

At our camping you can stay at night in tents, taste delicious and authentic national dishes, enjoy your holidays by hiking, horse-riding,  fishing, participating in agricultural and other outdoor activities.
After full day of different interesting activities you can enjoy your cozy evenings at the campfire singing, drinking mountainous herbal tea and merely catch camping vibes.

Name: Ostel In
Description:
Welcome to Ostel.In — Pondicherry’s favorite community hostel by the sea 

Tucked between Auroville and White Town, Ostel.In is more than just a stay — it’s an experience. Designed for travelers, dreamers, and creators, we bring together people from around the world to connect, unwind, and feel at home in Pondicherry’s peaceful coastal vibe.

 What we offer:
 Cosy dorms & private rooms (with ocean views)
 Swimming pool & chill lounges
 Rooftop café vibes
 Community events, music, art & good energy
 A space where friendships grow as naturally as palm trees

Here, every traveler finds a story — from early morning yoga and surf sessions to late-night conversations under the stars. Whether you’re exploring Auroville’s calm, wandering through White Town’s colorful streets, or simply relaxing by the beach, Ostel.In is your home away from home.

We’re a boutique backpacker hostel built around community and creativity — where comfort meets culture, and every stay turns into a memory.

 Stay. Connect. Feel at Home.
 Auroville Beach, Pondicherry
 www.ostel.co.in
 Follow us on Instagram for daily vibes — @ostel.

Name: Tuan House
Description:
TuanHouse is an innovative online platform that connects guests with homestay owners around the world. Our mission is to make it easy and hassle-free for travelers to find comfortable and affordable accommodations, while also helping hosts to earn extra income by renting out their spare rooms or entire homes.

At TuanHouse, we understand that finding the perfect homestay can be a daunting task, especially when you're traveling to a new destination. That's why we've created a user-friendly platform that allows guests to search for and book homestays based on their budget, location, and other preferences.

We also prioritize the safety and security of our guests and hosts, which is why we have a rigorous verification process and offer 24/7 customer support.

Whether you're a traveler looking for a unique and authentic travel experience, or a host looking to earn extra income, TuanHouse is the ideal platform for you. Join our community today and experience the comfort and convenience of homestay accommodations.

Name: CASAVARGAS
Description:
Casa de campo independente en Pedrezuela (sierra Norte de la Comunidad de Madrid) en plena naturaleza, a 5 min del pueblo con todos los servicios, a 25mn de Madrid, a pie de las montañas, ideal para el relax y disfrutar.

Grande, con ambientes amplios y mucha luz, es el lugar perfecto para dedicarlo al descanso, al estudio, al trabajo e incluso para conocer Madrid y poder reposar de verdad al final de un agotador día de ciudad.

En la casa podrás disfrutar de, camas muy confortables, calefacción por suelo radiante lo que la hace mantener una temperatura óptima y uniforme en toda la estancia. Chimenea que le dan ese toque perfecto de casa de campo con el calor y olor adicional de la leña. Una amplia cocina comedor dotada de todo tipo de electrodomésticos y utensilios para que cocines como si estuvieses en tu propia casa.

En el resto de la casa he procurado tenerla decorada de tal forma que sientas que estas en una casa acogedora y con vida, además está en un lugar en donde solo puedes encontrar relax y sosiego si es eso lo que buscas. En resumen he procurado que a la casa tan solo tengas que llevar las ganas de disfrutar.

En los exteriores con 1000m2 de parcela hay piscina tipo alberca con cascada (disponible en temporada de verano entre 15/6 y 15/9), rio con estanque, barbacoa y hoguera de veladas, además de rincones con arboleda para disfrutar grandes y pequeños.

En el entorno hay un pantano a tan solo 5 min paseando, además de estar en una zona ideal para practicar deportes como piragüismo, bici, escalada, senderismo, etc...

Name: Cabaña de Abi
Description: El terreno es muy cercano a La laguna y el terreno es de media manzana amplios jardines para niños. Cuenta con espacio para 12 personas, cocina, comedor, sala, refrigerador con congelador, pet-friendly, estufa con horno, piscina privada, columpios, a 100 metros de la laguna, net de voleibol, baños con regadera, espacio para comer afuera, churrasquera, fogata en el exterior, TV con Cable. Para llegar es 1 km de terraceria. Incluye sabanas, toallas, vajilla completa con platos, vasos, etc.

Hospitality & Homes (BNB Solutions) – We provide premium short-stay rentals and BNB experiences, offering comfort, convenience, and a home-like stay for travelers. Our focus is on curated spaces that blend style, affordability, and reliability.

At Sheero, we bring together hospitality and creativity—making stays memorable and brands remarkable.

Name: Riad Menthe et Citron - Maison d'Hôtes et d'Artistes
Description:
Un lieu d’inspiration et de création en plein cœur de la médina de Meknès, ville impériale du Maroc. 

Le Riad Menthe & Citron est bien plus qu’une maison d’hôtes. 
C’est une maison d’artistes, un espace de résidence et de rencontres, où l’art et la culture s’entrelacent avec l’authenticité du Maroc. 
Imaginé par Aymeric Vitu, artiste voyageur, ce riad accueille à la fois des voyageurs en quête d’expériences uniques, des créateurs en résidence et des passionnés d’art.

Ici, chaque séjour est une immersion dans un univers artistique :

 Expositions et rencontres avec des artistes en résidence
 Séjours authentiques dans un cadre inspirant

Un pont entre tradition et modernité, au cœur de Meknès

Nous avons aussi l’ambition de proposer des ateliers pédagogiques pour sensibiliser petits et grands à l’art, en collaborant avec des artisans et artistes locaux.

Rejoignez nous et faites partie de l’histoire du Riad Menthe & Citron !
Réservez votre séjour

Description:
Een bijzondere plek waar historie en modern comfort elkaar ontmoeten, in het schilderachtige dorp Noorbeek, Zuid-Limburg. Voorheen een geliefde herberg, nu een eigentijds hotel in het hart van het Heuvelland.
