De perfecte uitvalsbasis voor lange wandelingen in de natuur, een dagje shoppen in een van de nabijgelegen steden of om je terug te trekken voor jouw workation.

Name: Péniche Amboise
Description:
La Péniche Amboise, maison d’hôtes unique à Toulouse, flotte élégamment sur le canal du Midi, en plein cœur de la ville rose. Amarrée face aux allées ombragées du boulevard Griffoul-Dorval, elle offre un cadre paisible et insolite à quelques pas du centre historique.

Entièrement viabilisée, respectueuse de l’environnement et rénovée avec soin, la péniche accueille voyageurs, professionnels et curieux dans un décor chaleureux, alliant authenticité et confort. Trois chambres cosy, une suite avec kitchenette et un espace convivial permettent d’y séjourner comme à la maison… mais sur l’eau !

La Péniche Amboise, c’est aussi un lieu de rencontres, de petits-déjeuners soignés, et d’événements privés ou professionnels, dans une atmosphère calme et inspirante.


---

ENGLISH
Péniche Amboise is a unique floating guesthouse moored on the Canal du Midi, right in the heart of Toulouse. Nestled along the tree-lined Griffoul-Dorval boulevard, it offers a peaceful and original setting just steps away from the historic city center.

Fully serviced and eco-friendly, this carefully restored barge welcomes travelers, professionals, and the curious in a warm atmosphere where authenticity meets comfort. With three cozy rooms, a suite with kitchenette, and a common area, guests feel right at home… on water!

Péniche Amboise is also a vibrant space for meetings, quality breakfasts, and private or professional events in a serene, inspiring environment.

Name: Mas-1850
Description:
Mas-1850 was born out of our desire to offer and welcome you to a place of resources, reflection and self-awareness in a relaxing natural environment. 
In the heart of the Drôme Provençale, 20 minutes from Montélimar TGV station and the A7 motorway, Mas-1850 lies in a small valley between Mont Carmen and the hilltop village of Châteauneuf de Mazenc. It's a place full of energy, set in the heart of the Vermenon woods, between its 1850 walls and its terraced park of over 2 hectares. Nature is our motto: "At the source of humanity, at the source of health, the wonder of nature, its scents, sounds and colors". You can privatize this site for your training programs, therapeutic and psychological work, coaching and personal development: - Up to 15 participants - With high-quality 80x200 beds and storage space - A large, fully-equipped kitchen for 15 people in the center of the site - A fully-equipped 48 m2 training room included - An eco-responsible site (solar energy, pellets, water management, etc.) 
Contact us at welcome@mas1850.com or +33 (0) 6 81 83 91 38.

Name: La Terraza Guest House B&B
Description:
Beautiful La Terraza Guest House, located in San Roque de Grecia, Costa Rica, just a 35-minute drive from the Juan Santamaria International Airport (SJO). Located in the agriculturally-rich province of Alajuela, Grecia is known as the cleanest city in Central America.
Nestled along the picturesque Vigia River, La Terraza Guest House offers upscale amenities and attention you would expect to find at an excellent hotel, but at a budget-friendly price. At La Terraza Guest House we believe our guests want to get more, not pay more.
Over 300, TripAdvisor reviewers agree on the superior quality of La Terraza Guest House, from your host to the experienced and specially-trained staff of trusted employees. Boasting splendid surroundings and awesome accommodations, La Terraza Guest House, has it all!
At La Terraza, we’re all about customizing your visit to meet your wishes. Starting your day at La Terraza with a delicious, fulfilling breakfast couldn’t be easier.  Fresh fruits, farm fresh eggs, pancakes are just a few of the many mouthwatering morning meal combinations available.  
If you’re looking to surprise that special someone with a candlelight dinner or want to celebrate a momentous occasion with delectable fresh-made dishes, let us help you create the perfect dining experience.  Special Dietary accommodated. 
Free WIFI, in-room internet. Same-day laundry service available. Massage, manicure, and pedicure services. Fire Stick available. Restaurant dinner delivery assistance upon request.
Our goal at La Terraza is relatively straightforward: To exceed the expectations of every guest, every time. Provide accommodations that are very attractive, comfortable, clean and safe. We will consistently provide a friendly atmosphere, a place where the day’s memories can be shared with good food, good service, and excellent refreshments. We plan to expand and add more properties to provide superb value and superior service for our increasing clientele.
Location: San Roque Abano de Grecia , Alajuala

Name: L'Arbre d'Alice
Description: Situé au coeur de la Provence, entre Forcalquier et Banon, L'Arbre d'Alice vous accueille toute l'année en gîtes ou en chambre d'hôtes pour des séjours ressourçants en pleine nature !

Name: Vila AL-Castro
Description:
Em Entradas, uma localidade de Castro Verde, apenas a 32 km da Igreja do Carmo, a Vila AL-Castro apresenta acomodações com uma piscina exterior (jacuzzi), um jardim e acesso a Wi-Fi gratuito. 

O alojamento encontra-se num edifício de 1942, a 33 km do Museu Regional de Beja - Museu Rainha D. Leonor e a 33 km do Castelo de Beja.

Esta casa de férias com um pátio e vista da cidade possuí 1 quarto, uma sala de estar com sofá-cama, uma cozinha totalmente equipada e 1 casa de banho com chuveiro. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas pelos anfitriões.

Venha passar uns dias no nosso pequeno paraíso no Alentejo. Reserve já!

Name: La Gitanilla Alojamiento & Encanto
Description:
La Gitanilla es un alojamiento con encanto situado en pleno corazón histórico de Jerez de la Frontera.
 
Rodeado de un entorno inigualable de riqueza cultural y gastronómica, La Gitanilla  se erige sobre una antigua casa palacete andaluza de 1865 en el que sus instalaciones, totalmente reformadas, están decoradas exclusivamente por su dueña Virginia y su familia.
 
Desde La Gitanilla no sólo queremos ofrecerte una cama para dormir, sino que vivas una experiencia 360 que hará que tu viaje sea verdaderamente especial y lo puedas recordar con una sonrisa.

With a diverse array of bird species and a commitment to sustainable practices, we strive to create a harmonious sanctuary where guests can connect with nature.
Join us at our ranch and embark on a transformative journey filled with adventure, serenity, and unforgettable moments.

Description:

The comfortable, private accommodation is surrounded by trees and exceptional birdlife. 
Guests can start their day with a hot cuppa on the patio, enjoying the sounds of nature.  Winding down after a busy day with the sunset glowing through the trees is medicine for the soul.

ACCOMMODATION:
The cottage has been tastefully appointed for comfort, ease and convenience.
The MAIN BEDROOM offers medium firm queen-size bed, aircon, wardrobe and black-out curtains.  
The second room is set up as an OFFICE and offers a quiet work/study space as well as a comfortable single bed.
The BATHROOM offers shower and basin with double cabinet for storage.
The open plan LIVING ROOM offers garden views, relaxing lounge with TV (Netflix, Apple TV, Amazon Prime), and KITCHEN with all the usual appliances in addition to full-size fridge with freezer, washing machine, filter coffee machine and air fryer! 

CATERING:
Tea/coffee/milk/sugar and breakfast snacks are provided, as well as basic cooking condiments.

Ready-made home meals and/or stock of our guests' favourite beverages may also be arranged ahead of arrival date.

Every effort has been made to ensure our guest's comfort and convenience during their stay with us.

Name: Restaurant - Auberge de Morcles
Description:
L'Auberge de Morcles : Une expérience culinaire au cœur des montagnes suisses 

Dans le village de Morcles, l'Auberge de Morcles est bien plus qu'un simple restaurant.  Ce lieu unique célèbre les saveurs du terroir suisse grâce à une cuisine authentique et raffinée , élaborée à partir de produits locaux soigneusement sélectionnés dans un rayon de moins de 50 km. 

Avec en toile de fond la majestueuse Dent de Morcles, l'auberge marie charme et simplicité dans un cadre naturel exceptionnel . Ici, les menus sont proposés à l'ardoise, évoluant au gré des saisons et des produits disponibles, pour garantir une fraîcheur et une créativité sans compromis. 

Notre engagement ?
 Sublimer les produits locaux dans des plats savoureux et saisonniers 
 Accueillir nos hôtes avec une hospitalité sincère et attentionnée 
 Offrir une expérience culinaire mémorable dans un lieu où nature et gastronomie se rencontrent 

Avec une équipe passionnée  et un service à la hauteur de vos attentes , l’Auberge de Morcles vous invite à partager des instants uniques, dans un cadre aussi authentique qu’inoubliable.

Name: Les Quatre Sources
Description:
Les quatre sources -> De 4 bronnen 
Zijn de basis van de vijver die er ligt in de parkachtige tuin. Het is namelijk een bron gevoede vijver waaraan hij zijn loepzuiver water te danken heeft. 
Maar waarom dan in het Frans? 
Waar kent deze naam zijn oorsprong?  
In 2024 is het precies 210 jaar geleden dat Limburg bevrijd werd van de Franse bezetter. Na een periode van 20 jaar. 
In 2024 is het precies 220 jaar geleden dat Frankrijk Limburg binnen viel
Wat jullie waarschijnlijk niet weten is dat Limburg tussen 1750 en 1780 in het algemeen een rustig en redelijk welvarend gebied was. In de steden begonnen in die tijd de ideeën van de verlichting door te dringen. 
De Verlichting als stroming wordt gezien als een van de pijlers onder de westerse beschaving en zette grote wijzigingen in gang in het denken over religie, filosofie, kunst, wetenschap en politiek.
De Verlichting gaf aanleiding tot modernisering van de samenleving door middel van individualisering, emancipatie, feminisme, secularisering en globalisering. Het gelijkheidsbeginsel, de mensenrechten en de burgerrechten vinden er hun wortels, net zoals het 'vrijdenken',. Zaken die nu ook aan de orde van de dag zijn. 
Les quatre sources – Richt zich dan ook tot het vrij denken en spiritualiteit. Met zijn unieke ligging aan de voet van de Sint-Dionysiuskerk gelegen aan een bron gevoede vijver en een volgens Bagua & Feng shui ingerichte tuin. Willen we een uniek concept uitdragen en de mensen de mogelijkheid geven om te verlichten. Letterlijk verlichten als in lichter naar huis gaan door de ontspanning die men hier kan vinden.

Name: Il Cortile del Borgo
Description:
Scopri la bellezza del Piemonte con una locazione turistica esclusiva:
Nel cuore del Piemonte, a pochi chilometri dal Lago Maggiore, la nostra locazione turistica è il punto di partenza ideale per esplorare la regione e le sue tradizioni. La casa accogliente e ben attrezzata offre una zona giorno spaziosa, una cucina completamente equipaggiata, e camere eleganti con letti king e queen-size, con la possibilità di aggiungere due posti letto extra grazie al divano letto.

Un rifugio di tranquillità immerso nella natura:
Goditi la serenità che solo un ambiente naturale può offrire. Circondato da splendidi paesaggi e montagne, il nostro alloggio è perfetto per chi cerca un soggiorno tranquillo. Potrai passeggiare nel verde, respirare aria fresca e scoprire borghi autentici del Piemonte. La zona circostante è ideale per chi ama praticare attività all’aria aperta come escursioni e gite in bicicletta, mentre i panorami mozzafiato offriranno momenti di totale relax.

A due passi dal Lago Maggiore e dalle principali attrazioni turistiche:
La struttura è perfetta per esplorare il Lago Maggiore, con le sue isole e ville storiche. Milano è facilmente raggiungibile, così come le montagne del Piemonte per escursioni e sport all’aria aperta. Ogni angolo della regione ha qualcosa da offrire, che tu stia cercando cultura, natura o divertimento.

Accessibilità e comfort:
A soli 15 km dall’aeroporto di Malpensa, la nostra locazione è facilmente raggiungibile in auto o con i mezzi pubblici, offrendoti il meglio della tranquillità senza rinunciare alla comodità.

Un’esperienza unica:
Prenotando la nostra locazione turistica vivrai un’esperienza autentica, all’insegna della natura, della cultura e del relax. Ogni soggiorno sarà l’occasione per scoprire il Piemonte e creare ricordi indimenticabili.

Name: The Yellow Chalet
Description:
The Yellow Chalet is a quaint Himachali homestay looking over beautiful ice peaked mountains situated at Raila, Sainj Valley.
While at the property, you will find yourself immersed in a beautifully bloomed apple orchard, verdant pine forests stretches from behind this beautiful place for as far as your eyes can go.

This property is hosted by Manisha and Kaushal. Both the hosts have left their mundane city lives to settle for slow living in the hills, emersed in the local community life. 

We have retained the traditional charm of rustic Himachali infrastructure that will take you closer to the nature. While here, You can savour upon our home cooked delicacies to add flavour to your stay.  

And to add to your excitement, this is a completely pet friendly stay, so you can bring along your furry friends and enjoy some cozy time here. 

In terms of the activities you can engage yourself with here are 

- Rupi Raila Waterfall visit
- Raila Village walk and getting a view at the local life and vegetation. 
- Visiting the heritage sites like Twin Tower of Raila
- Enjoy a ride through The Great Himalayan National Park
- Small to medium duration treks - Bhatkanda Meadow, Khandadhar Top etc.

Can’t wait to see you all at The Yellow Chalet, your home in the mountains.

Name: Zašívárna Polom
Description:
NETRADIČNÍ UBYTOVÁNÍ
v mobilní dřevostavbě (tiny house) zasazené do kopců Vysočiny. Kopce, lesy, louky, romantická zemědělská stavení, klikaté silničky - a v srdci toho všeho stojí dřevostavba na kolečkách, která jako by tu stála odjakživa. Ale nestojí a navždy ani stát nebude, v tom je její kouzlo - stačí silnější auto a můžete se s ní stěhovat z místa na místo. Celý projekt dali dohromady - jak na papíře, tak i realizaci architekti ze 3petrici studio.

OFFGRID
Zašívárna je vymyšlena OFFGRID, je odpojena od veškerých sítí, a tedy nezávislá. Elektrická energie do ní proudí ze slunce, pro vodu je možné dojít k nedaleké studánce. Místní WC je suché - s luxusním výhledem do přírody :).

GLAMPING PRO RODINKU NEBO PARTU PŘÁTEL
Glamping v Zašívárně to je komfortní kempování v přírodě.
Zašívárna v sobě ochotně ubytuje až 4 osoby, disponuje totiž dvěma dvojlůžky, z toho jedno je ve spacím patře. Uvnitř prostoru s na míru navrženým překližkovým nábytkem pak hosté najdou vše, co budou potřebovat - malou lednici, vařič i dřez.
Mrkněte na vybavení Zašívárny.

UBYTOVÁNÍ V PŘÍRODĚ NA VYSOČINĚ
Díky proskleným plochám máte v Zašívárně maximální kontakt s přírodou.
Horizontální okno - monitorování lesní zvěře v širokém zorném úhlu.
Střešní okna - nabízí nocležníkům nezapomenutelné výhledy na hvězdnou oblohu. Okna jsou navíc panoramatická, je možné se do nich usadit s nohama na střeše jako na lesní posed. A ony ty srnky, zajíci i divočáci opravdu přijdou!
A když vystrčíte nos ze Zašívárny, doběhnete třeba k Vírské přehradě, zajdete si na Vírskou Via Ferratu, kdo bude mít kola rozjede se na Traily Vír (nejlepší traily na Vysočině), nebo dáte kochací procházku k rozhledně Horní les - spousta možností na Vysočině - mrkněte na naše tipy.

Description:

Bienvenido a El Oso Andaluz, un encantador hostel en el corazón de San Martín de los Andes, a solo 30 minutos del famoso Cerro Chapelco. Nuestro hostel es el lugar ideal para los amantes de la naturaleza y los deportes de invierno, ofreciendo una experiencia acogedora y accesible para todos.

Sobre Nosotros:

El Oso Andaluz nació con la misión de brindar un espacio cómodo y económico para viajeros de todo el mundo. Nos enorgullece ofrecer un ambiente cálido y familiar, donde cada huésped se siente como en casa.

Instalaciones:

Desayuno Incluido: Disfruta de un delicioso desayuno cada mañana.

Nuestro Entorno:

San Martín de los Andes es el destino perfecto para aventureros y amantes de la naturaleza. Desde nuestro hostel, tienes fácil acceso a actividades al aire libre como esquí, snowboard, trekking y pesca. El Cerro Chapelco, con sus impresionantes pistas, es uno de los principales atractivos, ofreciendo diversión para esquiadores de todos los niveles.

Compromiso:

En El Oso Andaluz, nos comprometemos a ofrecer un servicio de calidad, creando un ambiente inclusivo y amigable. Estamos aquí para hacer de tu estancia una experiencia inolvidable, brindándote consejos y recomendaciones para que disfrutes al máximo de San Martín de los Andes.

Síguenos:

Name: Poiana Stelelor
Description:
Porneste de la un vis alaturi de noi!

În vârful unui deal, într-o poiană pitorească, se află Poiana Stelelor,  destinația perfectă pentru odihnă și relaxare. Căsuțele noastre sunt locul perfect pentru a scăpa de agitația vieții de zi cu zi și a vă bucura de o liniște bine meritată.Din momentul în care  ajungeți veți fi inconjurați de câmpuri verzi și păduri luxuriante,  oferind o atmosferă cu adevărat liniștită. Fie că sunteți în căutarea unei escapade romantice sau a unui loc în care să evadați cu familia și prietenii, Poiana Stelelor este o destinație perfectă.  La Poiana Stelelor  credem că toată lumea ar trebui să se poată bucura de natură în forma sa cea mai pură. Faceți o plimbare prin împrejurimi sau vă relaxați în atmosfera liniștită a căsuțelor noastre.  Așteptăm cu nerăbdare să vă întâmpinăm în curând în Poiana Stelelor.

Recent am infiintat o cultura de lavanda, in scurt timp va vom inmiresma spatiul cu produsele derivate din aceasta.

Name: B&B La Collina dei Ciliegi
Description:
Ci troviamo in uno degli scenari rurali più suggestivi del Nord Italia, a pochi minuti di auto dalle più affascinanti realtà cittadine del Piemonte quali Gavi, Alessandria, Novi Ligure, Acqui Terme e Tortona.

A Castellania, a pochi chilometri da Cassano Spinola, sorge il museo dedicato a Fausto Coppi. Su queste colline cominciarono gli allenamenti del Campionissimo nato nel 1919, destinato poi a diventare il mito sportivo degli anni 40 e 50, in Italia e in Europa, quando si aggiudicò nello stesso anno  (1949) il Giro d’Italia e il Tour de France. La Collina dei Ciliegi è la base ideale per le vostre escursioni in bicicletta grazie ai servizi dedicati ai cicloturisti.

Una dolce pedalata sulle strade di Fausto e Serse Coppi è il modo migliore per apprezzare il morbido profilo del paesaggio collinare e le infinite sfumature cromatiche, dal verde estivo all'intenso rosso autunnale tipico dei vigneti locali. Sono infatti le vigne, il frutteto e i boschi che caratterizzano l’ambiente tranquillo e silenzioso che circonda la nostra accogliente dimora. Da qui potrete partire per piacevoli passeggiate a piedi e in bicicletta o raggiungere in auto prestigiose cantine vinicole come Vigneti Boveri, aziende agricole, quieti e suggestivi borghi tra il Piemonte e la vicinissima Liguria. I buongustai sapranno apprezzare gli agriturismi e le sagre che costellano il nostro territorio assieme alle rassegne enogastronomiche di prestigio come Dolci  Terre di Novi. I piu' avventurosi saranno entusiasmati dalla vicinanza all'Adventure Park Val Borbera e al Bob&Downhill Park Val Curone. Divertimento per grandi e piccoli anche all'Acquapark BolleBlu e all'Outlet McArthurGlen di Serravalle  Scrivia.

Name: Ramandire Bed and Breakfast
Description:
Nestled in the serene and peaceful suburb of Jackaroo Park in Witbank, also known as eMalahleni, Ramandire Bed & Breakfast provides a welcoming and cozy retreat. 

With its charming atmosphere, it offers an ideal escape for both business and leisure travelers. The B&B features 7 spacious, en-suite bedrooms, each thoughtfully equipped with modern amenities such as heaters and bar fridges for your comfort. 

Stay connected with complimentary Wi-Fi, and rest assured knowing your vehicle is safe in our secure parking area. For added relaxation, guests can unwind in the inviting communal lounge, complete with a TV, or make use of the fully equipped kitchen, which includes a microwave, oven stove, kettle, sandwich maker, and fridge. 

Whether you’re cooking a meal or just enjoying a cup of coffee, the kitchen has everything you need. Guests can enjoy the tranquil beauty of our garden or take a peaceful stroll through our vibrant vegetable garden, where fresh produce thrives. And meet Rex, our loyal guard dog, who adds an extra layer of warmth and security to the B&B. For your convenience, we offer laundry services, transportation, and the option to enjoy lunch and dinner meals, available upon request for an additional fee. 

Need a space for meetings? We also provide a small conference facility, comfortably accommodating up to 22 guests.

Il giardino privato di 80 metri quadrati è un vero angolo di paradiso, perfetto per colazioni all'aperto, cene romantiche o semplicemente per godersi la tranquillità e la vista spettacolare sul lago.

In un'atmosfera magica, l'Incanto del Trasimeno vi aspetta per regalarvi momenti indimenticabili.

Vi aspettiamo!

Rajawali Homestay Sleman memberikan Anda solusi hemat biaya untuk bermalam di Yogyakarta dengan harga yang terjangkau. Selain harga yang kompetitif, Rajawali Homestay Sleman juga menawarkan fasilitas lengkap yang dapat memenuhi kebutuhan Anda selama menginap di Yogyakarta. Dengan demikian, Anda dapat menikmati liburan di Yogyakarta dengan nyaman tanpa perlu khawatir dengan biaya akomodasi yang mahal.
Rajawali Homestay Sleman memastikan bahwa Anda akan merasa puas dengan pelayanan yang kami berikan selama Anda menginap di tempat kami. Tim kami selalu siap memberikan bantuan dan layanan terbaik untuk memenuhi kebutuhan Anda selama menginap di Yogyakarta. Dengan suasana yang hangat dan ramah, kami yakin bahwa Anda akan merasa seperti di rumah sendiri di Rajawali Homestay Sleman.
Lokasi Rajawali Homestay Sleman yang strategis membuat Anda dapat menikmati keindahan Yogyakarta dengan mudah. Berada di jantung kota, kami berlokasi dekat dengan tempat-tempat wisata populer dan akses transportasi yang mudah.

Dnes, i když mlýn již neslouží svému původnímu účelu, stále zde můžete cítit atmosféru minulých let a nasávat historickou atmosféru této půvabné stavby. Welcome to Calgary's premier luxury vacation rental company, where exceptional experiences await you. Whether you're seeking a short-term getaway or a long-term escape, our curated selection of upscale properties is designed to elevate your stay to new heights.

Indulge in the lap of luxury as you explore the vibrant city of Calgary, Alberta. Our handpicked collection of lavish properties boasts exquisite amenities and top-notch services, ensuring that every moment of your stay is nothing short of extraordinary.

From chic downtown condos with panoramic views to elegant suburban estates nestled in picturesque surroundings, we offer a diverse range of options to suit your preferences and desires. Discover the true essence of refined living, where seamless attention to detail meets unrivaled hospitality. Our dedicated concierge team is here to cater to your every need, making your stay as smooth and enjoyable as possible.

Whether you're in town for a quick luxurious escape or planning an extended getaway to explore the wonders of Alberta, our luxury short and long-term vacation rentals provide an exceptional backdrop for unforgettable memories.

Experience Calgary like never before, and let us make your stay a seamless blend of comfort, style, and sophistication. Welcome to a world of luxury at its finest. Welcome to Homey Homez.

Name: Chelsea Mountain Meadows
Description:
Chelsea Mountain Meadows is a retreat property set on 100 private acres in Chelsea, Vermont — reopening in May 2026 as a place that restores itself as it restores the people who come here.

We’re deeply engaged in land stewardship: rewilding meadows, reintroducing pasture rotation, refreshing the orchard, renewing the spring-fed pond, and weaving a Grace Trail through miles of wooded paths to bring this century-old horse farm back to a landscape that thrives naturally.

The farmhouse itself is being redesigned as a quiet escape for families to gather, for teams to reset, and for leaders to reconnect with purpose. Fireside book nooks, hidden gardens, and sweeping mountain views offer spaces for connection, reflection, and meaningful time together.

Discover modern comfort, held by a timeless place.

Name: Lay Day Uluwatu Surf & Party Hostel
Description: We're excited to announce that our brand-new hostel in Uluwatu is NOW OPEN! Join us during our exciting soft-opening period and be among the first to experience Uluwatu's newest hot spot. With a whopping 168 dorm beds and 5 private rooms, it's the ultimate playground for adults. Our concept blends the perfect mix of party, surf, and chill that you’d expect in any vibrant surfer's paradise! Our lively bar keeps the drinks flowing all day long, ensuring the party never stops. Plus, there's a massive pool just a few steps away for those refreshing dips. At Lay Day, we invite you to dive headfirst into our way of life - catch you there!

Creamos un espacio donde la vida en la Patagonia se equilibra con la conservación. Un proyecto que integra parcelas para construir refugios patagónicos, un hostel boutique, un café de especialidad y un parque privado que resguarda el paisaje.

Name: Le Lodge Keraën
Description:
Gîte "urbain" dans une maison de village atypique au cœur de Clermont L'Hérault. La déco mélange les genres et vous emmène dans différentes périodes (des années 70 à nos jours) et dans différentes régions (de la Bretagne à l'Hérault). Conçu pour 2 personnes uniquement, la chambre située au dernier étage, est équipée d'une climatisation réversible, et vous transporte dans un univers de cabine de bâteau avec son ambiance marine, aux objets chinés sur les marchés et sur les plages.
Dans la pièce de vie principale, vous trouverez une cuisine toute équipée, une salle d'eau pensée comme une verrière (cabine de douche, WC et machine à laver) et un coin salon aux nombreux rangements dotée d'une TV connectée.

Name: Ocean Vibes Inn
Description:
Located in Cape Town, Ocean Vibes Inn offers beachfront bed and breakfast accommodations a walking distance away from Blouberg Beach and has facilities like free bikes, a garden and a terrace. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a 24-hour front desk and full-day security, along with free Wifi throughout the property. Extra facilities include luggage storage space, meeting rooms, a tour desk and ironing service.

Rooms contain a private bathroom, while certain rooms are equipped with a balcony and others also feature a sea view.

A continental, full English/Irish or vegetarian breakfast is available each morning at the property.

The guest house has an outdoor fireplace.

Ocean Vibes offers a business center, laundry service and free private parking.

CTICC is 10 miles from the accommodation, while Robben Island Ferry is 11 miles from the property. The nearest airport is Cape Town International, 14 miles from Ocean Vibes, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 8.9 for a two-person trip.

Name: The Kings Throne Inn and Guest House
Description:
The Kings Throne Inn and Guest House is a historic accommodation nestled in the heart of the Old West End neighborhood in Toledo, Ohio. This charming establishment offers a unique blend of history, comfort, and hospitality to travelers from around the globe.

Originally constructed in 1892, The Kings Throne Inn has been meticulously preserved to retain its original charm while incorporating modern amenities to ensure a delightful stay for guests. The inn boasts a rich history, reflecting the architectural grandeur of a bygone era.

Upon arrival, guests are greeted by the picturesque façade of the inn, which exudes Old World charm and elegance. Stepping inside, they are transported back in time, surrounded by exquisite period furnishings, intricate woodwork, and architectural details that evoke the essence of a bygone era.

The Kings Throne Inn offers a variety of accommodation options to suit the preferences and needs of every guest. Whether visitors seek a cozy room for a romantic getaway, a spacious suite for a family vacation, or a tranquil retreat for a solo traveler, the inn provides a range of beautifully appointed rooms designed to ensure a comfortable and memorable stay.
Each room at The Kings Throne Inn is thoughtfully decorated with a blend of antique furniture and modern conveniences, creating a welcoming atmosphere that invites relaxation and rejuvenation. Guests can unwind in plush beds adorned with luxurious linens, take in views of the surrounding neighborhood from large windows, and enjoy amenities such as complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen television, and private bathrooms.

Name: Bed & Breakfast Achter de Duinen
Description:
Bed & Breakfast Achter de Duinen is een gloednieuwe B&B op een unieke plek in Den Haag. Hier slaap je met maximaal 2 personen (en baby) in een stijlvolle, met liefde verbouwde garage waar comfort en sfeer hand in hand gaan. Vanuit je appartement ben je zo op het strand én het bruisende Haagse centrum.

Het 'tiny house' van 30m2 heeft een eigen entree en bestaat uit een knusse slaapkamer met een comfortabel tweepersoonsbed, moderne badkamer, sfeervolle woonkamer met kitchenette en voortuin. Alles is aanwezig voor een onbezorgd verblijf.

Op vr, za en zo verblijden we je graag met een ontbijtje. Daarnaast bieden we diverse extra’s die jouw verblijf nét dat beetje specialer maken, zoals verhuur van fietsen, een strandpakket en VR-bril.
We helpen je ook graag op weg als je op zoek bent naar tips voor unieke uitjes, bijzondere restaurants of verborgen pareltjes in de omgeving.

Name: HyemStays
Description:
Built for the people who build everything else.

HyemStays provides specialist contractor accommodation across the North East, supporting the workforce behind construction, engineering, infrastructure, utilities, and major projects.

We offer fully serviced houses and apartments designed specifically for contractors and project teams. Our accommodation is practical, comfortable, and reliable — with strong Wi-Fi, convenient locations, and consistent standards that support long working days and early starts. Whether you need short-term accommodation or long-term stays, HyemStays makes booking and managing contractor accommodation straightforward.

We work with project managers, operations teams, and decision-makers who need accommodation they don’t have to think about. By providing dependable contractor accommodation across the North East, we help businesses reduce admin, control costs, and look after their people — so teams can stay focused on delivery, not logistics.

HyemStays is built around clarity and responsiveness. We offer flexible booking options, clear communication, and accommodation solutions that adapt to changing project requirements. From mobilising new teams to supporting ongoing projects, we act as a reliable accommodation partner, not just a provider.
Based in the North East, we have strong local knowledge and a growing portfolio of contractor accommodation in key locations across the region. Our serviced accommodation is suitable for individual contractors, small teams, and larger workforce requirements.

If you’re planning a project, relocating a team, or need dependable contractor accommodation in the North East, HyemStays is ready to support you.

Built for the people who build everything else.
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear

Name: Luna Africana by Palmer
Description:
Villas Luna Africana es un hotel boutique ubicado en el encantador Puerto Viejo de Talamanca, Costa Rica. Nuestro hotel se distingue por ofrecer una experiencia única en el Caribe costarricense, donde la serenidad y la belleza natural son protagonistas.

Nuestras exclusivas villas, rodeadas de exuberante vegetación tropical, cuentan con balcones y terrazas privadas que brindan vistas impresionantes y un ambiente de paz. Estamos estratégicamente situados a poca distancia de algunas de las playas más hermosas de la región, como Cocles y Playa Chiquita, permitiendo a nuestros huéspedes disfrutar del sol, la arena y el mar en un entorno paradisíaco.

En Villas Luna Africana, nos dedicamos a ofrecer un servicio excepcional y personalizado. Nuestro equipo se esfuerza en cuidar cada detalle para que cada huésped se sienta como en casa, desde la meticulosa limpieza hasta la atención personalizada de nuestros anfitriones.

Ya sea que busques una escapada relajante, aventuras en la naturaleza, o simplemente un lugar para desconectar, Villas Luna Africana es el destino perfecto.

Descubre la magia del Caribe costarricense en un entorno de lujo, confort y tranquilidad.

Description:
Come and visit a Finnish farm, where cows graze and tractors rumble. If you want, you can join the daily routines of the dairy farm and see how food is produced.

You can stay in an apartment located in the farmhouse, in a shed house or even a tree tent in a forest pasture. There is a delicious breakfast and things to do both in the yard and in the nearby nature.

The swimming beach can be reached by bike and within a short drive there are nature trails, canoe routes, traditional finnish dance pavilions, skiing slopes and a village pub.

Ollinaho’s farm is located in Kangasniemi in the middle of Finland and it is suitable as a stopping place whether you are moving from south to north or west to east. The easiest way to get to the place is by car, but you can also arrive at the nearby Hankasalmi train station.

Name: HHvilla-Malindi
Description:
Nestled in the enchanting coastal town of Malindi, Kenya, this stunning villa is a celebration of Swahili architecture and natural beauty. Designed to reflect the rich cultural heritage of the region, the villa offers a perfect blend of tradition and modern comfort. With 6 beautifully designed rooms (including 3 spacious bedrooms and 3 cozy cottages, each featuring indoor-outdoor living spaces and a kitchenette), a pristine blue pool, a lush garden, and a rejuvenating spa, this property is your ultimate retreat.  

The Villa: A Masterpiece of Swahili Architecture 
The villa’s design is inspired by the timeless elegance of Swahili architecture, characterized by its intricate wooden carvings, arched doorways, and coral stone accents. The  open windows and open spaces allow natural light to flood the interiors, creating a bright and airy atmosphere. Every detail, from the handcrafted furniture to the locally sourced decor, reflects the cultural richness of Malindi, making the villa a true homage to its surroundings.  

The Bedrooms: Comfort Meets Swahili Elegance 
The villa features three spacious bedrooms,The rooms are furnished with plush beds, soft linens, and traditional Swahili decor, ensuring a peaceful.

Activities and Experiences

Your stay at the villa can be as active or as relaxed as you want it to be. Here are just a few ways to make the most of your time:

    Poolside Relaxation: Spend your days lounging by the pool, reading a book, or enjoying a cool drink.

    Garden Exploration: Take a leisurely stroll through the garden, discover its hidden corners, or enjoy a picnic on the lawn.

    Outdoor Dining: Host a barbecue or dine al fresco under the stars.

    Cottage Cooking: Use the kitchenette to prepare light meals or snacks, enjoying the convenience of your own private space. 

Book Your Stay
Ready to experience the magic of this Swahili-style villa in Malindi? Book your stay today and start planning your dream escape.

Description:
Évadez-vous à BerryDome, un écrin de romantisme pensé pour les couples en quête d'une parenthèse intime, élégante et inoubliable.
Situé à Saint-Priest-la-Marche, en pleine nature, BerryDome vous accueille dans l’un de ses deux dômes au design raffiné, avec spa privatif, terrasse, lit king-size, climatisation et mini-bar. Un mélange parfait entre confort haut de gamme et immersion en pleine nature.

Imaginez-vous sous un ciel étoilé, dans un spa chauffé, loin du tumulte quotidien… Ici, chaque détail est conçu pour favoriser la reconnexion, la détente et les émotions fortes.

Offrir BerryDome, c’est offrir bien plus qu’une nuit : c’est proposer un moment suspendu, une parenthèse pour célébrer un anniversaire, un mariage, Noël ou simplement dire «je t’aime».

Nos bons-cadeaux Glamping sont disponibles toute l’année et personnalisables, pour faire plaisir à ceux que vous aimez ou vous faire plaisir tout simplement.

Plus qu’un séjour, BerryDome est une expérience sensorielle, une invitation à ralentir, à savourer l’instant présent, et à repartir avec des souvenirs gravés à jamais.

Name: Seaview Villa Norfolk
Description:
Seaview Villa is a stunningly refurbished 5 Bedroom 3 storey Victorian villa in the heart of Sheringham. It is a very handy 100 meters from the sea and High Street and is a quiet location.

The bedrooms have luxurious antique beds with the most comfortable mattresses that even Goldie Locks would love. It has five beautifully decorated bedrooms sleeping a maximum of ten. There are three double rooms, one single and one versatile room at the very top which can be a double with a single bed or three singles. The master bedroom has an ensuite,  there is a further family bathroom and ground floor shower room.

A spacious living room with 3 sofas, large multi media tv connected to BT TV to watch or record your favourite shows while you are playing at the beach. A open plan bespoke fitted kitchen, spacious dining room with a cd player and wi-fi radio.

The bespoke fitted kitchen offers a Range master electric cooker, large Smeg fridge freezer, Smeg dishwasher, washer dryer and a pantry with additional larder fridge and freezer ideal for those large family gatherings.

The garden has covered seating area and two picnic tables and a BBQ ideal for summer parties in the garden.

We allow up to 2 well behaved small dogs, but respectfully ask you to keep them on the ground floor and off the soft furnishings, so please don’t forget your dog beds.

Whether you're seeking relaxation, adventure, or personal growth, Garden of Dreams Collective offers a sanctuary where you can reconnect with yourself and nature. Join us for an unforgettable journey of transformation and tranquility.

Name: Bed en Bedford
Description:
Laat de drukte achter je en dompel je onder in een oase van rust in onze Tiny House, gehuisvest in een klassieke Bedford vrachtwagen in het pittoreske Maasdorp Lith in Noord-Brabant.  Het is niet zomaar een overnachting: het is een unieke, plattelandse ervaring! Deze accommodatie zal je betoveren met zijn landelijke inrichting, te midden van onze fruitgaard  en vrolijke kippen. 

Over ons  Wandel- en fietsroutes in de buurt Mail naar info@bedenbedford.nl voor boekingen en beschikbaarheid

Stel je voor dat je 's avonds onder de sterrenhemel ligt , omringd door de rust van de natuur en de geur van onze eigen fruitbomen. Als je 's ochtends wakker wordt, word je verwelkomd door het getjilp van vogels  en het gekakel van onze kippen. Het platteland was nog nooit zo knus en bijzonder. 

Onze Bedford vrachtwagen biedt alle voorzieningen die je nodig hebt voor een comfortabel verblijf. De verwarmde Bedford is uitgerust met een heerlijk, ruim tweepersoonsbed  (170 x 210), een eigen toilet , stromend water , koffie -en theefaciliteiten , een oventje  en voor de échte waaghalzen een buitendouche. 

Lith is omringd door menig fiets of wandelknooppunt langs de prachtige Maas.  Tevens mag een bezoek aan de Maxima sluizen niet ontbreken. De bourgondiërs laten zich verwennen bij het gezellige dorpsrestaurant.

Name: Luz en el Cielo Eco-B&B/ Hostel
Description:
Be lulled to sleep by the sound of the breaking waves and wake up to wildlife. Enjoy the company of the local monkeys every day of your stay as you relax on the veranda.

Luz en el Cielo is your home in the jungle: the town of Montezuma is just around the corner; the famous waterfalls a short hike away; a wildlife preserve, the best surfing beaches in Costa Rica and a National Park all a short driving distance from the lodge.

Whether you crave ocean, jungle, or a hip, artistic town, Montezuma is the place for you. Luz en el Cielo B&B provides guests with an unforgettable, homey, welcoming, experience in Montezuma. From the moment you arrive to the moment you leave, you will be making memories to last a lifetime during your stay at Luz en el Cielo.

See you in Paradise.

Name: Maita Guest
Description:
Story about us
At Maita, we believe that true comfort is found in both the little details and grand experiences. Founded with a passion for hospitality and a love for gathering people together, Maita is a space where everyone can unwind, feel welcome, and experience a bit of luxury mixed with the warmth of home. Located just moments away from local malls and hospitals, Maita offers the perfect balance of convenience and tranquility. Whether you’re here for business or pleasure, our guest house combines accessible city living with peaceful retreat-like amenities, including a refreshing pool, a cozy fire pit, and a traditional braai area perfect for socializing and savoring great food.

Our vision for your stay
Maita was created for those seeking more than just a place to sleep – it’s a place to recharge, connect, and find joy in the journey. Our goal is to make each guest feel at home, and our team is dedicated to ensuring that your stay is memorable, comfortable, and filled with delightful surprises. We look forward to welcoming you to Maita, where every stay becomes a cherished memory.

Name: On 9th Street Guesthouse
Description:
Welcome to On 9th Street Boutique Guesthouse, your serene escape in the heart of Johannesburg. Nestled just 4.5 km from Parkview Golf Club, our guesthouse offers a tranquil retreat with top-notch amenities.

 

Relax by our outdoor swimming pool, enjoy the lush garden, or unwind in our shared lounge. We provide free private parking and high-speed fibre WiFi throughout the property for your convenience.

Our guesthouse is environmentally friendly, powered by solar energy, ensuring a sustainable and reliable stay. It features a shared kitchen and a delightful terrace, perfect for socializing and enjoying the beautiful surroundings. We also offer a grill area for those who love outdoor cooking.



Each of our air-conditioned rooms is designed for comfort and style, equipped with a seating area, flat-screen TV with cable channels, and a private kitchen and dining area. You'll find complimentary toiletries, a shower, and a hairdryer in the en-suite bathrooms. Select rooms include a balcony with garden views, adding an extra touch of luxury. Each room also has its own coffee station with a Nespresso machine, ensuring you can start your day with a perfect cup of coffee. All rooms are provided with fresh bed linen and towels.

Conveniently located, On 9th Street Boutique Guesthouse is 10.1 km from Sandton City Mall and 10.5 km from Gautrain Sandton Station. The nearest airport, Lanseria International Airport, is just 29 km away.



Whether you're here for business or leisure, we offer a peaceful and comfortable stay with all the modern amenities you need. Come experience the best of Johannesburg at On 9th Street Boutique Guesthouse.

Name: Transylvania Escape
Description:
Welcome to Transylvania Escape Retreat, a haven crafted for nomads seeking a unique blend of tranquility and adventure. Nestled in the captivating landscape of Richiş, Transylvania, our retreat offers a harmonious escape from the ordinary.

Immerse yourself in a community that celebrates diversity, with our spacious courtyard providing a haven for both work and relaxation. Our thoughtfully designed accommodations, including well-equipped apartments and cozy double rooms, ensure your comfort and convenience.

Explore the picturesque surroundings, from the enchanting Biertan Fortified Church just 6 km away, to the exhilarating hiking and cycling trails that await your discovery. Engage in shared experiences with fellow nomads in our communal lounge area, or find solitude in our serene garden.

For those seeking an immersive cultural experience, our village comes alive with vibrant festivals, yoga classes, music concerts, and theater plays. Connect with locals from 12 different minorities and embark on a journey of exploration and enrichment.

At Transylvania Escape Retreat, we understand the needs of nomads, and our commitment is to provide a welcoming atmosphere, reliable amenities, and a touch of artistic inspiration. Whether you're working remotely or taking a break from the digital world, join us in this captivating corner of Transylvania for a truly unforgettable escape.

Name: Cubez Hostel
Description:
Ubicado en el corazón de Viladrau, cerca de Barcelona, Cubez Hostel Viladrau es una opción ideal para quienes buscan naturaleza, aventura y opciones de alquiler en Montseny. Rodeado por el Parque Natural del Montseny y la cordillera de las Guilleries, es más que un lugar para dormir: es el punto de partida para explorar la zona.

Comienza el día con aire puro y vistas al bosque. Ya sea que vengas a hacer senderismo por el Camí de Matagalls, disfrutar del turisme rural en Montseny o simplemente descansar, aquí encontrarás tranquilidad y acceso directo a la naturaleza.

Como alternativa acogedora al típico camping Montseny bungalows, ofrecemos habitaciones cómodas, espacios compartidos, y áreas comunes pensadas para conectar con otros viajeros.

Desde rutas hasta la Riera Major hasta paseos por el casco antiguo, cada día tiene algo nuevo. Estamos cerca del Hostal La Guineu en Viladrau, y muchos visitantes nos descubren buscando fotos del Hostal La Guineu o leyendo reseñas sobre Les Piscines del Montseny, puntos de referencia en la zona.

Por la noche, ofrecemos cenas locales y fogatas, creando un ambiente relajado bajo las estrellas.

En Cubez Hostel Viladrau, el equipo local te guiará con recomendaciones reales y rutas poco conocidas para que aproveches tu estancia al máximo.

Reserva hoy y vive el Montseny como un local.

Nosso objetivo é compartilhar com você, que aprecia a saúde e a beleza, a excelência em qualidade de vida e todo o bem-estar, mantendo uma completa harmonia com o meio ambiente. Trabalhamos com o compromisso e a visão de fazer um lugar que seja parte da paisagem de nossa região, ajudando a proteger os recursos naturais e promovendo uma nova ideia de ecoturismo. Temos como meta incentivar um modo de vida saudável, para que nossos hóspedes sintam-se à vontade para voltar periodicamente e desfrutar do mesmo conforto, paz e hospitalidade.

Name: Hartzell House
Description: Hartzell House Bed & Breakfast is a casually luxurious 7000-square-foot B&B in Addison, PA. It is a handsome example of Carpenter Gothic Victorian fused seamlessly with Craftsman style. Our lodging accommodations are comfortably appointed throughout with furnishings chosen to pamper and please our discerning guests. Name: ApartmanTorysa
Description:
Good day everyone,
I'm delighted to tell you a bit about our family-run serviced apartments nestled in the heart of Prešov, Slovakia. We've been welcoming business travellers since our establishment, creating what we like to think of as a proper home-from-home for our guests.
You see, whilst we're a boutique accommodation provider, we rather pride ourselves on combining that signature Slovak hospitality with all the modern amenities one expects from a professional business stay. Think of us as your cosy pied-à-terre in Eastern Slovakia, if you will.
What sets us apart, if I may say so, is our rather unique blend of business practicality and family warmth. We've furnished each apartment with dedicated workspaces and lightning-fast WiFi, naturally, but it's our personal touch that truly makes the difference. Whether you need an early morning airport transfer arranged or fancy a recommendation for the best spot for your business dinner, we're always on hand to help.
Our location is rather splendid too - right in the city centre, you're merely a stone's throw from all the main business districts and corporate offices. Perfect for those busy days of meetings and conferences.
We understand that business travel can be rather taxing, which is why we've ensured each apartment offers a peaceful retreat after a long day. No fuss, no bother - just comfortable, quiet spaces where you can properly unwind or catch up on work if needed.
Do feel free to reach out if you'd like to learn more about our accommodations or if you have any questions. We're quite looking forward to potentially welcoming you to our little corner of Slovakia.

Name: ROMA ECO LODGE AND STAYS
Description:
An ageless adventure where you are enhancing your inner beauty. The lodge is the epitome of comfort and facilities according to the environment. With an eccentric personality, the lodge is fun, funky, trendy, and offbeat. The architecture and interior design of the lodge are as unique as its operations, but always upscale and often combining local cultural details with chic elegance. An impressive experience in the remote village of Uttarkashi, book your stay in “ROMA ECO LODGE AND STAYS”.

Offering a private room, personal wooden cabins, a modular kitchen with a living area, and a library with an attached balcony from where one can have an uninterrupted majestic view of snow caped peaks of Swargarohini. Guest rooms are individually decorated, and use upscale linens and exclusive amenities. When here, enjoy the forest walking, heritage walks, village walks, stargazing, birdwatching, cooking with local families in the village, trekking, and many more mountaineering expeditions.

5 wood cabins made from raw unseasoned Pine Wood keeping the local cultural integrity in mind. “Roma Eco Lodge” has a distinct character, intentional design, and personalized services. Expect only the best hospitality and individualized experience in the most rural area of Uttarkashi and care from the team who go above and beyond to ensure the satisfaction of every guest. If seclusion in the midst of nature is on your mind, this forested lodge is best for you. If you desire the unfailing companionship of nature, the chirping of birds as your morning alarm, and unbroken, verdant pathways, snow caped mountains as far as the eye can see, this cabin-style lodge is ideal for your next vacation. For adventure seekers, there’s a forest camping nearby a high-altitude lake, in addition to birdwatching, stargazing, and zip-line.

#adventuretravel #travelbug #travelandleisure #trekking #tourpackages #wanderlust #solotravel #romaecolodgeandstays #romacafe #uttarakhand #hiking #offbeat #naturetrips

Name: Oceanview Hot Tubs
Description:
Welcome to Oceanviewhottubs.com - Your Gateway to Coastal Paradise!
Nestled along the rugged and picturesque coastline, Oceanviewhottubs.com offers the ultimate oceanfront escape you've been dreaming of. Our luxurious vacation rentals boast breathtaking ocean views, the soothing serenade of crashing waves, and unforgettable experiences that will make your stay truly magical.

Oceanfront Luxury: Perched majestically on the edge of the world, Oceanviewhottubs.com offers a rare chance to stay in the lap of luxury right on the oceanfront. Each of our nine units offers unobstructed panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean, and the sound of the waves provides the ultimate soundtrack to your getaway.

Private Hot Tubs: Retreat to your own personal oasis with a private hot tub in every unit. Sink into the bubbling warmth as you watch the sun dip below the horizon, casting a tapestry of colors across the sky. It's not just a hot tub; it's a front-row seat to nature's grand performance.

Wildlife Wonderland: Keep your eyes peeled for the enchanting wildlife that calls this coastal paradise home. Deers, foxes, pelicans, quail, whales, sea lions, and otters are just a few of the neighbors you might encounter during your stay. This is a wildlife lover's dream!

Whale Watching: Step out onto your private balcony or deck, binoculars in hand, and be prepared to witness the mesmerizing spectacle of whales breaching and spouting in the deep blue sea. Whale watching from your own hot tub - a memory to cherish.

Stargazing Heaven: When night falls, our location is a stargazer's paradise. With minimal light pollution, you'll be treated to a breathtaking view of the Milky Way. Our hot tubs were even the perfect spot for watching the celestial visitor, Comet Neowise, in July.

Sport and Adventure: Whether you're into sport fishing, hiking, surfing, or golfing, you'll find the perfect activities to fulfill your adventurous spirit.

Name: POUSADA AMORIM BABAÇULÂNDIA - TO
Description:
Descubra Babaçulândia e Hospede-se na Pousada Amorim

A apenas 60 km de Araguaína, Babaçulândia, Tocantins, é um destino turístico imperdível, conhecido por sua rica beleza natural e atrações diversificadas. A cidade, carinhosamente chamada de "Capital do Turismo", oferece uma combinação perfeita de aventura e relaxamento, tornando-a o local ideal para uma escapada inesquecível.

Belezas Naturais e Atrações

Uma das maiores atrações de Babaçulândia é a sua impressionante coleção de cachoeiras. Com 14 cachoeiras situadas nas proximidades, a região é um verdadeiro paraíso para os amantes da natureza. Cada cachoeira oferece um cenário espetacular e águas cristalinas, perfeitas para um mergulho revigorante ou simplesmente para contemplar a beleza do entorno. Explorar essas maravilhas naturais é uma experiência que promete encantar e renovar.

Para aqueles que preferem atividades aquáticas, Babaçulândia oferece passeios em barcos, caiques e catamarãs pelos seus rios e lagos. Esses passeios proporcionam uma perspectiva única da paisagem local, permitindo aos visitantes relaxar e apreciar a serenidade das águas enquanto observam a flora e fauna típicas da região.

Hospedagem Confortável na Pousada Amorim

Localizada a apenas 50 metros da orla de Babaçulândia, a Pousada Amorim é a escolha ideal para sua estadia. Nossa pousada oferece 16 quartos confortáveis e bem equipados, com ar-condicionado, Wi-Fi gratuito e TV por satélite, garantindo uma experiência agradável e relaxante.

Comece o dia com um delicioso café da manhã incluído em sua estadia e aproveite o ambiente acolhedor e tranquilo da nossa pousada. A localização central facilita o acesso às atrações locais e à orla, permitindo que você aproveite ao máximo o que Babaçulândia tem a oferecer.

Entre em Contato

Para reservar sua estadia ou obter mais informações sobre a Pousada Amorim e as atrações de Babaçulândia, entre em contato conosco:
Whatsapp - 63 3448 1139

Name: CHÂTEAU PAPOUNAN
Description:
Welcome to Château Papounan, a charming 19th-century guesthouse nestled in the heart of the Saint-Estèphe vineyards in the Médoc. Our home is surrounded by renowned wine estates, just 25 minutes from the Atlantic beaches and an hour from Bordeaux. While we are fortunate to have lovely views of the Garonne estuary, what our guests seem to appreciate most is the warm welcome. They often tell us they feel like they're visiting old friends. 

We love sharing our passion for the region by helping people discover local vineyards, recommending good restaurants, and sometimes even sharing a glass of wine in our garden. We cultivate a plot of vines ourselves, adjacent to the château. After winter pruning, trellising, vine training, and the September harvest, the grapes are combined with those from the local cooperative to produce "Marquis de Saint-Estèphe".

Name: Shree Vinayaka
Description:
Welcome to Shree Vinayaka – A Sanctuary of Serenity in the Heart of Varanasi 

Shree Vinayaka is a tranquil retreat located in the spiritual and cultural epicenter of Varanasi, offering a unique blend of peace and convenience.  Nestled near some of the city's most revered landmarks such as the Kashi Vishwanath Temple and Dashashwamedh Ghat, we provide a serene refuge for those seeking spiritual rejuvenation, cultural exploration, or simply a peaceful escape from the bustling streets. 

Our retreat is designed to immerse you in the timeless charm of Varanasi while ensuring a comfortable and restful stay. Whether you are a pilgrim, a tourist, or a seeker of inner peace, Shree Vinayaka offers an experience that caters to your soul.  The atmosphere is calm, creating a perfect environment for reflection and relaxation, while our central location gives easy access to the vibrant life of Varanasi, including its traditional eateries, cafes, and local markets. 

At Shree Vinayaka, we believe in the philosophy of "Atithi Devo Bhava" (The Guest is God) , and our team strives to provide personalized hospitality that feels like home.  Every detail, from our well-appointed rooms to our thoughtfully designed common areas, is curated to ensure a stay that is both enriching and memorable. 

We are more than just a place to stay; we are a sanctuary where you can connect with the ancient spiritual energies of the city, explore its rich history, and unwind amidst its timeless beauty.  Our guests often find that Shree Vinayaka offers the perfect balance of peace, comfort, and connection to Varanasi’s soul.

Come stay with us and experience Varanasi in its purest form – through the lens of tranquility and spiritual connection at Shree Vinayaka.

Name: Fourhouses Kft
Description:
Fourhouse Kft. – Accommodation Solutions Nationwide
Fourhouse Kft.'s core profile is providing medium to long-term accommodation services for companies employing domestic and international workers, with a special focus on Shared Service Centers (SSCs), all at a standard that meets labor market demands. Our goal is to provide reliable and comfortable homes for your employees across the country.

Currently, the majority of our active accommodation facilities are located in Budapest and Pest County (225 guests), Transdanubia (230 guests), and Hajdú-Bihar County (100 guests). Our offerings are continuously expanding to meet evolving needs.

Unterkunfts-Lösungen Landeskweit
Das Kernprofil der Fourhouse Kft. ist die Bereitstellung von mittel- bis langfristigen Unterkunfts-Dienstleistungen für Unternehmen, die in- und ausländische Mitarbeiter beschäftigen, mit besonderem Schwerpunkt auf Shared Service Centern (SSCs). Wir bieten einen Standard, der den Anforderungen des Arbeitsmarktes entspricht. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihren Mitarbeitern landesweit zuverlässige und komfortable Unterkünfte zu bieten.

Aktuell befinden sich die meisten unserer aktiven Unterkünfte in Budapest und im Komitat Pest (225 Personen), in Transdanubien (230 Personen) und im Komitat Hajdú-Bihar (100 Personen). Unser Angebot wird kontinuierlich erweitert, um den sich ändernden Bedürfnissen gerecht zu werden.

Szállásmegoldások Országosan
A Fourhouse Kft. fő profilja a közép- és/vagy hosszútávú szálláshelyszolgáltatás, amelyet belföldi és külföldi munkavállalókat foglalkoztató cégek, kiemelten az SSC-k (Shared Service Centerek) számára biztosítunk, a munkaerőpiaci igényeknek megfelelő színvonalon. Célunk, hogy megbízható és kényelmes otthont biztosítsunk munkavállalóinak országszerte.

Jelenleg aktív szálláshelyeink többsége Budapesten, Pest megyében (225 fő), a Dunántúlon (230 fő), és Hajdú-Bihar megyében (100 fő) helyezkedik el. 

Kínálatunk folyamatosan bővül, hogy a változó igényeknek is eleget tegyünk.

Le Nostre Soluzioni Abitative

Casa Bastia propone soluzioni flessibili per ogni esigenza:

* Ampio Bilocale (fino a 4 persone): Goditi spazi generosi con una confortevole camera matrimoniale e due divani letto singoli nella zona living. Ideale per famiglie o piccoli gruppi che desiderano comodità e privacy.

* Ampio Monolocale con Balconcino Relax (fino a 3 persone): Un ambiente moderno e accogliente, dotato di un divano letto matrimoniale e un letto alla francese per una terza persona nell'angolo notte. Perfetto per chi cerca una soluzione pratica e stilosa, con uno spazio esterno per momenti di relax.

* Wi-Fi ad alta velocità
* Aria condizionata per un clima sempre ideale
* Comoda lavanderia

La Posizione Ideale

La zona di Scalo Romana non è solo strategica per la vicinanza a poli di interesse, ma anche estremamente comoda per la vita quotidiana. Troverai un'ampia scelta di ottimi ristoranti, bar, supermercati e, per la massima comodità negli spostamenti, mezzi pubblici proprio sotto casa.

Scegli Casa Bastia per un soggiorno a Milano che unisce stile, comfort e una posizione invidiabile.

Localizado em Santo Antônio do Pinhal em um cenário privilegiado, você estará próximo a diversas atrações locais, como trilhas naturais, cachoeiras e pontos turísticos históricos. Permita-se explorar as maravilhas da região durante o dia e, à noite, retorne ao seu chalé para relaxar em meio à paz e à privacidade que ele proporciona.
Location: Santo Antônio do Pinhal, São Paulo

Name: Casa El Zorzal
Description:
Casa de color oliva y aromas de ensueño. Donde las horas se miden por los colores del cielo, y las brisas son caricias del viento. Abrid puertas y ventanas, dejad que la luz sea también su dueño. Que las noches se os hagan día, y el alba os despierte de este sueño.

Casa el Zorzal es una gema en plena naturaleza extremeña. Data de 1860, y se encuentra rodeada de encinas y olivos, en una finca de 10.000 m2, con vistas privilegiadas a la campiña extremeña. La casa rural tiene una categoria 4* y cuenta con todo lujo de detalles.

La zona se denomina Sierra de los Lagares, perteneciente a la pedanía del Pago de San Clemente, a pocos kilómetros de las Trujillo, Cáceres o Mérida. Este lugar es una de las zonas con mayor biodiversidad de Europa, siendo un paraíso natural para la ornitología, contando con el Parque Nacional de Monfragüe. Además, es una zona maravillosa para disfrutar del astroturismo por la escasa contaminación lumínica.

Nuestra casa rural mantiene su encanto tradicional, conservando aún las bóvedas de arista típicas de la zona. En sus 380m2 de espacio interior cuenta con cuatro habitaciones, tres baños y capacidad para 10 personas (y sus mascotas). En su exterior, rodeado de olivos, encinas y otros árboles frutales, encontramos la piscina, varias zonas de relax, y para los más activos, una cancha de mini-fútbol.

Casa el Zorzal está ubicada a pocos kilómetros de ciudades llenas de historia y tesoros del patrimonio como Trujillo, Cáceres, Guadalupe o Mérida. A corta distancia encontramos el Parque Nacional de Monfragüe, un paraíso para ornitólogos, o el Geoparque Villuercas-Ibores-Jara, cerca de Guadalupe.

Name: Mirleft COOLHOUSE
Description:
Firemní teambuilding, který dává smysl. Zažijte s týmem off-site jinak. Spojte práci, networking a dobrodružství v inspirativním prostředí s výhledem na oceán. Perfektní kombinace coworkingu, surfování a relaxace – jen pár hodin letu od vašeho kanclu! 

Single Fin COOLHOUSE na vás čeká v horách, a to jen 10 min autem od surfařské vesnice Taghazout v Maroku.  Věřte, že když změníte prostředí, změníte i způsob myšlení. Víme o čem mluvíme. Pod křídla si vás totiž vezmeme my, Češi, co to máme pod palcem. Dva z našeho týmu tu dokonce bydlí, tak se těšíme, až se tu s vámi potkáme! 

Představte si, že byste na pár dní vyměnili svůj kancl za terasu v horách s výhledem na oceán.  Představte si, že vás ráno místo kolony přivítá jen slunce a klid. Dočetli jste to až sem? Tak to o tom už při nejmenším přemýšlíte! Napište nám do zpráv a rádi cokoliv probereme.

Description:
The Turtle House, Morjim is a serene and thoughtfully designed 7-bedroom villa offering a premium homestay experience in the peaceful coastal belt of North Goa. Just a short distance from Morjim Beach, the villa provides an ideal blend of comfort, privacy, and relaxation, making it suitable for families, large groups, professionals on workations, celebration travellers, and long-stay guests seeking a calm retreat.

The villa features spacious air-conditioned bedrooms, warm natural lighting, and garden-facing balconies that create an inviting and homely atmosphere. Guests enjoy exclusive access to a private swimming pool, a fully equipped kitchen for self-cooking, a cozy projector room for entertainment, and multiple lounge areas perfect for unwinding. Its pet-friendly policy ensures that guests travelling with pets feel equally welcome and at home.

The Turtle House is located in the heart of Morjim, close to Ashwem Beach, Mandrem, Chapora Fort, popular cafés, restaurants, yoga retreats, and boutique stores. Despite its proximity to these attractions, the villa maintains a peaceful environment, allowing guests to relax away from the typical tourist noise. With Mopa Airport just a short drive away, the location is convenient for both domestic and international travellers.

Known for its clean interiors, spacious layout, and attentive service, the villa offers a refreshing alternative to crowded hotels. Every aspect of the stay—right from check-in support to in-house convenience—aims to deliver a smooth and memorable experience. Whether guests are planning a family holiday, a birthday celebration, a weekend getaway, or an extended stay in Goa, The Turtle House provides the comfort, space, and tranquility they are looking for.

The focus remains simple: peaceful vibes, warm hospitality, and a stay that guests remember long after they leave.

Com total conforto e comodidade, a Vila Lilo espera por você, sua história de amor ou sua próxima experiência!

Installé dans de magnifiques longères en pierre du XVIIIᵉ siècle, entièrement rénovées, le domaine accueille des voyageurs venus de France et d’ailleurs pour vivre une expérience chaleureuse et ressourçante.

À seulement quelques minutes des plages, de Vannes et des paysages emblématiques du Morbihan, notre domaine propose des hébergements de charme au sein d’un environnement naturel préservé, avec parc paysager, étang et piscine couverte chauffée. La qualité de notre accueil est reconnue par nos hôtes, avec une excellente note de satisfaction et des avis élogieux soulignant le confort, le calme et l’attention portée aux détails.

Original brick and hardwood floors, and exterior ensure the 1895 beauty isn't discarded. Enjoy overlooking the historic park and being 5-7 minutes from the most coveted urban and tourist attractions of the area.  

Enjoy the remnants of global travel and collector’s art and furnishings, both comfortable and luxurious. A stone's throw from the Old Market, Blackstone, Midtown, UNMC and Creighton. Overlooking the Historic Park, and a short walk to the local trails. Comfort is assured with luxury mattresses to ensure your coffee ritual isn’t to make up for lost sleep!

This fully furnished corporate rental boasts the love and care of a private owner who has collected art and furnishings as it were her own home.  Your host works to ensure your stay is fun, comfortable and peaceful. 

Each space is roughly 1900 square feet, with work space, 3 bedrooms, an enormous master suite, and 2.5 bathrooms.  Baths and kitchen are modernized, as is lighting and furniture, with some midcentury, antiques, and global pieces creating an eclectic space to call your own.  Offering short-term and long-term rentals, and the capacity to offer all three units for reunions or events when planned in advance.  

2-car private garage, plenty of street parking, private laundry, private entrance, small, private deck, and shared gigantic veranda overlooking the park.

Habitaciones cómodas y bien equipadas: Diseñadas para tu descanso, con todo lo necesario para una estadía placentera.

Ambiente familiar y atención personalizada: Nos enorgullecemos de brindar un servicio cercano y amable, haciendo que cada huésped se sienta como en casa.

Ubicación privilegiada: Estamos estratégicamente situados para que puedas explorar fácilmente los principales atractivos de Santa Clara, cerca de los lugares de interés histórico, cultural y social.

En Hostal Ana y Arley, tu comodidad y satisfacción son nuestra prioridad. Ofrecemos desayuno casero, orientación sobre los lugares de interés a visitar,  servicio de lavandería, para asegurar que tu estancia sea perfecta.

Ya sea que viajes por negocios o por placer, te invitamos a descubrir un lugar donde la hospitalidad cubana cobra vida.

Planifica tu próxima aventura y reserva tu estancia con nosotros!

Visita nuestro sitio web para ver más detalles y hacer tu reserva: 

https://sites.google.com/view/ana-y-arley-hostal/inicio

Laureles, en Medellín, se llevó el primer puesto en la lista de barrios "más cool del mundo" de 
Time Out. (Imagen cortesía de la alcaldía de Medellín)
 (CNN) -- Laureles, en la animada ciudad colombiana de Medellín, fue elegido como el barrio "más 
cool del mundo" en 2023 por la revista Time Out.

Servicios y comodidades:
Casas para reuniones familiares y grupos de amigos. El hostal ofrece habitaciones y aparta estudios equipados para grupos, con opciones que incluyen baño privado, ropa de cama y vistas al jardín. 

Conexión Wi-Fi gratuita: Los huéspedes pueden disfrutar de acceso a internet en todas las áreas del establecimiento. 

Jardín y terraza: Espacios al aire libre ideales para el descanso y la convivencia. 

Cocina equipada: Algunas unidades cuentan con cocina completa, incluyendo nevera, horno y fogones, facilitando la preparación de alimentos para estancias prolongadas. 

Servicios adicionales: El hostal ofrece servicio de limpieza  y organización de tours para enriquecer la experiencia de los huéspedes. 

Políticas del establecimiento:
Horario de entrada y salida: El check-in se realiza a partir de las 15:00 y el check-out hasta las 12:00. 

Prohibición de fiestas: No se permiten despedidas de soltero/a ni fiestas similares, garantizando un ambiente tranquilo para todos los huéspedes. 

El Hostal Saveva se destaca por su ambiente acogedor y su compromiso con la satisfacción de las necesidades de familias y grupos que buscan un lugar confortable para descansar y disfrutar de Medellín.

Name: The Beach Cottage Kappad
Description:
The Beach Cottage Kappad: a beautiful example of traditional Kerala architecture comprising of 3 well appointed, fully air conditioned bedrooms with satellite TV and the most popular streaming apps in all rooms. 

The cottage comes with an outside dining area, outside bar, swing, water feature and gorgeous cultural murals.The property also has a variety of fun games for all ages , a huge collection of books and films for guests to use at their leisure.

The cottage is situated next to Kappad Beach, which is wide and open and features a few parks and playgrounds  - perfect for relaxing the whole day away. Kappad Beach is steeped in history as in 1498, Vasco-da-Gama landed here, sparking the development of the European spice trade in India. It is also the most charming of India’s Blue Flag beaches and a winner of the Green Destination Award, therefore the water and sand on the beach are of the highest quality making it a truly beautiful location. 

The property has caretakers (a lovely married couple) who live on site to help make sure the rooms and grounds are clean and to provide you with anything you may need. They have their own living quarters so all rooms and facilities will be entirely your own. 

A fantastic destination for honeymoons, holidays, weekends away and celebrations. Ideal for travellers looking for a place where privacy is paramount.

Name: Chez Céline Sous Les Pins
Description:
Venez découvrir le calme de la nature environnante à Chez Céline Sous les pins avec son jardin entièrement clôturé et sa piscine. Situé dans le petit village de Vielle St Girons, le long de l'Océan Atlantique, notre gîte offre des balades uniques dans un calme absolu, des séances de surf à seulement 5 min, des kilomètres de pistes cyclables tout autour, la plage et le lac à quelques minutes, le tout avec en option des sessions de yoga, de Pilates, des massages, des Breakfast et panier repas sur commande... Il n'y a plus qu'à vous détendre et vous ressourcer, aux chants des oiseaux et la beauté des paysages alentours.

La maison vous propose une ambiance et décoration tendance, tout en profitant du confort le plus moderne !

Dans un rayon d'une heure de voiture, se trouvent Dax, Bayonne, Biarritz, Hossegor.

Name: Unter Der Linde

De quoi ressentir une véritable ambiance d’autrefois dans une ferme viticole Alsacienne typique

Plus qu'un simple séjour un voyage dans le temps et l'espace !

Nos chambres d’hôtes entièrement rénovées en 2016 bénéficient du meilleur confort avec lit « Queen size » et literie 4*, douche à l'italienne, Wifi gratuit ...

Vous pourrez aussi profiter de la piscine et du parc pour vous rafraichir et vous délasser en revenant de vos visites.

Name: Munlai Community Tourism
Description:
A mesmerizing two-hour ride from Bandarban town takes you to Munlai, a tranquil para of 60 Bawm households. The spectacular setting amidst hills and the river Sangu, lets you experience the exquisite lifestyle of the Bawm community through homestay and culinary expedition, thrilling treks, kayaking, country’s longest zip-line and many other adventures. You can choose to relax or have a rush of adrenaline in this fully managed facility. Come visit us, we are waiting for you.

Munlai is the first ever community tourism initiative of the country with the core philosophy to restore, develop and sustain the Bawm community, its culture and heritage.

Name: Hollewand Guesthouse
Description:
Welkom op de Hollewand!
Wil je even uitrusten, rustig werken of juist lekker actief bezig zijn? Kom dan naar deze landelijke gelegen gastenverblijf in Zwolle. De appartementen zijn gevestigd in een bijna 100 jaar oud gebouw dat vroeger onderdeel was van het nabijgelegen landgoed Zandhove.

Hollewand Guesthouse beschikt over 2 appartementen van ieder ca. 100 m2 en is voorzien van alle gemakken voor een kort of lang verblijf. De woonkamer is sfeervol ingericht, heeft comfortabele stoelen,  een heerlijke bank, en een 4K Smart TV.

Door de mooie ligging aan het bos en nabijgelegen golfterrein met een ruim uitzicht, een privé parkeerplaats en een eigen ‘achterom/opgang’ heb je veel privacy en rust.

De Hollewand ligt aan de rand van Zwolle. Door zijn ligging aan het  bos, fietspaden, naastgelegen golf terrein en 15 fietsminuten van hartje Zwolle is de Hollewand een ideale uitvalsbasis om lekker te genieten van de buitenlucht. Op de vele routes kunt je er rustig wandelen, fietsen of actief bezig zijn met je mountainbike of paard.

Op het naastgelegen golfterrein ‘de Golftuin’ kunt u indien gewenst een balletje slaan of genieten van een hapje /drankje in ‘De Orangerie’, de gezellige horecagelegenheid van Golftuin Zwolle.

In Zwolle centrum kunt u genieten van mooie terrassen, goed eten, musea en de heerlijke sfeer die de stad Zwolle zo kenmerkt.

Name: Villa Mooi Canggu
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Canggu, Villa Mooi Canggu is a hidden gem that offers the best of both worlds – a peaceful and private retreat whilst being only 9 minutes by scooter from all the vibrant beaches, restaurants and clubs like Finn's that make Canggu so popular. With a beautiful pool and plenty of space to relax, Villa Mooi Canggu is the perfect place to stay to enjoy all that Canggu has to offer.

We provide for free:
🗸 everyday cleaning service
🗸 fresh towels
🗸 rocket fast internet

The living room is a great place to relax after a long day. The couch is comfortable and there is a smart TV for entertainment. The kitchen is fully equipped with everything you need to cook up a feast.  The bedrooms have a ensuite bathroom, comfortable king-size beds and plenty of storage space for your belongingsand. 

Berawa Beach is a world-famous surfing destination, and it's just minutes away from the private villa. The villa is also close to other popular beaches, like Echo Beach and Batu Bolong Beach. 

There's plenty of space to relax outdoors, with a private pool, a sundeck and outdoor shower. And if you need to stay connected, there's fast internet throughout the property.

Name: Brakkerhus
Description:
Vi har skabt vores lille perle “Brakkerhus”, som består af luksus hytterne  ”Bench” & ”Dutch” og en smuk gårdsplads med pavillion, fordi vi gerne vil dele vores begejstring for de mange timer vi tilbringer, der hvor kragerne vender.

Hvad enten du trænger til ro efter en lang arbejdsdag, søger en base for dine vandre- eller cykelture eller bare ønsker at stå af ræset i et par dage, så er du mere end velkommen på “Brakkerhus”.

Om boligen …

Vores luksus hytter er på 20 m2 og har plads til 2 sovende gæster. Tilbring natten i den behagelige kontinental dobbeltseng, og nyd det moderne badeværelse.

Spisebordet er et klap-bord, og kan nemt klappes op og ned, hvilket hurtigt forvandler gulvpladsen fra et spisehjørne til et hyggehjørne, med bekveme lænestole.

Køkkenet er meget veludstyret med 4 kogeplader, en indbygget ovn, et køleskab, samt gode knive og gryder. 

Hvis vejret er til det, kan maden nydes  i cafesættet  på den private vestvendte veranda på 8 m2.

Name: B&B Aria di Mare
Description:
Crediamo nelle esperienze autentiche e nel tocco personale, ed è proprio questo che vi offriamo: una base amichevole e cordiale da cui partire all’esplorazione di San Vito Lo Capo e dintorni.

Le nostre camere sono ideali per rilassarsi dopo un'escursione nelle limitrofe riserve o una giornata al mare. Tutte le stanze a tema sono climatizzate e dotate di bagno privato; una è ubicata al piano terra invece le altre sono al primo piano e godono di un terrazzo privato.

Inoltre la struttura ricettiva è composta da vari spazi comuni arredati, ad esempio il patio e il solarium vista.

Il B&B aria di mare è il luogo perfetto per tutte le coppie e le famiglie in viaggio che qui grazie ai nostri servizi su misura e alla nostra professionalità, avranno sia la possibilità di divertirsi e fare sport sia di rilassarsi e stare a contatto con la natura, lontano dai rumori e dalla frenesia della città.
