Name: Sandy Hook
Description:
Te midden in een van de prachtige bossen die Norg rijk is, ligt het sprookjesachtige vakantiehuis, de Sandy Hook. Een perfecte plek om echt tot rust te komen, om er lekker actief op uit te gaan en om gezellig met elkaar samen te zijn. Het rietgedekte dak die de Sandy Hook omhult, geeft het huis een sprookjesachtige ambiance.

De Sandy Hook staat op een perceel van 1000m2, deze ruimte maakt het verblijf in de Sandy Hook zeer aangenaam.
Het woon- en eetgedeelte is huiselijk ingericht, met oog voor het knusse bosgevoel. De open gashaard is een echte eyecatcher. De landelijke keuken is ingericht met een 6 pits gasstel, een fraaie oven en een koel-vries combinatie. Het vrije bosgevoel is met lekker weer nog meer naar binnen te halen d.m.v. de openslaande terrasdeuren, die grenzen aan de woonkamer.

Op de eerste verdieping treft u 3 slaapkamers (2 met balkon), de douche en toilet.
De 4e slaapkamer bevindt zich op de 2e verdieping.
De boxspringbedden zijn voorzien van kussens en synthetische dekbedden. Laken- en handdoekenpakketten liggen voor u klaar.

Voor kinderen is in het huis aanwezig: een box, 2 kinderstoelen, wipstoeltje, co-sleeper (incl. matras), kinderbedje (incl. matras), babybadje, commode met aankleedkussen. Buiten is het voor kinderen fijn spelen door de aanwezigheid van een trampoline, glijbaan en schommels.

Er is een ruime schuur aanwezig.

Met de fiets bent u zo in het centrum van het pittoreske Norg, hier vindt u gezellige terrasjes, kroegjes en winkels.

Name: Quinta das Quintãs & Spa
Description: In between Baião and Régua, on a steep slope in front of the Douro River, you will find a rural property where silence, tranquility and the encounter with nature are ex-libris.  We believe that after your stay at Quinta das Quintãs you will have increased strength to return to your daily life. Our property, in the same family for over 100 years, has 30 hectares, which are divided into forest, vineyards, orchards and pastures. As a result of the owner's passion for animals, the farm has a surprising wide variety of animals, with which our guests can interact during their stay. For the accommodation of its guests, the house has 5 bedrooms with capacity for 2 people, 2 T0 studios with capacity for 2 people. for 2 people, 2 T1 houses with capacity for 4 people and 2 T2 houses with capacity for 6 people. On the property there is an indoor spa and an outdoor spa that delight those who visit us. Children are delighted to spend time with animals and playing in the children's park.

Name: Sunflower apartment city center, Plovdiv
Description:
Sunflower Apartment City Center is located in the heart of the city of Plovdiv. The apartment is private, located in a new residential building. It consists of a spacious living room and dining room with kitchenette, bedroom, bathroom with toilet and balcony. For the convenience of guests, the apartment offers a covered garage. It is modern and comfortably furnished. All the necessary amenities are provided for a perfect stay. It is suitable for guests traveling for business or pleasure, for couples or families. The hostess provides a compliment for her guests, coffee/tea. The friendly hostess is available to assist their guests at any time. Transfers from / to Plovdiv Airport and from / to Sofia Airport are provided upon additional request and payment.
The property  is located in a quiet central street of Plovdiv. The city’s main pedestrian street is meters away, along which you will reach many historical and cultural sites. Be sure to visit the Central City Garden and the Singing Fountains, under the sounds and lights of which you'll immerse you in the blissful tranquility of a green paradise. The walk along the Main pedestrian sreat of Plovdiv will take you to Jumaya Mosque Square, where you will see the Ancient Stadium Philippopolis, from here you can stop at Nebet Tepe, where the millennial Old town of Plovdiv stretches or continue to Kapana with its various cafes and bars. In the Old Town, don't forget to take your souvenir photos of the Ancient Roman Theater, where every year in the summer months a number of concerts and cultural events are organized, Balabanov House, Hindlian House, Ethnographic Museum and others. If your stay gives you time, stop by Plovdiv Rowing Canal Park. A number of European and World rowing competitions are held here. There are opportunities for cycling and other sports.

Name: PARS Inspired by bees
Description:
Our life on planet earth is completely dependent on the nature around us. Being and living means not losing touch with nature and taking care of nature. Taking care of your health, taking care of nature and environment. The idea of a healthy relationship between nature and man lies at the core of the brand's philosophy.
Beekeeping and bee therapy are a unique manifestation of the connection between nature and man. It has been proven that contact with nature, particularly contact with bees, has a positive effect on a person's physical and mental health. The whole package of bee related experience is world famous thanks to apitourism. PARS offers a package of apitourism services in Armenia.

Մեր կյանքը երկիր մոլորակի վրա ամբողջությամբ կախված է մեզ շրջապատող բնությունից։ Լինել ու ապրել նշանակում է չկորցնել կապը բնության հետ եւ հոգ տանել բնության մասին։ Հոգ տանել սեփական մարմնի առողջության մասին, հոգ տանել բնության ու միջավայրի մասին։ Բնության ու մարդու միջեւ առողջ հարաբերությունների գաղափարն ընկած է բրենդի փիլիսոփայության հիմքում։
Բնության եւ մարդու կապի յուրատեսակ դրսեւորում է մեղվապահությունը եւ մեղվաթերապիան։ Ապացուցված է, որ բնության հետ կապը՝ մասնավորապես մեղուների հետ կապը, դրական ազդեցություն է թողնում մարդու ֆիզիկական եւ հոգեկան առողջության վրա։ Մեղուների հետ կապված փորձառության ամբողջ փաթեթը աշխարհում հայտնի է ապիտուրիզմի շնորհիվ։ PARS-ը հանդես է գալիս Հայաստանում ապիտուրիզմի ծառայությունների փաթեթով։

Name: Meo Design Suites & Spa
Description:
In pieno centro storico, di fronte ad una delle chiese più belle della Catania barocca, la Basilica Maria Santissima dell'Elemosina, meglio conosciuta come la Basilica della Collegiata, nasce Meo Design Suites & Spa, un piccolo resort con Spa che si affaccia sul lato Est di via Etnea poco più a nord del palazzo dell'Università.
 Il suo nome -Meo- significa in dialetto catanese "mio", ed è stato ideato da Simona Cosentino di Iraci Architetti per rappresentare  quel concetto di intimità personale che ha ispirato la ristrutturazione degli spazi. Chi pernotta in una delle camere deve sentirsi libero di esprimere, anzi vivere, sé stesso. A sottolineare questa impostazione concettuale di pieno e intimo possesso dello spazio da parte di chi vi alloggia, ciascuna delle camere è stata denominata con la traduzione in dialetto dei pronomi personali o possessivi della lingua italiana.

Name: B&B Verde Salento

Its strategic position, in Galatone, makes it possible to visit all the important places in Salento with ease, without having to worry about the chaos of tourist cities.

Name: Chambres d'hôtes La Quérière entre Beauval et Chambord
Description:
Nos 4 chambres d'hôtes sont situées dans une ancienne ferme de Sologne, dans le Loir et Cher. La maison a été rénovée avec des matériaux écologiques, isolation avec laine de chanvre, panneaux solaires chauffants, pompe à chaleur, pompage de l'eau du puits pour l'arrosage. 
Les chambres sont spacieuses et décorées sur le thème des fleurs. Elles  disposent d'une entrée individuelle, d'une douche et toilettes séparées, d'une bouilloire avec sucres, cafés, thés, infusions, une télévision TNT, un réseau wifi gratuit, de la documentation touristique, des serviettes/gants de toilette et les lits sont faits à votre arrivée. Une place de parking est dédie à chacune de nos chambres, sur un terrain clos et sécurisé.
En pleine nature, au pied de la forêt et d'étangs pour de belles balades, des jeux pour enfants, prenez le temps de vous reposer, de prendre un grand bol d'air. Depuis notre maison, vous rayonnez en 30 minutes, vers le zoo de Beauval, les châteaux du Val de Loire, les jardins, les villages, musées pittoresques et sites troglodytiques , les activités nautiques, aériennes, équestres, nature, en trottinette, avec un âne ou en 2CV, visites gourmandes et viticoles, baignade et bien-être, 
Un petit déjeuner copieux et gourmand, fait maison, des produits locaux, sont servis dans la salle à manger familiale ou sous la tonnelle, face au bassin d'agrément. Nos 2 chevaux, la chèvre, le chien et le chat apprécient les caresses.
Le tarif inclut : la nuitée, le petit déjeuner, la taxe de séjour, le ménage de fin de séjour. La recharge de votre voiture électrique est facturée en sus.

Name: AMAZEBNB
Description:
At AMAZE BNB, we are committed to providing exceptional property management services that exceed expectations. With a deep understanding of the property management market and a passion for delivering personalized solutions, we manage a diverse portfolio of Studios, 1BHK/2BHK/3BHK and villas.
Our team of dedicated professionals is driven by a client-first philosophy. We believe that every property, whether a single-family home or a multi-unit complex, deserves the highest level of care and attention. From guest relations and property maintenance to financial management and legal compliance, we offer comprehensive services that ensure your investment is not only protected but also thrives.
With years of experience in the industry, we have developed a reputation for reliability, transparency, and excellence. We understand that effective property management is about more than just maintaining buildings—it's about building relationships. That's why we work closely with property owners and service providers to create harmonious living and working environments.
Whether you're a property owner looking to maximize your investment or a tenant seeking a well-managed space to call home, AMAZE BNB is here to provide the professional, reliable, and responsive service you deserve.

Name: Casa Vicentica i Polo
Description: Disfruta de una estancia tranquila y rodeado de naturaleza en el corazón del parque natural del Delta de l'Ebre. Una casa del 1956 recién remodelada, equipada y muy acogedora. Donde podréis cocinar, comer, tomar un refrigerio en su gran porche, disfrutar de la fresca y de espectaculares atardeceres. Descansar en las 4 grandes y cómodas habitaciones completamente equipadas. Dar una vuelta por su espacioso terreno y campo. Y sobre todo haga tiempo, tome su tiempo. Esta es nuestra filosofía.

Name: Chalet de la Forêt des Reys
Description:
**Bienvenue au Chalet de la Forêt des Reys** 
Situé dans l'écrin verdoyant de la station-village de Crest-Voland Cohennoz, le Chalet de la Forêt des Reys est bien plus qu'un simple gîte, c'est une porte ouverte sur la beauté des Alpes du Nord. Ici, la nature est reine, et chaque fenêtre offre un tableau vivant sur les forêts de montagne , les pistes de ski et les chemins de randonnée. Nous sommes entre la chaîne des Aravis et le massif du Mont-Blanc. 

 **Un Engagement pour la Nature** 
Engagés dans la préservation de notre environnement magnifique, nous mettons un point d'honneur à respecter et à valoriser la nature qui nous entoure. Nous faisons tout pour avoir une démarche durable et voulons être un ambassadeur du slow tourisme. 
*** Gîte classé Refuge pour la biodiversité par LPO ***

 **Une Expérience Chaleureuse en Montagne** 
Nous vous proposons de séjourner dans un gîte chaleureux offrant tout le confort nécessaire . Que vous soyez skieur ou un passionné de randonnées, un amoureux de la faune et de la flore, ou simplement à la recherche d'un havre de paix, notre gîte est ouvert toute l’année. 

 **Activités pour Tous** 
Au Chalet de la Forêt des Reys, chaque saison a son charme et ses activités. Ski, randonnée, VTT, rencontres culturelles, gastronomie savoyarde ou simplement se ressourcer au cœur des forêts du Val d’Arly.

 **Réservez Votre Séjour ** 
Découvrez la station-village de Crest-Voland Cohennoz au cœur du Val d’Arly en Savoie. Réservez dès maintenant pour une expérience ski & nature au Chalet de la Forêt des Reys – idéal entre amis et en famille.

Name: RELAX ZONE VRCHOVINA
Description:
Ať už plánujete firemní setkání, rodinnou oslavu, sportovní víkend nebo romantickou svatbu, Relax Zone nabízí soukromí, komfort a inspirující atmosféru.

Místo se nachází v malebné krajině blízko Českého Ráje, kde pole, pastviny a lesy vytvářejí jedinečné prostředí pro odpočinek i aktivní vyžití. Celý areál je uzavřený, což vám zajišťuje naprosté soukromí. Po dobu vašeho pobytu budete mít vše jen pro sebe – žádní jiní hosté, jen váš tým, rodina nebo přátelé.

Ubytování nabízí 25 pohodlných lůžek rozdělených do 5 prostorných apartmánů. Každý apartmán je zařízený s důrazem na pohodlí a soukromí, abyste si mohli užít zasloužený odpočinek. K dispozici je také společenská místnost s krbovými kamny a otevřenou plně vybavenou kuchyní – ideální prostor pro večerní posezení, týmové porady nebo společné stolování.

Areál dále zahrnuje:
- saunu, která vám pomůže načerpat energii a zrelaxovat tělo i mysl,
- venkovní bazén se slanou vodou, kde se můžete osvěžit během teplých dní,
- multifunkční halu, kterou lze přizpůsobit vašim potřebám – od sportovních aktivit, až po školení, prezentace nebo cvičení,
- velkou travnatou plochu s výhledem na okolní krajinu, ideální pro venkovní aktivity, hry nebo třeba večerní grilování,
- hniště, kde si můžete vychutnat společné chvíle u táboráku pod hvězdnou oblohou.

Součástí areálu jsou i zastřešené terasy, kde můžete relaxovat za každého počasí. Příroda, která obklopuje Relax Zone, nabízí nekonečné možnosti – od klidných procházek až po sportovní aktivity a týmové hry.

Relax Zone je více než jen místo k přespání. Je to prostor, kde vznikají nezapomenutelné okamžiky. Ať už chcete stmelit svůj tým, oslavit životní jubileum, užít si sportovní víkend, nebo si říct své „ano“ na romantickém místě, náš areál nabízí zázemí, které splní vaše očekávání.

Poskytneme individuální přístup a možnost přizpůsobit celý prostor vašim potřebám. Ať už potřebujete prostor pro školení, odpočinek nebo zábavu, v Relax Zone najdete vše, co hledáte.

Name: Boho Thikana
Description: Driven by a passion for hospitality and a love for the tranquil mountains of Bir, Himachal Pradesh, I lead the management of Boho Thikana, a charming retreat nestled amidst breathtaking vistas. With a commitment to providing guests with unforgettable experiences, Boho Thikana offers a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life. Our cozy retreat features four thoughtfully designed rooms, each equipped with modern amenities and adorned with bohemian-themed decor. From stunning views of the Dhauladhar ranges to warm hospitality and personalized attention, we strive to create a welcoming environment where guests can reconnect with themselves and nature. As a pet-friendly establishment, we warmly welcome furry companions to share in the mountain experience. With a dedication to sustainability, we prioritize eco-conscious practices, including using organic food in our kitchen and reducing our carbon footprint wherever possible. Whether guests seek adventurous paragliding experiences, guided hikes to nearby waterfalls, or simply a tranquil setting to unwind, Boho Thikana aims to be their home away from home in the Himalayas.

Name: BIKES BEERS BED & BREAKFAST
Description:
Welcome to Bikes Beers Bed & Breakfast, where we cater to motorcycle enthusiasts and other travelers. 
Our B&B is located at the gateway to Kerry and the rest of South West Ireland, surrounded by breathtaking scenery and winding roads. We offer secure parking for your motorbike, as well as a range of amenities designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible. We also offer a hearty breakfast each morning, so you can fuel up before hitting the road. 
If you are an adventurous soul our B&B is the perfect base for exploring Ireland.

Name: Gargi Residency
Description:
Welcome to our hostel, nestled in the heart of the coaching region since 2005. Just a brisk 5-6 minute walk from the renowned Allen Career Institute and a mere 10 minutes from other leading coaching classes, we pride ourselves on being one of the oldest and most trusted establishments in the area.

Our hostel has been a stepping stone for numerous successful students, with many securing coveted spots in prestigious colleges like AIIMS, AFMC, various IITs, NITs, and more. Specializing in nurturing the aspirations of India's future doctors and engineers, we offer a conducive environment for rigorous preparation for NEET, JEE, and medical examinations.

What sets us apart is our commitment to catering to both students and parents alike. With separate rooms and family accommodations available, we ensure that everyone feels at home. Our tailored packages offer comprehensive amenities including accommodation, nutritious meals, high-speed WiFi, laundry services, and essential utilities, all at the best and most affordable rates.

Being a family-run establishment, we prioritize the quality of student life and the food we serve. With over 18 years of experience in catering to the needs of students and their families, we understand the importance of fostering a supportive and disciplined environment conducive to academic success.

For more information on how we can support your academic journey, please don't hesitate to reach out. Your success is our priority.

Name: Dar Riad Jomana
Description:
Located in Marrakesh and with Bahia Palace reachable within a 2-minute walk, DAR Riad Jomana has concierge services, non-smoking rooms, a garden, free WiFi throughout the property and a terrace. Featuring a bar, the riad is close to several noted attractions, around one mile from Boucharouite Museum, a 16-minute walk from Djemaa El Fna and 1.1 miles from The Orientalist Museum of Marrakech. The riad provides an indoor pool and a tour desk.
At the riad, the rooms are equipped with a desk, bed linen and a patio with a garden view. The private bathroom is equipped with a bidet, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All rooms at DAR Riad Jomana feature air conditioning and a closet .

Name: Dimoraeroom.com
Description:
Dimoraeroom was born from a simple observation: travelers to Italy deserve better value, and property owners deserve to keep more of what they earn. The traditional booking platforms charge high commissions that drive up prices for guests while cutting into hosts' earnings.
We're changing that. By focusing exclusively on Italy and charging significantly lower fees, we create a win-win situation: guests save money, hosts earn more, and everyone experiences authentic Italian hospitality without the hefty platform fees.
Our team personally verifies every property to ensure quality and authenticity. We're not just a booking platform—we're your partners in creating memorable Italian experiences.
